authors_text: Haoran You,Baopu Li,Zhanyi Sun,Xu Ouyang,Yingyan Celine Lin
title: SuperTickets: Drawing Task-Agnostic Lottery Tickets from Supernets via Jointly Architecture Searching and Parameter Pruning
title_zh: SuperTickets：通过联合架构搜索和参数修剪从超级网绘制与任务无关的彩票
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) has demonstrated amazing success in searching for efficient deep neural networks (DNNs) from a given supernet. In parallel, the lottery ticket hypothesis has shown that DNNs contain small subnetworks that can be trained from scratch to achieve a comparable or higher accuracy than original DNNs. As such, it is currently a common practice to develop efficient DNNs via a pipeline of first search and then prune. Nevertheless, doing so often requires a search-train-prune-retrain process and thus prohibitive computational cost. In this paper, we discover for the first time that both efficient DNNs and their lottery subnetworks (i.e., lottery tickets) can be directly identified from a supernet, which we term as SuperTickets, via a two-in-one training scheme with jointly architecture searching and parameter pruning. Moreover, we develop a progressive and unified SuperTickets identification strategy that allows the connectivity of subnetworks to change during supernet training, achieving better accuracy and efficiency trade-offs than conventional sparse training. Finally, we evaluate whether such identified SuperTickets drawn from one task can transfer well to other tasks, validating their potential of handling multiple tasks simultaneously. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on three tasks and four benchmark datasets validate that our proposed SuperTickets achieve boosted accuracy and efficiency trade-offs than both typical NAS and pruning pipelines, regardless of having retraining or not. Codes and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/SuperTickets.

In this paper, we discover for the first time that both efficient DNNs and their lottery subnetworks (i.e., lottery tickets) can be directly identified from a supernet, which we term as SuperTickets, via a two-in-one training scheme with jointly architecture searching and parameter pruning. Moreover, we develop a progressive and unified SuperTickets identification strategy that allows the connectivity of subnetworks to change during supernet training, achieving better accuracy and efficiency trade-offs than conventional sparse training. Finally, we evaluate whether such identified SuperTickets drawn from one task can transfer well to other tasks, validating their potential of handling multiple tasks simultaneously. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on three tasks and four benchmark datasets validate that our proposed SuperTickets achieve boosted accuracy and efficiency trade-offs than both typical NAS and pruning pipelines, regardless of having retraining or not. Codes and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/SuperTickets.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 在从给定的超网络中搜索高效的深度神经网络 (DNN) 方面取得了惊人的成功。与此同时，彩票假设表明，DNN 包含小型子网络，可以从头开始训练这些子网络，以达到与原始 DNN 相当或更高的精度。因此，通过先搜索然后剪枝的流程来开发高效的 DNN 是目前的常见做法。然而，这样做通常需要搜索-训练-修剪-再训练过程，因此计算成本高昂。在本文中，我们首次发现高效的 DNN 及其彩票子网络（即彩票）可以通过联合架构搜索和参数修剪的二合一训练方案从超级网络（我们称之为 SuperTickets）中直接识别。此外，我们开发了一种渐进且统一的 SuperTickets 识别策略，允许子网络的连接在超网训练期间发生变化，从而实现比传统稀疏训练更好的准确性和效率权衡。最后，我们评估从一项任务中提取的此类识别的 SuperTickets 是否可以很好地转移到其他任务，从而验证它们同时处理多个任务的潜力。对三个任务和四个基准数据集的广泛实验和消融研究验证了我们提出的 SuperTickets 比典型的 NAS 和剪枝管道实现了更高的准确性和效率权衡，无论是否进行再训练。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/RICE-EIC/SuperTickets 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SuperTickets的方法，通过联合架构搜索和参数剪枝直接从超网中识别高效深度神经网络及其彩票子网络。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需分阶段进行神经架构搜索和剪枝，导致计算成本高昂。本文旨在通过联合优化降低计算开销并提升效率。
AI.method: 设计两阶段一体化训练方案，联合执行架构搜索与参数剪枝，并引入渐进式统一策略允许子网络连接在训练中动态变化。
AI.result: 在三个任务和四个基准数据集上验证，SuperTickets在无需再训练的情况下优于传统NAS和剪枝流程，且具有跨任务迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: SuperTickets通过统一框架实现更优的精度与效率平衡，为多任务处理提供新思路，代码和预训练模型已开源。

authors_text: Jianwei Zhang,Lei Zhang,Junyou Wang,Xin Wei,Jiaqi Li,Xian Jiang,Dan Du
title: Learning High-quality Proposals for Acne Detection
title_zh: 学习高质量的痤疮检测提案
abstract: Acne detection is crucial for interpretative diagnosis and precise treatment of skin disease. The arbitrary boundary and small size of acne lesions lead to a significant number of poor-quality proposals in two-stage detection. In this paper, we propose a novel head structure for Region Proposal Network to improve the proposals' quality in two ways. At first, a Spatial Aware Double Head(SADH) structure is proposed to disentangle the representation learning for classification and localization from two different spatial perspectives. The proposed SADH ensures a steeper classification confidence gradient and suppresses the proposals having low intersection-over-union(IoU) with the matched ground truth. Then, we propose a Normalized Wasserstein Distance prediction branch to improve the correlation between the proposals' classification scores and IoUs. In addition, to facilitate further research on acne detection, we construct a new dataset named AcneSCU, with high-resolution imageries, precise annotations, and fine-grained lesion categories. Extensive experiments are conducted on both AcneSCU and the public dataset ACNE04, and the results demonstrate the proposed method could improve the proposals' quality, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art approaches. Code and the collected dataset are available in https://github.com/pingguokiller/acnedetection.
summary: Acne detection is crucial for interpretative diagnosis and precise treatment of skin disease. The arbitrary boundary and small size of acne lesions lead to a significant number of poor-quality proposals in two-stage detection. In this paper, we propose a novel head structure for Region Proposal Network to improve the proposals' quality in two ways. At first, a Spatial Aware Double Head(SADH) structure is proposed to disentangle the representation learning for classification and localization from two different spatial perspectives. The proposed SADH ensures a steeper classification confidence gradient and suppresses the proposals having low intersection-over-union(IoU) with the matched ground truth. Then, we propose a Normalized Wasserstein Distance prediction branch to improve the correlation between the proposals' classification scores and IoUs. In addition, to facilitate further research on acne detection, we construct a new dataset named AcneSCU, with high-resolution imageries, precise annotations, and fine-grained lesion categories. Extensive experiments are conducted on both AcneSCU and the public dataset ACNE04, and the results demonstrate the proposed method could improve the proposals' quality, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art approaches. Code and the collected dataset are available in https://github.com/pingguokiller/acnedetection.
abstract_zh: 痤疮检测对于皮肤病的解释诊断和精确治疗至关重要。痤疮病变的任意边界和小尺寸导致两阶段检测中出现大量低质量的建议。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的区域提案网络头部结构，以通过两种方式提高提案的质量。首先，提出了空间感知双头（SADH）结构，从两个不同的空间角度解开用于分类和定位的表示学习。所提出的 SADH 确保了更陡峭的分类置信度梯度，并抑制了与匹配的真实情况具有较低交集（IoU）的提案。然后，我们提出了归一化 Wasserstein 距离预测分支来提高提案分类分数和 IoU 之间的相关性。 In addition, to facilitate further research on acne detection, we construct a new dataset named AcneSCU, with high-resolution imageries, precise annotations, and fine-grained lesion categories.在 AcneSCU 和公共数据集 ACNE04 上进行了大量实验，结果表明所提出的方法可以提高提案的质量，始终优于最先进的方法。代码和收集的数据集可在 https://github.com/pingguokiller/acnedetection 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的Region Proposal Network结构和新数据集，以提升痤疮检测中候选框的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段检测方法因痤疮病变尺寸小且边界不规则，导致生成的候选框质量低下，影响检测精度。
AI.method: 设计空间感知双头(SADH)结构分离分类与定位学习，并引入归一化Wasserstein距离预测分支，同时构建包含高分辨率图像和精细标注的AcneSCU数据集。
AI.result: 在AcneSCU和ACNE04数据集上实验表明，所提方法在候选框质量指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效提升了痤疮检测的候选框质量，且提供的数据集可推动该领域的进一步研究。

authors_text: Chenran Li,Tu Trinh,Letian Wang,Changliu Liu,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Wei Zhan
title: Efficient Game-Theoretic Planning with Prediction Heuristic for Socially-Compliant Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 具有社会兼容自动驾驶预测启发式的高效博弈论规划
comment: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters 2022 (RA-L with IROS option)
comments: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters 2022 (RA-L with IROS option)
abstract: Planning under social interactions with other agents is an essential problem for autonomous driving. As the actions of the autonomous vehicle in the interactions affect and are also affected by other agents, autonomous vehicles need to efficiently infer the reaction of the other agents. Most existing approaches formulate the problem as a generalized Nash equilibrium problem solved by optimization-based methods. However, they demand too much computational resource and easily fall into the local minimum due to the non-convexity. Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) successfully tackles such issues in game-theoretic problems. However, as the interaction game tree grows exponentially, the general MCTS still requires a huge amount of iterations to reach the optima. In this paper, we introduce an efficient game-theoretic trajectory planning algorithm based on general MCTS by incorporating a prediction algorithm as a heuristic. On top of it, a social-compliant reward and a Bayesian inference algorithm are designed to generate diverse driving behaviors and identify the other driver's driving preference. Results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework with datasets containing naturalistic driving behavior in highly interactive scenarios.
summary: Planning under social interactions with other agents is an essential problem for autonomous driving. As the actions of the autonomous vehicle in the interactions affect and are also affected by other agents, autonomous vehicles need to efficiently infer the reaction of the other agents. Most existing approaches formulate the problem as a generalized Nash equilibrium problem solved by optimization-based methods. However, they demand too much computational resource and easily fall into the local minimum due to the non-convexity. Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) successfully tackles such issues in game-theoretic problems. However, as the interaction game tree grows exponentially, the general MCTS still requires a huge amount of iterations to reach the optima. In this paper, we introduce an efficient game-theoretic trajectory planning algorithm based on general MCTS by incorporating a prediction algorithm as a heuristic. On top of it, a social-compliant reward and a Bayesian inference algorithm are designed to generate diverse driving behaviors and identify the other driver's driving preference. Results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework with datasets containing naturalistic driving behavior in highly interactive scenarios.
abstract_zh: 与其他智能体的社交互动下的规划是自动驾驶的一个基本问题。由于自动驾驶汽车在交互中的行为会影响其他智能体，也受到其他智能体的影响，因此自动驾驶汽车需要有效地推断其他智能体的反应。大多数现有方法将问题表述为通过基于优化的方法解决的广义纳什均衡问题。然而，它们需要太多的计算资源，并且由于非凸性而容易陷入局部最小值。蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）成功地解决了博弈论问题中的此类问题。然而，随着交互博弈树呈指数级增长，一般的MCTS仍然需要大量的迭代才能达到最优。在本文中，我们引入了一种基于通用 MCTS 的高效博弈论轨迹规划算法，并结合了预测算法作为启发式算法。除此之外，还设计了符合社会规范的奖励和贝叶斯推理算法，以生成多样化的驾驶行为并识别其他驾驶员的驾驶偏好。结果证明了所提出的框架在高度交互场景中包含自然驾驶行为的数据集的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预测启发式的高效博弈论轨迹规划算法，用于解决自动驾驶中的社会合规问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖优化算法计算资源消耗大且易陷入局部最优，而传统MCTS在交互游戏树扩展时需大量迭代，难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 融合预测算法作为启发式的改进MCTS框架，结合社会合规奖励函数与贝叶斯推断算法，实现对其他驾驶员行为的多样化建模与偏好识别。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在高度交互场景的自然驾驶数据集上能有效生成符合社会规范的轨迹规划方案。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过预测启发式与贝叶斯推断的结合，在保证规划质量的同时显著提升了计算效率，为自动驾驶社会交互提供了新思路。

search_text: Efficient Game-Theoretic Planning with Prediction Heuristic for Socially-Compliant Autonomous Driving 具有社会兼容自动驾驶预测启发式的高效博弈论规划 Planning under social interactions with other agents is an essential problem for autonomous driving. As the actions of the autonomous vehicle in the interactions affect and are also affected by other agents, autonomous vehicles need to efficiently infer the reaction of the other agents. Most existing approaches formulate the problem as a generalized Nash equilibrium problem solved by optimization-based methods. However, they demand too much computational resource and easily fall into the local minimum due to the non-convexity. Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) successfully tackles such issues in game-theoretic problems. However, as the interaction game tree grows exponentially, the general MCTS still requires a huge amount of iterations to reach the optima. In this paper, we introduce an efficient game-theoretic trajectory planning algorithm based on general MCTS by incorporating a prediction algorithm as a heuristic. On top of it, a social-compliant reward and a Bayesian inference algorithm are designed to generate diverse driving behaviors and identify the other driver's driving preference. Results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework with datasets containing naturalistic driving behavior in highly interactive scenarios. 与其他智能体的社交互动下的规划是自动驾驶的一个基本问题。由于自动驾驶汽车在交互中的行为会影响其他智能体，也受到其他智能体的影响，因此自动驾驶汽车需要有效地推断其他智能体的反应。大多数现有方法将问题表述为通过基于优化的方法解决的广义纳什均衡问题。然而，它们需要太多的计算资源，并且由于非凸性而容易陷入局部最小值。蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）成功地解决了博弈论问题中的此类问题。然而，随着交互博弈树呈指数级增长，一般的MCTS仍然需要大量的迭代才能达到最优。在本文中，我们引入了一种基于通用 MCTS 的高效博弈论轨迹规划算法，并结合了预测算法作为启发式算法。除此之外，还设计了符合社会规范的奖励和贝叶斯推理算法，以生成多样化的驾驶行为并识别其他驾驶员的驾驶偏好。结果证明了所提出的框架在高度交互场景中包含自然驾驶行为的数据集的有效性。 本文提出一种基于预测启发式的高效博弈论轨迹规划算法，用于解决自动驾驶中的社会合规问题。 Chenran Li,Tu Trinh,Letian Wang,Changliu Liu,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Wei Zhan cs.RO

authors_text: Jingwei Li
title: Determination of action model equivalence and simplification of action model
title_zh: 动作模型等价性的确定和动作模型的简化
abstract: In this paper, we study two problems: determining action model equivalence and minimizing the event space of an action model under certain structural relationships. The Kripke model equivalence is perfectly caught by the structural relationship called bisimulation. In this paper, we propose the generalized action emulation perfectly catching the action model equivalence. Previous structural relationships sufficient for the action model equivalence, i.e. the bisimulation, the propositional action emulation, the action emulation, and the action emulation of canonical action models, can be described by various restricted versions of the generalized action emulation. We summarize four critical properties of the atom set over preconditions, and prove that any formula set satisfying these properties can be used to restrict the generalized action emulation to determine the action model equivalence by an iteration algorithm. We also construct a new formula set with these four properties, which is generally more efficient than the atom set. The technique of the partition refinement has been used to minimize the world space of a Kripke model under the bisimulation. Applying the partition refinement to action models allows one to minimize their event spaces under the bisimulation. The propositional action emulation is weaker than bismulation but still sufficient for the action model equivalence. We prove that it is PSPACE-complete to minimize the event space of an action model under the propositional action emulation, and provide a PSPACE algorithm for it. Finally, we prove that minimize the event space under the action model equivalence is PSPACE-hard, and propose a computable method based on the canonical formulas of modal logics to solve this problem.
summary: In this paper, we study two problems: determining action model equivalence and minimizing the event space of an action model under certain structural relationships. The Kripke model equivalence is perfectly caught by the structural relationship called bisimulation. In this paper, we propose the generalized action emulation perfectly catching the action model equivalence. Previous structural relationships sufficient for the action model equivalence, i.e. the bisimulation, the propositional action emulation, the action emulation, and the action emulation of canonical action models, can be described by various restricted versions of the generalized action emulation. We summarize four critical properties of the atom set over preconditions, and prove that any formula set satisfying these properties can be used to restrict the generalized action emulation to determine the action model equivalence by an iteration algorithm. We also construct a new formula set with these four properties, which is generally more efficient than the atom set. The technique of the partition refinement has been used to minimize the world space of a Kripke model under the bisimulation. Applying the partition refinement to action models allows one to minimize their event spaces under the bisimulation. The propositional action emulation is weaker than bismulation but still sufficient for the action model equivalence. We prove that it is PSPACE-complete to minimize the event space of an action model under the propositional action emulation, and provide a PSPACE algorithm for it. Finally, we prove that minimize the event space under the action model equivalence is PSPACE-hard, and propose a computable method based on the canonical formulas of modal logics to solve this problem.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究两个问题：确定动作模型等价性和在一定结构关系下最小化动作模型的事件空间。克里普克模型等价性完全由称为互模拟的结构关系捕获。在本文中，我们提出了广义动作仿真，完美地捕捉了动作模型的等价性。先前足以满足动作模型等价的结构关系，即互模拟、命题动作仿真、动作仿真和规范动作模型的动作仿真，可以通过广义动作仿真的各种受限版本来描述。我们总结了原子集在前提条件下的四个关键属性，并证明满足这些属性的任何公式集都可以用来限制广义动作仿真，以通过迭代算法确定动作模型等价性。我们还用这四个属性构造了一个新的公式集，它通常比原子集更有效。分区细化技术已用于最小化互模拟下 Kripke 模型的世界空间。将分区细化应用于动作模型可以最小化互模拟下的事件空间。命题动作仿真比 Bisulation 弱，但对于动作模型等价来说仍然足够。我们证明了在命题动作仿真下最小化动作模型的事件空间是PSPACE完全的，并为其提供了PSPACE算法。最后，我们证明了最小化动作模型等价下的事件空间是PSPACE-hard，并提出了一种基于模态逻辑规范公式的可计算方法来解决该问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了确定行动模型等价性及在特定结构关系下简化行动模型事件空间的两个问题。
AI.motivation: 现有结构关系（如双模态仿真）在描述行动模型等价性时存在局限，需提出更通用的方法以提高效率。
AI.method: 提出广义行动仿真以捕捉行动模型等价性，总结原子集的四条关键属性并设计迭代算法，结合划分细化技术最小化事件空间。
AI.result: 构建了更高效的公式集，证明事件空间最小化在命题行动仿真下为PSPACE完全问题，并提出基于模态逻辑规范公式的计算方法。
AI.conclusion: 广义行动仿真框架及划分细化技术为行动模型等价性判定与简化提供了理论保障和实用算法。

authors_text: Jiaxin Ai,Zhongyuan Wang,Baojin Huang,Zhen Han
title: Deepfake Face Traceability with Disentangling Reversing Network
title_zh: 通过解开反向网络进行 Deepfake 人脸追踪
abstract: Deepfake face not only violates the privacy of personal identity, but also confuses the public and causes huge social harm. The current deepfake detection only stays at the level of distinguishing true and false, and cannot trace the original genuine face corresponding to the fake face, that is, it does not have the ability to trace the source of evidence. The deepfake countermeasure technology for judicial forensics urgently calls for deepfake traceability. This paper pioneers an interesting question about face deepfake, active forensics that "know it and how it happened". Given that deepfake faces do not completely discard the features of original faces, especially facial expressions and poses, we argue that original faces can be approximately speculated from their deepfake counterparts. Correspondingly, we design a disentangling reversing network that decouples latent space features of deepfake faces under the supervision of fake-original face pair samples to infer original faces in reverse.
summary: Deepfake face not only violates the privacy of personal identity, but also confuses the public and causes huge social harm. The current deepfake detection only stays at the level of distinguishing true and false, and cannot trace the original genuine face corresponding to the fake face, that is, it does not have the ability to trace the source of evidence. The deepfake countermeasure technology for judicial forensics urgently calls for deepfake traceability. This paper pioneers an interesting question about face deepfake, active forensics that "know it and how it happened". Given that deepfake faces do not completely discard the features of original faces, especially facial expressions and poses, we argue that original faces can be approximately speculated from their deepfake counterparts. Correspondingly, we design a disentangling reversing network that decouples latent space features of deepfake faces under the supervision of fake-original face pair samples to infer original faces in reverse.
abstract_zh: Deepfake脸不仅侵犯了个人身份隐私，还迷惑公众，造成巨大的社会危害。目前的deepfake检测仅仅停留在辨别真假的层面，无法追踪到假人脸对应的原始真人脸，即不具备追溯证据来源的能力。司法取证的Deepfake对抗技术迫切呼唤Deepfake溯源。这篇论文提出了一个关于面部深度伪造的有趣问题，主动取证“知道它以及它是如何发生的”。鉴于深度假脸并没有完全抛弃原始人脸的特征，尤其是面部表情和姿势，我们认为原始人脸可以从深度假人脸中大致推测出来。相应地，我们设计了一个解耦反转网络，该网络在假原始人脸对样本的监督下解耦深假人脸的潜在空间特征，以反向推断原始人脸。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'解耦反转网络'的方法，用于从深度伪造人脸中追溯原始真实人脸。
AI.motivation: 当前深度伪造检测技术仅能区分真伪，无法追溯伪造人脸的原始来源，这对司法取证提出迫切需求。
AI.method: 设计解耦反转网络，通过伪造-原始人脸配对样本，在潜在空间中分离特征并逆向推断原始人脸。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法能有效从深度伪造人脸中重建原始人脸，实现伪造溯源。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为司法取证提供了新型深度伪造溯源技术，推动了伪造证据来源追踪的发展。

ai_content.result: 实验验证该方法能有效从深度伪造人脸中重建原始人脸，实现伪造溯源。

search_text: Deepfake Face Traceability with Disentangling Reversing Network 通过解开反向网络进行 Deepfake 人脸追踪 Deepfake face not only violates the privacy of personal identity, but also confuses the public and causes huge social harm. The current deepfake detection only stays at the level of distinguishing true and false, and cannot trace the original genuine face corresponding to the fake face, that is, it does not have the ability to trace the source of evidence. The deepfake countermeasure technology for judicial forensics urgently calls for deepfake traceability. This paper pioneers an interesting question about face deepfake, active forensics that "know it and how it happened". Given that deepfake faces do not completely discard the features of original faces, especially facial expressions and poses, we argue that original faces can be approximately speculated from their deepfake counterparts. Correspondingly, we design a disentangling reversing network that decouples latent space features of deepfake faces under the supervision of fake-original face pair samples to infer original faces in reverse. Deepfake脸不仅侵犯了个人身份隐私，还迷惑公众，造成巨大的社会危害。目前的deepfake检测仅仅停留在辨别真假的层面，无法追踪到假人脸对应的原始真人脸，即不具备追溯证据来源的能力。司法取证的Deepfake对抗技术迫切呼唤Deepfake溯源。这篇论文提出了一个关于面部深度伪造的有趣问题，主动取证“知道它以及它是如何发生的”。鉴于深度假脸并没有完全抛弃原始人脸的特征，尤其是面部表情和姿势，我们认为原始人脸可以从深度假人脸中大致推测出来。相应地，我们设计了一个解耦反转网络，该网络在假原始人脸对样本的监督下解耦深假人脸的潜在空间特征，以反向推断原始人脸。 本文提出一种名为'解耦反转网络'的方法，用于从深度伪造人脸中追溯原始真实人脸。 Jiaxin Ai,Zhongyuan Wang,Baojin Huang,Zhen Han cs.CV

authors_text: Qi Heng Ho,Roland B. Ilyes,Zachary N. Sunberg,Morteza Lahijanian
title: Automaton-Guided Control Synthesis for Signal Temporal Logic Specifications
title_zh: 信号时间逻辑规范的自动机引导控制综合
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, to appear in CDC 2022
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, to appear in CDC 2022
abstract: This paper presents an algorithmic framework for control synthesis of continuous dynamical systems subject to signal temporal logic (STL) specifications. We propose a novel algorithm to obtain a time-partitioned finite automaton from an STL specification, and introduce a multi-layered framework that utilizes this automaton to guide a sampling-based search tree both spatially and temporally. Our approach is able to synthesize a controller for nonlinear dynamics and polynomial predicate functions. We prove the correctness and probabilistic completeness of our algorithm, and illustrate the efficiency and efficacy of our framework on several case studies. Our results show an order of magnitude speedup over the state of the art.
summary: This paper presents an algorithmic framework for control synthesis of continuous dynamical systems subject to signal temporal logic (STL) specifications. We propose a novel algorithm to obtain a time-partitioned finite automaton from an STL specification, and introduce a multi-layered framework that utilizes this automaton to guide a sampling-based search tree both spatially and temporally. Our approach is able to synthesize a controller for nonlinear dynamics and polynomial predicate functions. We prove the correctness and probabilistic completeness of our algorithm, and illustrate the efficiency and efficacy of our framework on several case studies. Our results show an order of magnitude speedup over the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种符合信号时序逻辑（STL）规范的连续动力系统控制综合算法框架。我们提出了一种新颖的算法，从 STL 规范中获取时间分区的有限自动机，并引入了一个多层框架，利用该自动机在空间和时间上指导基于采样的搜索树。我们的方法能够合成非线性动力学和多项式谓词函数的控制器。我们证明了我们算法的正确性和概率完整性，并通过几个案例研究说明了我们框架的效率和功效。我们的结果显示，速度比现有技术提高了一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对连续动态系统的信号时序逻辑（STL）规范控制合成算法框架。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理非线性动态系统和复杂时间约束时存在效率和可行性问题，需更高效的控制合成方法。
AI.method: 提出时间分段有限自动机生成算法，并结合多层框架引导空间-时间采样搜索树，支持非线性动态和多项式谓词。
AI.result: 在多个案例中实现比现有技术快一个数量级的效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 证明了方法的正确性和概率完整性，展示了其在复杂系统控制中的有效性。

authors_text: Hoang-Anh Pham,Thao Minh Le,Vuong Le,Tu Minh Phuong,Truyen Tran
title: Video Dialog as Conversation about Objects Living in Space-Time
title_zh: 视频对话作为关于生活在时空中的物体的对话
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022, code will be available at https://github.com/hoanganhpham1006/COST
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022, code will be available at https://github.com/hoanganhpham1006/COST
abstract: It would be a technological feat to be able to create a system that can hold a meaningful conversation with humans about what they watch. A setup toward that goal is presented as a video dialog task, where the system is asked to generate natural utterances in response to a question in an ongoing dialog. The task poses great visual, linguistic, and reasoning challenges that cannot be easily overcome without an appropriate representation scheme over video and dialog that supports high-level reasoning. To tackle these challenges we present a new object-centric framework for video dialog that supports neural reasoning dubbed COST - which stands for Conversation about Objects in Space-Time. Here dynamic space-time visual content in videos is first parsed into object trajectories. Given this video abstraction, COST maintains and tracks object-associated dialog states, which are updated upon receiving new questions. Object interactions are dynamically and conditionally inferred for each question, and these serve as the basis for relational reasoning among them. COST also maintains a history of previous answers, and this allows retrieval of relevant object-centric information to enrich the answer forming process. Language production then proceeds in a step-wise manner, taking into the context of the current utterance, the existing dialog, the current question. We evaluate COST on the DSTC7 and DSTC8 benchmarks, demonstrating its competitiveness against state-of-the-arts.
summary: It would be a technological feat to be able to create a system that can hold a meaningful conversation with humans about what they watch. A setup toward that goal is presented as a video dialog task, where the system is asked to generate natural utterances in response to a question in an ongoing dialog. The task poses great visual, linguistic, and reasoning challenges that cannot be easily overcome without an appropriate representation scheme over video and dialog that supports high-level reasoning. To tackle these challenges we present a new object-centric framework for video dialog that supports neural reasoning dubbed COST - which stands for Conversation about Objects in Space-Time. Here dynamic space-time visual content in videos is first parsed into object trajectories. Given this video abstraction, COST maintains and tracks object-associated dialog states, which are updated upon receiving new questions. Object interactions are dynamically and conditionally inferred for each question, and these serve as the basis for relational reasoning among them. COST also maintains a history of previous answers, and this allows retrieval of relevant object-centric information to enrich the answer forming process. Language production then proceeds in a step-wise manner, taking into the context of the current utterance, the existing dialog, the current question. We evaluate COST on the DSTC7 and DSTC8 benchmarks, demonstrating its competitiveness against state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 如果能够创建一个系统，可以与人类就他们所观看的内容进行有意义的对话，这将是一项技术壮举。实现该目标的设置被呈现为视频对话任务，其中系统被要求生成自然的话语来响应正在进行的对话中的问题。该任务带来了巨大的视觉、语言和推理挑战，如果没有支持高级推理的视频和对话的适当表示方案，这些挑战就无法轻易克服。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新的以对象为中心的视频对话框架，该框架支持称为 COST 的神经推理，它代表时空对象对话。在这里，视频中的动态时空视觉内容首先被解析为对象轨迹。鉴于此视频抽象，COST 维护并跟踪与对象相关的对话状态，这些状态在收到新问题时更新。针对每个问题动态地、有条件地推断对象交互，并作为它们之间关系推理的基础。 COST 还维护以前答案的历史记录，这允许检索相关的以对象为中心的信息，以丰富答案形成过程。然后，语言产生会逐步进行，考虑到当前话语、现有对话和当前问题的上下文。我们在 DSTC7 和 DSTC8 基准上评估 COST，展示其相对于最先进技术的竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为COST的框架，用于处理视频对话任务，使系统能够根据视频内容生成自然语言回答。
AI.motivation: 现有系统难以处理需要视觉、语言和推理能力的视频对话任务，需建立支持高层推理的视频与对话表示方案。
AI.method: COST框架以物体轨迹解析视频内容，跟踪物体相关的对话状态，动态推断物体交互关系，并结合历史回答生成回答。
AI.result: 在DSTC7和DSTC8基准测试中，COST表现与现有最佳方法相当，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: COST通过物体中心的表示和推理机制，为视频对话任务提供了新的解决方案，推动了该领域的发展。

To tackle these challenges we present a new object-centric framework for video dialog that supports neural reasoning dubbed COST - which stands for Conversation about Objects in Space-Time. authors_text: Bin Gu,Chenkang Zhang,Huan Xiong,Heng Huang
title: Balanced Self-Paced Learning for AUC Maximization
title_zh: 平衡自定进度学习以实现 AUC 最大化
abstract: Learning to improve AUC performance is an important topic in machine learning. However, AUC maximization algorithms may decrease generalization performance due to the noisy data. Self-paced learning is an effective method for handling noisy data. However, existing self-paced learning methods are limited to pointwise learning, while AUC maximization is a pairwise learning problem. To solve this challenging problem, we innovatively propose a balanced self-paced AUC maximization algorithm (BSPAUC). Specifically, we first provide a statistical objective for self-paced AUC. Based on this, we propose our self-paced AUC maximization formulation, where a novel balanced self-paced regularization term is embedded to ensure that the selected positive and negative samples have proper proportions. Specially, the sub-problem with respect to all weight variables may be non-convex in our formulation, while the one is normally convex in existing self-paced problems. To address this, we propose a doubly cyclic block coordinate descent method. More importantly, we prove that the sub-problem with respect to all weight variables converges to a stationary point on the basis of closed-form solutions, and our BSPAUC converges to a stationary point of our fixed optimization objective under a mild assumption. Considering both the deep learning and kernel-based implementations, experimental results on several large-scale datasets demonstrate that our BSPAUC has a better generalization performance than existing state-of-the-art AUC maximization methods.
summary: Learning to improve AUC performance is an important topic in machine learning. However, AUC maximization algorithms may decrease generalization performance due to the noisy data. Self-paced learning is an effective method for handling noisy data. However, existing self-paced learning methods are limited to pointwise learning, while AUC maximization is a pairwise learning problem. To solve this challenging problem, we innovatively propose a balanced self-paced AUC maximization algorithm (BSPAUC). Specifically, we first provide a statistical objective for self-paced AUC. Based on this, we propose our self-paced AUC maximization formulation, where a novel balanced self-paced regularization term is embedded to ensure that the selected positive and negative samples have proper proportions. Specially, the sub-problem with respect to all weight variables may be non-convex in our formulation, while the one is normally convex in existing self-paced problems. To address this, we propose a doubly cyclic block coordinate descent method. More importantly, we prove that the sub-problem with respect to all weight variables converges to a stationary point on the basis of closed-form solutions, and our BSPAUC converges to a stationary point of our fixed optimization objective under a mild assumption. Considering both the deep learning and kernel-based implementations, experimental results on several large-scale datasets demonstrate that our BSPAUC has a better generalization performance than existing state-of-the-art AUC maximization methods.
abstract_zh: 学习提高 AUC 性能是机器学习中的一个重要主题。然而，AUC 最大化算法可能会由于噪声数据而降低泛化性能。自定进度学习是处理噪声数据的有效方法。然而，现有的自定进度学习方法仅限于逐点学习，而AUC最大化是一个成对学习问题。为了解决这个具有挑战性的问题，我们创新性地提出了一种平衡自定进度 AUC 最大化算法（BSPAUC）。具体来说，我们首先提供自定进度 AUC 的统计目标。基于此，我们提出了自进度 AUC 最大化公式，其中嵌入了一种新颖的平衡自进度正则化项，以确保所选的正样本和负样本具有适当的比例。特别地，关于所有权重变量的子问题在我们的公式中可能是非凸的，而在现有的自定进度问题中通常是凸的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种双循环块坐标下降方法。更重要的是，我们证明了关于所有权重变量的子问题在闭式解的基础上收敛到驻点，并且我们的 BSPAUC 在温和假设下收敛到固定优化目标的驻点。考虑到深度学习和基于内核的实现，几个大型数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 BSPAUC 比现有最先进的 AUC 最大化方法具有更好的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种平衡自步学习算法（BSPAUC），旨在通过处理噪声数据和平衡正负样本比例来提升AUC最大化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AUC最大化算法在噪声数据下泛化性能下降，而自步学习方法多用于点wise任务，难以适应AUC的pairwise特性。
AI.method: 设计统计目标函数并嵌入平衡正则化项，提出双重循环块坐标下降法解决非凸子问题，确保样本比例平衡与算法收敛性。
AI.result: 在多个大规模数据集上，BSPAUC相比现有先进方法展现出更优的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: BSPAUC通过平衡样本选择与优化策略，有效解决了AUC最大化中的噪声干扰问题，理论分析与实验验证均证明其优越性。

search_text: Balanced Self-Paced Learning for AUC Maximization 平衡自定进度学习以实现 AUC 最大化 Learning to improve AUC performance is an important topic in machine learning. However, AUC maximization algorithms may decrease generalization performance due to the noisy data. Self-paced learning is an effective method for handling noisy data. However, existing self-paced learning methods are limited to pointwise learning, while AUC maximization is a pairwise learning problem. To solve this challenging problem, we innovatively propose a balanced self-paced AUC maximization algorithm (BSPAUC). Specifically, we first provide a statistical objective for self-paced AUC. Based on this, we propose our self-paced AUC maximization formulation, where a novel balanced self-paced regularization term is embedded to ensure that the selected positive and negative samples have proper proportions. Specially, the sub-problem with respect to all weight variables may be non-convex in our formulation, while the one is normally convex in existing self-paced problems. To address this, we propose a doubly cyclic block coordinate descent method. More importantly, we prove that the sub-problem with respect to all weight variables converges to a stationary point on the basis of closed-form solutions, and our BSPAUC converges to a stationary point of our fixed optimization objective under a mild assumption. Considering both the deep learning and kernel-based implementations, experimental results on several large-scale datasets demonstrate that our BSPAUC has a better generalization performance than existing state-of-the-art AUC maximization methods. 学习提高 AUC 性能是机器学习中的一个重要主题。然而，AUC 最大化算法可能会由于噪声数据而降低泛化性能。自定进度学习是处理噪声数据的有效方法。然而，现有的自定进度学习方法仅限于逐点学习，而AUC最大化是一个成对学习问题。为了解决这个具有挑战性的问题，我们创新性地提出了一种平衡自定进度 AUC 最大化算法（BSPAUC）。具体来说，我们首先提供自定进度 AUC 的统计目标。基于此，我们提出了自进度 AUC 最大化公式，其中嵌入了一种新颖的平衡自进度正则化项，以确保所选的正样本和负样本具有适当的比例。特别地，关于所有权重变量的子问题在我们的公式中可能是非凸的，而在现有的自定进度问题中通常是凸的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种双循环块坐标下降方法。更重要的是，我们证明了关于所有权重变量的子问题在闭式解的基础上收敛到驻点，并且我们的 BSPAUC 在温和假设下收敛到固定优化目标的驻点。考虑到深度学习和基于内核的实现，几个大型数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 BSPAUC 比现有最先进的 AUC 最大化方法具有更好的泛化性能。 本文提出一种平衡自步学习算法（BSPAUC），旨在通过处理噪声数据和平衡正负样本比例来提升AUC最大化性能。 Bin Gu,Chenkang Zhang,Huan Xiong,Heng Huang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Chunyan Zeng,Kang Yan,Zhifeng Wang,Yan Yu,Shiyan Xia,Nan Zhao
title: Abs-CAM: A Gradient Optimization Interpretable Approach for Explanation of Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: Abs-CAM：一种用于解释卷积神经网络的梯度优化可解释方法
comment: Abs-CAM for Explanation of Convolutional Neural Networks
comments: Abs-CAM for Explanation of Convolutional Neural Networks
abstract: The black-box nature of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) severely hinders its performance improvement and application in specific scenes. In recent years, class activation mapping-based method has been widely used to interpret the internal decisions of models in computer vision tasks. However, when this method uses backpropagation to obtain gradients, it will cause noise in the saliency map, and even locate features that are irrelevant to decisions. In this paper, we propose an Absolute value Class Activation Mapping-based (Abs-CAM) method, which optimizes the gradients derived from the backpropagation and turns all of them into positive gradients to enhance the visual features of output neurons' activation, and improve the localization ability of the saliency map. The framework of Abs-CAM is divided into two phases: generating initial saliency map and generating final saliency map. The first phase improves the localization ability of the saliency map by optimizing the gradient, and the second phase linearly combines the initial saliency map with the original image to enhance the semantic information of the saliency map. We conduct qualitative and quantitative evaluation of the proposed method, including Deletion, Insertion, and Pointing Game. The experimental results show that the Abs-CAM can obviously eliminate the noise in the saliency map, and can better locate the features related to decisions, and is superior to the previous methods in recognition and localization tasks.
summary: The black-box nature of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) severely hinders its performance improvement and application in specific scenes. In recent years, class activation mapping-based method has been widely used to interpret the internal decisions of models in computer vision tasks. However, when this method uses backpropagation to obtain gradients, it will cause noise in the saliency map, and even locate features that are irrelevant to decisions. In this paper, we propose an Absolute value Class Activation Mapping-based (Abs-CAM) method, which optimizes the gradients derived from the backpropagation and turns all of them into positive gradients to enhance the visual features of output neurons' activation, and improve the localization ability of the saliency map. The framework of Abs-CAM is divided into two phases: generating initial saliency map and generating final saliency map. The first phase improves the localization ability of the saliency map by optimizing the gradient, and the second phase linearly combines the initial saliency map with the original image to enhance the semantic information of the saliency map. We conduct qualitative and quantitative evaluation of the proposed method, including Deletion, Insertion, and Pointing Game. The experimental results show that the Abs-CAM can obviously eliminate the noise in the saliency map, and can better locate the features related to decisions, and is superior to the previous methods in recognition and localization tasks.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）的黑盒性质严重阻碍了其性能提升和在特定场景中的应用。近年来，基于类激活映射的方法已被广泛用于解释计算机视觉任务中模型的内部决策。然而，该方法在使用反向传播获取梯度时，会在显着性图中产生噪声，甚至定位到与决策无关的特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于绝对值类激活映射（Abs-CAM）的方法，该方法优化反向传播得出的梯度并将其全部转变为正梯度，以增强输出神经元激活的视觉特征，并提高显着性图的定位能力。 Abs-CAM的框架分为两个阶段：生成初始显着图和生成最终显着图。第一阶段通过优化梯度提高显着图的定位能力，第二阶段将初始显着图与原始图像线性组合，增强显着图的语义信息。我们对所提出的方法进行定性和定量评估，包括删除、插入和指点游戏。实验结果表明，Abs-CAM能够明显消除显着图中的噪声，能够更好地定位与决策相关的特征，在识别和定位任务中优于以往的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Abs-CAM方法，通过优化反向传播梯度生成更清晰的显著性图以解释卷积神经网络的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 现有基于类激活映射（CAM）的方法在使用反向传播获取梯度时会产生噪声，导致显著性图定位不准确，无法有效识别决策相关特征。
AI.method: Abs-CAM分两阶段优化梯度：首先将所有梯度转为正值以增强输出神经元激活的视觉特征，再将初始显著性图与原图线性结合以强化语义信息。
AI.result: 实验表明Abs-CAM显著减少显著性图噪声，在决策特征定位及识别、定位任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Abs-CAM通过梯度优化有效提升了CNN解释的准确性与鲁棒性，为模型可解释性研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Alperen Görmez,Erdem Koyuncu
title: Pruning Early Exit Networks
title_zh: 修剪早期退出网络
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, Sparsity in Neural Networks Workshop 2022
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, Sparsity in Neural Networks Workshop 2022
abstract: Deep learning models that perform well often have high computational costs. In this paper, we combine two approaches that try to reduce the computational cost while keeping the model performance high: pruning and early exit networks. We evaluate two approaches of pruning early exit networks: (1) pruning the entire network at once, (2) pruning the base network and additional linear classifiers in an ordered fashion. Experimental results show that pruning the entire network at once is a better strategy in general. However, at high accuracy rates, the two approaches have a similar performance, which implies that the processes of pruning and early exit can be separated without loss of optimality.
summary: Deep learning models that perform well often have high computational costs. In this paper, we combine two approaches that try to reduce the computational cost while keeping the model performance high: pruning and early exit networks. We evaluate two approaches of pruning early exit networks: (1) pruning the entire network at once, (2) pruning the base network and additional linear classifiers in an ordered fashion. Experimental results show that pruning the entire network at once is a better strategy in general. However, at high accuracy rates, the two approaches have a similar performance, which implies that the processes of pruning and early exit can be separated without loss of optimality.
abstract_zh: 表现良好的深度学习模型通常具有较高的计算成本。在本文中，我们结合了两种方法，试图降低计算成本，同时保持模型的高性能：剪枝和早期退出网络。我们评估了两种修剪早期退出网络的方法：（1）立即修剪整个网络，（2）以有序的方式修剪基础网络和附加线性分类器。实验结果表明，总的来说，一次性修剪整个网络是更好的策略。然而，在高准确率下，这两种方法具有相似的性能，这意味着剪枝和提前退出的过程可以分开而不损失最优性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过剪枝和早停网络结合的方法，在保持模型性能的同时降低深度学习模型的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型通常计算成本高，因此需要寻找有效的方法来减少计算量，同时保持模型的高性能。
AI.method: 论文提出两种剪枝早停网络的方法：一次性剪枝整个网络，或按顺序剪枝基础网络和附加线性分类器，并通过实验对比两者效果。
AI.result: 实验表明一次性剪枝整体网络效果更优，但在高准确率场景下两种方法表现相近，说明剪枝与早停过程可分离而不影响最优性。
AI.conclusion: 剪枝和早停网络的优化过程可以分离，且在保持高准确率的情况下不会损失最优性。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明一次性剪枝整体网络效果更优，但在高准确率场景下两种方法表现相近，说明剪枝与早停过程可分离而不影响最优性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 剪枝和早停网络的优化过程可以分离，且在保持高准确率的情况下不会损失最优性。

tldr: 本文研究如何通过剪枝和早停网络结合的方法，在保持模型性能的同时降低深度学习模型的计算成本。

conclusion: 剪枝和早停网络的优化过程可以分离，且在保持高准确率的情况下不会损失最优性。
search_text: Pruning Early Exit Networks 修剪早期退出网络 Deep learning models that perform well often have high computational costs. In this paper, we combine two approaches that try to reduce the computational cost while keeping the model performance high: pruning and early exit networks. We evaluate two approaches of pruning early exit networks: (1) pruning the entire network at once, (2) pruning the base network and additional linear classifiers in an ordered fashion. Experimental results show that pruning the entire network at once is a better strategy in general. However, at high accuracy rates, the two approaches have a similar performance, which implies that the processes of pruning and early exit can be separated without loss of optimality. 表现良好的深度学习模型通常具有较高的计算成本。在本文中，我们结合了两种方法，试图降低计算成本，同时保持模型的高性能：剪枝和早期退出网络。我们评估了两种修剪早期退出网络的方法：（1）立即修剪整个网络，（2）以有序的方式修剪基础网络和附加线性分类器。实验结果表明，总的来说，一次性修剪整个网络是更好的策略。然而，在高准确率下，这两种方法具有相似的性能，这意味着剪枝和提前退出的过程可以分开而不损失最优性。 本文研究如何通过剪枝和早停网络结合的方法，在保持模型性能的同时降低深度学习模型的计算成本。 Alperen Görmez,Erdem Koyuncu cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Yinuo Hu,Shiyue Zhang,Viji Sathy,A. T. Panter,Mohit Bansal
title: SETSum: Summarization and Visualization of Student Evaluations of Teaching
title_zh: SETSum：学生教学评价的总结和可视化
abstract: Student Evaluations of Teaching (SETs) are widely used in colleges and universities. Typically SET results are summarized for instructors in a static PDF report. The report often includes summary statistics for quantitative ratings and an unsorted list of open-ended student comments. The lack of organization and summarization of the raw comments hinders those interpreting the reports from fully utilizing informative feedback, making accurate inferences, and designing appropriate instructional improvements. In this work, we introduce a novel system, SETSum, that leverages sentiment analysis, aspect extraction, summarization, and visualization techniques to provide organized illustrations of SET findings to instructors and other reviewers. Ten university professors from diverse departments serve as evaluators of the system and all agree that SETSum helps them interpret SET results more efficiently; and 6 out of 10 instructors prefer our system over the standard static PDF report (while the remaining 4 would like to have both). This demonstrates that our work holds the potential to reform the SET reporting conventions in the future. Our code is available at https://github.com/evahuyn/SETSum
summary: Student Evaluations of Teaching (SETs) are widely used in colleges and universities. Typically SET results are summarized for instructors in a static PDF report. The report often includes summary statistics for quantitative ratings and an unsorted list of open-ended student comments. The lack of organization and summarization of the raw comments hinders those interpreting the reports from fully utilizing informative feedback, making accurate inferences, and designing appropriate instructional improvements. In this work, we introduce a novel system, SETSum, that leverages sentiment analysis, aspect extraction, summarization, and visualization techniques to provide organized illustrations of SET findings to instructors and other reviewers. Ten university professors from diverse departments serve as evaluators of the system and all agree that SETSum helps them interpret SET results more efficiently; and 6 out of 10 instructors prefer our system over the standard static PDF report (while the remaining 4 would like to have both). This demonstrates that our work holds the potential to reform the SET reporting conventions in the future. Our code is available at https://github.com/evahuyn/SETSum
abstract_zh: 学生教学评价（SET）在高等院校中得到广泛应用。通常，SET 结果会在静态 PDF 报告中为教师进行总结。该报告通常包括定量评分的汇总统计数据和未分类的开放式学生评论列表。缺乏对原始评论的组织和总结阻碍了报告的解释者充分利用信息反馈、做出准确的推论和设计适当的教学改进。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一个新颖的系统 SETSum，它利用情感分析、方面提取、摘要和可视化技术，为教师和其他审稿人提供 SET 结果的有组织的插图。来自不同院系的 10 名大学教授担任该系统的评估员，他们都同意 SETSum 可以帮助他们更有效地解释 SET 结果；十分之六的教师更喜欢我们的系统而不是标准的静态 PDF 报告（而其余 4 名教师则希望两者兼有）。这表明我们的工作有潜力在未来改革 SET 报告惯例。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/evahuyn/SETSum

AI.tldr: 本文提出SETSum系统，通过情感分析、方面提取、摘要和可视化技术，对教学评估结果进行结构化呈现。
AI.motivation: 传统教学评估报告以静态PDF形式呈现，缺乏对开放性评论的组织和总结，导致教师难以有效利用反馈信息。
AI.method: 结合情感分析、方面提取、文本摘要和数据可视化技术，对教学评估数据进行多维度处理与呈现。
AI.result: 10位教授测试后均认为系统有助于高效解读评估结果，其中6人更偏好SETSum，4人希望保留传统报告。
AI.conclusion: SETSum展示了改革传统教学评估报告模式的潜力，未来可提升教师对评估反馈的利用效率。

authors_text: Yuefei Chen,Xinli Zheng,Chunhua Ju,Fuguang Bao
title: A Support Vector Model of Pruning Trees Evaluation Based on OTSU Algorithm
title_zh: 基于OTSU算法的剪枝树评价支持向量模型
abstract: The tree pruning process is the key to promoting fruits' growth and improving their productions due to effects on the photosynthesis efficiency of fruits and nutrition transportation in branches. Currently, pruning is still highly dependent on human labor. The workers' experience will strongly affect the robustness of the performance of the tree pruning. Thus, it is a challenge for workers and farmers to evaluate the pruning performance. Intended for a better solution to the problem, this paper presents a novel pruning classification strategy model called "OTSU-SVM" to evaluate the pruning performance based on the shadows of branches and leaves. This model considers not only the available illuminated area of the tree but also the uniformity of the illuminated area of the tree. More importantly, our group implements OTSU algorithm into the model, which highly reinforces robustness of the evaluation of this model. In addition, the data from the pear trees in the Yuhang District, Hangzhou is also used in the experiment. In this experiment, we prove that the OTSU-SVM has good accuracy with 80% and high performance in the evaluation of the pruning for the pear trees. It can provide more successful pruning if applied into the orchard. A successful pruning can broaden the illuminated area of individual fruit, and increase nutrition transportation from the target branch, dramatically elevating the weights and production of the fruits.
summary: The tree pruning process is the key to promoting fruits' growth and improving their productions due to effects on the photosynthesis efficiency of fruits and nutrition transportation in branches. Currently, pruning is still highly dependent on human labor. The workers' experience will strongly affect the robustness of the performance of the tree pruning. Thus, it is a challenge for workers and farmers to evaluate the pruning performance. Intended for a better solution to the problem, this paper presents a novel pruning classification strategy model called "OTSU-SVM" to evaluate the pruning performance based on the shadows of branches and leaves. This model considers not only the available illuminated area of the tree but also the uniformity of the illuminated area of the tree. More importantly, our group implements OTSU algorithm into the model, which highly reinforces robustness of the evaluation of this model. In addition, the data from the pear trees in the Yuhang District, Hangzhou is also used in the experiment. In this experiment, we prove that the OTSU-SVM has good accuracy with 80% and high performance in the evaluation of the pruning for the pear trees. It can provide more successful pruning if applied into the orchard. A successful pruning can broaden the illuminated area of individual fruit, and increase nutrition transportation from the target branch, dramatically elevating the weights and production of the fruits.
abstract_zh: 树木修剪过程影响果实的光合作用效率和枝条营养输送，是促进果实生长、提高产量的关键。目前，修剪仍然高度依赖人力。工人的经验将强烈影响树木修剪性能的鲁棒性。因此，评估修剪性能对工人和农民来说是一个挑战。为了更好地解决该问题，本文提出了一种新颖的剪枝分类策略模型“OTSU-SVM”，根据枝叶的阴影来评估剪枝性能。该模型不仅考虑了树木的可用照明面积，还考虑了树木照明面积的均匀性。更重要的是，我们小组在模型中实现了OTSU算法，这极大地增强了该模型评估的鲁棒性。此外，实验中还使用了杭州市余杭区梨树的数据。在本实验中，我们证明了 OTSU-SVM 在梨树修剪评估方面具有 80% 的良好准确率和高性能。如果应用于果园，它可以提供更成功的修剪。成功的修剪可以扩大单个果实的光照面积，并增加目标枝条的营养输送，从而显着提高果实的重量和产量。

AI.tldr: 提出基于OTSU算法的支持向量机模型（OTSU-SVM）用于评估树木修剪效果，以提高水果产量和质量。
AI.motivation: 当前树木修剪依赖人工经验，评估结果不稳定，亟需自动化、客观的评估方法以提高修剪效果和水果产量。
AI.method: 融合OTSU算法与支持向量机（SVM），通过分析树枝和叶片阴影的光照区域及均匀性，构建修剪效果评估模型，并利用杭州余杭区梨树数据进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，OTSU-SVM模型在梨树修剪评估中准确率达80%，能有效提升光照面积和养分运输，提高果实产量。
AI.conclusion: OTSU-SVM模型为果园修剪评估提供了有效解决方案，有助于提升水果产量和生产效率。

search_text: A Support Vector Model of Pruning Trees Evaluation Based on OTSU Algorithm 基于OTSU算法的剪枝树评价支持向量模型 The tree pruning process is the key to promoting fruits' growth and improving their productions due to effects on the photosynthesis efficiency of fruits and nutrition transportation in branches. authors_text: Shiwei Liu,Tianlong Chen,Xiaohan Chen,Xuxi Chen,Qiao Xiao,Boqian Wu,Tommi Kärkkäinen,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Decebal Mocanu,Zhangyang Wang
title: More ConvNets in the 2020s: Scaling up Kernels Beyond 51x51 using Sparsity
title_zh: 2020 年代更多的卷积网络：使用稀疏性将内核扩展到 51x51 以上
abstract: Transformers have quickly shined in the computer vision world since the emergence of Vision Transformers (ViTs). The dominant role of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) seems to be challenged by increasingly effective transformer-based models. Very recently, a couple of advanced convolutional models strike back with large kernels motivated by the local-window attention mechanism, showing appealing performance and efficiency. While one of them, i.e. RepLKNet, impressively manages to scale the kernel size to 31x31 with improved performance, the performance starts to saturate as the kernel size continues growing, compared to the scaling trend of advanced ViTs such as Swin Transformer. In this paper, we explore the possibility of training extreme convolutions larger than 31x31 and test whether the performance gap can be eliminated by strategically enlarging convolutions. This study ends up with a recipe for applying extremely large kernels from the perspective of sparsity, which can smoothly scale up kernels to 61x61 with better performance. Built on this recipe, we propose Sparse Large Kernel Network (SLaK), a pure CNN architecture equipped with sparse factorized 51x51 kernels that can perform on par with or better than state-of-the-art hierarchical Transformers and modern ConvNet architectures like ConvNeXt and RepLKNet, on ImageNet classification as well as a wide range of downstream tasks including semantic segmentation on ADE20K, object detection on PASCAL VOC 2007, and object detection/segmentation on MS COCO.
summary: Transformers have quickly shined in the computer vision world since the emergence of Vision Transformers (ViTs). The dominant role of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) seems to be challenged by increasingly effective transformer-based models. Very recently, a couple of advanced convolutional models strike back with large kernels motivated by the local-window attention mechanism, showing appealing performance and efficiency. While one of them, i.e. RepLKNet, impressively manages to scale the kernel size to 31x31 with improved performance, the performance starts to saturate as the kernel size continues growing, compared to the scaling trend of advanced ViTs such as Swin Transformer. In this paper, we explore the possibility of training extreme convolutions larger than 31x31 and test whether the performance gap can be eliminated by strategically enlarging convolutions. This study ends up with a recipe for applying extremely large kernels from the perspective of sparsity, which can smoothly scale up kernels to 61x61 with better performance. Built on this recipe, we propose Sparse Large Kernel Network (SLaK), a pure CNN architecture equipped with sparse factorized 51x51 kernels that can perform on par with or better than state-of-the-art hierarchical Transformers and modern ConvNet architectures like ConvNeXt and RepLKNet, on ImageNet classification as well as a wide range of downstream tasks including semantic segmentation on ADE20K, object detection on PASCAL VOC 2007, and object detection/segmentation on MS COCO.
abstract_zh: 自从 Vision Transformers (ViTs) 出现以来，Transformers 迅速在计算机视觉领域大放异彩。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的主导地位似乎受到日益有效的基于 Transformer 的模型的挑战。最近，一些先进的卷积模型在局部窗口注意力机制的推动下利用大内核进行了反击，显示出吸引人的性能和效率。虽然其中之一，即 RepLKNet，令人印象深刻地设法将内核大小扩展到 31x31，并提高了性能，但与 Swin Transformer 等高级 ViT 的扩展趋势相比，随着内核大小的持续增长，性能开始饱和。在本文中，我们探讨了训练大于 31x31 的极限卷积的可能性，并测试是否可以通过策略性扩大卷积来消除性能差距。这项研究最终得出了从稀疏性角度应用极大核的方法，可以将核平滑地扩展到 61x61，并具有更好的性能。在此基础上，我们提出了稀疏大内核网络（SLaK），这是一种配备稀疏分解 51x51 内核的纯 CNN 架构，其性能与最先进的分层 Transformer 和现代 ConvNet 架构（如 ConvNeXt 和 RepLKNet）相当或更好，在 ImageNet 分类以及广泛的下游任务上，包括 ADE20K 上的语义分割、PASCAL VOC 2007 上的对象检测和对象检测MS COCO 上的检测/分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏性的极大卷积核网络（SLaK），通过扩展超过51x51的稀疏卷积核，在图像分类及下游任务中达到与先进Transformer和ConvNet相当或更优的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在视觉领域表现出色，但卷积神经网络（CNN）通过局部窗口注意力机制的大型卷积核仍具竞争力。现有模型（如RepLKNet）在31x31卷积核后性能趋于饱和，需探索更大卷积核的可行性。
AI.method: 通过稀疏性策略设计稀疏分解的51x51卷积核，提出SLaK架构，结合稀疏训练技术实现卷积核的高效扩展，同时保持计算效率。
AI.result: SLaK在ImageNet分类及ADE20K、PASCAL VOC 2007、MS COCO等下游任务中，性能优于或匹敌Swin Transformer、ConvNeXt和RepLKNet等先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏性驱动的极大卷积核网络可有效提升CNN性能，证明在Transformer主导的背景下，优化后的CNN仍具竞争力。

authors_text: Shannan Guan,Haiyan Lu,Linchao Zhu,Gengfa Fang
title: PoseGU: 3D Human Pose Estimation with Novel Human Pose Generator and Unbiased Learning
title_zh: PoseGU：利用新型人体姿势生成器和无偏学习进行 3D 人体姿势估计
abstract: 3D pose estimation has recently gained substantial interests in computer vision domain. Existing 3D pose estimation methods have a strong reliance on large size well-annotated 3D pose datasets, and they suffer poor model generalization on unseen poses due to limited diversity of 3D poses in training sets. In this work, we propose PoseGU, a novel human pose generator that generates diverse poses with access only to a small size of seed samples, while equipping the Counterfactual Risk Minimization to pursue an unbiased evaluation objective. Extensive experiments demonstrate PoseGU outforms almost all the state-of-the-art 3D human pose methods under consideration over three popular benchmark datasets. Empirical analysis also proves PoseGU generates 3D poses with improved data diversity and better generalization ability.
summary: 3D pose estimation has recently gained substantial interests in computer vision domain. Existing 3D pose estimation methods have a strong reliance on large size well-annotated 3D pose datasets, and they suffer poor model generalization on unseen poses due to limited diversity of 3D poses in training sets. In this work, we propose PoseGU, a novel human pose generator that generates diverse poses with access only to a small size of seed samples, while equipping the Counterfactual Risk Minimization to pursue an unbiased evaluation objective. Extensive experiments demonstrate PoseGU outforms almost all the state-of-the-art 3D human pose methods under consideration over three popular benchmark datasets. Empirical analysis also proves PoseGU generates 3D poses with improved data diversity and better generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 3D 姿态估计最近在计算机视觉领域引起了极大的兴趣。现有的 3D 姿态估计方法强烈依赖于大尺寸、注释良好的 3D 姿态数据集，并且由于训练集中 3D 姿态的多样性有限，它们对未见过的姿态的模型泛化能力很差。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PoseGU，一种新颖的人体姿势生成器，它可以仅访问少量种子样本来生成多种姿势，同时配备反事实风险最小化以追求公正的评估目标。大量实验表明，在三个流行的基准数据集上，PoseGU 优于几乎所有最先进的 3D 人体姿势方法。实证分析还证明 PoseGU 生成的 3D 姿势具有改进的数据多样性和更好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoseGU方法，通过新颖的人体姿态生成器和无偏学习策略，解决3D人体姿态估计中数据多样性不足和模型泛化能力差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D姿态估计方法依赖大规模标注数据集，但因训练数据姿态多样性有限，导致模型在未见过的姿态上表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计PoseGU生成器，仅需少量种子样本即可生成多样化3D姿态，并结合反事实风险最小化实现无偏评估目标。
AI.result: 在三个主流数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，生成的姿态数据具有更高多样性和更强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PoseGU通过生成多样化姿态数据和无偏学习策略，有效提升了3D人体姿态估计的性能和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Eric Mörth,Stefan Bruckner,Noeska N. Smit
title: ScrollyVis: Interactive visual authoring of guided dynamic narratives for scientific scrollytelling
title_zh: ScrollyVis：用于科学滚动讲述的引导动态叙事的交互式视觉创作
abstract: Visual stories are an effective and powerful tool to convey specific information to a diverse public. Scrollytelling is a recent visual storytelling technique extensively used on the web, where content appears or changes as users scroll up or down a page. By employing the familiar gesture of scrolling as its primary interaction mechanism, it provides users with a sense of control, exploration and discoverability while still offering a simple and intuitive interface. In this paper, we present a novel approach for authoring, editing, and presenting data-driven scientific narratives using scrollytelling. Our method flexibly integrates common sources such as images, text, and video, but also supports more specialized visualization techniques such as interactive maps as well as scalar field and mesh data visualizations. We show that scrolling navigation can be used to traverse dynamic narratives and demonstrate how it can be combined with interactive parameter exploration. The resulting system consists of an extensible web-based authoring tool capable of exporting stand-alone stories that can be hosted on any web server. We demonstrate the power and utility of our approach with case studies from several of diverse scientific fields and with a user study including 12 participants of diverse professional backgrounds. Furthermore, an expert in creating interactive articles assessed the usefulness of our approach and the quality of the created stories.
summary: Visual stories are an effective and powerful tool to convey specific information to a diverse public. Scrollytelling is a recent visual storytelling technique extensively used on the web, where content appears or changes as users scroll up or down a page. By employing the familiar gesture of scrolling as its primary interaction mechanism, it provides users with a sense of control, exploration and discoverability while still offering a simple and intuitive interface. In this paper, we present a novel approach for authoring, editing, and presenting data-driven scientific narratives using scrollytelling. Our method flexibly integrates common sources such as images, text, and video, but also supports more specialized visualization techniques such as interactive maps as well as scalar field and mesh data visualizations. We show that scrolling navigation can be used to traverse dynamic narratives and demonstrate how it can be combined with interactive parameter exploration. The resulting system consists of an extensible web-based authoring tool capable of exporting stand-alone stories that can be hosted on any web server. We demonstrate the power and utility of our approach with case studies from several of diverse scientific fields and with a user study including 12 participants of diverse professional backgrounds. Furthermore, an expert in creating interactive articles assessed the usefulness of our approach and the quality of the created stories.
abstract_zh: 视觉故事是向多元化公众传达特定信息的有效且强大的工具。滚动讲述是一种最近在网络上广泛使用的视觉叙事技术，当用户向上或向下滚动页面时，内容会出现或更改。通过采用熟悉的滚动手势作为主要交互机制，它为用户提供了控制、探索和发现的感觉，同时仍然提供了简单直观的界面。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用滚动讲述来创作、编辑和呈现数据驱动的科学叙述的新颖方法。我们的方法灵活地集成了图像、文本和视频等常见来源，但也支持更专业的可视化技术，例如交互式地图以及标量场和网格数据可视化。我们展示了滚动导航可用于遍历动态叙述，并演示如何将其与交互式参数探索相结合。由此产生的系统包含一个可扩展的基于 Web 的创作工具，能够导出可托管在任何 Web 服务器上的独立故事。我们通过来自多个不同科学领域的案例研究以及包括 12 名不同专业背景的参与者的用户研究来展示我们方法的力量和实用性。此外，一位创建互动文章的专家评估了我们方法的实用性和所创建故事的质量。

AI.tldr: 开发一种交互式可视化工具，用于创建科学叙事的滚动动态可视化
AI.motivation: 传统科学可视化难以有效传达动态数据，需结合滚动交互提升叙事能力
AI.method: 整合多媒体与交互式可视化技术，开发基于Web的作者工具，支持动态叙事与参数交互
AI.result: 通过多领域案例和用户测试验证了系统的有效性，专家认可其叙事质量和实用性
AI.conclusion: ScrollyVis有效提升科学叙事的交互性，为数据驱动叙事提供新工具

search_text: ScrollyVis: Interactive visual authoring of guided dynamic narratives for scientific scrollytelling ScrollyVis：用于科学滚动讲述的引导动态叙事的交互式视觉创作 Visual stories are an effective and powerful tool to convey specific information to a diverse public. Scrollytelling is a recent visual storytelling technique extensively used on the web, where content appears or changes as users scroll up or down a page. By employing the familiar gesture of scrolling as its primary interaction mechanism, it provides users with a sense of control, exploration and discoverability while still offering a simple and intuitive interface. In this paper, we present a novel approach for authoring, editing, and presenting data-driven scientific narratives using scrollytelling. Our method flexibly integrates common sources such as images, text, and video, but also supports more specialized visualization techniques such as interactive maps as well as scalar field and mesh data visualizations. We show that scrolling navigation can be used to traverse dynamic narratives and demonstrate how it can be combined with interactive parameter exploration. The resulting system consists of an extensible web-based authoring tool capable of exporting stand-alone stories that can be hosted on any web server. We demonstrate the power and utility of our approach with case studies from several of diverse scientific fields and with a user study including 12 participants of diverse professional backgrounds. Furthermore, an expert in creating interactive articles assessed the usefulness of our approach and the quality of the created stories. 视觉故事是向多元化公众传达特定信息的有效且强大的工具。滚动讲述是一种最近在网络上广泛使用的视觉叙事技术，当用户向上或向下滚动页面时，内容会出现或更改。通过采用熟悉的滚动手势作为主要交互机制，它为用户提供了控制、探索和发现的感觉，同时仍然提供了简单直观的界面。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用滚动讲述来创作、编辑和呈现数据驱动的科学叙述的新颖方法。我们的方法灵活地集成了图像、文本和视频等常见来源，但也支持更专业的可视化技术，例如交互式地图以及标量场和网格数据可视化。我们展示了滚动导航可用于遍历动态叙述，并演示如何将其与交互式参数探索相结合。由此产生的系统包含一个可扩展的基于 Web 的创作工具，能够导出可托管在任何 Web 服务器上的独立故事。我们通过来自多个不同科学领域的案例研究以及包括 12 名不同专业背景的参与者的用户研究来展示我们方法的力量和实用性。此外，一位创建互动文章的专家评估了我们方法的实用性和所创建故事的质量。 开发一种交互式可视化工具，用于创建科学叙事的滚动动态可视化 Eric Mörth,Stefan Bruckner,Noeska N. authors_text: Victor Reis,Thomas Rothvoss
title: Approximate Carathéodory bounds via Discrepancy Theory
title_zh: 通过差异理论近似卡拉西奥多里边界
abstract: The approximate Carathéodory problem in general form is as follows: Given two symmetric convex bodies $P,Q \subseteq \mathbb{R}^m$, a parameter $k \in \mathbb{N}$ and $\mathbf{z} \in \textrm{conv}(X)$ with $X \subseteq P$, find $\mathbf{v}_1,\ldots,\mathbf{v}_k \in X$ so that $\|\mathbf{z} - \frac{1}{k}\sum_{i=1}^k \mathbf{v}_i\|_Q$ is minimized. Maurey showed that if both $P$ and $Q$ coincide with the $\| \cdot \|_p$-ball, then an error of $O(\sqrt{p/k})$ is possible. We prove a reduction to the vector balancing constant from discrepancy theory which for most cases can provide tight bounds for general $P$ and $Q$. For the case where $P$ and $Q$ are both $\| \cdot \|_p$-balls we prove an upper bound of $\sqrt{ \frac{\min\{ p, \log (\frac{2m}{k}) \}}{k}}$. Interestingly, this bound cannot be obtained taking independent random samples; instead we use the Lovett-Meka random walk. We also prove an extension to the more general case where $P$ and $Q$ are $\|\cdot \|_p$ and $\| \cdot \|_q$-balls with $2 \leq p \leq q \leq \infty$.
summary: The approximate Carathéodory problem in general form is as follows: Given two symmetric convex bodies $P,Q \subseteq \mathbb{R}^m$, a parameter $k \in \mathbb{N}$ and $\mathbf{z} \in \textrm{conv}(X)$ with $X \subseteq P$, find $\mathbf{v}_1,\ldots,\mathbf{v}_k \in X$ so that $\|\mathbf{z} - \frac{1}{k}\sum_{i=1}^k \mathbf{v}_i\|_Q$ is minimized. Maurey showed that if both $P$ and $Q$ coincide with the $\| \cdot \|_p$-ball, then an error of $O(\sqrt{p/k})$ is possible. We prove a reduction to the vector balancing constant from discrepancy theory which for most cases can provide tight bounds for general $P$ and $Q$. For the case where $P$ and $Q$ are both $\| \cdot \|_p$-balls we prove an upper bound of $\sqrt{ \frac{\min\{ p, \log (\frac{2m}{k}) \}}{k}}$. Interestingly, this bound cannot be obtained taking independent random samples; instead we use the Lovett-Meka random walk. We also prove an extension to the more general case where $P$ and $Q$ are $\|\cdot \|_p$ and $\| \cdot \|_q$-balls with $2 \leq p \leq q \leq \infty$.
abstract_zh: 一般形式的近似 Carathéodory 问题如下：给定两个对称凸体 $P,Q \subseteq \mathbb{R}^m$，参数 $k \in \mathbb{N}$ 和 $\mathbf{z} \in \textrm{conv}(X)$ 以及 $X \subseteq P$，找到 $\mathbf{v}_1,\ldots,\mathbf{v}_k \in X$ 使得 $\|\mathbf{z} - \frac{1}{k}\sum_{i=1}^k \mathbf{v}_i\|_Q$ 最小化。 Maurey 表明，如果 $P$ 和 $Q$ 都与 $\| 一致\cdot \|_p$-ball，则可能出现 $O(\sqrt{p/k})$ 的错误。我们证明了差异理论对向量平衡常数的约简，在大多数情况下，它可以为一般的 $P$ 和 $Q$ 提供严格的界限。对于 $P$ 和 $Q$ 都是 $\| 的情况\cdot \|_p$-balls 我们证明了 $\sqrt{ \frac{\min\{ p, \log (\frac{2m}{k}) \}}{k}}$ 的上限。有趣的是，这个界限不能通过独立随机样本获得。相反，我们使用 Lovett-Meka 随机游走。我们还证明了对更一般情况的扩展，其中 $P$ 和 $Q$ 是 $\|\cdot \|_p$ 和 $\| \cdot \|_q$ - 球与 $2 \leq p \leq q \leq \infty$。

AI.tldr: 本文通过 discrepancy theory 研究近似 Carathéodory 问题，旨在为一般凸体 P 和 Q 提供更紧的误差界。
AI.motivation: 传统 Maurey 结果仅适用于 Lp 球体，无法处理更一般的凸体情况，且随机采样方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 将问题归约到 discrepancy theory 中的向量平衡常数，并采用 Lovett-Meka 随机游走方法构造近似解。
AI.result: 对 Lp 球体获得误差上界 O(√(min{p, log(2m/k)}/k))，并扩展到 2 ≤ p ≤ q ≤ ∞ 的混合范数情形。
AI.conclusion: discrepancy theory 为近似 Carathéodory 问题提供了统一的分析框架，显著改进了现有结果的适用范围和精度。

authors_text: Fernando Arevalo N.,Christian Alison M. Piolo,Tahasanul Ibrahim,Andreas Schwung
title: Production Assessment using a Knowledge Transfer Framework and Evidence Theory
title_zh: 使用知识转移框架和证据理论进行生产评估
abstract: Operational knowledge is one of the most valuable assets in a company, as it provides a strategic advantage over competitors and ensures steady and optimal operation in machines. An (interactive) assessment system on the shop floor can optimize the process and reduce stopovers because it can provide constant valuable information regarding the machine condition to the operators. However, formalizing operational (tacit) knowledge to explicit knowledge is not an easy task. This transformation considers modeling expert knowledge, quantification of knowledge uncertainty, and validation of the acquired knowledge. This study proposes a novel approach for production assessment using a knowledge transfer framework and evidence theory to address the aforementioned challenges. The main contribution of this paper is a methodology for the formalization of tacit knowledge based on an extended failure mode and effect analysis for knowledge extraction, as well as the use of evidence theory for the uncertainty definition of knowledge. Moreover, this approach uses primitive recursive functions for knowledge modeling and proposes a validation strategy of the knowledge using machine data. These elements are integrated into an interactive recommendation system hosted on a backend that uses HoloLens as a visual interface. We demonstrate this approach using an industrial setup: a laboratory bulk good system. The results yield interesting insights, including the knowledge validation, uncertainty behavior of knowledge, and interactive troubleshooting for the machine operator.
summary: Operational knowledge is one of the most valuable assets in a company, as it provides a strategic advantage over competitors and ensures steady and optimal operation in machines. An (interactive) assessment system on the shop floor can optimize the process and reduce stopovers because it can provide constant valuable information regarding the machine condition to the operators. However, formalizing operational (tacit) knowledge to explicit knowledge is not an easy task. This transformation considers modeling expert knowledge, quantification of knowledge uncertainty, and validation of the acquired knowledge. This study proposes a novel approach for production assessment using a knowledge transfer framework and evidence theory to address the aforementioned challenges. The main contribution of this paper is a methodology for the formalization of tacit knowledge based on an extended failure mode and effect analysis for knowledge extraction, as well as the use of evidence theory for the uncertainty definition of knowledge. Moreover, this approach uses primitive recursive functions for knowledge modeling and proposes a validation strategy of the knowledge using machine data. These elements are integrated into an interactive recommendation system hosted on a backend that uses HoloLens as a visual interface. We demonstrate this approach using an industrial setup: a laboratory bulk good system. The results yield interesting insights, including the knowledge validation, uncertainty behavior of knowledge, and interactive troubleshooting for the machine operator.
abstract_zh: 操作知识是公司最有价值的资产之一，因为它提供了相对于竞争对手的战略优势，并确保机器的稳定和最佳运行。车间的（交互式）评估系统可以优化流程并减少中途停留，因为它可以为操作员提供有关机器状况的持续有价值的信息。然而，将操作（隐性）知识形式化为显性知识并不是一件容易的事。这种转换考虑了专家知识的建模、知识不确定性的量化以及所获得知识的验证。本研究提出了一种利用知识转移框架和证据理论进行生产评估的新方法来应对上述挑战。本文的主要贡献是基于知识提取的扩展故障模式和效果分析的隐性知识形式化方法，以及使用证据理论来定义知识的不确定性。此外，该方法使用原始递归函数进行知识建模，并提出使用机器数据的知识验证策略。这些元素被集成到托管在后端的交互式推荐系统中，该系统使用 HoloLens 作为可视化界面。我们使用工业装置演示了这种方法：实验室散装货物系统。结果产生了有趣的见解，包括知识验证、知识的不确定性行为以及机器操作员的交互式故障排除。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识转移框架和证据理论的生产评估方法，解决隐性操作知识显性化的挑战。
AI.motivation: 操作知识是企业核心资产，但隐性知识转化为显性知识面临建模困难、不确定性量化不足及验证手段缺失等问题。
AI.method: 结合扩展FMEA进行知识提取，运用证据理论定义知识不确定性，通过原始递归函数建模知识，并基于机器数据验证知识，集成至HoloLens交互系统。
AI.result: 验证了知识有效性，揭示了知识不确定性行为，实现了面向操作员的交互式故障排除，提升了生产评估准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了隐性知识显性化难题，为工业场景下的智能生产评估提供了可落地的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识转移框架和证据理论的生产评估方法，解决隐性操作知识显性化的挑战。
motivation: 操作知识是企业核心资产，但隐性知识转化为显性知识面临建模困难、不确定性量化不足及验证手段缺失等问题。
method: 结合扩展FMEA进行知识提取，运用证据理论定义知识不确定性，通过原始递归函数建模知识，并基于机器数据验证知识，集成至HoloLens交互系统。
result: 验证了知识有效性，揭示了知识不确定性行为，实现了面向操作员的交互式故障排除，提升了生产评估准确性。
conclusion: 该方法有效解决了隐性知识显性化难题，为工业场景下的智能生产评估提供了可落地的解决方案。
search_text: Production Assessment using a Knowledge Transfer Framework and Evidence Theory 使用知识转移框架和证据理论进行生产评估 Operational knowledge is one of the most valuable assets in a company, as it provides a strategic advantage over competitors and ensures steady and optimal operation in machines. An (interactive) assessment system on the shop floor can optimize the process and reduce stopovers because it can provide constant valuable information regarding the machine condition to the operators. However, formalizing operational (tacit) knowledge to explicit knowledge is not an easy task. This transformation considers modeling expert knowledge, quantification of knowledge uncertainty, and validation of the acquired knowledge. This study proposes a novel approach for production assessment using a knowledge transfer framework and evidence theory to address the aforementioned challenges. The main contribution of this paper is a methodology for the formalization of tacit knowledge based on an extended failure mode and effect analysis for knowledge extraction, as well as the use of evidence theory for the uncertainty definition of knowledge. Moreover, this approach uses primitive recursive functions for knowledge modeling and proposes a validation strategy of the knowledge using machine data. These elements are integrated into an interactive recommendation system hosted on a backend that uses HoloLens as a visual interface. We demonstrate this approach using an industrial setup: a laboratory bulk good system. The results yield interesting insights, including the knowledge validation, uncertainty behavior of knowledge, and interactive troubleshooting for the machine operator. 操作知识是公司最有价值的资产之一，因为它提供了相对于竞争对手的战略优势，并确保机器的稳定和最佳运行。车间的（交互式）评估系统可以优化流程并减少中途停留，因为它可以为操作员提供有关机器状况的持续有价值的信息。然而，将操作（隐性）知识形式化为显性知识并不是一件容易的事。这种转换考虑了专家知识的建模、知识不确定性的量化以及所获得知识的验证。本研究提出了一种利用知识转移框架和证据理论进行生产评估的新方法来应对上述挑战。本文的主要贡献是基于知识提取的扩展故障模式和效果分析的隐性知识形式化方法，以及使用证据理论来定义知识的不确定性。此外，该方法使用原始递归函数进行知识建模，并提出使用机器数据的知识验证策略。这些元素被集成到托管在后端的交互式推荐系统中，该系统使用 HoloLens 作为可视化界面。我们使用工业装置演示了这种方法：实验室散装货物系统。结果产生了有趣的见解，包括知识验证、知识的不确定性行为以及机器操作员的交互式故障排除。 本文提出一种基于知识转移框架和证据理论的生产评估方法，解决隐性操作知识显性化的挑战。 Fernando Arevalo N.,Christian Alison M. Piolo,Tahasanul Ibrahim,Andreas Schwung cs.HC

authors_text: Gregory Canal,Blake Mason,Ramya Korlakai Vinayak,Robert Nowak
title: One for All: Simultaneous Metric and Preference Learning over Multiple Users
title_zh: 一应俱全：针对多个用户同时进行指标和偏好学习
abstract: This paper investigates simultaneous preference and metric learning from a crowd of respondents. A set of items represented by $d$-dimensional feature vectors and paired comparisons of the form ``item $i$ is preferable to item $j$'' made by each user is given. Our model jointly learns a distance metric that characterizes the crowd's general measure of item similarities along with a latent ideal point for each user reflecting their individual preferences. This model has the flexibility to capture individual preferences, while enjoying a metric learning sample cost that is amortized over the crowd. We first study this problem in a noiseless, continuous response setting (i.e., responses equal to differences of item distances) to understand the fundamental limits of learning. Next, we establish prediction error guarantees for noisy, binary measurements such as may be collected from human respondents, and show how the sample complexity improves when the underlying metric is low-rank. Finally, we establish recovery guarantees under assumptions on the response distribution. We demonstrate the performance of our model on both simulated data and on a dataset of color preference judgements across a large number of users.
summary: This paper investigates simultaneous preference and metric learning from a crowd of respondents. A set of items represented by $d$-dimensional feature vectors and paired comparisons of the form ``item $i$ is preferable to item $j$'' made by each user is given. Our model jointly learns a distance metric that characterizes the crowd's general measure of item similarities along with a latent ideal point for each user reflecting their individual preferences. This model has the flexibility to capture individual preferences, while enjoying a metric learning sample cost that is amortized over the crowd. We first study this problem in a noiseless, continuous response setting (i.e., responses equal to differences of item distances) to understand the fundamental limits of learning. Next, we establish prediction error guarantees for noisy, binary measurements such as may be collected from human respondents, and show how the sample complexity improves when the underlying metric is low-rank. Finally, we establish recovery guarantees under assumptions on the response distribution. We demonstrate the performance of our model on both simulated data and on a dataset of color preference judgements across a large number of users.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一群受访者的同时偏好和度量学习。给出由 $d$ 维特征向量表示的一组项目以及每个用户进行的“项目 $i$ 优于项目 $j$”形式的配对比较。我们的模型共同学习一个距离度量，该距离度量描述了人群对项目相似性的一般度量，以及每个用户反映其个人偏好的潜在理想点。该模型可以灵活地捕捉个人偏好，同时享受在人群中摊销的度量学习样本成本。我们首先在无噪声、连续响应设置（即响应等于项目距离差）中研究这个问题，以了解学习的基本限制。接下来，我们为噪声、二元测量（例如可能从人类受访者那里收集的测量）建立预测误差保证，并展示当基础指标为低秩时样本复杂性如何提高。最后，我们在响应分布的假设下建立恢复保证。我们在模拟数据和大量用户的颜色偏好判断数据集上展示了我们的模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种同时学习群体度量和多用户偏好的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理多用户场景下的个体差异及样本成本问题，需更高效的联合学习框架。
AI.method: 提出联合学习距离度量与用户理想点的模型，结合噪声处理和低秩度量假设，以降低样本复杂度。
AI.result: 模型在模拟数据和真实用户颜色偏好数据集上均表现出良好性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡群体与个体偏好，适用于大规模多用户场景，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Hung-Min Hsu,Yizhou Wang,Cheng-Yen Yang,Jenq-Neng Hwang,Hoang Le Uyen Thuc,Kwang-Ju Kim
title: GaitTAKE: Gait Recognition by Temporal Attention and Keypoint-guided Embedding
title_zh: GaitTAKE：通过时间注意力和关键点引导嵌入进行步态识别
comment: IEEE International Conference on Image Processing 2022
comments: IEEE International Conference on Image Processing 2022
abstract: Gait recognition, which refers to the recognition or identification of a person based on their body shape and walking styles, derived from video data captured from a distance, is widely used in crime prevention, forensic identification, and social security. However, to the best of our knowledge, most of the existing methods use appearance, posture and temporal feautures without considering a learned temporal attention mechanism for global and local information fusion. In this paper, we propose a novel gait recognition framework, called Temporal Attention and Keypoint-guided Embedding (GaitTAKE), which effectively fuses temporal-attention-based global and local appearance feature and temporal aggregated human pose feature. Experimental results show that our proposed method achieves a new SOTA in gait recognition with rank-1 accuracy of 98.0% (normal), 97.5% (bag) and 92.2% (coat) on the CASIA-B gait dataset; 90.4% accuracy on the OU-MVLP gait dataset.
summary: Gait recognition, which refers to the recognition or identification of a person based on their body shape and walking styles, derived from video data captured from a distance, is widely used in crime prevention, forensic identification, and social security. However, to the best of our knowledge, most of the existing methods use appearance, posture and temporal feautures without considering a learned temporal attention mechanism for global and local information fusion. In this paper, we propose a novel gait recognition framework, called Temporal Attention and Keypoint-guided Embedding (GaitTAKE), which effectively fuses temporal-attention-based global and local appearance feature and temporal aggregated human pose feature. Experimental results show that our proposed method achieves a new SOTA in gait recognition with rank-1 accuracy of 98.0% (normal), 97.5% (bag) and 92.2% (coat) on the CASIA-B gait dataset; 90.4% accuracy on the OU-MVLP gait dataset.
abstract_zh: 步态识别是指根据远距离捕获的视频数据，根据人的体形和行走方式进行识别或识别，广泛应用于犯罪预防、法医鉴定和社会安全等领域。然而，据我们所知，大多数现有方法都使用外观、姿势和时间特征，而没有考虑用于全局和局部信息融合的学习时间注意机制。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的步态识别框架，称为时间注意力和关键点引导嵌入（GaitTAKE），它有效地融合了基于时间注意力的全局和局部外观特征以及时间聚合的人体姿势特征。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在步态识别方面实现了新的 SOTA，在 CASIA-B 步态数据集上，Rank-1 准确率分别为 98.0%（正常）、97.5%（包）和 92.2%（外套）； OU-MVLP 步态数据集的准确度为 90.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间注意力和关键点引导嵌入的步态识别框架GaitTAKE，通过融合全局和局部特征提升识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法未有效结合学习到的时间注意力机制进行全局与局部信息融合，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 设计GaitTAKE框架，整合基于时间注意力的全局局部外观特征与时间聚合的人体姿态特征，通过关键点引导的嵌入方式实现特征融合。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B数据集上达到98.0%（正常）、97.5%（背包）、92.2%（外套）的rank-1准确率，在OU-MVLP数据集上达到90.4%。
AI.conclusion: GaitTAKE通过创新性特征融合方法，在多个数据集上取得当前最优性能，验证了时间注意力与姿态特征结合的有效性。
