authors_text: David Bombara,Revanth Konda,Steven Swanbeck,Jun Zhang
title: Anthropomorphic Twisted String-Actuated Soft Robotic Gripper with Tendon-Based Stiffening
title_zh: 具有肌腱加固功能的拟人化扭弦驱动软机器人夹具
abstract: Realizing high-performance soft robotic grippers is challenging because of the inherent limitations of the soft actuators and artificial muscles that drive them, including low force output, small actuation range, and poor compactness. Despite advances in this area, realizing compact soft grippers with high dexterity and force output is still challenging. This paper explores twisted string actuators (TSAs) to drive a soft robotic gripper. TSAs have been used in numerous robotic applications, but their inclusion in soft robots has been limited. The proposed design of the gripper was inspired by the human hand. Tunable stiffness was implemented in the fingers with antagonistic TSAs. The fingers' bending angles, actuation speed, blocked force output, and stiffness tuning were experimentally characterized. The gripper achieved a score of 6 on the Kapandji test and recreated 31 of the 33 grasps of the Feix GRASP taxonomy. It exhibited a maximum grasping force of 72 N, which was almost 13 times its own weight. A comparison study revealed that the proposed gripper exhibited equivalent or superior performance compared to other similar soft grippers.
summary: Realizing high-performance soft robotic grippers is challenging because of the inherent limitations of the soft actuators and artificial muscles that drive them, including low force output, small actuation range, and poor compactness. Despite advances in this area, realizing compact soft grippers with high dexterity and force output is still challenging. This paper explores twisted string actuators (TSAs) to drive a soft robotic gripper. TSAs have been used in numerous robotic applications, but their inclusion in soft robots has been limited. The proposed design of the gripper was inspired by the human hand. Tunable stiffness was implemented in the fingers with antagonistic TSAs. The fingers' bending angles, actuation speed, blocked force output, and stiffness tuning were experimentally characterized. The gripper achieved a score of 6 on the Kapandji test and recreated 31 of the 33 grasps of the Feix GRASP taxonomy. It exhibited a maximum grasping force of 72 N, which was almost 13 times its own weight. A comparison study revealed that the proposed gripper exhibited equivalent or superior performance compared to other similar soft grippers.
abstract_zh: 实现高性能软体机器人夹具具有挑战性，因为软体执行器和驱动它们的人造肌肉存在固有的局限性，包括力输出小、驱动范围小和紧凑性差。尽管在这一领域取得了进步，但实现具有高灵活性和力输出的紧凑型软夹具仍然具有挑战性。本文探讨了用于驱动软机器人抓手的扭弦致动器 (TSA)。 TSA 已用于许多机器人应用，但它们在软机器人中的应用受到限制。所提出的夹具设计灵感来自于人手。通过对抗性 TSA 在手指中实现可调节的刚度。对手指的弯曲角度、驱动速度、受阻力输出和刚度调节进行了实验表征。该抓取器在 Kapandji 测试中获得了 6 分，并重新创建了 Feix GRASP 分类法的 33 次抓取中的 31 次。它表现出的最大抓握力为 72 N，几乎是其自身重量的 13 倍。一项比较研究表明，与其他类似的软夹具相比，所提出的夹具表现出相同或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 设计一种基于扭弦执行器和肌腱刚度调节的仿人软体机械手夹爪，以提高其抓取力和灵巧度。
AI.motivation: 传统软体执行器存在力量输出低、运动范围小和结构不紧凑的问题，难以实现高性能的软体夹爪。
AI.method: 采用扭弦执行器（TSAs）驱动仿人手指，通过对抗式TSAs实现指尖刚度调节，并进行多参数实验验证。
AI.result: 夹爪在Kapandji测试中得6分，完成31种Feix GRASP抓取方式，最大抓力达72N（13倍自重），性能优于同类软夹爪。
AI.conclusion: 该设计有效提升了软体夹爪的抓取力和灵巧度，验证了TSAs与肌腱刚度调节在软体机器人中的应用潜力。

search_text: Anthropomorphic Twisted String-Actuated Soft Robotic Gripper with Tendon-Based Stiffening 具有肌腱加固功能的拟人化扭弦驱动软机器人夹具 Realizing high-performance soft robotic grippers is challenging because of the inherent limitations of the soft actuators and artificial muscles that drive them, including low force output, small actuation range, and poor compactness. Despite advances in this area, realizing compact soft grippers with high dexterity and force output is still challenging. This paper explores twisted string actuators (TSAs) to drive a soft robotic gripper. TSAs have been used in numerous robotic applications, but their inclusion in soft robots has been limited. The proposed design of the gripper was inspired by the human hand. Tunable stiffness was implemented in the fingers with antagonistic TSAs. The fingers' bending angles, actuation speed, blocked force output, and stiffness tuning were experimentally characterized. The gripper achieved a score of 6 on the Kapandji test and recreated 31 of the 33 grasps of the Feix GRASP taxonomy. It exhibited a maximum grasping force of 72 N, which was almost 13 times its own weight. A comparison study revealed that the proposed gripper exhibited equivalent or superior performance compared to other similar soft grippers. 实现高性能软体机器人夹具具有挑战性，因为软体执行器和驱动它们的人造肌肉存在固有的局限性，包括力输出小、驱动范围小和紧凑性差。尽管在这一领域取得了进步，但实现具有高灵活性和力输出的紧凑型软夹具仍然具有挑战性。本文探讨了用于驱动软机器人抓手的扭弦致动器 (TSA)。 TSA 已用于许多机器人应用，但它们在软机器人中的应用受到限制。所提出的夹具设计灵感来自于人手。通过对抗性 TSA 在手指中实现可调节的刚度。对手指的弯曲角度、驱动速度、受阻力输出和刚度调节进行了实验表征。该抓取器在 Kapandji 测试中获得了 6 分，并重新创建了 Feix GRASP 分类法的 33 次抓取中的 31 次。它表现出的最大抓握力为 72 N，几乎是其自身重量的 13 倍。一项比较研究表明，与其他类似的软夹具相比，所提出的夹具表现出相同或更好的性能。 设计一种基于扭弦执行器和肌腱刚度调节的仿人软体机械手夹爪，以提高其抓取力和灵巧度。 David Bombara,Revanth Konda,Steven Swanbeck,Jun Zhang cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Blas Kolic,Mateo Tonatiuh Rodriguez-Cervantes,Pablo Padilla-Longoria,Francis Knights
title: Rhythm and form in music: a complex systems approach
title_zh: 音乐的节奏和形式：复杂的系统方法
abstract: There has been an everlasting discussion around the concept of form in music. This work is motivated by such debate by using a complex systems framework in which we study the form as an emergent property of rhythm. Such a framework corresponds with the traditional notion of musical form and allows us to generalize this concept to more general shapes and structures in music. We develop the three following metrics of the rhythmic complexity of a musical piece and its parts: 1) the rhythmic heterogeneity, based on the permutation entropy, where high values indicate a wide variety of rhythmic patterns; 2) the syncopation, based on the distribution of on-beat onsets, where high values indicate a high proportion of off-the-beat notes; and 3) the component extractor, based on the communities of a visibility graph of the rhythmic figures over time, where we identify structural components that constitute the piece at a (to be explained) perceptual level. With the same parameters, our metrics are comparable within a piece or between pieces.
summary: There has been an everlasting discussion around the concept of form in music. This work is motivated by such debate by using a complex systems framework in which we study the form as an emergent property of rhythm. Such a framework corresponds with the traditional notion of musical form and allows us to generalize this concept to more general shapes and structures in music. We develop the three following metrics of the rhythmic complexity of a musical piece and its parts: 1) the rhythmic heterogeneity, based on the permutation entropy, where high values indicate a wide variety of rhythmic patterns; 2) the syncopation, based on the distribution of on-beat onsets, where high values indicate a high proportion of off-the-beat notes; and 3) the component extractor, based on the communities of a visibility graph of the rhythmic figures over time, where we identify structural components that constitute the piece at a (to be explained) perceptual level. With the same parameters, our metrics are comparable within a piece or between pieces.
abstract_zh: 关于音乐形式的概念一直存在着持久的讨论。这项工作的动机是通过使用复杂的系统框架来研究这种形式作为节奏的新兴属性。这样的框架与音乐形式的传统概念相对应，并允许我们将这个概念推广到音乐中更一般的形状和结构。我们开发了以下三个衡量音乐作品及其部分的节奏复杂性的指标：1）基于排列熵的节奏异质性，其中高值表示节奏模式的多样性； 2) 切分音，基于节拍开始的分布，其中高值表示非节拍音符的比例高； 3）组件提取器，基于随时间变化的节奏图形的可见性图的社区，我们在感知层面上识别构成该作品的结构组件。使用相同的参数，我们的指标在一个片段内或片段之间具有可比性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过复杂系统框架研究音乐中的节奏与形式关系，提出三种度量节奏复杂性的指标。
AI.motivation: 传统音乐形式概念存在争议，本文旨在通过复杂系统方法将形式视为节奏的涌现属性，并推广至更广泛的音乐结构分析。
AI.method: 开发三种指标：1) 基于排列熵的节奏异质性；2) 基于节拍分布的切分音度量；3) 基于可见性图社区检测的结构组件提取器。
AI.result: 建立可比的节奏复杂性度量体系，支持同一作品内部或不同作品间的分析对比。
AI.conclusion: 该框架符合传统音乐形式概念，为音乐结构分析提供量化工具，拓展了形式研究的适用范围。

authors_text: Rebecca Roelofs,Liting Sun,Ben Caine,Khaled S. Refaat,Ben Sapp,Scott Ettinger,Wei Chai
title: CausalAgents: A Robustness Benchmark for Motion Forecasting using Causal Relationships
title_zh: CausalAgents：使用因果关系进行运动预测的鲁棒性基准
comment: Rebecca Roelofs and Liting Sun are equally contributed to the work
comments: Rebecca Roelofs and Liting Sun are equally contributed to the work
abstract: As machine learning models become increasingly prevalent in motion forecasting for autonomous vehicles (AVs), it is critical to ensure that model predictions are safe and reliable. However, exhaustively collecting and labeling the data necessary to fully test the long tail of rare and challenging scenarios is difficult and expensive. In this work, we construct a new benchmark for evaluating and improving model robustness by applying perturbations to existing data. Specifically, we conduct an extensive labeling effort to identify causal agents, or agents whose presence influences human drivers' behavior in any format, in the Waymo Open Motion Dataset (WOMD), and we use these labels to perturb the data by deleting non-causal agents from the scene. We evaluate a diverse set of state-of-the-art deep-learning model architectures on our proposed benchmark and find that all models exhibit large shifts under even non-causal perturbation: we observe a 25-38% relative change in minADE as compared to the original. We also investigate techniques to improve model robustness, including increasing the training dataset size and using targeted data augmentations that randomly drop non-causal agents throughout training. Finally, we release the causal agent labels (at https://github.com/google-research/causal-agents) as an additional attribute to WOMD and the robustness benchmarks to aid the community in building more reliable and safe deep-learning models for motion forecasting.
summary: As machine learning models become increasingly prevalent in motion forecasting for autonomous vehicles (AVs), it is critical to ensure that model predictions are safe and reliable. However, exhaustively collecting and labeling the data necessary to fully test the long tail of rare and challenging scenarios is difficult and expensive. In this work, we construct a new benchmark for evaluating and improving model robustness by applying perturbations to existing data. Specifically, we conduct an extensive labeling effort to identify causal agents, or agents whose presence influences human drivers' behavior in any format, in the Waymo Open Motion Dataset (WOMD), and we use these labels to perturb the data by deleting non-causal agents from the scene. We evaluate a diverse set of state-of-the-art deep-learning model architectures on our proposed benchmark and find that all models exhibit large shifts under even non-causal perturbation: we observe a 25-38% relative change in minADE as compared to the original. We also investigate techniques to improve model robustness, including increasing the training dataset size and using targeted data augmentations that randomly drop non-causal agents throughout training. Finally, we release the causal agent labels (at https://github.com/google-research/causal-agents) as an additional attribute to WOMD and the robustness benchmarks to aid the community in building more reliable and safe deep-learning models for motion forecasting.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习模型在自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 运动预测中变得越来越普遍，确保模型预测的安全可靠至关重要。然而，详尽地收集和标记充分测试罕见和具有挑战性场景的长尾所需的数据是困难且昂贵的。在这项工作中，我们通过对现有数据应用扰动来构建一个新的基准来评估和提高模型的稳健性。具体来说，我们在 Waymo 开放运动数据集 (WOMD) 中进行了广泛的标记工作，以识别因果代理或其存在以任何形式影响人类驾驶员行为的代理，并使用这些标签通过从场景中删除非因果代理来扰乱数据。我们在我们提出的基准上评估了一组不同的最先进的深度学习模型架构，发现所有模型甚至在非因果扰动下都表现出很大的变化：与原始模型相比，我们观察到 minADE 的相对变化为 25-38%。我们还研究了提高模型鲁棒性的技术，包括增加训练数据集的大小以及使用有针对性的数据增强，在整个训练过程中随机删除非因果代理。最后，我们发布了因果代理标签（https://github.com/google-research/causal-agents）作为 WOMD 的附加属性和鲁棒性基准，以帮助社区构建更可靠、更安全的运动预测深度学习模型。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出CausalAgents基准，通过因果关系分析提升运动预测模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中的运动预测模型需应对罕见场景，但数据收集成本高且困难，需通过基准测试提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在Waymo数据集中标注因果代理，通过删除非因果代理生成扰动数据，并评估模型性能及改进方法（如数据增强）。
AI.result: 所有模型在非因果扰动下minADE相对变化25-38%，并开源因果标签及基准以促进研究。
AI.conclusion: CausalAgents基准为评估和提升运动预测模型鲁棒性提供有效工具，推动安全可靠模型开发。

method: 在Waymo数据集中标注因果代理，通过删除非因果代理生成扰动数据，并评估模型性能及改进方法（如数据增强）。
result: 所有模型在非因果扰动下minADE相对变化25-38%，并开源因果标签及基准以促进研究。
conclusion: CausalAgents基准为评估和提升运动预测模型鲁棒性提供有效工具，推动安全可靠模型开发。
search_text: CausalAgents: A Robustness Benchmark for Motion Forecasting using Causal Relationships CausalAgents：使用因果关系进行运动预测的鲁棒性基准 As machine learning models become increasingly prevalent in motion forecasting for autonomous vehicles (AVs), it is critical to ensure that model predictions are safe and reliable. However, exhaustively collecting and labeling the data necessary to fully test the long tail of rare and challenging scenarios is difficult and expensive. In this work, we construct a new benchmark for evaluating and improving model robustness by applying perturbations to existing data. Specifically, we conduct an extensive labeling effort to identify causal agents, or agents whose presence influences human drivers' behavior in any format, in the Waymo Open Motion Dataset (WOMD), and we use these labels to perturb the data by deleting non-causal agents from the scene. We evaluate a diverse set of state-of-the-art deep-learning model architectures on our proposed benchmark and find that all models exhibit large shifts under even non-causal perturbation: we observe a 25-38% relative change in minADE as compared to the original. We also investigate techniques to improve model robustness, including increasing the training dataset size and using targeted data augmentations that randomly drop non-causal agents throughout training. Finally, we release the causal agent labels (at https://github.com/google-research/causal-agents) as an additional attribute to WOMD and the robustness benchmarks to aid the community in building more reliable and safe deep-learning models for motion forecasting. 随着机器学习模型在自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 运动预测中变得越来越普遍，确保模型预测的安全可靠至关重要。然而，详尽地收集和标记充分测试罕见和具有挑战性场景的长尾所需的数据是困难且昂贵的。在这项工作中，我们通过对现有数据应用扰动来构建一个新的基准来评估和提高模型的稳健性。具体来说，我们在 Waymo 开放运动数据集 (WOMD) 中进行了广泛的标记工作，以识别因果代理或其存在以任何形式影响人类驾驶员行为的代理，并使用这些标签通过从场景中删除非因果代理来扰乱数据。我们在我们提出的基准上评估了一组不同的最先进的深度学习模型架构，发现所有模型甚至在非因果扰动下都表现出很大的变化：与原始模型相比，我们观察到 minADE 的相对变化为 25-38%。我们还研究了提高模型鲁棒性的技术，包括增加训练数据集的大小以及使用有针对性的数据增强，在整个训练过程中随机删除非因果代理。最后，我们发布了因果代理标签（https://github.com/google-research/causal-agents）作为 WOMD 的附加属性和鲁棒性基准，以帮助社区构建更可靠、更安全的运动预测深度学习模型。 该论文提出CausalAgents基准，通过因果关系分析提升运动预测模型的鲁棒性。 Rebecca Roelofs,Liting Sun,Ben Caine,Khaled S. Refaat,Ben Sapp,Scott Ettinger,Wei Chai cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Mohamed Y. Selim,Ahmed E. Kamal,Farid Nait-Abdesselam
title: X-haul Outage Compensation in 5G/6G Using Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces
title_zh: 使用可重构智能表面的 5G/6G 中的 X-haul 中断补偿
comment: This paper was submitted to a conference May 2022
comments: This paper was submitted to a conference May 2022
abstract: 5G network operators consider the dense deployment of small base-stations (SBSs) to increase network coverage and capacity. Hence, operators face the challenge of X-hauling, i.e., backhauling or fronthauling, their traffic to the core network. Also, SBSs densification will increase the possibility of failure of these X-haul links. To cope with this problem, an X-haul outage compensation scheme with the assistance of Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS) is proposed to mitigate or at least alleviate the effect of X-haul failure. The RIS is a newly adopted technology that is able to improve the performance of wireless networks. In this paper, we present and evaluate an X-haul outage compensation scheme based on placing a number of RIS panels in pre-planned locations to mitigate the effect of X-haul failure. This evaluation is done using frequencies below and beyond 6 GHz. Based on our analytical results, the proposed RIS scheme shows that placing a sufficient number of RIS elements in proximity to the failed SBS under certain conditions can help acquire the same X-haul rate before the occurrence of the failure. Also, we show that for high X-haul spectral density, the RIS-assisted transmission with a certain number of elements can be more energy-efficient than line-of-sight and non-line-of-sight transmissions. Finally, the system's energy efficiency is addressed with and without RIS, and the optimal number of RIS reflecting elements is derived.

Hence, operators face the challenge of X-hauling, i.e., backhauling or fronthauling, their traffic to the core network. Also, SBSs densification will increase the possibility of failure of these X-haul links. To cope with this problem, an X-haul outage compensation scheme with the assistance of Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS) is proposed to mitigate or at least alleviate the effect of X-haul failure. The RIS is a newly adopted technology that is able to improve the performance of wireless networks. In this paper, we present and evaluate an X-haul outage compensation scheme based on placing a number of RIS panels in pre-planned locations to mitigate the effect of X-haul failure. This evaluation is done using frequencies below and beyond 6 GHz. Based on our analytical results, the proposed RIS scheme shows that placing a sufficient number of RIS elements in proximity to the failed SBS under certain conditions can help acquire the same X-haul rate before the occurrence of the failure. Also, we show that for high X-haul spectral density, the RIS-assisted transmission with a certain number of elements can be more energy-efficient than line-of-sight and non-line-of-sight transmissions. Finally, the system's energy efficiency is addressed with and without RIS, and the optimal number of RIS reflecting elements is derived.
abstract_zh: 5G网络运营商考虑密集部署小型基站（SBS）以增加网络覆盖范围和容量。因此，运营商面临着 X 传输的挑战，即将其流量回传或前传至核心网络。此外，SBS 的致密化将增加这些 X 传输链路发生故障的可能性。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种借助可重构智能表面（RIS）的X-haul中断补偿方案，以减轻或至少减轻X-haul故障的影响。 RIS是一项新采用的技术，能够提高无线网络的性能。在本文中，我们提出并评估了一种 X 传输断电补偿方案，该方案基于将多个 RIS 面板放置在预先规划的位置，以减轻 X 传输故障的影响。该评估是使用低于和超过 6 GHz 的频率完成的。根据我们的分析结果，所提出的 RIS 方案表明，在某些条件下将足够数量的 RIS 元件放置在故障 SBS 附近可以帮助在故障发生之前获得相同的 X 拖运率。此外，我们还表明，对于高 X 距离频谱密度，具有一定数量元件的 RIS 辅助传输可以比视距和非视距传输更加节能。最后，讨论了使用和不使用 RIS 时系统的能源效率，并得出了 RIS 反射元件的最佳数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用可重构智能表面（RIS）进行X-haul中断补偿的方案，以应对5G/6G网络中密集部署的小型基站（SBS）带来的X-haul链路故障问题。
AI.motivation: 随着5G网络中密集部署小型基站，X-haul链路故障的可能性增加，这对网络性能和可靠性提出了挑战。因此，需要一种有效的解决方案来补偿X-haul中断。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于RIS的X-haul中断补偿方案，通过在预规划位置放置多个RIS面板，以减轻X-haul中断的影响。该方案在低于和高于6 GHz的频率下进行了评估。
AI.result: 分析结果表明，在特定条件下，将足够数量的RIS元素放置在故障SBS附近可以恢复相同的X-haul速率。此外，对于高X-haul频谱密度，RIS辅助传输在某些情况下比视距和非视距传输更节能。
AI.conclusion: RIS技术可以有效补偿X-haul中断，并提高系统能量效率。通过优化RIS反射元件的数量，可以进一步提升网络性能和可靠性。

authors_text: Changwei Gong,Changhong Jing,Yanyan Shen,Shuqiang Wang
title: Dynamic Community Detection via Adversarial Temporal Graph Representation Learning
title_zh: 通过对抗性时态图表示学习进行动态社区检测
abstract: Dynamic community detection has been prospered as a powerful tool for quantifying changes in dynamic brain network connectivity patterns by identifying strongly connected sets of nodes. However, as the network science problems and network data to be processed become gradually more sophisticated, it awaits a better method to efficiently learn low dimensional representation from dynamic network data and reveal its latent function that changes over time in the brain network. In this work, an adversarial temporal graph representation learning (ATGRL) framework is proposed to detect dynamic communities from a small sample of brain network data. It adopts a novel temporal graph attention network as an encoder to capture more efficient spatio-temporal features by attention mechanism in both spatial and temporal dimensions. In addition, the framework employs adversarial training to guide the learning of temporal graph representation and optimize the measurable modularity loss to maximize the modularity of community. Experiments on the real-world brain networks datasets are demonstrated to show the effectiveness of this new method.
summary: Dynamic community detection has been prospered as a powerful tool for quantifying changes in dynamic brain network connectivity patterns by identifying strongly connected sets of nodes. However, as the network science problems and network data to be processed become gradually more sophisticated, it awaits a better method to efficiently learn low dimensional representation from dynamic network data and reveal its latent function that changes over time in the brain network. In this work, an adversarial temporal graph representation learning (ATGRL) framework is proposed to detect dynamic communities from a small sample of brain network data. It adopts a novel temporal graph attention network as an encoder to capture more efficient spatio-temporal features by attention mechanism in both spatial and temporal dimensions. In addition, the framework employs adversarial training to guide the learning of temporal graph representation and optimize the measurable modularity loss to maximize the modularity of community. Experiments on the real-world brain networks datasets are demonstrated to show the effectiveness of this new method.
abstract_zh: 动态社区检测已成为一种强大的工具，通过识别强连接的节点集来量化动态大脑网络连接模式的变化。然而，随着网络科学问题和要处理的网络数据逐渐变得更加复杂，需要更好的方法来有效地从动态网络数据中学习低维表示，并揭示其在脑网络中随时间变化的潜在功能。在这项工作中，提出了一种对抗性时间图表示学习（ATGRL）框架，用于从小脑网络数据样本中检测动态社区。它采用新颖的时间图注意力网络作为编码器，通过空间和时间维度的注意力机制捕获更有效的时空特征。此外，该框架采用对抗性训练来指导时间图表示的学习，并优化可测量的模块化损失，以最大化社区的模块化。对现实世界大脑网络数据集的实验证明了这种新方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对抗性时间图表示学习框架（ATGRL），用于从小样本脑网络数据中检测动态社区。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效学习动态网络数据的低维表示并揭示其随时间变化的潜在功能，需更优方法应对复杂动态网络分析需求。
AI.method: 采用时间图注意力网络作为编码器提取时空特征，并通过对抗训练优化可衡量的模块度损失以提升社区模块度。
AI.result: 在真实世界脑网络数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ATGRL框架为动态社区检测提供了新思路，未来可进一步探索其在复杂动态网络中的应用潜力。

Experiments on the real-world brain networks datasets are demonstrated to show the effectiveness of this new method. 动态社区检测已成为一种强大的工具，通过识别强连接的节点集来量化动态大脑网络连接模式的变化。然而，随着网络科学问题和要处理的网络数据逐渐变得更加复杂，需要更好的方法来有效地从动态网络数据中学习低维表示，并揭示其在脑网络中随时间变化的潜在功能。在这项工作中，提出了一种对抗性时间图表示学习（ATGRL）框架，用于从小脑网络数据样本中检测动态社区。它采用新颖的时间图注意力网络作为编码器，通过空间和时间维度的注意力机制捕获更有效的时空特征。此外，该框架采用对抗性训练来指导时间图表示的学习，并优化可测量的模块化损失，以最大化社区的模块化。对现实世界大脑网络数据集的实验证明了这种新方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种对抗性时间图表示学习框架（ATGRL），用于从小样本脑网络数据中检测动态社区。 Changwei Gong,Changhong Jing,Yanyan Shen,Shuqiang Wang cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xuanwen Huang,Yang Yang,Yang Wang,Chunping Wang,Zhisheng Zhang,Jiarong Xu,Lei Chen,Michalis Vazirgiannis
title: DGraph: A Large-Scale Financial Dataset for Graph Anomaly Detection
title_zh: DGraph：用于图异常检测的大规模金融数据集
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. Dataset Url: https://dgraph.xinye.com/
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. Dataset Url: https://dgraph.xinye.com/
abstract: Graph Anomaly Detection (GAD) has recently become a hot research spot due to its practicability and theoretical value. Since GAD emphasizes the application and the rarity of anomalous samples, enriching the varieties of its datasets is fundamental work. Thus, this paper present DGraph, a real-world dynamic graph in the finance domain. DGraph overcomes many limitations of current GAD datasets. It contains about 3M nodes, 4M dynamic edges, and 1M ground-truth nodes. We provide a comprehensive observation of DGraph, revealing that anomalous nodes and normal nodes generally have different structures, neighbor distribution, and temporal dynamics. Moreover, it suggests that unlabeled nodes are also essential for detecting fraudsters. Furthermore, we conduct extensive experiments on DGraph. Observation and experiments demonstrate that DGraph is propulsive to advance GAD research and enable in-depth exploration of anomalous nodes.
summary: Graph Anomaly Detection (GAD) has recently become a hot research spot due to its practicability and theoretical value. Since GAD emphasizes the application and the rarity of anomalous samples, enriching the varieties of its datasets is fundamental work. Thus, this paper present DGraph, a real-world dynamic graph in the finance domain. DGraph overcomes many limitations of current GAD datasets. It contains about 3M nodes, 4M dynamic edges, and 1M ground-truth nodes. We provide a comprehensive observation of DGraph, revealing that anomalous nodes and normal nodes generally have different structures, neighbor distribution, and temporal dynamics. Moreover, it suggests that unlabeled nodes are also essential for detecting fraudsters. Furthermore, we conduct extensive experiments on DGraph. Observation and experiments demonstrate that DGraph is propulsive to advance GAD research and enable in-depth exploration of anomalous nodes.
abstract_zh: 图异常检测（GAD）因其实用性和理论价值而成为近年来的研究热点。由于GAD强调异常样本的应用性和稀有性，丰富其数据集的多样性是基础工作。因此，本文提出了 DGraph，一种金融领域的真实世界动态图。 DGraph 克服了当前 GAD 数据集的许多限制。它包含大约 3M 个节点、4M 个动态边和 1M 个真实节点。我们对 DGraph 进行了全面的观察，揭示了异常节点和正常节点通常具有不同的结构、邻居分布和时间动态。此外，它表明未标记的节点对于检测欺诈者也至关重要。此外，我们在 DGraph 上进行了广泛的实验。观察和实验表明，DGraph 有助于推进 GAD 研究并实现对异常节点的深入探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DGraph，一个用于图异常检测的大规模金融数据集，旨在推动图异常检测（GAD）研究。
AI.motivation: 现有GAD数据集存在局限性，缺乏真实动态金融场景的数据，且异常样本稀缺，难以支持深入研究。
AI.method: 构建包含300万节点、400万动态边和100万标注节点的DGraph，分析正常与异常节点的结构、邻居分布及时间动态差异，并通过实验验证数据集有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明DGraph能有效揭示异常节点特征，证明未标记节点对欺诈检测的重要性，并推动GAD方法的深入探索。
AI.conclusion: DGraph为金融领域的图异常检测提供了高质量数据支持，有助于促进相关算法研究与实际应用。

authors_text: Roland Olsson,Chau Tran,Lars Magnusson
title: Automatic Synthesis of Neurons for Recurrent Neural Nets
title_zh: 循环神经网络的神经元自动合成
abstract: We present a new class of neurons, ARNs, which give a cross entropy on test data that is up to three times lower than the one achieved by carefully optimized LSTM neurons. The explanations for the huge improvements that often are achieved are elaborate skip connections through time, up to four internal memory states per neuron and a number of novel activation functions including small quadratic forms. The new neurons were generated using automatic programming and are formulated as pure functional programs that easily can be transformed. We present experimental results for eight datasets and found excellent improvements for seven of them, but LSTM remained the best for one dataset. The results are so promising that automatic programming to generate new neurons should become part of the standard operating procedure for any machine learning practitioner who works on time series data such as sensor signals.
summary: We present a new class of neurons, ARNs, which give a cross entropy on test data that is up to three times lower than the one achieved by carefully optimized LSTM neurons. The explanations for the huge improvements that often are achieved are elaborate skip connections through time, up to four internal memory states per neuron and a number of novel activation functions including small quadratic forms. The new neurons were generated using automatic programming and are formulated as pure functional programs that easily can be transformed. We present experimental results for eight datasets and found excellent improvements for seven of them, but LSTM remained the best for one dataset. The results are so promising that automatic programming to generate new neurons should become part of the standard operating procedure for any machine learning practitioner who works on time series data such as sensor signals.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一类新的神经元，ARN，它在测试数据上给出的交叉熵比精心优化的 LSTM 神经元所获得的交叉熵低三倍。通常实现的巨大改进的解释是随着时间的推移精心设计的跳跃连接、每个神经元多达四个内部记忆状态以及许多新颖的激活函数（包括小型二次形式）。新神经元是使用自动编程生成的，并被制定为易于转换的纯功能程序。 We present experimental results for eight datasets and found excellent improvements for seven of them, but LSTM remained the best for one dataset.结果非常有希望，以至于自动编程生成新神经元应该成为任何处理传感器信号等时间序列数据的机器学习从业者的标准操作程序的一部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型循环神经网络神经元ARNs，通过自动编程技术设计出具有跳过连接、多记忆状态和新型激活函数的结构，在多数时间序列数据集上显著优于LSTM。
AI.motivation: 传统LSTM在处理复杂时间序列任务时存在性能瓶颈，而自动编程技术可探索更优神经元架构，从而提升循环神经网络的表达能力与效率。
AI.method: 采用自动编程生成神经元架构，设计包含长距离跳过连接、最多四个内部记忆状态及小规模二次型激活函数的新型神经元，并以纯函数式程序实现其可转换性。
AI.result: 在八个时间序列数据集测试中，七个数据集的交叉熵损失较优化LSTM降低达三倍，但LSTM在单一数据集上仍保持最优表现。
AI.conclusion: 自动编程生成神经元应成为时间序列机器学习的标准实践，ARNs架构为复杂时序建模提供了新的有效范式。

authors_text: Zipei Fan,Xiaojie Yang,Wei Yuan,Renhe Jiang,Quanjun Chen,Xuan Song,Ryosuke Shibasaki
title: Online Trajectory Prediction for Metropolitan Scale Mobility Digital Twin
title_zh: 都市规模移动数字孪生的在线轨迹预测
abstract: Knowing "what is happening" and "what will happen" of the mobility in a city is the building block of a data-driven smart city system. In recent years, mobility digital twin that makes a virtual replication of human mobility and predicting or simulating the fine-grained movements of the subjects in a virtual space at a metropolitan scale in near real-time has shown its great potential in modern urban intelligent systems. However, few studies have provided practical solutions. The main difficulties are four-folds. 1) The daily variation of human mobility is hard to model and predict; 2) the transportation network enforces a complex constraints on human mobility; 3) generating a rational fine-grained human trajectory is challenging for existing machine learning models; and 4) making a fine-grained prediction incurs high computational costs, which is challenging for an online system. Bearing these difficulties in mind, in this paper we propose a two-stage human mobility predictor that stratifies the coarse and fine-grained level predictions. In the first stage, to encode the daily variation of human mobility at a metropolitan level, we automatically extract citywide mobility trends as crowd contexts and predict long-term and long-distance movements at a coarse level. In the second stage, the coarse predictions are resolved to a fine-grained level via a probabilistic trajectory retrieval method, which offloads most of the heavy computations to the offline phase. We tested our method using a real-world mobile phone GPS dataset in the Kanto area in Japan, and achieved good prediction accuracy and a time efficiency of about 2 min in predicting future 1h movements of about 220K mobile phone users on a single machine to support more higher-level analysis of mobility prediction.
summary: Knowing "what is happening" and "what will happen" of the mobility in a city is the building block of a data-driven smart city system. In recent years, mobility digital twin that makes a virtual replication of human mobility and predicting or simulating the fine-grained movements of the subjects in a virtual space at a metropolitan scale in near real-time has shown its great potential in modern urban intelligent systems. However, few studies have provided practical solutions. The main difficulties are four-folds. 1) The daily variation of human mobility is hard to model and predict; 2) the transportation network enforces a complex constraints on human mobility; 3) generating a rational fine-grained human trajectory is challenging for existing machine learning models; and 4) making a fine-grained prediction incurs high computational costs, which is challenging for an online system. Bearing these difficulties in mind, in this paper we propose a two-stage human mobility predictor that stratifies the coarse and fine-grained level predictions. In the first stage, to encode the daily variation of human mobility at a metropolitan level, we automatically extract citywide mobility trends as crowd contexts and predict long-term and long-distance movements at a coarse level. In the second stage, the coarse predictions are resolved to a fine-grained level via a probabilistic trajectory retrieval method, which offloads most of the heavy computations to the offline phase. We tested our method using a real-world mobile phone GPS dataset in the Kanto area in Japan, and achieved good prediction accuracy and a time efficiency of about 2 min in predicting future 1h movements of about 220K mobile phone users on a single machine to support more higher-level analysis of mobility prediction.
abstract_zh: 了解城市交通“正在发生什么”和“将要发生什么”是数据驱动的智慧城市系统的基石。近年来，移动数字孪生能够虚拟复制人类的移动性，并在大都市规模的虚拟空间中近乎实时地预测或模拟主体的细粒度运动，在现代城市智能系统中显示出其巨大潜力。然而，很少有研究提供实用的解决方案。主要困难有四个方面。 1）人类流动性的日常变化难以建模和预测； 2）交通网络对人员流动施加了复杂的限制； 3）生成合理的细粒度人体轨迹对于现有的机器学习模型来说是一个挑战； 4）进行细粒度的预测会产生很高的计算成本，这对于在线系统来说是一个挑战。考虑到这些困难，在本文中，我们提出了一种两阶段的人员流动性预测器，它将粗粒度和细粒度的预测进行分层。在第一阶段，为了对大都市层面的人类流动性的日常变化进行编码，我们自动提取全市范围的流动趋势作为人群背景，并在粗略水平上预测长期和长距离的流动。在第二阶段，通过概率轨迹检索方法将粗略预测解析为细粒度级别，从而将大部分繁重计算卸载到离线阶段。我们使用日本关东地区的真实手机 GPS 数据集对我们的方法进行了测试，在单机上预测约 22 万手机用户未来 1 小时的移动时取得了良好的预测精度和约 2 分钟的时间效率，以支持更高级别的移动预测分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段的人类移动预测方法，用于解决大规模城市交通数字孪生中的轨迹预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究难以处理城市级移动预测中的四个核心挑战：日常移动模式建模、交通网络约束、细粒度轨迹生成及高计算成本。
AI.method: 采用分层预测框架，第一阶段通过提取城市级移动趋势进行粗粒度预测，第二阶段使用概率轨迹检索方法将粗预测细化为细粒度轨迹，并将计算压力转移到离线阶段。
AI.result: 基于日本关东地区真实手机GPS数据集的测试显示，该方法在单机上可实现220K用户1小时移动预测，准确率高且单次预测耗时约2分钟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了预测精度与计算效率，为城市级交通数字孪生系统提供了可行的技术方案。

search_text: Online Trajectory Prediction for Metropolitan Scale Mobility Digital Twin 都市规模移动数字孪生的在线轨迹预测 Knowing "what is happening" and "what will happen" of the mobility in a city is the building block of a data-driven smart city system. In recent years, mobility digital twin that makes a virtual replication of human mobility and predicting or simulating the fine-grained movements of the subjects in a virtual space at a metropolitan scale in near real-time has shown its great potential in modern urban intelligent systems. However, few studies have provided practical solutions. The main difficulties are four-folds. 1) The daily variation of human mobility is hard to model and predict; 2) the transportation network enforces a complex constraints on human mobility; 3) generating a rational fine-grained human trajectory is challenging for existing machine learning models; and 4) making a fine-grained prediction incurs high computational costs, which is challenging for an online system. Bearing these difficulties in mind, in this paper we propose a two-stage human mobility predictor that stratifies the coarse and fine-grained level predictions. In the first stage, to encode the daily variation of human mobility at a metropolitan level, we automatically extract citywide mobility trends as crowd contexts and predict long-term and long-distance movements at a coarse level. In the second stage, the coarse predictions are resolved to a fine-grained level via a probabilistic trajectory retrieval method, which offloads most of the heavy computations to the offline phase. We tested our method using a real-world mobile phone GPS dataset in the Kanto area in Japan, and achieved good prediction accuracy and a time efficiency of about 2 min in predicting future 1h movements of about 220K mobile phone users on a single machine to support more higher-level analysis of mobility prediction. 了解城市交通“正在发生什么”和“将要发生什么”是数据驱动的智慧城市系统的基石。近年来，移动数字孪生能够虚拟复制人类的移动性，并在大都市规模的虚拟空间中近乎实时地预测或模拟主体的细粒度运动，在现代城市智能系统中显示出其巨大潜力。然而，很少有研究提供实用的解决方案。主要困难有四个方面。 1）人类流动性的日常变化难以建模和预测； 2）交通网络对人员流动施加了复杂的限制； 3）生成合理的细粒度人体轨迹对于现有的机器学习模型来说是一个挑战； 4）进行细粒度的预测会产生很高的计算成本，这对于在线系统来说是一个挑战。考虑到这些困难，在本文中，我们提出了一种两阶段的人员流动性预测器，它将粗粒度和细粒度的预测进行分层。在第一阶段，为了对大都市层面的人类流动性的日常变化进行编码，我们自动提取全市范围的流动趋势作为人群背景，并在粗略水平上预测长期和长距离的流动。在第二阶段，通过概率轨迹检索方法将粗略预测解析为细粒度级别，从而将大部分繁重计算卸载到离线阶段。我们使用日本关东地区的真实手机 GPS 数据集对我们的方法进行了测试，在单机上预测约 22 万手机用户未来 1 小时的移动时取得了良好的预测精度和约 2 分钟的时间效率，以支持更高级别的移动预测分析。 本文提出一种两阶段的人类移动预测方法，用于解决大规模城市交通数字孪生中的轨迹预测问题。 Zipei Fan,Xiaojie Yang,Wei Yuan,Renhe Jiang,Quanjun Chen,Xuan Song,Ryosuke Shibasaki cs.SI,cs.AI

authors_text: Chawin Sitawarin,Zachary Golan-Strieb,David Wagner
title: Demystifying the Adversarial Robustness of Random Transformation Defenses
title_zh: 揭秘随机变换防御的对抗鲁棒性
comment: ICML 2022 (short presentation), AAAI 2022 AdvML Workshop (best paper, oral presentation)
comments: ICML 2022 (short presentation), AAAI 2022 AdvML Workshop (best paper, oral presentation)
abstract: Neural networks' lack of robustness against attacks raises concerns in security-sensitive settings such as autonomous vehicles. While many countermeasures may look promising, only a few withstand rigorous evaluation. Defenses using random transformations (RT) have shown impressive results, particularly BaRT (Raff et al., 2019) on ImageNet. However, this type of defense has not been rigorously evaluated, leaving its robustness properties poorly understood. Their stochastic properties make evaluation more challenging and render many proposed attacks on deterministic models inapplicable. First, we show that the BPDA attack (Athalye et al., 2018a) used in BaRT's evaluation is ineffective and likely overestimates its robustness. We then attempt to construct the strongest possible RT defense through the informed selection of transformations and Bayesian optimization for tuning their parameters. Furthermore, we create the strongest possible attack to evaluate our RT defense. Our new attack vastly outperforms the baseline, reducing the accuracy by 83% compared to the 19% reduction by the commonly used EoT attack ($4.3\times$ improvement). Our result indicates that the RT defense on the Imagenette dataset (a ten-class subset of ImageNet) is not robust against adversarial examples. Extending the study further, we use our new attack to adversarially train RT defense (called AdvRT), resulting in a large robustness gain. Code is available at https://github.com/wagner-group/demystify-random-transform.
summary: Neural networks' lack of robustness against attacks raises concerns in security-sensitive settings such as autonomous vehicles. While many countermeasures may look promising, only a few withstand rigorous evaluation. Defenses using random transformations (RT) have shown impressive results, particularly BaRT (Raff et al., 2019) on ImageNet. However, this type of defense has not been rigorously evaluated, leaving its robustness properties poorly understood. Their stochastic properties make evaluation more challenging and render many proposed attacks on deterministic models inapplicable. First, we show that the BPDA attack (Athalye et al., 2018a) used in BaRT's evaluation is ineffective and likely overestimates its robustness. We then attempt to construct the strongest possible RT defense through the informed selection of transformations and Bayesian optimization for tuning their parameters. Furthermore, we create the strongest possible attack to evaluate our RT defense. Our new attack vastly outperforms the baseline, reducing the accuracy by 83% compared to the 19% reduction by the commonly used EoT attack ($4.3\times$ improvement). Our result indicates that the RT defense on the Imagenette dataset (a ten-class subset of ImageNet) is not robust against adversarial examples. Extending the study further, we use our new attack to adversarially train RT defense (called AdvRT), resulting in a large robustness gain. Code is available at https://github.com/wagner-group/demystify-random-transform.
abstract_zh: 神经网络缺乏抵御攻击的鲁棒性，引起了对自动驾驶汽车等安全敏感环境的担忧。虽然许多对策看起来很有希望，但只有少数能够经受住严格的评估。使用随机变换 (RT) 的防御已显示出令人印象深刻的结果，特别是 ImageNet 上的 BaRT（Raff 等人，2019）。然而，这种类型的防御尚未经过严格评估，因此对其稳健性特性知之甚少。它们的随机特性使评估更具挑战性，并使许多针对确定性模型的攻击提议不适用。首先，我们表明 BaRT 评估中使用的 BPDA 攻击（Athalye 等人，2018a）是无效的，并且可能高估了其鲁棒性。然后，我们尝试通过明智的变换选择和贝叶斯优化来调整其参数，构建尽可能最强的 RT 防御。此外，我们创建了尽可能最强的攻击来评估我们的 RT 防御。我们的新攻击大大优于基线，与常用的 EoT 攻击降低 19% 的准确率相比，准确率降低了 83%（提高了 4.3 美元\倍）。我们的结果表明，Imagenette 数据集（ImageNet 的十类子集）上的 RT 防御对于对抗性示例并不稳健。进一步扩展研究，我们使用新的攻击来对抗性地训练 RT 防御（称为 AdvRT），从而获得巨大的鲁棒性增益。代码可在 https://github.com/wagner-group/demystify-random-transform 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机变换防御（RT）在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，提出更有效的攻击方法并验证其防御效果。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在安全敏感场景中易受攻击，而随机变换防御（如BaRT）的鲁棒性尚未被充分验证，其随机性使评估更具挑战性。
AI.method: 分析BPDA攻击的局限性，通过选择性变换与贝叶斯优化构建最强RT防御，设计新型攻击方法并进行对抗训练。
AI.result: 新攻击方法在ImageNet子集上将准确率降低83%（较传统方法提升4.3倍），证明RT防御不鲁棒；对抗训练后（AdvRT）显著提升鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 随机变换防御需结合对抗训练才能有效，本文方法为评估和增强此类防御提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了随机变换防御（RT）在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，提出更有效的攻击方法并验证其防御效果。

authors_text: Alice Baird,Panagiotis Tzirakis,Jeffrey A. Brooks,Christopher B. Gregory,Björn Schuller,Anton Batliner,Dacher Keltner,Alan Cowen
title: The ACII 2022 Affective Vocal Bursts Workshop & Competition: Understanding a critically understudied modality of emotional expression
title_zh: ACII 2022 情感声乐爆发研讨会及比赛：理解一种经过严格研究的情感表达方式
abstract: The ACII Affective Vocal Bursts Workshop & Competition is focused on understanding multiple affective dimensions of vocal bursts: laughs, gasps, cries, screams, and many other non-linguistic vocalizations central to the expression of emotion and to human communication more generally. This year's competition comprises four tracks using a large-scale and in-the-wild dataset of 59,299 vocalizations from 1,702 speakers. The first, the A-VB-High task, requires competition participants to perform a multi-label regression on a novel model for emotion, utilizing ten classes of richly annotated emotional expression intensities, including; Awe, Fear, and Surprise. The second, the A-VB-Two task, utilizes the more conventional 2-dimensional model for emotion, arousal, and valence. The third, the A-VB-Culture task, requires participants to explore the cultural aspects of the dataset, training native-country dependent models. Finally, for the fourth task, A-VB-Type, participants should recognize the type of vocal burst (e.g., laughter, cry, grunt) as an 8-class classification. This paper describes the four tracks and baseline systems, which use state-of-the-art machine learning methods. The baseline performance for each track is obtained by utilizing an end-to-end deep learning model and is as follows: for A-VB-High, a mean (over the 10-dimensions) Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) of 0.5687 CCC is obtained; for A-VB-Two, a mean (over the 2-dimensions) CCC of 0.5084 is obtained; for A-VB-Culture, a mean CCC from the four cultures of 0.4401 is obtained; and for A-VB-Type, the baseline Unweighted Average Recall (UAR) from the 8-classes is 0.4172 UAR.
summary: The ACII Affective Vocal Bursts Workshop & Competition is focused on understanding multiple affective dimensions of vocal bursts: laughs, gasps, cries, screams, and many other non-linguistic vocalizations central to the expression of emotion and to human communication more generally. This year's competition comprises four tracks using a large-scale and in-the-wild dataset of 59,299 vocalizations from 1,702 speakers. The first, the A-VB-High task, requires competition participants to perform a multi-label regression on a novel model for emotion, utilizing ten classes of richly annotated emotional expression intensities, including; Awe, Fear, and Surprise. The second, the A-VB-Two task, utilizes the more conventional 2-dimensional model for emotion, arousal, and valence. The third, the A-VB-Culture task, requires participants to explore the cultural aspects of the dataset, training native-country dependent models. Finally, for the fourth task, A-VB-Type, participants should recognize the type of vocal burst (e.g., laughter, cry, grunt) as an 8-class classification. This paper describes the four tracks and baseline systems, which use state-of-the-art machine learning methods. The baseline performance for each track is obtained by utilizing an end-to-end deep learning model and is as follows: for A-VB-High, a mean (over the 10-dimensions) Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) of 0.5687 CCC is obtained; for A-VB-Two, a mean (over the 2-dimensions) CCC of 0.5084 is obtained; for A-VB-Culture, a mean CCC from the four cultures of 0.4401 is obtained; and for A-VB-Type, the baseline Unweighted Average Recall (UAR) from the 8-classes is 0.4172 UAR.
abstract_zh: ACII 情感爆发研讨会和比赛的重点是理解爆发声音的多个情感维度：笑声、喘息、哭泣、尖叫以及许多其他对于情感表达和更广泛的人类交流至关重要的非语言发声。今年的比赛包括四个曲目，使用了来自 1,702 名说话者的 59,299 种声音的大规模野外数据集。第一个任务是 A-VB-High 任务，要求竞赛参与者利用十类注释丰富的情感表达强度，对新颖的情感模型执行多标签回归，包括：敬畏、恐惧和惊讶。第二个任务是 A-VB-Two 任务，它利用更传统的情感、唤醒和效价二维模型。第三个任务是 A-VB-Culture 任务，要求参与者探索数据集的文化方面，训练依赖于本国的模型。最后，对于第四个任务，A-VB-Type，参与者应该将声音爆发的类型（例如笑声、哭泣、咕噜声）识别为 8 级分类。本文描述了四个轨道和基线系统，它们使用最先进的机器学习方法。每个赛道的基线性能是通过利用端到端深度学习模型获得的，如下所示：对于A-VB-High，获得平均（在10个维度上）一致性相关系数（CCC）为0.5687 CCC；对于 A-VB-Two，获得的平均（二维）CCC 为 0.5084；对于 A-VB-Culture，四种培养物的平均 CCC 为 0.4401；对于 A-VB-Type，8 个类别的基线未加权平均召回率 (UAR) 为 0.4172 UAR。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ACII 2022情感语音爆发研讨会与竞赛的四个任务，包括多维情感回归、二维情感模型、文化差异分析和语音爆发类型分类，并提供了基于深度学习的基线系统。
AI.motivation: 语音爆发作为非语言情感表达的重要模态，其研究在情感计算领域存在显著空白，且跨文化差异和复杂情感维度分析尚需深入探索。
AI.method: 采用端到端深度学习模型构建基线系统，针对四个任务分别使用多标签回归、二维情感模型、文化依赖模型和8类分类方法进行处理。
AI.result: 基线系统在四个任务中分别达到CCC 0.5687（A-VB-High）、CCC 0.5084（A-VB-Two）、CCC 0.4401（A-VB-Culture）和UAR 0.4172（A-VB-Type）的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 当前基线系统验证了深度学习方法在情感语音爆发分析中的有效性，但模型性能仍有提升空间，尤其需要关注文化差异和多维情感建模的优化。

search_text: The ACII 2022 Affective Vocal Bursts Workshop & Competition: Understanding a critically understudied modality of emotional expression ACII 2022 情感声乐爆发研讨会及比赛：理解一种经过严格研究的情感表达方式 The ACII Affective Vocal Bursts Workshop & Competition is focused on understanding multiple affective dimensions of vocal bursts: laughs, gasps, cries, screams, and many other non-linguistic vocalizations central to the expression of emotion and to human communication more generally. This year's competition comprises four tracks using a large-scale and in-the-wild dataset of 59,299 vocalizations from 1,702 speakers. The second, the A-VB-Two task, utilizes the more conventional 2-dimensional model for emotion, arousal, and valence. The third, the A-VB-Culture task, requires participants to explore the cultural aspects of the dataset, training native-country dependent models. Finally, for the fourth task, A-VB-Type, participants should recognize the type of vocal burst (e.g., laughter, cry, grunt) as an 8-class classification. This paper describes the four tracks and baseline systems, which use state-of-the-art machine learning methods. authors_text: Alain Raymond-Saez,Julio Hurtado,Alvaro Soto
title: A Study on the Predictability of Sample Learning Consistency
title_zh: 样本学习一致性的可预测性研究
abstract: Curriculum Learning is a powerful training method that allows for faster and better training in some settings. This method, however, requires having a notion of which examples are difficult and which are easy, which is not always trivial to provide. A recent metric called C-Score acts as a proxy for example difficulty by relating it to learning consistency. Unfortunately, this method is quite compute intensive which limits its applicability for alternative datasets. In this work, we train models through different methods to predict C-Score for CIFAR-100 and CIFAR-10. We find, however, that these models generalize poorly both within the same distribution as well as out of distribution. This suggests that C-Score is not defined by the individual characteristics of each sample but rather by other factors. We hypothesize that a sample's relation to its neighbours, in particular, how many of them share the same labels, can help in explaining C-Scores. We plan to explore this in future work.
summary: Curriculum Learning is a powerful training method that allows for faster and better training in some settings. This method, however, requires having a notion of which examples are difficult and which are easy, which is not always trivial to provide. A recent metric called C-Score acts as a proxy for example difficulty by relating it to learning consistency. Unfortunately, this method is quite compute intensive which limits its applicability for alternative datasets. In this work, we train models through different methods to predict C-Score for CIFAR-100 and CIFAR-10. We find, however, that these models generalize poorly both within the same distribution as well as out of distribution. This suggests that C-Score is not defined by the individual characteristics of each sample but rather by other factors. We hypothesize that a sample's relation to its neighbours, in particular, how many of them share the same labels, can help in explaining C-Scores. We plan to explore this in future work.
abstract_zh: 课程学习是一种强大的培训方法，可以在某些情况下实现更快、更好的培训。然而，这种方法需要了解哪些示例是困难的、哪些示例是简单的，而提供这些示例并不总是微不足道的。最近的一个名为 C-Score 的指标通过将难度与学习一致性联系起来，充当了难度的代理。不幸的是，这种方法的计算量很大，这限制了它对替代数据集的适用性。在这项工作中，我们通过不同的方法训练模型来预测 CIFAR-100 和 CIFAR-10 的 C 分数。然而，我们发现这些模型无论是在同一分布内还是在分布外，泛化能力都很差。这表明 C 分数不是由每个样本的个体特征定义的，而是由其他因素定义的。我们假设样本与其邻居的关系，特别是其中有多少样本共享相同的标签，可以帮助解释 C 分数。我们计划在未来的工作中对此进行探索。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了样本学习一致性（C-Score）的可预测性，尝试通过不同方法训练模型预测C-Score，并分析其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 课程学习需要判断样本难度，但C-Score作为代理指标计算量大且泛化能力不足，需探索其决定因素以提升效率。
AI.method: 训练多种模型预测CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集的C-Score，并评估其在分布内和分布外的泛化表现。
AI.result: 模型在分布内和分布外均泛化不佳，表明C-Score并非由样本个体特征决定，可能与样本间关系相关。
AI.conclusion: C-Score可能受样本邻近关系（如标签共享）影响，未来将深入研究该方向以改进预测方法。

authors_text: Alireza Borjali,Soheil Ashkani-Esfahani,Rohan Bhimani,Daniel Guss,Orhun K. Muratoglu,Christopher W. DiGiovanni,Kartik Mangudi Varadarajan,Bart Lubberts
title: The use of deep learning enables high diagnostic accuracy in detecting syndesmotic instability on weight-bearing CT scanning
title_zh: 使用深度学习可以在负重 CT 扫描中检测韧带联合不稳定性方面实现较高的诊断准确性
abstract: Delayed diagnosis of syndesmosis instability can lead to significant morbidity and accelerated arthritic change in the ankle joint. Weight-bearing computed tomography (WBCT) has shown promising potential for early and reliable detection of isolated syndesmotic instability using 3D volumetric measurements. While these measurements have been reported to be highly accurate, they are also experience-dependent, time-consuming, and need a particular 3D measurement software tool that leads the clinicians to still show more interest in the conventional diagnostic methods for syndesmotic instability. The purpose of this study was to increase accuracy, accelerate analysis time, and reduce inter-observer bias by automating 3D volume assessment of syndesmosis anatomy using WBCT scans. We conducted a retrospective study using previously collected WBCT scans of patients with unilateral syndesmotic instability. 144 bilateral ankle WBCT scans were evaluated (48 unstable, 96 control). We developed three deep learning (DL) models for analyzing WBCT scans to recognize syndesmosis instability. These three models included two state-of-the-art models (Model 1 - 3D convolutional neural network [CNN], and Model 2 - CNN with long short-term memory [LSTM]), and a new model (Model 3 - differential CNN LSTM) that we introduced in this study. Model 1 failed to analyze the WBCT scans (F1-score = 0). Model 2 only misclassified two cases (F1-score = 0.80). Model 3 outperformed Model 2 and achieved a nearly perfect performance, misclassifying only one case (F1-score = 0.91) in the control group as unstable while being faster than Model 2.

Model 1 failed to analyze the WBCT scans (F1-score = 0). Model 2 only misclassified two cases (F1-score = 0.80). Model 3 outperformed Model 2 and achieved a nearly perfect performance, misclassifying only one case (F1-score = 0.91) in the control group as unstable while being faster than Model 2.
abstract_zh: 韧带联合不稳定性的延迟诊断可能会导致踝关节的显着发病率和加速关节炎变化。负重计算机断层扫描 (WBCT) 在使用 3D 体积测量来早期可靠地检测孤立的韧带联合不稳定性方面显示出巨大的潜力。虽然这些测量据报道非常准确，但它们也依赖于经验、耗时，并且需要特定的 3D 测量软件工具，这使得临床医生仍然对下胫腓联合不稳定性的传统诊断方法表现出更大的兴趣。本研究的目的是通过使用 WBCT 扫描自动对韧带联合解剖结构进行 3D 体积评估，从而提高准确性、缩短分析时间并减少观察者间偏差。我们利用之前收集的单侧韧带联合不稳定患者的 WBCT 扫描进行了一项回顾性研究。评估了 144 例双侧踝关节 WBCT 扫描（48 例不稳定，96 例控制）。我们开发了三种深度学习 (DL) 模型来分析 WBCT 扫描以识别韧带联合的不稳定性。这三个模型包括两个最先进的模型（模型 1 - 3D 卷积神经网络 [CNN] 和模型 2 - 具有长短期记忆的 CNN [LSTM]），以及我们在本研究中引入的一个新模型（模型 3 - 差分 CNN LSTM）。模型 1 未能分析 WBCT 扫描（F1 分数 = 0）。模型 2 仅错误分类了两种情况 (F1-score = 0.80)。模型 3 优于模型 2，实现了近乎完美的性能，仅将对照组中的一个案例（F1-score = 0.91）错误分类为不稳定，同时比模型 2 更快。

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了三种深度学习模型，用于自动化分析负重CT扫描以检测胫腓联合不稳定，旨在提高诊断准确性并减少人工依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统胫腓联合不稳定检测方法依赖经验、耗时且需特定软件，导致临床仍偏好传统方法。亟需自动化方案以提升效率和准确性。
AI.method: 基于144例负重CT扫描数据（48例不稳定，96例对照），构建三种模型：3D卷积神经网络（Model 1）、CNN-LSTM（Model 2）及新型差分CNN-LSTM（Model 3）。
AI.result: Model 1完全失效（F1=0），Model 2误判2例（F1=0.80），Model 3仅误判1例（F1=0.91），且分析速度优于Model 2。
AI.conclusion: 差分CNN-LSTM模型在胫腓联合不稳定检测中表现出近完美性能，为临床提供高效自动化诊断工具，有望替代传统方法。

search_text: The use of deep learning enables high diagnostic accuracy in detecting syndesmotic instability on weight-bearing CT scanning 使用深度学习可以在负重 CT 扫描中检测韧带联合不稳定性方面实现较高的诊断准确性 Delayed diagnosis of syndesmosis instability can lead to significant morbidity and accelerated arthritic change in the ankle joint. Weight-bearing computed tomography (WBCT) has shown promising potential for early and reliable detection of isolated syndesmotic instability using 3D volumetric measurements. While these measurements have been reported to be highly accurate, they are also experience-dependent, time-consuming, and need a particular 3D measurement software tool that leads the clinicians to still show more interest in the conventional diagnostic methods for syndesmotic instability. The purpose of this study was to increase accuracy, accelerate analysis time, and reduce inter-observer bias by automating 3D volume assessment of syndesmosis anatomy using WBCT scans. We conducted a retrospective study using previously collected WBCT scans of patients with unilateral syndesmotic instability. 144 bilateral ankle WBCT scans were evaluated (48 unstable, 96 control). We developed three deep learning (DL) models for analyzing WBCT scans to recognize syndesmosis instability. These three models included two state-of-the-art models (Model 1 - 3D convolutional neural network [CNN], and Model 2 - CNN with long short-term memory [LSTM]), and a new model (Model 3 - differential CNN LSTM) that we introduced in this study. Model 1 failed to analyze the WBCT scans (F1-score = 0). Model 2 only misclassified two cases (F1-score = 0.80). Model 3 outperformed Model 2 and achieved a nearly perfect performance, misclassifying only one case (F1-score = 0.91) in the control group as unstable while being faster than Model 2. 韧带联合不稳定性的延迟诊断可能会导致踝关节的显着发病率和加速关节炎变化。负重计算机断层扫描 (WBCT) 在使用 3D 体积测量来早期可靠地检测孤立的韧带联合不稳定性方面显示出巨大的潜力。虽然这些测量据报道非常准确，但它们也依赖于经验、耗时，并且需要特定的 3D 测量软件工具，这使得临床医生仍然对下胫腓联合不稳定性的传统诊断方法表现出更大的兴趣。本研究的目的是通过使用 WBCT 扫描自动对韧带联合解剖结构进行 3D 体积评估，从而提高准确性、缩短分析时间并减少观察者间偏差。我们利用之前收集的单侧韧带联合不稳定患者的 WBCT 扫描进行了一项回顾性研究。评估了 144 例双侧踝关节 WBCT 扫描（48 例不稳定，96 例控制）。我们开发了三种深度学习 (DL) 模型来分析 WBCT 扫描以识别韧带联合的不稳定性。这三个模型包括两个最先进的模型（模型 1 - 3D 卷积神经网络 [CNN] 和模型 2 - 具有长短期记忆的 CNN [LSTM]），以及我们在本研究中引入的一个新模型（模型 3 - 差分 CNN LSTM）。模型 1 未能分析 WBCT 扫描（F1 分数 = 0）。模型 2 仅错误分类了两种情况 (F1-score = 0.80)。模型 3 优于模型 2，实现了近乎完美的性能，仅将对照组中的一个案例（F1-score = 0.91）错误分类为不稳定，同时比模型 2 更快。 本研究开发了三种深度学习模型，用于自动化分析负重CT扫描以检测胫腓联合不稳定，旨在提高诊断准确性并减少人工依赖。 Alireza Borjali,Soheil Ashkani-Esfahani,Rohan Bhimani,Daniel Guss,Orhun K. authors_text: Maxime Tremblay,Guillaume Duclos-Cianci,Stefanos Kourtis
title: Finite-rate sparse quantum codes aplenty
title_zh: 大量的有限速率稀疏量子代码
abstract: We introduce a methodology for generating random multi-qubit stabilizer codes based on solving a constraint satisfaction problem (CSP) on random bipartite graphs. This framework allows us to enforce stabilizer commutation, $X/Z$ balancing, finite rate, sparsity, and maximum-degree constraints simultaneously in a CSP that we can then solve numerically. Using a state-of-the-art CSP solver, we obtain convincing evidence for the existence of a satisfiability threshold. Furthermore, the extent of the satisfiable phase increases with the number of qubits. In that phase, finding sparse codes becomes an easy problem. Moreover, we observe that the sparse codes found in the satisfiable phase practically achieve the channel capacity for erasure noise. Our results show that intermediate-size finite-rate sparse quantum codes are easy to find, while also demonstrating a flexible methodology for generating good codes with custom properties. We therefore establish a complete and customizable pipeline for random quantum code discovery.
summary: We introduce a methodology for generating random multi-qubit stabilizer codes based on solving a constraint satisfaction problem (CSP) on random bipartite graphs. This framework allows us to enforce stabilizer commutation, $X/Z$ balancing, finite rate, sparsity, and maximum-degree constraints simultaneously in a CSP that we can then solve numerically. Using a state-of-the-art CSP solver, we obtain convincing evidence for the existence of a satisfiability threshold. Furthermore, the extent of the satisfiable phase increases with the number of qubits. In that phase, finding sparse codes becomes an easy problem. Moreover, we observe that the sparse codes found in the satisfiable phase practically achieve the channel capacity for erasure noise. Our results show that intermediate-size finite-rate sparse quantum codes are easy to find, while also demonstrating a flexible methodology for generating good codes with custom properties. We therefore establish a complete and customizable pipeline for random quantum code discovery.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种基于解决随机二分图上的约束满足问题（CSP）来生成随机多量子位稳定器代码的方法。该框架允许我们在 CSP 中同时执行稳定器换向、$X/Z$ 平衡、有限速率、稀疏性和最大度约束，然后我们可以对其进行数值求解。使用最先进的 CSP 求解器，我们获得了令人信服的证据来证明可满足性阈值的存在。此外，可满足阶段的范围随着量子位数量的增加而增加。在这个阶段，寻找稀疏代码就成为一个简单的问题。此外，我们观察到在可满足阶段发现的稀疏码实际上达到了擦除噪声的信道容量。我们的结果表明，中等大小的有限速率稀疏量子代码很容易找到，同时还展示了一种灵活的方法来生成具有自定义属性的良好代码。因此，我们为随机量子代码发现建立了一个完整且可定制的管道。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于约束满足问题（CSP）的框架，用于生成满足多项约束条件的稀疏量子码。
AI.motivation: 现有量子码在稀疏性、有限速率和纠错能力之间难以平衡，需一种灵活方法生成定制化量子码。
AI.method: 通过在随机二分图上构建CSP模型，同时满足稳定子交换、X/Z平衡、有限速率等约束，并利用先进求解器数值求解。
AI.result: 发现可满足性阈值随量子位数增加而扩大，可满足相中稀疏码易于构造且接近擦除信道容量。
AI.conclusion: 建立了完整的量子码生成流程，证明中间规模有限速率稀疏码易构造，并展示方法的灵活性与实用性。

authors_text: Xiurong Jiang,Lin Zhu,Yifan Hou,Hui Tian
title: Mirror Complementary Transformer Network for RGB-thermal Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 用于 RGB 热显着物体检测的镜像互补变压器网络
abstract: RGB-thermal salient object detection (RGB-T SOD) aims to locate the common prominent objects of an aligned visible and thermal infrared image pair and accurately segment all the pixels belonging to those objects. It is promising in challenging scenes such as nighttime and complex backgrounds due to the insensitivity to lighting conditions of thermal images. Thus, the key problem of RGB-T SOD is to make the features from the two modalities complement and adjust each other flexibly, since it is inevitable that any modalities of RGB-T image pairs failure due to challenging scenes such as extreme light conditions and thermal crossover. In this paper, we propose a novel mirror complementary Transformer network (MCNet) for RGB-T SOD. Specifically, we introduce a Transformer-based feature extraction module to effective extract hierarchical features of RGB and thermal images. Then, through the attention-based feature interaction and serial multiscale dilated convolution (SDC) based feature fusion modules, the proposed model achieves the complementary interaction of low-level features and the semantic fusion of deep features. Finally, based on the mirror complementary structure, the salient regions of the two modalities can be accurately extracted even one modality is invalid. To demonstrate the robustness of the proposed model under challenging scenes in real world, we build a novel RGB-T SOD dataset VT723 based on a large public semantic segmentation RGB-T dataset used in the autonomous driving domain. Expensive experiments on benchmark and VT723 datasets show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, including CNN-based and Transformer-based methods. The code and dataset will be released later at https://github.com/jxr326/SwinMCNet.
summary: RGB-thermal salient object detection (RGB-T SOD) aims to locate the common prominent objects of an aligned visible and thermal infrared image pair and accurately segment all the pixels belonging to those objects. It is promising in challenging scenes such as nighttime and complex backgrounds due to the insensitivity to lighting conditions of thermal images. Thus, the key problem of RGB-T SOD is to make the features from the two modalities complement and adjust each other flexibly, since it is inevitable that any modalities of RGB-T image pairs failure due to challenging scenes such as extreme light conditions and thermal crossover. In this paper, we propose a novel mirror complementary Transformer network (MCNet) for RGB-T SOD. Specifically, we introduce a Transformer-based feature extraction module to effective extract hierarchical features of RGB and thermal images. Then, through the attention-based feature interaction and serial multiscale dilated convolution (SDC) based feature fusion modules, the proposed model achieves the complementary interaction of low-level features and the semantic fusion of deep features. Finally, based on the mirror complementary structure, the salient regions of the two modalities can be accurately extracted even one modality is invalid. To demonstrate the robustness of the proposed model under challenging scenes in real world, we build a novel RGB-T SOD dataset VT723 based on a large public semantic segmentation RGB-T dataset used in the autonomous driving domain. Expensive experiments on benchmark and VT723 datasets show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, including CNN-based and Transformer-based methods. The code and dataset will be released later at https://github.com/jxr326/SwinMCNet.
abstract_zh: RGB-热显着物体检测（RGB-T SOD）旨在定位对齐的可见光和热红外图像对中常见的突出物体，并准确分割属于这些物体的所有像素。由于热图像对光照条件不敏感，它在夜间和复杂背景等具有挑战性的场景中很有前景。因此，RGB-T SOD的关键问题是使两种模态的特征相互补充和灵活调整，因为任何模态的RGB-T图像对都不可避免地会由于极端光照条件和热交叉等具有挑战性的场景而失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 RGB-T SOD 的新型镜像互补 Transformer 网络（MCNet）。具体来说，我们引入了基于 Transformer 的特征提取模块来有效提取 RGB 和热图像的层次特征。然后，通过基于注意力的特征交互和基于串行多尺度扩张卷积（SDC）的特征融合模块，该模型实现了低层特征的互补交互和深层特征的语义融合。最后，基于镜像互补结构，即使一种模态无效，也可以准确提取两种模态的显着区域。为了证明所提出的模型在现实世界中具有挑战性的场景下的鲁棒性，我们基于自动驾驶领域使用的大型公共语义分割 RGB-T 数据集构建了一个新颖的 RGB-T SOD 数据集 VT723。对基准和 VT723 数据集进行的昂贵实验表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法，包括基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的方法。代码和数据集稍后将在 https://github.com/jxr326/SwinMCNet 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于镜像互补Transformer网络（MCNet）的RGB-热红外显著物体检测方法，旨在通过多模态特征互补提升复杂场景下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: RGB-热红外图像在夜间或复杂背景下具有互补优势，但单一模态可能因光照或热交叉失效，需通过跨模态特征互补提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计Transformer-based特征提取模块，结合注意力机制与多尺度空洞卷积实现低层特征互补和深层语义融合，并通过镜像结构确保单模态失效时仍能准确检测。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和新构建的VT723数据集上均优于现有CNN和Transformer方法，验证了模型的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MCNet通过跨模态特征互补机制显著提升了RGB-热红外显著物体检测性能，为复杂场景下的视觉任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Mirror Complementary Transformer Network for RGB-thermal Salient Object Detection 用于 RGB 热显着物体检测的镜像互补变压器网络 RGB-thermal salient object detection (RGB-T SOD) aims to locate the common prominent objects of an aligned visible and thermal infrared image pair and accurately segment all the pixels belonging to those objects. It is promising in challenging scenes such as nighttime and complex backgrounds due to the insensitivity to lighting conditions of thermal images. Thus, the key problem of RGB-T SOD is to make the features from the two modalities complement and adjust each other flexibly, since it is inevitable that any modalities of RGB-T image pairs failure due to challenging scenes such as extreme light conditions and thermal crossover. In this paper, we propose a novel mirror complementary Transformer network (MCNet) for RGB-T SOD. Specifically, we introduce a Transformer-based feature extraction module to effective extract hierarchical features of RGB and thermal images. Then, through the attention-based feature interaction and serial multiscale dilated convolution (SDC) based feature fusion modules, the proposed model achieves the complementary interaction of low-level features and the semantic fusion of deep features. Finally, based on the mirror complementary structure, the salient regions of the two modalities can be accurately extracted even one modality is invalid. To demonstrate the robustness of the proposed model under challenging scenes in real world, we build a novel RGB-T SOD dataset VT723 based on a large public semantic segmentation RGB-T dataset used in the autonomous driving domain. Expensive experiments on benchmark and VT723 datasets show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, including CNN-based and Transformer-based methods. The code and dataset will be released later at https://github.com/jxr326/SwinMCNet. authors_text: Harshit K. Sankhla,M. Nomaan Qureshi,Shankara Narayanan V.,Vedansh Mittal,Gunjan Gupta,Harit Pandya,K. Madhava Krishna
title: Flow Synthesis Based Visual Servoing Frameworks for Monocular Obstacle Avoidance Amidst High-Rises
title_zh: 基于流合成的视觉伺服框架，用于高层建筑中的单目避障
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE), 2022
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE), 2022
abstract: We propose a novel flow synthesis based visual servoing framework enabling long-range obstacle avoidance for Micro Air Vehicles (MAV) flying amongst tall skyscrapers. Recent deep learning based frameworks use optical flow to do high-precision visual servoing. In this paper, we explore the question: can we design a surrogate flow for these high-precision visual-servoing methods, which leads to obstacle avoidance? We revisit the concept of saliency for identifying high-rise structures in/close to the line of attack amongst other competing skyscrapers and buildings as a collision obstacle. A synthesised flow is used to displace the salient object segmentation mask. This flow is so computed that the visual servoing controller maneuvers the MAV safely around the obstacle. In this approach, we use a multi-step Cross-Entropy Method (CEM) based servo control to achieve flow convergence, resulting in obstacle avoidance. We use this novel pipeline to successfully and persistently maneuver high-rises and reach the goal in simulated and photo-realistic real-world scenes. We conduct extensive experimentation and compare our approach with optical flow and short-range depth-based obstacle avoidance methods to demonstrate the proposed framework's merit. Additional Visualisation can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/monocular-obstacle/home
summary: We propose a novel flow synthesis based visual servoing framework enabling long-range obstacle avoidance for Micro Air Vehicles (MAV) flying amongst tall skyscrapers. Recent deep learning based frameworks use optical flow to do high-precision visual servoing. In this paper, we explore the question: can we design a surrogate flow for these high-precision visual-servoing methods, which leads to obstacle avoidance? We revisit the concept of saliency for identifying high-rise structures in/close to the line of attack amongst other competing skyscrapers and buildings as a collision obstacle. A synthesised flow is used to displace the salient object segmentation mask. This flow is so computed that the visual servoing controller maneuvers the MAV safely around the obstacle. In this approach, we use a multi-step Cross-Entropy Method (CEM) based servo control to achieve flow convergence, resulting in obstacle avoidance. We use this novel pipeline to successfully and persistently maneuver high-rises and reach the goal in simulated and photo-realistic real-world scenes. We conduct extensive experimentation and compare our approach with optical flow and short-range depth-based obstacle avoidance methods to demonstrate the proposed framework's merit. Additional Visualisation can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/monocular-obstacle/home
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于流合成的新型视觉伺服框架，能够使微型飞行器（MAV）在高耸的摩天大楼中飞行时实现远程避障。最近基于深度学习的框架使用光流来进行高精度视觉伺服。在本文中，我们探讨了这样一个问题：我们能否为这些高精度视觉伺服方法设计一个替代流程，从而实现避障？我们重新审视显着性的概念，用于将攻击线内/附近的高层建筑与其他竞争的摩天大楼和建筑物一起识别为碰撞障碍。合成流用于替换显着对象分割掩模。该流程经过计算，使得视觉伺服控制器能够安全地操纵 MAV 绕过障碍物。在这种方法中，我们使用基于多步交叉熵方法（CEM）的伺服控制来实现流收敛，从而避免障碍物。我们使用这种新颖的管道成功并持续地操纵高层建筑，并在模拟和逼真的现实世界场景中达到目标。我们进行了广泛的实验，并将我们的方法与光流和基于短程深度的避障方法进行比较，以证明所提出的框架的优点。其他可视化可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/moneye-obstacle/home 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流合成的视觉伺服框架，用于单目微型飞行器在高层建筑间的长距离避障。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习框架依赖光流实现高精度视觉伺服，但难以直接用于避障。本文旨在设计一种替代流，使视觉伺服系统能有效规避高层建筑等障碍物。
AI.method: 通过显著性检测识别攻击路径上的高层建筑，合成流位移显著性分割掩膜，并采用多步交叉熵方法（CEM）实现流收敛与避障控制。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实场景中成功实现持续避障，实验表明该框架优于传统光流和短距离深度避障方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的流合成框架为单目 MAV 在复杂高层环境中实现长距离避障提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jiyoun Randolph,Md Jobair Hossain Faruk,Hossain Shahriar,Maria Valero,Liang Zhao,Nazmus Sakib,Bilash Saha
title: Blockchain-based Medical Image Sharing and Automated Critical-results Notification: A Novel Framework
title_zh: 基于区块链的医学图像共享和自动关键结果通知：一种新颖的框架
abstract: In teleradiology, medical images are transmitted to offsite radiologists for interpretation and the dictation report is sent back to the original site to aid timely diagnosis and proper patient care. Although teleradiology offers great benefits including time and cost efficiency, after-hour coverages, and staffing shortage management, there are some technical and operational limitations to overcome in reaching its full potential. We analyzed the current teleradiology workflow to identify inefficiencies. Image unavailability and delayed critical result communication stemmed from lack of system integration between teleradiology practice and healthcare institutions are among the most substantial factors causing prolonged turnaround time. In this paper, we propose a blockchain-based medical image sharing and automated critical-results notification platform to address the current limitation. We believe the proposed platform will enhance efficiency in workflow by eliminating the need for intermediaries and will benefit patients by eliminating the need for storing medical images in hard copies. While considerable progress was achieved, further research on governance and HIPAA compliance is required to optimize the adoption of the new application. Towards an idea to a working paradigm, we will implement the prototype during the next phase of our study.

In this paper, we propose a blockchain-based medical image sharing and automated critical-results notification platform to address the current limitation. We believe the proposed platform will enhance efficiency in workflow by eliminating the need for intermediaries and will benefit patients by eliminating the need for storing medical images in hard copies. While considerable progress was achieved, further research on governance and HIPAA compliance is required to optimize the adoption of the new application. Towards an idea to a working paradigm, we will implement the prototype during the next phase of our study.
abstract_zh: 在远程放射学中，医学图像被传输给异地放射科医生进行解释，听写报告被发送回原始站点，以帮助及时诊断和适当的患者护理。尽管远程放射学提供了巨大的好处，包括时间和成本效率、下班后覆盖和人员短缺管理，但在充分发挥其潜力时，仍需要克服一些技术和操作限制。我们分析了当前的远程放射学工作流程，以找出效率低下的地方。由于远程放射学实践和医疗机构之间缺乏系统集成而导致图像不可用和关键结果通信延迟是导致周转时间延长的最重要因素之一。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于区块链的医学图像共享和自动化关键结果通知平台来解决当前的限制。我们相信，所提出的平台将消除对中介机构的需求，从而提高工作流程的效率，并且无需将医学图像存储在硬拷贝中，将使患者受益。虽然取得了相当大的进展，但仍需要对治理和 HIPAA 合规性进行进一步研究，以优化新应用程序的采用。为了将一个想法变成一个工作范式，我们将在下一阶段的研究中实现原型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区块链的医疗影像共享与自动化危急结果通知框架，旨在优化远程放射学流程。
AI.motivation: 现有远程放射学流程因系统集成不足导致影像不可用和危急结果通知延迟，影响诊断效率与患者护理。
AI.method: 设计区块链平台实现医疗影像共享与自动化通知，消除中间环节并减少纸质存储需求，后续将开发原型验证。
AI.result: 该框架有望提升流程效率，但需进一步研究治理机制与HIPAA合规性以推动应用落地。
AI.conclusion: 区块链技术为医疗影像共享提供新思路，但需解决合规性与治理问题以实现临床转化。

search_text: Blockchain-based Medical Image Sharing and Automated Critical-results Notification: A Novel Framework 基于区块链的医学图像共享和自动关键结果通知：一种新颖的框架 In teleradiology, medical images are transmitted to offsite radiologists for interpretation and the dictation report is sent back to the original site to aid timely diagnosis and proper patient care. Although teleradiology offers great benefits including time and cost efficiency, after-hour coverages, and staffing shortage management, there are some technical and operational limitations to overcome in reaching its full potential. We analyzed the current teleradiology workflow to identify inefficiencies. Image unavailability and delayed critical result communication stemmed from lack of system integration between teleradiology practice and healthcare institutions are among the most substantial factors causing prolonged turnaround time. In this paper, we propose a blockchain-based medical image sharing and automated critical-results notification platform to address the current limitation. We believe the proposed platform will enhance efficiency in workflow by eliminating the need for intermediaries and will benefit patients by eliminating the need for storing medical images in hard copies. While considerable progress was achieved, further research on governance and HIPAA compliance is required to optimize the adoption of the new application. Towards an idea to a working paradigm, we will implement the prototype during the next phase of our study. 在远程放射学中，医学图像被传输给异地放射科医生进行解释，听写报告被发送回原始站点，以帮助及时诊断和适当的患者护理。尽管远程放射学提供了巨大的好处，包括时间和成本效率、下班后覆盖和人员短缺管理，但在充分发挥其潜力时，仍需要克服一些技术和操作限制。我们分析了当前的远程放射学工作流程，以找出效率低下的地方。由于远程放射学实践和医疗机构之间缺乏系统集成而导致图像不可用和关键结果通信延迟是导致周转时间延长的最重要因素之一。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于区块链的医学图像共享和自动化关键结果通知平台来解决当前的限制。我们相信，所提出的平台将消除对中介机构的需求，从而提高工作流程的效率，并且无需将医学图像存储在硬拷贝中，将使患者受益。虽然取得了相当大的进展，但仍需要对治理和 HIPAA 合规性进行进一步研究，以优化新应用程序的采用。为了将一个想法变成一个工作范式，我们将在下一阶段的研究中实现原型。 本文提出一种基于区块链的医疗影像共享与自动化危急结果通知框架，旨在优化远程放射学流程。 Jiyoun Randolph,Md Jobair Hossain Faruk,Hossain Shahriar,Maria Valero,Liang Zhao,Nazmus Sakib,Bilash Saha cs.HC,cs.CR,cs.DC

authors_text: John R. Kender,Bishwaranjan Bhattacharjee,Parijat Dube,Brian Belgodere
title: G2L: A Geometric Approach for Generating Pseudo-labels that Improve Transfer Learning
title_zh: G2L：一种生成改善迁移学习的伪标签的几何方法
abstract: Transfer learning is a deep-learning technique that ameliorates the problem of learning when human-annotated labels are expensive and limited. In place of such labels, it uses instead the previously trained weights from a well-chosen source model as the initial weights for the training of a base model for a new target dataset. We demonstrate a novel but general technique for automatically creating such source models. We generate pseudo-labels according to an efficient and extensible algorithm that is based on a classical result from the geometry of high dimensions, the Cayley-Menger determinant. This G2L (``geometry to label'') method incrementally builds up pseudo-labels using a greedy computation of hypervolume content. We demonstrate that the method is tunable with respect to expected accuracy, which can be forecast by an information-theoretic measure of dataset similarity (divergence) between source and target. The results of 280 experiments show that this mechanical technique generates base models that have similar or better transferability compared to a baseline of models trained on extensively human-annotated ImageNet1K labels, yielding an overall error decrease of 0.43\%, and an error decrease in 4 out of 5 divergent datasets tested.
summary: Transfer learning is a deep-learning technique that ameliorates the problem of learning when human-annotated labels are expensive and limited. In place of such labels, it uses instead the previously trained weights from a well-chosen source model as the initial weights for the training of a base model for a new target dataset. We demonstrate a novel but general technique for automatically creating such source models. We generate pseudo-labels according to an efficient and extensible algorithm that is based on a classical result from the geometry of high dimensions, the Cayley-Menger determinant. This G2L (``geometry to label'') method incrementally builds up pseudo-labels using a greedy computation of hypervolume content. We demonstrate that the method is tunable with respect to expected accuracy, which can be forecast by an information-theoretic measure of dataset similarity (divergence) between source and target. The results of 280 experiments show that this mechanical technique generates base models that have similar or better transferability compared to a baseline of models trained on extensively human-annotated ImageNet1K labels, yielding an overall error decrease of 0.43\%, and an error decrease in 4 out of 5 divergent datasets tested.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习是一种深度学习技术，可以改善人工注释标签昂贵且有限的学习问题。它使用精心选择的源模型中先前训练的权重来代替此类标签，作为新目标数据集的基础模型训练的初始权重。我们展示了一种新颖但通用的技术来自动创建此类源模型。我们根据一种高效且可扩展的算法生成伪标签，该算法基于高维几何的经典结果（凯莱-门格行列式）。这种 G2L（“几何标记”）方法使用超体积内容的贪婪计算来逐步构建伪标签。我们证明该方法在预期精度方面是可调的，这可以通过源和目标之间的数据集相似性（分歧）的信息论测量来预测。 280 次实验的结果表明，与在大量人工注释的 ImageNet1K 标签上训练的模型基线相比，这种机械技术生成的基础模型具有相似或更好的可迁移性，总体误差降低了 0.43\%，并且测试的 5 个不同数据集中有 4 个误差降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何方法的G2L技术，通过生成伪标签来提升迁移学习效果。
AI.motivation: 人工标注数据成本高昂且有限，传统迁移学习依赖预训练模型权重，但如何自动构建有效的源模型仍是挑战。
AI.method: 利用高维几何中的Cayley-Menger行列式，通过贪心算法计算超体积内容增量生成伪标签，并基于信息论度量数据集相似性进行参数调优。
AI.result: 280次实验表明，该方法生成的基模型在5个数据集中的4个表现优于ImageNet1K标注模型，总体错误率降低0.43%。
AI.conclusion: G2L方法通过几何建模实现了可调参的伪标签生成，为无依赖人工标注的迁移学习提供了有效解决方案。
