authors_text: Suhong Moon,Domas Buracas,Seunghyun Park,Jinkyu Kim,John Canny
title: An Embedding-Dynamic Approach to Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 自监督学习的嵌入动态方法
abstract: A number of recent self-supervised learning methods have shown impressive performance on image classification and other tasks. A somewhat bewildering variety of techniques have been used, not always with a clear understanding of the reasons for their benefits, especially when used in combination. Here we treat the embeddings of images as point particles and consider model optimization as a dynamic process on this system of particles. Our dynamic model combines an attractive force for similar images, a locally dispersive force to avoid local collapse, and a global dispersive force to achieve a globally-homogeneous distribution of particles. The dynamic perspective highlights the advantage of using a delayed-parameter image embedding (a la BYOL) together with multiple views of the same image. It also uses a purely-dynamic local dispersive force (Brownian motion) that shows improved performance over other methods and does not require knowledge of other particle coordinates. The method is called MSBReg which stands for (i) a Multiview centroid loss, which applies an attractive force to pull different image view embeddings toward their centroid, (ii) a Singular value loss, which pushes the particle system toward spatially homogeneous density, (iii) a Brownian diffusive loss. We evaluate downstream classification performance of MSBReg on ImageNet as well as transfer learning tasks including fine-grained classification, multi-class object classification, object detection, and instance segmentation. In addition, we also show that applying our regularization term to other methods further improves their performance and stabilize the training by preventing a mode collapse.
summary: A number of recent self-supervised learning methods have shown impressive performance on image classification and other tasks. A somewhat bewildering variety of techniques have been used, not always with a clear understanding of the reasons for their benefits, especially when used in combination. Here we treat the embeddings of images as point particles and consider model optimization as a dynamic process on this system of particles. Our dynamic model combines an attractive force for similar images, a locally dispersive force to avoid local collapse, and a global dispersive force to achieve a globally-homogeneous distribution of particles. The dynamic perspective highlights the advantage of using a delayed-parameter image embedding (a la BYOL) together with multiple views of the same image. It also uses a purely-dynamic local dispersive force (Brownian motion) that shows improved performance over other methods and does not require knowledge of other particle coordinates. The method is called MSBReg which stands for (i) a Multiview centroid loss, which applies an attractive force to pull different image view embeddings toward their centroid, (ii) a Singular value loss, which pushes the particle system toward spatially homogeneous density, (iii) a Brownian diffusive loss. We evaluate downstream classification performance of MSBReg on ImageNet as well as transfer learning tasks including fine-grained classification, multi-class object classification, object detection, and instance segmentation. In addition, we also show that applying our regularization term to other methods further improves their performance and stabilize the training by preventing a mode collapse.
abstract_zh: 最近的许多自监督学习方法在图像分类和其他任务上表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。人们使用的技术有些令人眼花缭乱，但人们并不总是清楚地了解它们的好处，特别是在组合使用时。在这里，我们将图像的嵌入视为点粒子，并将模型优化视为该粒子系统的动态过程。我们的动态模型结合了相似图像的吸引力、避免局部崩溃的局部色散力以及实现粒子全局均匀分布的全局色散力。动态透视突出了使用延迟参数图像嵌入（la BYOL）以及同一图像的多个视图的优势。它还使用纯动态局部色散力（布朗运动），该力显示出比其他方法更好的性能，并且不需要其他粒子坐标的知识。该方法称为 MSBReg，它代表 (i) 多视图质心损失，它施加吸引力将不同的图像视图嵌入拉向其质心，(ii) 奇异值损失，它将粒子系统推向空间均匀密度，(iii) 布朗扩散损失。我们评估了 MSBReg 在 ImageNet 上的下游分类性能以及迁移学习任务，包括细粒度分类、多类对象分类、对象检测和实例分割。此外，我们还表明，将我们的正则化项应用于其他方法可以进一步提高其性能并通过防止模式崩溃来稳定训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态嵌入的自监督学习方法，通过物理动力学模型优化图像嵌入分布，提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法技术繁杂且原理不清晰，组合使用效果难以解释，需建立统一动态视角以优化嵌入表示并避免模式崩溃。
AI.method: 将图像嵌入视为粒子系统，引入吸引/排斥力动态调整分布：1) 多视图中心损失（拉近不同视角嵌入）；2) 奇异值损失（促进均匀分布）；3) 布朗运动扩散损失（无需坐标信息的局部扩散）。
AI.result: 在ImageNet及细粒度分类、目标检测等下游任务中优于现有方法，其正则化项可提升其他方法性能并稳定训练。
AI.conclusion: 动态视角揭示了延迟参数与多视图机制的优势，提出的MSBReg方法通过物理启发的损失函数有效优化嵌入分布，具有通用正则化价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态嵌入的自监督学习方法，通过物理动力学模型优化图像嵌入分布，提升下游任务性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法技术繁杂且原理不清晰，组合使用效果难以解释，需建立统一动态视角以优化嵌入表示并避免模式崩溃。
ai_content.method: 将图像嵌入视为粒子系统，引入吸引/排斥力动态调整分布：1) 多视图中心损失（拉近不同视角嵌入）；2) 奇异值损失（促进均匀分布）；3) 布朗运动扩散损失（无需坐标信息的局部扩散）。
ai_content.result: 在ImageNet及细粒度分类、目标检测等下游任务中优于现有方法，其正则化项可提升其他方法性能并稳定训练。
ai_content.conclusion: 动态视角揭示了延迟参数与多视图机制的优势，提出的MSBReg方法通过物理启发的损失函数有效优化嵌入分布，具有通用正则化价值。

search_text: An Embedding-Dynamic Approach to Self-supervised Learning 自监督学习的嵌入动态方法 A number of recent self-supervised learning methods have shown impressive performance on image classification and other tasks. A somewhat bewildering variety of techniques have been used, not always with a clear understanding of the reasons for their benefits, especially when used in combination. Here we treat the embeddings of images as point particles and consider model optimization as a dynamic process on this system of particles. Our dynamic model combines an attractive force for similar images, a locally dispersive force to avoid local collapse, and a global dispersive force to achieve a globally-homogeneous distribution of particles. The dynamic perspective highlights the advantage of using a delayed-parameter image embedding (a la BYOL) together with multiple views of the same image. It also uses a purely-dynamic local dispersive force (Brownian motion) that shows improved performance over other methods and does not require knowledge of other particle coordinates. The method is called MSBReg which stands for (i) a Multiview centroid loss, which applies an attractive force to pull different image view embeddings toward their centroid, (ii) a Singular value loss, which pushes the particle system toward spatially homogeneous density, (iii) a Brownian diffusive loss. We evaluate downstream classification performance of MSBReg on ImageNet as well as transfer learning tasks including fine-grained classification, multi-class object classification, object detection, and instance segmentation. In addition, we also show that applying our regularization term to other methods further improves their performance and stabilize the training by preventing a mode collapse. 最近的许多自监督学习方法在图像分类和其他任务上表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。人们使用的技术有些令人眼花缭乱，但人们并不总是清楚地了解它们的好处，特别是在组合使用时。在这里，我们将图像的嵌入视为点粒子，并将模型优化视为该粒子系统的动态过程。我们的动态模型结合了相似图像的吸引力、避免局部崩溃的局部色散力以及实现粒子全局均匀分布的全局色散力。动态透视突出了使用延迟参数图像嵌入（la BYOL）以及同一图像的多个视图的优势。它还使用纯动态局部色散力（布朗运动），该力显示出比其他方法更好的性能，并且不需要其他粒子坐标的知识。该方法称为 MSBReg，它代表 (i) 多视图质心损失，它施加吸引力将不同的图像视图嵌入拉向其质心，(ii) 奇异值损失，它将粒子系统推向空间均匀密度，(iii) 布朗扩散损失。我们评估了 MSBReg 在 ImageNet 上的下游分类性能以及迁移学习任务，包括细粒度分类、多类对象分类、对象检测和实例分割。此外，我们还表明，将我们的正则化项应用于其他方法可以进一步提高其性能并通过防止模式崩溃来稳定训练。 本文提出一种基于动态嵌入的自监督学习方法，通过物理动力学模型优化图像嵌入分布，提升下游任务性能。 Suhong Moon,Domas Buracas,Seunghyun Park,Jinkyu Kim,John Canny cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Josh Meyer,David Ifeoluwa Adelani,Edresson Casanova,Alp Öktem,Daniel Whitenack Julian Weber,Salomon Kabongo,Elizabeth Salesky,Iroro Orife,Colin Leong,Perez Ogayo,Chris Emezue,Jonathan Mukiibi,Salomey Osei,Apelete Agbolo,Victor Akinode,Bernard Opoku,Samuel Olanrewaju,Jesujoba Alabi,Shamsuddeen Muhammad
title: BibleTTS: a large, high-fidelity, multilingual, and uniquely African speech corpus
title_zh: BibleTTS：大型、高保真、多语言且独特的非洲语音语料库
abstract: BibleTTS is a large, high-quality, open speech dataset for ten languages spoken in Sub-Saharan Africa. The corpus contains up to 86 hours of aligned, studio quality 48kHz single speaker recordings per language, enabling the development of high-quality text-to-speech models. The ten languages represented are: Akuapem Twi, Asante Twi, Chichewa, Ewe, Hausa, Kikuyu, Lingala, Luganda, Luo, and Yoruba. This corpus is a derivative work of Bible recordings made and released by the Open.Bible project from Biblica. We have aligned, cleaned, and filtered the original recordings, and additionally hand-checked a subset of the alignments for each language. We present results for text-to-speech models with Coqui TTS. The data is released under a commercial-friendly CC-BY-SA license.
summary: BibleTTS is a large, high-quality, open speech dataset for ten languages spoken in Sub-Saharan Africa. The corpus contains up to 86 hours of aligned, studio quality 48kHz single speaker recordings per language, enabling the development of high-quality text-to-speech models. The ten languages represented are: Akuapem Twi, Asante Twi, Chichewa, Ewe, Hausa, Kikuyu, Lingala, Luganda, Luo, and Yoruba. This corpus is a derivative work of Bible recordings made and released by the Open.Bible project from Biblica. We have aligned, cleaned, and filtered the original recordings, and additionally hand-checked a subset of the alignments for each language. We present results for text-to-speech models with Coqui TTS. The data is released under a commercial-friendly CC-BY-SA license.
abstract_zh: BibleTTS 是一个大型、高质量、开放的语音数据集，涵盖撒哈拉以南非洲地区使用的十种语言。该语料库包含每种语言长达 86 小时的录音室品质 48kHz 单扬声器录音，有助于开发高质量的文本转语音模型。代表的十种语言是：阿库阿佩姆契维语、阿桑特契维语、奇切瓦语、埃维语、豪萨语、基库尤语、林加拉语、卢干达语、洛语和约鲁巴语。该语料库是 Biblica 的 Open.Bible 项目制作和发布的圣经录音的衍生作品。我们对原始录音进行了对齐、清理和过滤，并另外手动检查了每种语言的对齐子集。我们展示了使用 Coqui TTS 的文本转语音模型的结果。该数据是在商业友好的 CC-BY-SA 许可下发布的。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了BibleTTS，一个包含十种非洲语言的高质量语音语料库，用于开发文本到语音模型。
AI.motivation: 撒哈拉以南非洲语言缺乏高质量的语音数据，限制了本地化AI技术的发展，尤其是文本到语音（TTS）模型的训练。
AI.method: 基于Open.Bible项目的圣经录音，通过自动对齐、清洗、过滤及人工校验，构建每种语言86小时的48kHz单人录音数据集，并使用Coqui TTS进行模型验证。
AI.result: 成功生成了支持十种非洲语言的高质量语音数据集，并展示了基于该数据集的TTS模型效果。
AI.conclusion: BibleTTS为非洲语言的语音技术研究提供了重要资源，有助于推动多语言TTS模型的发展及本地化应用。

authors_text: Moein Shakeri,Hong Zhang
title: Highlight Specular Reflection Separation based on Tensor Low-rank and Sparse Decomposition Using Polarimetric Cues
title_zh: 使用偏振线索基于张量低阶和稀疏分解的高光镜面反射分离
abstract: This paper is concerned with specular reflection removal based on tensor low-rank decomposition framework with the help of polarization information. Our method is motivated by the observation that the specular highlight of an image is sparsely distributed while the remaining diffuse reflection can be well approximated by a linear combination of several distinct colors using a low-rank and sparse decomposition framework. Unlike current solutions, our tensor low-rank decomposition keeps the spatial structure of specular and diffuse information which enables us to recover the diffuse image under strong specular reflection or in saturated regions. We further define and impose a new polarization regularization term as constraint on color channels. This regularization boosts the performance of the method to recover an accurate diffuse image by handling the color distortion, a common problem of chromaticity-based methods, especially in case of strong specular reflection. Through comprehensive experiments on both synthetic and real polarization images, we demonstrate that our method is able to significantly improve the accuracy of highlight specular removal, and outperform the competitive methods to recover the diffuse image, especially in regions of strong specular reflection or in saturated areas.
summary: This paper is concerned with specular reflection removal based on tensor low-rank decomposition framework with the help of polarization information. Our method is motivated by the observation that the specular highlight of an image is sparsely distributed while the remaining diffuse reflection can be well approximated by a linear combination of several distinct colors using a low-rank and sparse decomposition framework. Unlike current solutions, our tensor low-rank decomposition keeps the spatial structure of specular and diffuse information which enables us to recover the diffuse image under strong specular reflection or in saturated regions. We further define and impose a new polarization regularization term as constraint on color channels. This regularization boosts the performance of the method to recover an accurate diffuse image by handling the color distortion, a common problem of chromaticity-based methods, especially in case of strong specular reflection. Through comprehensive experiments on both synthetic and real polarization images, we demonstrate that our method is able to significantly improve the accuracy of highlight specular removal, and outperform the competitive methods to recover the diffuse image, especially in regions of strong specular reflection or in saturated areas.
abstract_zh: 本文关注的是借助偏振信息基于张量低阶分解框架的镜面反射去除。我们的方法的动机是观察到图像的镜面高光是稀疏分布的，而剩余的漫反射可以通过使用低秩和稀疏分解框架的几种不同颜色的线性组合来很好地近似。与当前的解决方案不同，我们的张量低阶分解保留了镜面反射和漫反射信息的空间结构，这使我们能够在强镜面反射或饱和区域中恢复漫反射图像。我们进一步定义并施加一个新的偏振正则化项作为对颜色通道的约束。这种正则化通过处理颜色失真（基于色度的方法的常见问题），特别是在强镜面反射的情况下，提高了恢复准确漫反射图像的方法的性能。通过对合成和真实偏振图像的综合实验，我们证明我们的方法能够显着提高高光镜面反射去除的准确性，并且在恢复漫反射图像方面优于竞争方法，特别是在强镜面反射区域或饱和区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于张量低秩和稀疏分解的高光分离方法，利用偏振信息提升强高光区域的漫反射图像恢复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在强高光或饱和区域难以准确分离漫反射与高光，且基于色度的方法易产生颜色失真，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过张量低秩分解保留高光与漫反射的空间结构，并引入偏振正则化约束颜色通道，联合优化低秩近似与稀疏高光分布。
AI.result: 在合成与真实偏振图像实验中，该方法显著提升高光去除精度，尤其在强反射区域优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合偏振线索的张量分解框架能有效恢复漫反射图像，解决颜色失真问题，在复杂光照场景中表现更优。

search_text: Highlight Specular Reflection Separation based on Tensor Low-rank and Sparse Decomposition Using Polarimetric Cues 使用偏振线索基于张量低阶和稀疏分解的高光镜面反射分离 This paper is concerned with specular reflection removal based on tensor low-rank decomposition framework with the help of polarization information. Our method is motivated by the observation that the specular highlight of an image is sparsely distributed while the remaining diffuse reflection can be well approximated by a linear combination of several distinct colors using a low-rank and sparse decomposition framework. Unlike current solutions, our tensor low-rank decomposition keeps the spatial structure of specular and diffuse information which enables us to recover the diffuse image under strong specular reflection or in saturated regions. We further define and impose a new polarization regularization term as constraint on color channels. This regularization boosts the performance of the method to recover an accurate diffuse image by handling the color distortion, a common problem of chromaticity-based methods, especially in case of strong specular reflection. Through comprehensive experiments on both synthetic and real polarization images, we demonstrate that our method is able to significantly improve the accuracy of highlight specular removal, and outperform the competitive methods to recover the diffuse image, especially in regions of strong specular reflection or in saturated areas. 本文关注的是借助偏振信息基于张量低阶分解框架的镜面反射去除。我们的方法的动机是观察到图像的镜面高光是稀疏分布的，而剩余的漫反射可以通过使用低秩和稀疏分解框架的几种不同颜色的线性组合来很好地近似。与当前的解决方案不同，我们的张量低阶分解保留了镜面反射和漫反射信息的空间结构，这使我们能够在强镜面反射或饱和区域中恢复漫反射图像。我们进一步定义并施加一个新的偏振正则化项作为对颜色通道的约束。这种正则化通过处理颜色失真（基于色度的方法的常见问题），特别是在强镜面反射的情况下，提高了恢复准确漫反射图像的方法的性能。通过对合成和真实偏振图像的综合实验，我们证明我们的方法能够显着提高高光镜面反射去除的准确性，并且在恢复漫反射图像方面优于竞争方法，特别是在强镜面反射区域或饱和区域。 本文提出一种基于张量低秩和稀疏分解的高光分离方法，利用偏振信息提升强高光区域的漫反射图像恢复效果。 Moein Shakeri,Hong Zhang cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Qihao Peng,Zhiyu Xiang,YuanGang Fan,Tengqi Zhao,Xijun Zhao
title: RWT-SLAM: Robust Visual SLAM for Highly Weak-textured Environments
title_zh: RWT-SLAM：适用于高度弱纹理环境的鲁棒视觉 SLAM
abstract: As a fundamental task for intelligent robots, visual SLAM has made great progress over the past decades. However, robust SLAM under highly weak-textured environments still remains very challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel visual SLAM system named RWT-SLAM to tackle this problem. We modify LoFTR network which is able to produce dense point matching under low-textured scenes to generate feature descriptors. To integrate the new features into the popular ORB-SLAM framework, we develop feature masks to filter out the unreliable features and employ KNN strategy to strengthen the matching robustness. We also retrained visual vocabulary upon new descriptors for efficient loop closing. The resulting RWT-SLAM is tested in various public datasets such as TUM and OpenLORIS, as well as our own data. The results shows very promising performance under highly weak-textured environments.
summary: As a fundamental task for intelligent robots, visual SLAM has made great progress over the past decades. However, robust SLAM under highly weak-textured environments still remains very challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel visual SLAM system named RWT-SLAM to tackle this problem. We modify LoFTR network which is able to produce dense point matching under low-textured scenes to generate feature descriptors. To integrate the new features into the popular ORB-SLAM framework, we develop feature masks to filter out the unreliable features and employ KNN strategy to strengthen the matching robustness. We also retrained visual vocabulary upon new descriptors for efficient loop closing. The resulting RWT-SLAM is tested in various public datasets such as TUM and OpenLORIS, as well as our own data. The results shows very promising performance under highly weak-textured environments.
abstract_zh: 作为智能机器人的一项基本任务，视觉SLAM在过去几十年中取得了长足的进步。然而，在高度弱纹理环境下的鲁棒 SLAM 仍然非常具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 RWT-SLAM 的新型视觉 SLAM 系统来解决这个问题。我们修改了 LoFTR 网络，该网络能够在低纹理场景下产生密集点匹配，以生成特征描述符。为了将新特征集成到流行的 ORB-SLAM 框架中，我们开发了特征掩模来过滤掉不可靠的特征，并采用 KNN 策略来增强匹配的鲁棒性。我们还根据新的描述符重新训练视觉词汇，以实现有效的循环关闭。由此产生的 RWT-SLAM 在各种公共数据集（例如 TUM 和 OpenLORIS）以及我们自己的数据中进行了测试。结果显示在高度弱纹理环境下具有非常有前景的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RWT-SLAM的视觉SLAM系统，专门针对高度弱纹理环境下的鲁棒性挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉SLAM方法在弱纹理环境中容易失效，亟需提升复杂场景下的定位与建图鲁棒性。
AI.method: 改进LoFTR网络生成密集特征点，结合特征掩码过滤不可靠特征，采用KNN策略增强匹配鲁棒性，并重新训练视觉词典优化回环检测。
AI.result: 在TUM、OpenLORIS等公开数据集及自建数据中验证，系统在弱纹理场景下表现出显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: RWT-SLAM通过多技术融合有效解决了弱纹理环境下的SLAM难题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Matteo Bettini,Ryan Kortvelesy,Jan Blumenkamp,Amanda Prorok
title: VMAS: A Vectorized Multi-Agent Simulator for Collective Robot Learning
title_zh: VMAS：用于集体机器人学习的矢量化多智能体模拟器
abstract: While many multi-robot coordination problems can be solved optimally by exact algorithms, solutions are often not scalable in the number of robots. Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) is gaining increasing attention in the robotics community as a promising solution to tackle such problems. Nevertheless, we still lack the tools that allow us to quickly and efficiently find solutions to large-scale collective learning tasks. In this work, we introduce the Vectorized Multi-Agent Simulator (VMAS). VMAS is an open-source framework designed for efficient MARL benchmarking. It is comprised of a vectorized 2D physics engine written in PyTorch and a set of twelve challenging multi-robot scenarios. Additional scenarios can be implemented through a simple and modular interface. We demonstrate how vectorization enables parallel simulation on accelerated hardware without added complexity. When comparing VMAS to OpenAI MPE, we show how MPE's execution time increases linearly in the number of simulations while VMAS is able to execute 30,000 parallel simulations in under 10s, proving more than 100x faster. Using VMAS's RLlib interface, we benchmark our multi-robot scenarios using various Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)-based MARL algorithms. VMAS's scenarios prove challenging in orthogonal ways for state-of-the-art MARL algorithms. The VMAS framework is available at https://github.com/proroklab/VectorizedMultiAgentSimulator. A video of VMAS scenarios and experiments is available at https://youtu.be/aaDRYfiesAY.
summary: While many multi-robot coordination problems can be solved optimally by exact algorithms, solutions are often not scalable in the number of robots. Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) is gaining increasing attention in the robotics community as a promising solution to tackle such problems. Nevertheless, we still lack the tools that allow us to quickly and efficiently find solutions to large-scale collective learning tasks. In this work, we introduce the Vectorized Multi-Agent Simulator (VMAS). VMAS is an open-source framework designed for efficient MARL benchmarking. It is comprised of a vectorized 2D physics engine written in PyTorch and a set of twelve challenging multi-robot scenarios. Additional scenarios can be implemented through a simple and modular interface. We demonstrate how vectorization enables parallel simulation on accelerated hardware without added complexity. When comparing VMAS to OpenAI MPE, we show how MPE's execution time increases linearly in the number of simulations while VMAS is able to execute 30,000 parallel simulations in under 10s, proving more than 100x faster. Using VMAS's RLlib interface, we benchmark our multi-robot scenarios using various Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)-based MARL algorithms. VMAS's scenarios prove challenging in orthogonal ways for state-of-the-art MARL algorithms. The VMAS framework is available at https://github.com/proroklab/VectorizedMultiAgentSimulator. A video of VMAS scenarios and experiments is available at https://youtu.be/aaDRYfiesAY.
abstract_zh: 虽然许多多机器人协调问题可以通过精确算法得到最佳解决，但解决方案通常无法在机器人数量上进行扩展。多智能体强化学习（MARL）作为解决此类问题的一种有前景的解决方案，在机器人界越来越受到关注。尽管如此，我们仍然缺乏能够快速有效地找到大规模集体学习任务解决方案的工具。在这项工作中，我们介绍了矢量化多智能体模拟器（VMAS）。 VMAS 是一个开源框架，专为高效的 MARL 基准测试而设计。它由用 PyTorch 编写的矢量化 2D 物理引擎和一组 12 个具有挑战性的多机器人场景组成。其他场景可以通过简单且模块化的界面来实现。我们演示了矢量化如何在加速硬件上实现并行仿真而不增加复杂性。在将 VMAS 与 OpenAI MPE 进行比较时，我们展示了 MPE 的执行时间如何随着模拟数量线性增加，而 VMAS 能够在 10 秒内执行 30,000 个并行模拟，事实证明速度快了 100 倍以上。使用 VMAS 的 RLlib 接口，我们使用各种基于近端策略优化 (PPO) 的 MARL 算法对多机器人场景进行基准测试。 VMAS 的场景对于最先进的 MARL 算法来说在正交方面具有挑战性。 VMAS 框架位于 https://github.com/proroklab/VectorizedMultiAgentSimulator。有关 VMAS 场景和实验的视频，请访问 https://youtu.be/aaDRYfiesAY。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VMAS框架，用于高效的大规模多机器人集体学习任务基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有多机器人协调算法扩展性差，而MARL缺乏高效工具以支持大规模并行仿真。
AI.method: 设计基于PyTorch的向量化2D物理引擎及十二个挑战性场景，通过模块化接口支持扩展，并利用硬件加速实现并行模拟。
AI.result: VMAS在30,000次并行仿真中仅需10秒（比MPE快100倍），且其场景对先进MARL算法具有挑战性。
AI.conclusion: VMAS为集体机器人学习提供了高效开源工具，推动大规模多智能体强化学习研究。

authors_text: Ezra Tal,Gilhyun Ryou,Sertac Karaman
title: Aerobatic Trajectory Generation for a VTOL Fixed-Wing Aircraft Using Differential Flatness
title_zh: 使用差分平面度生成 VTOL 固定翼飞机的特技飞行轨迹
comment: 14 pages, 17 figures, video of experiments available at https://aera.mit.edu/projects/TailsitterAerobatics
comments: 14 pages, 17 figures, video of experiments available at https://aera.mit.edu/projects/TailsitterAerobatics
abstract: This paper proposes a novel algorithm for aerobatic trajectory generation for a vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) tailsitter flying wing aircraft. The algorithm differs from existing approaches for fixed-wing trajectory generation, as it considers a realistic six-degree-of-freedom (6DOF) flight dynamics model, including aerodynamics equations. Using a global dynamics model enables the generation of aerobatics trajectories that exploit the entire flight envelope, enabling agile maneuvering through the stall regime, sideways uncoordinated flight, inverted flight etc. The method uses the differential flatness property of the global tailsitter flying wing dynamics, which is derived in this work. By performing snap minimization in the differentially flat output space, a computationally efficient algorithm, suitable for online motion planning, is obtained. The algorithm is demonstrated in extensive flight experiments encompassing six aerobatics maneuvers, a time-optimal drone racing trajectory, and an airshow-like aerobatic sequence for three tailsitter aircraft.
summary: This paper proposes a novel algorithm for aerobatic trajectory generation for a vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) tailsitter flying wing aircraft. The algorithm differs from existing approaches for fixed-wing trajectory generation, as it considers a realistic six-degree-of-freedom (6DOF) flight dynamics model, including aerodynamics equations. Using a global dynamics model enables the generation of aerobatics trajectories that exploit the entire flight envelope, enabling agile maneuvering through the stall regime, sideways uncoordinated flight, inverted flight etc. The method uses the differential flatness property of the global tailsitter flying wing dynamics, which is derived in this work. By performing snap minimization in the differentially flat output space, a computationally efficient algorithm, suitable for online motion planning, is obtained. The algorithm is demonstrated in extensive flight experiments encompassing six aerobatics maneuvers, a time-optimal drone racing trajectory, and an airshow-like aerobatic sequence for three tailsitter aircraft.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于垂直起降（VTOL）尾座飞翼飞机特技飞行轨迹生成的新算法。该算法与现有的固定翼轨迹生成方法不同，因为它考虑了现实的六自由度 (6DOF) 飞行动力学模型，包括空气动力学方程。使用全局动力学模型可以生成利用整个飞行包线的特技飞行轨迹，从而能够通过失速状态、侧向不协调飞行、倒转飞行等进行灵活机动。该方法使用了本工作中推导的全局尾翼飞翼动力学的微分平坦度特性。通过在差异平坦的输出空间中执行捕捉最小化，获得了适合在线运动规划的计算高效的算法。该算法在广泛的飞行实验中得到了证明，包括六次特技飞行、时间最优的无人机竞速轨迹以及三架尾翼飞机的类似航展的特技飞行序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于微分平坦性的算法，用于垂直起降固定翼飞机的特技飞行轨迹生成。
AI.motivation: 现有固定翼轨迹生成方法未能充分考虑复杂飞行包线和六自由度动力学模型，难以实现高敏捷性特技机动。
AI.method: 构建包含空气动力学的六自由度全局动力学模型，利用微分平坦性在输出空间进行snap最小化优化，实现高效轨迹规划。
AI.result: 实验验证了算法在六种特技动作、无人机竞速轨迹及多机协同表演中的有效性，展示了计算效率和运动规划能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过微分平坦性与动力学模型结合，为VTOL飞机复杂特技飞行提供了实时可行的轨迹生成方案。

search_text: Aerobatic Trajectory Generation for a VTOL Fixed-Wing Aircraft Using Differential Flatness 使用差分平面度生成 VTOL 固定翼飞机的特技飞行轨迹 This paper proposes a novel algorithm for aerobatic trajectory generation for a vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) tailsitter flying wing aircraft. The algorithm differs from existing approaches for fixed-wing trajectory generation, as it considers a realistic six-degree-of-freedom (6DOF) flight dynamics model, including aerodynamics equations. Using a global dynamics model enables the generation of aerobatics trajectories that exploit the entire flight envelope, enabling agile maneuvering through the stall regime, sideways uncoordinated flight, inverted flight etc. The method uses the differential flatness property of the global tailsitter flying wing dynamics, which is derived in this work. By performing snap minimization in the differentially flat output space, a computationally efficient algorithm, suitable for online motion planning, is obtained. The algorithm is demonstrated in extensive flight experiments encompassing six aerobatics maneuvers, a time-optimal drone racing trajectory, and an airshow-like aerobatic sequence for three tailsitter aircraft. 本文提出了一种用于垂直起降（VTOL）尾座飞翼飞机特技飞行轨迹生成的新算法。该算法与现有的固定翼轨迹生成方法不同，因为它考虑了现实的六自由度 (6DOF) 飞行动力学模型，包括空气动力学方程。使用全局动力学模型可以生成利用整个飞行包线的特技飞行轨迹，从而能够通过失速状态、侧向不协调飞行、倒转飞行等进行灵活机动。该方法使用了本工作中推导的全局尾翼飞翼动力学的微分平坦度特性。通过在差异平坦的输出空间中执行捕捉最小化，获得了适合在线运动规划的计算高效的算法。该算法在广泛的飞行实验中得到了证明，包括六次特技飞行、时间最优的无人机竞速轨迹以及三架尾翼飞机的类似航展的特技飞行序列。 本文提出一种基于微分平坦性的算法，用于垂直起降固定翼飞机的特技飞行轨迹生成。 Ezra Tal,Gilhyun Ryou,Sertac Karaman cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Oleksandr Ferludin,Arno Eigenwillig,Martin Blais,Dustin Zelle,Jan Pfeifer,Alvaro Sanchez-Gonzalez,Wai Lok Sibon Li,Sami Abu-El-Haija,Peter Battaglia,Neslihan Bulut,Jonathan Halcrow,Filipe Miguel Gonçalves de Almeida,Pedro Gonnet,Liangze Jiang,Parth Kothari,Silvio Lattanzi,André Linhares,Brandon Mayer,Vahab Mirrokni,John Palowitch,Mihir Paradkar,Jennifer She,Anton Tsitsulin,Kevin Villela,Lisa Wang, et al. (2 additional authors not shown)
title: TF-GNN: Graph Neural Networks in TensorFlow
title_zh: TF-GNN：TensorFlow 中的图神经网络
abstract: TensorFlow-GNN (TF-GNN) is a scalable library for Graph Neural Networks in TensorFlow. It is designed from the bottom up to support the kinds of rich heterogeneous graph data that occurs in today's information ecosystems. In addition to enabling machine learning researchers and advanced developers, TF-GNN offers low-code solutions to empower the broader developer community in graph learning. Many production models at Google use TF-GNN, and it has been recently released as an open source project. In this paper we describe the TF-GNN data model, its Keras message passing API, and relevant capabilities such as graph sampling and distributed training.
summary: TensorFlow-GNN (TF-GNN) is a scalable library for Graph Neural Networks in TensorFlow. It is designed from the bottom up to support the kinds of rich heterogeneous graph data that occurs in today's information ecosystems. In addition to enabling machine learning researchers and advanced developers, TF-GNN offers low-code solutions to empower the broader developer community in graph learning. Many production models at Google use TF-GNN, and it has been recently released as an open source project. In this paper we describe the TF-GNN data model, its Keras message passing API, and relevant capabilities such as graph sampling and distributed training.
abstract_zh: TensorFlow-GNN (TF-GNN) 是 TensorFlow 中图神经网络的可扩展库。它是自下而上设计的，旨在支持当今信息生态系统中出现的各种丰富的异构图形数据。除了为机器学习研究人员和高级开发人员提供支持之外，TF-GNN 还提供低代码解决方案，为更广泛的开发人员社区提供图学习方面的支持。谷歌的许多生产模型都使用 TF-GNN，并且它最近已作为开源项目发布。在本文中，我们描述了 TF-GNN 数据模型、其 Keras 消息传递 API 以及图采样和分布式训练等相关功能。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了TF-GNN库，该库为TensorFlow中的图神经网络提供可扩展的解决方案，支持异构图数据，并提供低代码工具和分布式训练能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络工具难以高效处理现代信息生态中的复杂异构图数据，且缺乏对开发者友好的低代码支持，需构建统一框架以推动图学习应用普及。
AI.method: 设计基于TensorFlow的TF-GNN数据模型，开发Keras消息传递API，实现图采样、分布式训练等核心功能，支持异构图结构的灵活建模与大规模训练。
AI.result: TF-GNN已被谷歌生产系统采用并作为开源项目发布，验证了其在实际场景中的有效性，同时通过Keras API降低了图学习的使用门槛。
AI.conclusion: TF-GNN通过可扩展架构和易用性设计，为图神经网络研究与应用提供了高效工具，未来可进一步优化分布式训练性能并扩展更多图算法支持。

authors_text: Yunsheng Li,Yinpeng Chen,Xiyang Dai,Dongdong Chen,Mengchen Liu,Pei Yu,Jing Yin,Lu Yuan,Zicheng Liu,Nuno Vasconcelos
title: Should All Proposals be Treated Equally in Object Detection?
title_zh: 在对象检测中是否应该平等对待所有提案？
abstract: The complexity-precision trade-off of an object detector is a critical problem for resource constrained vision tasks. Previous works have emphasized detectors implemented with efficient backbones. The impact on this trade-off of proposal processing by the detection head is investigated in this work. It is hypothesized that improved detection efficiency requires a paradigm shift, towards the unequal processing of proposals, assigning more computation to good proposals than poor ones. This results in better utilization of available computational budget, enabling higher accuracy for the same FLOPS. We formulate this as a learning problem where the goal is to assign operators to proposals, in the detection head, so that the total computational cost is constrained and the precision is maximized. The key finding is that such matching can be learned as a function that maps each proposal embedding into a one-hot code over operators. While this function induces a complex dynamic network routing mechanism, it can be implemented by a simple MLP and learned end-to-end with off-the-shelf object detectors. This 'dynamic proposal processing' (DPP) is shown to outperform state-of-the-art end-to-end object detectors (DETR, Sparse R-CNN) by a clear margin for a given computational complexity.
summary: The complexity-precision trade-off of an object detector is a critical problem for resource constrained vision tasks. Previous works have emphasized detectors implemented with efficient backbones. The impact on this trade-off of proposal processing by the detection head is investigated in this work. It is hypothesized that improved detection efficiency requires a paradigm shift, towards the unequal processing of proposals, assigning more computation to good proposals than poor ones. This results in better utilization of available computational budget, enabling higher accuracy for the same FLOPS. We formulate this as a learning problem where the goal is to assign operators to proposals, in the detection head, so that the total computational cost is constrained and the precision is maximized. The key finding is that such matching can be learned as a function that maps each proposal embedding into a one-hot code over operators. While this function induces a complex dynamic network routing mechanism, it can be implemented by a simple MLP and learned end-to-end with off-the-shelf object detectors. This 'dynamic proposal processing' (DPP) is shown to outperform state-of-the-art end-to-end object detectors (DETR, Sparse R-CNN) by a clear margin for a given computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 目标检测器的复杂性与精度的权衡是资源受限的视觉任务的关键问题。以前的工作强调使用高效骨干网实现的检测器。这项工作研究了检测头处理提案的这种权衡的影响。假设提高检测效率需要范式转变，转向不平等的提案处理，为好的提案分配比差的提案更多的计算。这可以更好地利用可用的计算预算，从而在相同的 FLOPS 下实现更高的精度。我们将其表述为一个学习问题，其目标是在检测头中将运算符分配给建议，以便限制总计算成本并最大化精度。关键的发现是，这种匹配可以作为一种函数来学习，该函数将每个提案嵌入映射到运算符上的独热代码中。虽然此功能引入了复杂的动态网络路由机制，但它可以通过简单的 MLP 来实现，并使用现成的对象检测器进行端到端学习。对于给定的计算复杂度，这种“动态提议处理”（DPP）的性能明显优于最先进的端到端目标检测器（DETR、Sparse R-CNN）。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在目标检测中是否应平等处理所有建议框，并提出了一种动态建议处理方法（DPP）来提高检测效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的视觉任务中，目标检测的复杂度与精度之间的权衡是一个关键问题。以往的研究重点在于使用高效的骨干网络，但忽视了检测头中建议框处理对这一权衡的影响。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种动态建议处理方法（DPP），通过学习将每个建议框嵌入映射到一个操作符的one-hot编码，从而实现对不同建议框的不均衡计算分配。
AI.result: 实验表明，DPP方法在给定计算复杂度下优于最先进的端到端目标检测器（如DETR和Sparse R-CNN）。
AI.conclusion: 动态建议处理（DPP）能够有效提升目标检测的精度，同时保持计算复杂度，为资源受限环境下的检测任务提供了新的解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，DPP方法在给定计算复杂度下优于最先进的端到端目标检测器（如DETR和Sparse R-CNN）。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 动态建议处理（DPP）能够有效提升目标检测的精度，同时保持计算复杂度，为资源受限环境下的检测任务提供了新的解决方案。

tldr: 本文探讨了在目标检测中是否应平等处理所有建议框，并提出了一种动态建议处理方法（DPP）来提高检测效率和精度。

search_text: Should All Proposals be Treated Equally in Object Detection? 在对象检测中是否应该平等对待所有提案？ The complexity-precision trade-off of an object detector is a critical problem for resource constrained vision tasks. Previous works have emphasized detectors implemented with efficient backbones. The impact on this trade-off of proposal processing by the detection head is investigated in this work. It is hypothesized that improved detection efficiency requires a paradigm shift, towards the unequal processing of proposals, assigning more computation to good proposals than poor ones. This results in better utilization of available computational budget, enabling higher accuracy for the same FLOPS. We formulate this as a learning problem where the goal is to assign operators to proposals, in the detection head, so that the total computational cost is constrained and the precision is maximized. The key finding is that such matching can be learned as a function that maps each proposal embedding into a one-hot code over operators. While this function induces a complex dynamic network routing mechanism, it can be implemented by a simple MLP and learned end-to-end with off-the-shelf object detectors. This 'dynamic proposal processing' (DPP) is shown to outperform state-of-the-art end-to-end object detectors (DETR, Sparse R-CNN) by a clear margin for a given computational complexity. 目标检测器的复杂性与精度的权衡是资源受限的视觉任务的关键问题。以前的工作强调使用高效骨干网实现的检测器。这项工作研究了检测头处理提案的这种权衡的影响。假设提高检测效率需要范式转变，转向不平等的提案处理，为好的提案分配比差的提案更多的计算。这可以更好地利用可用的计算预算，从而在相同的 FLOPS 下实现更高的精度。我们将其表述为一个学习问题，其目标是在检测头中将运算符分配给建议，以便限制总计算成本并最大化精度。关键的发现是，这种匹配可以作为一种函数来学习，该函数将每个提案嵌入映射到运算符上的独热代码中。虽然此功能引入了复杂的动态网络路由机制，但它可以通过简单的 MLP 来实现，并使用现成的对象检测器进行端到端学习。对于给定的计算复杂度，这种“动态提议处理”（DPP）的性能明显优于最先进的端到端目标检测器（DETR、Sparse R-CNN）。 本文探讨了在目标检测中是否应平等处理所有建议框，并提出了一种动态建议处理方法（DPP）来提高检测效率和精度。 Yunsheng Li,Yinpeng Chen,Xiyang Dai,Dongdong Chen,Mengchen Liu,Pei Yu,Jing Yin,Lu Yuan,Zicheng Liu,Nuno Vasconcelos cs.CV

authors_text: Kin G. Olivares,Azul Garza,David Luo,Cristian Challú,Max Mergenthaler,Souhaib Ben Taieb,Shanika L. Wickramasuriya,Artur Dubrawski
title: HierarchicalForecast: A Reference Framework for Hierarchical Forecasting in Python
title_zh: HierarchicalForecast：Python 分层预测的参考框架
abstract: Large collections of time series data are commonly organized into structures with different levels of aggregation; examples include product and geographical groupings. It is often important to ensure that the forecasts are coherent so that the predicted values at disaggregate levels add up to the aggregate forecast. The growing interest of the Machine Learning community in hierarchical forecasting systems indicates that we are in a propitious moment to ensure that scientific endeavors are grounded on sound baselines. For this reason, we put forward the HierarchicalForecast library, which contains preprocessed publicly available datasets, evaluation metrics, and a compiled set of statistical baseline models. Our Python-based reference framework aims to bridge the gap between statistical and econometric modeling, and Machine Learning forecasting research. Code and documentation are available in https://github.com/Nixtla/hierarchicalforecast.
summary: Large collections of time series data are commonly organized into structures with different levels of aggregation; examples include product and geographical groupings. It is often important to ensure that the forecasts are coherent so that the predicted values at disaggregate levels add up to the aggregate forecast. The growing interest of the Machine Learning community in hierarchical forecasting systems indicates that we are in a propitious moment to ensure that scientific endeavors are grounded on sound baselines. For this reason, we put forward the HierarchicalForecast library, which contains preprocessed publicly available datasets, evaluation metrics, and a compiled set of statistical baseline models. Our Python-based reference framework aims to bridge the gap between statistical and econometric modeling, and Machine Learning forecasting research. Code and documentation are available in https://github.com/Nixtla/hierarchicalforecast.
abstract_zh: 大量时间序列数据通常被组织成具有不同聚合级别的结构；例子包括产品和地理分组。确保预测的连贯性通常很重要，这样分类级别的预测值就能累加到总体预测中。机器学习社区对分层预测系统的兴趣日益浓厚，这表明我们正处于确保科学努力建立在合理基线之上的有利时刻。为此，我们提出了 HierarchicalForecast 库，其中包含预处理的公开数据集、评估指标和一组已编译的统计基线模型。我们基于 Python 的参考框架旨在弥合统计和计量经济建模以及机器学习预测研究之间的差距。代码和文档可在 https://github.com/Nixtla/hierarchicalforecast 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为HierarchicalForecast的Python框架，用于处理分层时间序列预测问题，提供预处理数据集、评估指标和基准模型。
AI.motivation: 分层时间序列数据在预测时需要保证不同层级的预测结果一致性，而现有研究缺乏统一的基准工具，需建立跨统计模型与机器学习方法的桥梁。
AI.method: 开发包含公开数据集、评估指标及统计基准模型的Python库，整合分层预测的预处理流程与评价体系。
AI.result: 实现了可复用的分层预测框架，提供标准化测试环境，促进该领域的算法比较与研究进展。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为分层预测研究提供了可靠基准，有助于推动机器学习与传统统计方法在该领域的融合应用。

authors_text: Kira Maag,Matthias Rottmann
title: False Negative Reduction in Semantic Segmentation under Domain Shift using Depth Estimation
title_zh: 使用深度估计减少域转移下语义分割的误报
abstract: State-of-the-art deep neural networks demonstrate outstanding performance in semantic segmentation. However, their performance is tied to the domain represented by the training data. Open world scenarios cause inaccurate predictions which is hazardous in safety relevant applications like automated driving. In this work, we enhance semantic segmentation predictions using monocular depth estimation to improve segmentation by reducing the occurrence of non-detected objects in presence of domain shift. To this end, we infer a depth heatmap via a modified segmentation network which generates foreground-background masks, operating in parallel to a given semantic segmentation network. Both segmentation masks are aggregated with a focus on foreground classes (here road users) to reduce false negatives. To also reduce the occurrence of false positives, we apply a pruning based on uncertainty estimates. Our approach is modular in a sense that it post-processes the output of any semantic segmentation network. In our experiments, we observe less non-detected objects of most important classes and an enhanced generalization to other domains compared to the basic semantic segmentation prediction.
summary: State-of-the-art deep neural networks demonstrate outstanding performance in semantic segmentation. However, their performance is tied to the domain represented by the training data. Open world scenarios cause inaccurate predictions which is hazardous in safety relevant applications like automated driving. In this work, we enhance semantic segmentation predictions using monocular depth estimation to improve segmentation by reducing the occurrence of non-detected objects in presence of domain shift. To this end, we infer a depth heatmap via a modified segmentation network which generates foreground-background masks, operating in parallel to a given semantic segmentation network. Both segmentation masks are aggregated with a focus on foreground classes (here road users) to reduce false negatives. To also reduce the occurrence of false positives, we apply a pruning based on uncertainty estimates. Our approach is modular in a sense that it post-processes the output of any semantic segmentation network. In our experiments, we observe less non-detected objects of most important classes and an enhanced generalization to other domains compared to the basic semantic segmentation prediction.
abstract_zh: 最先进的深度神经网络在语义分割方面表现出出色的性能。然而，它们的性能与训练数据所代表的领域相关。开放世界场景会导致预测不准确，这对于自动驾驶等安全相关应用来说是危险的。在这项工作中，我们使用单目深度估计增强语义分割预测，通过减少域移位时未检测到的对象的出现来改进分割。为此，我们通过修改后的分割网络推断深度热图，该网络生成前景-背景掩模，与给定的语义分割网络并行操作。两个分割掩模都以前景类别（此处为道路使用者）为重点进行聚合，以减少误报。为了减少误报的发生，我们根据不确定性估计进行修剪。我们的方法是模块化的，它可以对任何语义分割网络的输出进行后处理。在我们的实验中，与基本语义分割预测相比，我们观察到最重要类别的未检测到的对象较少，并且对其他领域的泛化能力增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用单目深度估计减少领域迁移下语义分割的假阴性问题，通过生成深度热图与语义分割结果融合提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型在训练数据领域与实际应用领域不一致时易产生假阴性，这对自动驾驶等安全关键场景构成重大风险。
AI.method: 设计修改后的分割网络并行生成深度热图，与原始语义分割结果聚合时侧重前景类别（如道路使用者），结合不确定性估计进行假阳性剪枝。
AI.result: 实验表明重要类别未检测物体数量显著减少，且模型对其他领域的泛化能力优于基础语义分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化方法能有效提升分割结果的鲁棒性，在跨领域场景下减少关键目标的漏检风险。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用单目深度估计减少领域迁移下语义分割的假阴性问题，通过生成深度热图与语义分割结果融合提升检测性能。

authors_text: Hyuntai Kim
title: Convolution Neural Network based Mode Decomposition for Degenerated Modes via Multiple Images from Polarizers
title_zh: 基于卷积神经网络的退化模式通过来自偏振器的多个图像的模式分解
abstract: In this paper, a mode decomposition (MD) method for degenerated modes has been studied. Convolution neural network (CNN) has been applied for image training and predicting the mode coefficients. Four-fold degenerated $LP_{11}$ series has been the target to be decomposed. Multiple images are regarded as an input to decompose the degenerate modes. Total of seven different images, including the full original near-field image, and images after linear polarizers of four directions (0$^\circ$, 45$^\circ$, 90$^\circ$, and 135$^\circ$), and images after two circular polarizers (right-handed and left-handed) has been considered for training, validation, and test. The output label of the model has been chosen as the real and imaginary components of the mode coefficient, and the loss function has been selected to be the root-mean-square (RMS) of the labels. The RMS and mean-absolute-error (MAE) of the label, intensity, phase, and field correlation between the actual and predicted values have been selected to be the metrics to evaluate the CNN model. The CNN model has been trained with 100,000 three-dimensional images with depths of three, four, and seven. The performance of the trained model was evaluated via 10,000 test samples with four sets of images - images after three linear polarizers (0$^\circ$, 45$^\circ$, 90$^\circ$) and image after right-handed circular polarizer - showed 0.0634 of label RMS, 0.0292 of intensity RMS, 0.1867 rad of phase MAE, and 0.9978 of average field correlation. The performance of 4 image sets showed at least 50.68\% of performance enhancement compared to models considering only images after linear polarizers.

abstract_zh: 本文研究了退化模态的模态分解（MD）方法。卷积神经网络（CNN）已应用于图像训练和模式系数预测。四重退化$LP_{11}$系列是分解的目标。多个图像被视为分解简并模式的输入。总共七幅不同的图像，包括完整的原始近场图像、四个方向（0$^\circ$、45$^\circ$、90$^\circ$ 和 135$^\circ$）线性偏振器之后的图像以及两个圆偏振器（右旋和左旋）之后的图像已被考虑用于训练、验证和测试。模型的输出标签被选择为众数系数的实部和虚部，损失函数被选择为标签的均方根（RMS）。选择标签的 RMS 和平均绝对误差 (MAE)、强度、相位以及实际值和预测值之间的场相关性作为评估 CNN 模型的指标。 CNN 模型已使用 100,000 张深度为 3、4 和 7 的三维图像进行训练。通过 10,000 个测试样本和四组图像（三个线性偏振器（0$^\circ$、45$^\circ$、90$^\circ$）后的图像和右旋圆偏振器后的图像）评估训练模型的性能 - 显示标签 RMS 为 0.0634，强度 RMS 为 0.0292，相位 MAE 为 0.1867 rad，平均值为 0.9978场相关性。与仅考虑线性偏振器之后的图像的模型相比，4 个图像集的性能表现出至少 50.68% 的性能增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的模式分解方法，通过多角度偏振器获取的图像对退化模式进行分解。
AI.motivation: 传统模式分解方法在处理退化模式时存在精度不足的问题，需探索更高效的图像分析技术以提升分解效果。
AI.method: 利用CNN模型，输入包含全场近场图像及四方向线性偏振器和双圆偏振器图像的多组数据，输出模式系数的实部和虚部，采用均方根误差（RMS）作为损失函数进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 测试显示，使用四组图像（三线性偏振器加右旋圆偏振器）的模型在标签RMS、强度RMS、相位MAE和场相关性指标上分别达到0.0634、0.0292、0.1867 rad和0.9978，较仅使用线性偏振器的模型性能提升至少50.68%。
AI.conclusion: 结合多角度偏振图像的CNN方法显著提升了退化模式分解的精度，为复杂模式分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Grégoire Sergeant-Perthuis,Jakob Maier,Joan Bruna,Edouard Oyallon
title: On Non-Linear operators for Geometric Deep Learning
title_zh: 几何深度学习的非线性算子
comment: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 35 (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 35 (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: This work studies operators mapping vector and scalar fields defined over a manifold $\mathcal{M}$, and which commute with its group of diffeomorphisms $\text{Diff}(\mathcal{M})$. We prove that in the case of scalar fields $L^p_ω(\mathcal{M,\mathbb{R}})$, those operators correspond to point-wise non-linearities, recovering and extending known results on $\mathbb{R}^d$. In the context of Neural Networks defined over $\mathcal{M}$, it indicates that point-wise non-linear operators are the only universal family that commutes with any group of symmetries, and justifies their systematic use in combination with dedicated linear operators commuting with specific symmetries. In the case of vector fields $L^p_ω(\mathcal{M},T\mathcal{M})$, we show that those operators are solely the scalar multiplication. It indicates that $\text{Diff}(\mathcal{M})$ is too rich and that there is no universal class of non-linear operators to motivate the design of Neural Networks over the symmetries of $\mathcal{M}$.
summary: This work studies operators mapping vector and scalar fields defined over a manifold $\mathcal{M}$, and which commute with its group of diffeomorphisms $\text{Diff}(\mathcal{M})$. We prove that in the case of scalar fields $L^p_ω(\mathcal{M,\mathbb{R}})$, those operators correspond to point-wise non-linearities, recovering and extending known results on $\mathbb{R}^d$. In the context of Neural Networks defined over $\mathcal{M}$, it indicates that point-wise non-linear operators are the only universal family that commutes with any group of symmetries, and justifies their systematic use in combination with dedicated linear operators commuting with specific symmetries. In the case of vector fields $L^p_ω(\mathcal{M},T\mathcal{M})$, we show that those operators are solely the scalar multiplication. It indicates that $\text{Diff}(\mathcal{M})$ is too rich and that there is no universal class of non-linear operators to motivate the design of Neural Networks over the symmetries of $\mathcal{M}$.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了在流形$\mathcal{M}$上定义的映射向量和标量场的算子，并与其微分同胚组$\text{Diff}(\mathcal{M})$交换。我们证明，在标量场 $L^p_ω(\mathcal{M,\mathbb{R}})$ 的情况下，这些运算符对应于逐点非线性，恢复和扩展 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 上的已知结果。在 $\mathcal{M}$ 定义的神经网络的背景下，它表明逐点非线性算子是唯一与任何对称群交换的通用族，并证明了它们与与特定对称性交换的专用线性算子相结合的系统使用。在向量场 $L^p_ω(\mathcal{M},T\mathcal{M})$ 的情况下，我们证明这些运算符只是标量乘法。它表明 $\text{Diff}(\mathcal{M})$ 过于丰富，并且没有通用的非线性算子类来激励神经网络在 $\mathcal{M}$ 的对称性上的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在流形上定义的向量场和标量场之间映射且与微分同胚群交换的非线性算子，探讨其在几何深度学习中的应用。
AI.motivation: 几何深度学习需要设计符合流形对称性的神经网络算子，而现有研究缺乏对非线性算子与流形对称性关系的系统分析。
AI.method: 通过分析流形上的L^p空间标量场和向量场，结合微分同胚群的性质，证明满足交换条件的算子形式。
AI.result: 标量场情形下仅点wise非线性算子满足条件，向量场情形下仅标量乘法满足条件，表明微分同胚群过于复杂无法支持通用非线性算子。
AI.conclusion: 几何神经网络应优先采用点wise非线性算子结合特定对称性线性算子，而向量场情形需重新设计符合流形对称性的网络结构。

authors_text: Christian Boin,Lei Lei,Simon X. Yang
title: AVDDPG: Federated reinforcement learning applied to autonomous platoon control
title_zh: AVDDPG：联合强化学习应用于自主排控制
abstract: Since 2016 federated learning (FL) has been an evolving topic of discussion in the artificial intelligence (AI) research community. Applications of FL led to the development and study of federated reinforcement learning (FRL). Few works exist on the topic of FRL applied to autonomous vehicle (AV) platoons. In addition, most FRL works choose a single aggregation method (usually weight or gradient aggregation). We explore FRL's effectiveness as a means to improve AV platooning by designing and implementing an FRL framework atop a custom AV platoon environment. The application of FRL in AV platooning is studied under two scenarios: (1) Inter-platoon FRL (Inter-FRL) where FRL is applied to AVs across different platoons; (2) Intra-platoon FRL (Intra-FRL) where FRL is applied to AVs within a single platoon. Both Inter-FRL and Intra-FRL are applied to a custom AV platooning environment using both gradient and weight aggregation to observe the performance effects FRL can have on AV platoons relative to an AV platooning environment trained without FRL. It is concluded that Intra-FRL using weight aggregation (Intra-FRLWA) provides the best performance for controlling an AV platoon. In addition, we found that weight aggregation in FRL for AV platooning provides increases in performance relative to gradient aggregation. Finally, a performance analysis is conducted for Intra-FRLWA versus a platooning environment without FRL for platoons of length 3, 4 and 5 vehicles. It is concluded that Intra-FRLWA largely out-performs the platooning environment that is trained without FRL.

Applications of FL led to the development and study of federated reinforcement learning (FRL). Few works exist on the topic of FRL applied to autonomous vehicle (AV) platoons. In addition, most FRL works choose a single aggregation method (usually weight or gradient aggregation). We explore FRL's effectiveness as a means to improve AV platooning by designing and implementing an FRL framework atop a custom AV platoon environment. The application of FRL in AV platooning is studied under two scenarios: (1) Inter-platoon FRL (Inter-FRL) where FRL is applied to AVs across different platoons; (2) Intra-platoon FRL (Intra-FRL) where FRL is applied to AVs within a single platoon. Both Inter-FRL and Intra-FRL are applied to a custom AV platooning environment using both gradient and weight aggregation to observe the performance effects FRL can have on AV platoons relative to an AV platooning environment trained without FRL. It is concluded that Intra-FRL using weight aggregation (Intra-FRLWA) provides the best performance for controlling an AV platoon. In addition, we found that weight aggregation in FRL for AV platooning provides increases in performance relative to gradient aggregation. Finally, a performance analysis is conducted for Intra-FRLWA versus a platooning environment without FRL for platoons of length 3, 4 and 5 vehicles. It is concluded that Intra-FRLWA largely out-performs the platooning environment that is trained without FRL.
abstract_zh: 自 2016 年以来，联邦学习 (FL) 一直是人工智能 (AI) 研究社区不断发展的讨论话题。 FL 的应用促进了联邦强化学习 (FRL) 的开发和研究。关于将 FRL 应用于自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 排的主题的著作很少。此外，大多数FRL作品选择单一聚合方法（通常是权重聚合或梯度聚合）。我们通过在自定义 AV 队列环境上设计和实现 FRL 框架，探索 FRL 作为改进 AV 队列的一种手段的有效性。 FRL在AV编队中的应用在两种情况下进行研究：（1）排间FRL（Inter-FRL），其中FRL应用于跨不同排的AV； (2) 排内 FRL（Intra-FRL），其中 FRL 适用于单个排内的 AV。 Inter-FRL 和 Intra-FRL 都应用于自定义 AV 编队环境，使用梯度和权重聚合来观察 FRL 相对于未经过 FRL 训练的 AV 编队环境对 AV 编队的性能影响。结论是，使用权重聚合的 Intra-FRL (Intra-FRLWA) 为控制 AV 排提供了最佳性能。此外，我们发现 FRL 中用于 AV 队列行驶的权重聚合相对于梯度聚合可提高性能。最后，针对长度为 3、4 和 5 辆车的排，对 Intra-FRLWA 与没有 FRL 的队列环境进行性能分析。结论是，Intra-FRLWA 在很大程度上优于没有 FRL 训练的编队环境。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现一个联邦强化学习框架，用于提升自动驾驶车队的协同控制
AI.motivation: 现有联邦强化学习在自动驾驶车队场景应用研究不足，且多采用单一聚合方法，需探索不同聚合方式对车队控制效果的影响
AI.method: 构建自定义自动驾驶车队环境，设计Inter-FRL和Intra-FRL两种场景，分别采用梯度聚合和权重聚合方法进行对比实验
AI.result: Intra-FRL权重聚合方案在3/4/5辆车队场景中均显著优于非FRL方案，且权重聚合性能优于梯度聚合
AI.conclusion: 权重聚合的Intra-FRL方案在自动驾驶车队控制中表现最优，验证了联邦强化学习在提升车队协同控制中的有效性

search_text: AVDDPG: Federated reinforcement learning applied to autonomous platoon control AVDDPG：联合强化学习应用于自主排控制 Since 2016 federated learning (FL) has been an evolving topic of discussion in the artificial intelligence (AI) research community. Applications of FL led to the development and study of federated reinforcement learning (FRL). Few works exist on the topic of FRL applied to autonomous vehicle (AV) platoons. In addition, most FRL works choose a single aggregation method (usually weight or gradient aggregation). We explore FRL's effectiveness as a means to improve AV platooning by designing and implementing an FRL framework atop a custom AV platoon environment. The application of FRL in AV platooning is studied under two scenarios: (1) Inter-platoon FRL (Inter-FRL) where FRL is applied to AVs across different platoons; (2) Intra-platoon FRL (Intra-FRL) where FRL is applied to AVs within a single platoon. Both Inter-FRL and Intra-FRL are applied to a custom AV platooning environment using both gradient and weight aggregation to observe the performance effects FRL can have on AV platoons relative to an AV platooning environment trained without FRL. It is concluded that Intra-FRL using weight aggregation (Intra-FRLWA) provides the best performance for controlling an AV platoon. In addition, we found that weight aggregation in FRL for AV platooning provides increases in performance relative to gradient aggregation. Finally, a performance analysis is conducted for Intra-FRLWA versus a platooning environment without FRL for platoons of length 3, 4 and 5 vehicles. It is concluded that Intra-FRLWA largely out-performs the platooning environment that is trained without FRL. 自 2016 年以来，联邦学习 (FL) 一直是人工智能 (AI) 研究社区不断发展的讨论话题。 FL 的应用促进了联邦强化学习 (FRL) 的开发和研究。关于将 FRL 应用于自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 排的主题的著作很少。此外，大多数FRL作品选择单一聚合方法（通常是权重聚合或梯度聚合）。我们通过在自定义 AV 队列环境上设计和实现 FRL 框架，探索 FRL 作为改进 AV 队列的一种手段的有效性。 FRL在AV编队中的应用在两种情况下进行研究：（1）排间FRL（Inter-FRL），其中FRL应用于跨不同排的AV； (2) 排内 FRL（Intra-FRL），其中 FRL 适用于单个排内的 AV。 Inter-FRL 和 Intra-FRL 都应用于自定义 AV 编队环境，使用梯度和权重聚合来观察 FRL 相对于未经过 FRL 训练的 AV 编队环境对 AV 编队的性能影响。结论是，使用权重聚合的 Intra-FRL (Intra-FRLWA) 为控制 AV 排提供了最佳性能。此外，我们发现 FRL 中用于 AV 队列行驶的权重聚合相对于梯度聚合可提高性能。最后，针对长度为 3、4 和 5 辆车的排，对 Intra-FRLWA 与没有 FRL 的队列环境进行性能分析。结论是，Intra-FRLWA 在很大程度上优于没有 FRL 训练的编队环境。 设计并实现一个联邦强化学习框架，用于提升自动驾驶车队的协同控制 Christian Boin,Lei Lei,Simon X. authors_text: Chuang Gan,Yi Gu,Siyuan Zhou,Jeremy Schwartz,Seth Alter,James Traer,Dan Gutfreund,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Josh McDermott,Antonio Torralba
title: Finding Fallen Objects Via Asynchronous Audio-Visual Integration
title_zh: 通过异步视听集成寻找掉落物体
abstract: The way an object looks and sounds provide complementary reflections of its physical properties. In many settings cues from vision and audition arrive asynchronously but must be integrated, as when we hear an object dropped on the floor and then must find it. In this paper, we introduce a setting in which to study multi-modal object localization in 3D virtual environments. An object is dropped somewhere in a room. An embodied robot agent, equipped with a camera and microphone, must determine what object has been dropped -- and where -- by combining audio and visual signals with knowledge of the underlying physics. To study this problem, we have generated a large-scale dataset -- the Fallen Objects dataset -- that includes 8000 instances of 30 physical object categories in 64 rooms. The dataset uses the ThreeDWorld platform which can simulate physics-based impact sounds and complex physical interactions between objects in a photorealistic setting. As a first step toward addressing this challenge, we develop a set of embodied agent baselines, based on imitation learning, reinforcement learning, and modular planning, and perform an in-depth analysis of the challenge of this new task.
summary: The way an object looks and sounds provide complementary reflections of its physical properties. In many settings cues from vision and audition arrive asynchronously but must be integrated, as when we hear an object dropped on the floor and then must find it. In this paper, we introduce a setting in which to study multi-modal object localization in 3D virtual environments. An object is dropped somewhere in a room. An embodied robot agent, equipped with a camera and microphone, must determine what object has been dropped -- and where -- by combining audio and visual signals with knowledge of the underlying physics. To study this problem, we have generated a large-scale dataset -- the Fallen Objects dataset -- that includes 8000 instances of 30 physical object categories in 64 rooms. The dataset uses the ThreeDWorld platform which can simulate physics-based impact sounds and complex physical interactions between objects in a photorealistic setting. As a first step toward addressing this challenge, we develop a set of embodied agent baselines, based on imitation learning, reinforcement learning, and modular planning, and perform an in-depth analysis of the challenge of this new task.
abstract_zh: 物体的外观和声音提供了其物理特性的互补反映。在许多设置中，来自视觉和听觉的线索异步到达，但必须整合，就像当我们听到有物体掉在地板上时，然后必须找到它。在本文中，我们介绍了一种研究 3D 虚拟环境中多模式对象定位的设置。一个物体掉落在房间的某处。配备摄像头和麦克风的实体机器人代理必须通过将音频和视觉信号与基础物理知识相结合来确定掉落的物体以及掉落地点。为了研究这个问题，我们生成了一个大型数据集——Fallen Objects 数据集——其中包括 64 个房间中 30 个物理对象类别的 8000 个实例。该数据集使用 ThreeDWorld 平台，该平台可以在逼真的环境中模拟基于物理的撞击声音和对象之间的复杂物理交互。作为应对这一挑战的第一步，我们基于模仿学习、强化学习和模块化规划开发了一组具体代理基线，并对这项新任务的挑战进行了深入分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过异步音频-视觉信息融合来定位3D虚拟环境中掉落物体的方法，并构建了包含8000个实例的Fallen Objects数据集进行研究。
AI.motivation: 物体的视觉和听觉信息能反映其物理特性，但在实际场景中这两种模态信号常存在异步性，需有效整合以实现物体定位，这对机器人感知能力提出挑战。
AI.method: 基于ThreeDWorld平台生成物理仿真数据集，设计包含视觉-听觉信号的多模态定位任务，并采用模仿学习、强化学习和模块化规划等方法构建智能体基线模型。
AI.result: 验证了多模态信息融合在物体定位中的有效性，分析了不同算法在异步信号对齐与物理知识利用方面的性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 异步音频-视觉融合为物体定位提供了新思路，所构建的数据集可推动相关算法研究，但跨模态时序对齐与物理先验知识的结合仍是关键挑战。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过异步音频-视觉信息融合来定位3D虚拟环境中掉落物体的方法，并构建了包含8000个实例的Fallen Objects数据集进行研究。

authors_text: Hanoona Rasheed,Muhammad Maaz,Muhammad Uzair Khattak,Salman Khan,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: Bridging the Gap between Object and Image-level Representations for Open-Vocabulary Detection
title_zh: 弥合开放词汇检测的对象和图像级表示之间的差距
abstract: Existing open-vocabulary object detectors typically enlarge their vocabulary sizes by leveraging different forms of weak supervision. This helps generalize to novel objects at inference. Two popular forms of weak-supervision used in open-vocabulary detection (OVD) include pretrained CLIP model and image-level supervision. We note that both these modes of supervision are not optimally aligned for the detection task: CLIP is trained with image-text pairs and lacks precise localization of objects while the image-level supervision has been used with heuristics that do not accurately specify local object regions. In this work, we propose to address this problem by performing object-centric alignment of the language embeddings from the CLIP model. Furthermore, we visually ground the objects with only image-level supervision using a pseudo-labeling process that provides high-quality object proposals and helps expand the vocabulary during training. We establish a bridge between the above two object-alignment strategies via a novel weight transfer function that aggregates their complimentary strengths. In essence, the proposed model seeks to minimize the gap between object and image-centric representations in the OVD setting. On the COCO benchmark, our proposed approach achieves 36.6 AP50 on novel classes, an absolute 8.2 gain over the previous best performance. For LVIS, we surpass the state-of-the-art ViLD model by 5.0 mask AP for rare categories and 3.4 overall. Code: https://github.com/hanoonaR/object-centric-ovd.
summary: Existing open-vocabulary object detectors typically enlarge their vocabulary sizes by leveraging different forms of weak supervision. This helps generalize to novel objects at inference. Two popular forms of weak-supervision used in open-vocabulary detection (OVD) include pretrained CLIP model and image-level supervision. We note that both these modes of supervision are not optimally aligned for the detection task: CLIP is trained with image-text pairs and lacks precise localization of objects while the image-level supervision has been used with heuristics that do not accurately specify local object regions. In this work, we propose to address this problem by performing object-centric alignment of the language embeddings from the CLIP model. Furthermore, we visually ground the objects with only image-level supervision using a pseudo-labeling process that provides high-quality object proposals and helps expand the vocabulary during training. We establish a bridge between the above two object-alignment strategies via a novel weight transfer function that aggregates their complimentary strengths. In essence, the proposed model seeks to minimize the gap between object and image-centric representations in the OVD setting. On the COCO benchmark, our proposed approach achieves 36.6 AP50 on novel classes, an absolute 8.2 gain over the previous best performance. For LVIS, we surpass the state-of-the-art ViLD model by 5.0 mask AP for rare categories and 3.4 overall. Code: https://github.com/hanoonaR/object-centric-ovd.
abstract_zh: 现有的开放词汇目标检测器通常通过利用不同形式的弱监督来扩大其词汇量。这有助于在推理时推广到新的对象。开放词汇检测（OVD）中使用的两种流行的弱监督形式包括预训练的 CLIP 模型和图像级监督。我们注意到，这两种监督模式都没有针对检测任务进行最佳调整：CLIP 使用图像-文本对进行训练，缺乏对象的精确定位，而图像级监督则与不能准确指定局部对象区域的启发式方法一起使用。在这项工作中，我们建议通过对 CLIP 模型中的语言嵌入进行以对象为中心的对齐来解决这个问题。此外，我们使用伪标记过程仅通过图像级监督对对象进行视觉基础，该过程提供高质量的对象建议并有助于在训练期间扩展词汇量。我们通过一种新颖的权重传递函数在上述两种对象对齐策略之间建立了一座桥梁，该函数聚合了它们的互补优势。本质上，所提出的模型旨在最小化 OVD 设置中以对象和图像为中心的表示之间的差距。在 COCO 基准上，我们提出的方法在新类上达到了 36.6 AP50，比之前的最佳性能绝对提高了 8.2。对于 LVIS，我们在稀有类别中超越了最先进的 ViLD 模型 5.0 掩模 AP，总体上超过了 3.4。代码：https://github.com/hanoonaR/object-centric-ovd。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过弥合对象级与图像级表示之间的差距，提升开放词汇检测（OVD）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇检测方法中，CLIP模型和图像级监督的弱监督模式在检测任务中未被最优对齐，导致定位精度不足和词汇扩展受限。
AI.method: 提出对象中心对齐策略，结合CLIP语言嵌入与图像级伪标签生成，通过权重转移函数整合两者优势。
AI.result: 在COCO基准测试中，新类别达到36.6 AP50（较之前最佳提升8.2）；在LVIS上，罕见类别掩码AP超越ViLD模型5.0，整体提升3.4。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过桥接对象与图像表示差距，有效提升了开放词汇检测的准确性和泛化能力。

search_text: Bridging the Gap between Object and Image-level Representations for Open-Vocabulary Detection 弥合开放词汇检测的对象和图像级表示之间的差距 Existing open-vocabulary object detectors typically enlarge their vocabulary sizes by leveraging different forms of weak supervision. This helps generalize to novel objects at inference. Two popular forms of weak-supervision used in open-vocabulary detection (OVD) include pretrained CLIP model and image-level supervision. We note that both these modes of supervision are not optimally aligned for the detection task: CLIP is trained with image-text pairs and lacks precise localization of objects while the image-level supervision has been used with heuristics that do not accurately specify local object regions. In this work, we propose to address this problem by performing object-centric alignment of the language embeddings from the CLIP model. Furthermore, we visually ground the objects with only image-level supervision using a pseudo-labeling process that provides high-quality object proposals and helps expand the vocabulary during training. We establish a bridge between the above two object-alignment strategies via a novel weight transfer function that aggregates their complimentary strengths. In essence, the proposed model seeks to minimize the gap between object and image-centric representations in the OVD setting. On the COCO benchmark, our proposed approach achieves 36.6 AP50 on novel classes, an absolute 8.2 gain over the previous best performance. For LVIS, we surpass the state-of-the-art ViLD model by 5.0 mask AP for rare categories and 3.4 overall. authors_text: Niv Cohen,Jonathan Kahana,Yedid Hoshen
title: Red PANDA: Disambiguating Anomaly Detection by Removing Nuisance Factors
title_zh: Red PANDA：通过消除干扰因素消除异常检测的歧义
abstract: Anomaly detection methods strive to discover patterns that differ from the norm in a semantic way. This goal is ambiguous as a data point differing from the norm by an attribute e.g., age, race or gender, may be considered anomalous by some operators while others may consider this attribute irrelevant. Breaking from previous research, we present a new anomaly detection method that allows operators to exclude an attribute from being considered as relevant for anomaly detection. Our approach then learns representations which do not contain information over the nuisance attributes. Anomaly scoring is performed using a density-based approach. Importantly, our approach does not require specifying the attributes that are relevant for detecting anomalies, which is typically impossible in anomaly detection, but only attributes to ignore. An empirical investigation is presented verifying the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Anomaly detection methods strive to discover patterns that differ from the norm in a semantic way. This goal is ambiguous as a data point differing from the norm by an attribute e.g., age, race or gender, may be considered anomalous by some operators while others may consider this attribute irrelevant. Breaking from previous research, we present a new anomaly detection method that allows operators to exclude an attribute from being considered as relevant for anomaly detection. Our approach then learns representations which do not contain information over the nuisance attributes. Anomaly scoring is performed using a density-based approach. Importantly, our approach does not require specifying the attributes that are relevant for detecting anomalies, which is typically impossible in anomaly detection, but only attributes to ignore. An empirical investigation is presented verifying the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 异常检测方法致力于以语义方式发现与规范不同的模式。这个目标是不明确的，因为数据点与正常属性（例如年龄、种族或性别）不同，可能会被一些操作员认为是异常的，而其他操作员可能会认为该属性无关紧要。 Breaking from previous research, we present a new anomaly detection method that allows operators to exclude an attribute from being considered as relevant for anomaly detection.然后，我们的方法学习不包含干扰属性信息的表示。使用基于密度的方法进行异常评分。重要的是，我们的方法不需要指定与检测异常相关的属性（这在异常检测中通常是不可能的），而只需要指定要忽略的属性。进行了实证研究，验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型异常检测方法Red PANDA，通过排除干扰属性提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测难以处理不同操作员对属性重要性认知差异的问题，需允许排除特定干扰属性以提高检测准确性。
AI.method: 通过指定需忽略的属性学习不含干扰信息的表示，采用密度-based方法进行异常评分，无需明确指定相关属性。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在多个数据集上有效，能够准确排除干扰因素并提升异常检测性能。
AI.conclusion: Red PANDA通过属性排除机制有效解决了异常检测中的干扰因素问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Scott Emmons,Caspar Oesterheld,Andrew Critch,Vincent Conitzer,Stuart Russell
title: For Learning in Symmetric Teams, Local Optima are Global Nash Equilibria
title_zh: 对于对称团队中的学习，局部最优是全局纳什均衡
abstract: Although it has been known since the 1970s that a globally optimal strategy profile in a common-payoff game is a Nash equilibrium, global optimality is a strict requirement that limits the result's applicability. In this work, we show that any locally optimal symmetric strategy profile is also a (global) Nash equilibrium. Furthermore, we show that this result is robust to perturbations to the common payoff and to the local optimum. Applied to machine learning, our result provides a global guarantee for any gradient method that finds a local optimum in symmetric strategy space. While this result indicates stability to unilateral deviation, we nevertheless identify broad classes of games where mixed local optima are unstable under joint, asymmetric deviations. We analyze the prevalence of instability by running learning algorithms in a suite of symmetric games, and we conclude by discussing the applicability of our results to multi-agent RL, cooperative inverse RL, and decentralized POMDPs.
summary: Although it has been known since the 1970s that a globally optimal strategy profile in a common-payoff game is a Nash equilibrium, global optimality is a strict requirement that limits the result's applicability. In this work, we show that any locally optimal symmetric strategy profile is also a (global) Nash equilibrium. Furthermore, we show that this result is robust to perturbations to the common payoff and to the local optimum. Applied to machine learning, our result provides a global guarantee for any gradient method that finds a local optimum in symmetric strategy space. While this result indicates stability to unilateral deviation, we nevertheless identify broad classes of games where mixed local optima are unstable under joint, asymmetric deviations. We analyze the prevalence of instability by running learning algorithms in a suite of symmetric games, and we conclude by discussing the applicability of our results to multi-agent RL, cooperative inverse RL, and decentralized POMDPs.
abstract_zh: 尽管从 20 世纪 70 年代起人们就知道共同收益博弈中的全局最优策略是纳什均衡，但全局最优性是一个严格的要求，限制了结果的适用性。在这项工作中，我们证明任何局部最优对称策略配置文件也是（全局）纳什均衡。此外，我们表明这个结果对于共同收益和局部最优的扰动是稳健的。应用于机器学习，我们的结果为任何在对称策略空间中找到局部最优的梯度方法提供了全局保证。虽然这个结果表明单边偏差的稳定性，但我们仍然确定了广泛的博弈类别，其中混合局部最优在联合、不对称偏差下不稳定。我们通过在一组对称游戏中运行学习算法来分析不稳定的普遍性，最后讨论我们的结果对多智能体强化学习、合作逆强化学习和去中心化 POMDP 的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文证明在对称团队学习中，局部最优策略等同于全局纳什均衡，并探讨其在机器学习中的应用与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统理论要求全局最优才能保证纳什均衡，但实际应用中局部最优更易实现，需放宽条件以提升适用性。
AI.method: 通过博弈论分析与机器学习实验，验证局部最优策略的纳什均衡性质及其对扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 局部最优策略在对称博弈中为全局纳什均衡，且具有鲁棒性；但部分博弈中存在联合偏差导致的不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 结果为多智能体强化学习等场景提供理论支持，但需警惕联合非对称偏差引发的稳定性问题。

In this work, we show that any locally optimal symmetric strategy profile is also a (global) Nash equilibrium. Furthermore, we show that this result is robust to perturbations to the common payoff and to the local optimum. Applied to machine learning, our result provides a global guarantee for any gradient method that finds a local optimum in symmetric strategy space. While this result indicates stability to unilateral deviation, we nevertheless identify broad classes of games where mixed local optima are unstable under joint, asymmetric deviations. We analyze the prevalence of instability by running learning algorithms in a suite of symmetric games, and we conclude by discussing the applicability of our results to multi-agent RL, cooperative inverse RL, and decentralized POMDPs. 尽管从 20 世纪 70 年代起人们就知道共同收益博弈中的全局最优策略是纳什均衡，但全局最优性是一个严格的要求，限制了结果的适用性。在这项工作中，我们证明任何局部最优对称策略配置文件也是（全局）纳什均衡。此外，我们表明这个结果对于共同收益和局部最优的扰动是稳健的。应用于机器学习，我们的结果为任何在对称策略空间中找到局部最优的梯度方法提供了全局保证。虽然这个结果表明单边偏差的稳定性，但我们仍然确定了广泛的博弈类别，其中混合局部最优在联合、不对称偏差下不稳定。我们通过在一组对称游戏中运行学习算法来分析不稳定的普遍性，最后讨论我们的结果对多智能体强化学习、合作逆强化学习和去中心化 POMDP 的适用性。 本文证明在对称团队学习中，局部最优策略等同于全局纳什均衡，并探讨其在机器学习中的应用与稳定性。 Scott Emmons,Caspar Oesterheld,Andrew Critch,Vincent Conitzer,Stuart Russell cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Zihan Li,Dihan Li,Cangbai Xu,Weice Wang,Qingqi Hong,Qingde Li,Jie Tian
title: TFCNs: A CNN-Transformer Hybrid Network for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: TFCN：用于医学图像分割的 CNN-Transformer 混合网络
abstract: Medical image segmentation is one of the most fundamental tasks concerning medical information analysis. Various solutions have been proposed so far, including many deep learning-based techniques, such as U-Net, FC-DenseNet, etc. However, high-precision medical image segmentation remains a highly challenging task due to the existence of inherent magnification and distortion in medical images as well as the presence of lesions with similar density to normal tissues. In this paper, we propose TFCNs (Transformers for Fully Convolutional denseNets) to tackle the problem by introducing ResLinear-Transformer (RL-Transformer) and Convolutional Linear Attention Block (CLAB) to FC-DenseNet. TFCNs is not only able to utilize more latent information from the CT images for feature extraction, but also can capture and disseminate semantic features and filter non-semantic features more effectively through the CLAB module. Our experimental results show that TFCNs can achieve state-of-the-art performance with dice scores of 83.72\% on the Synapse dataset. In addition, we evaluate the robustness of TFCNs for lesion area effects on the COVID-19 public datasets. The Python code will be made publicly available on https://github.com/HUANGLIZI/TFCNs.
summary: Medical image segmentation is one of the most fundamental tasks concerning medical information analysis. Various solutions have been proposed so far, including many deep learning-based techniques, such as U-Net, FC-DenseNet, etc. However, high-precision medical image segmentation remains a highly challenging task due to the existence of inherent magnification and distortion in medical images as well as the presence of lesions with similar density to normal tissues. In this paper, we propose TFCNs (Transformers for Fully Convolutional denseNets) to tackle the problem by introducing ResLinear-Transformer (RL-Transformer) and Convolutional Linear Attention Block (CLAB) to FC-DenseNet. TFCNs is not only able to utilize more latent information from the CT images for feature extraction, but also can capture and disseminate semantic features and filter non-semantic features more effectively through the CLAB module. Our experimental results show that TFCNs can achieve state-of-the-art performance with dice scores of 83.72\% on the Synapse dataset. In addition, we evaluate the robustness of TFCNs for lesion area effects on the COVID-19 public datasets. The Python code will be made publicly available on https://github.com/HUANGLIZI/TFCNs.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分割是医学信息分析最基本的任务之一。目前已经提出了各种解决方案，包括许多基于深度学习的技术，例如U-Net、FC-DenseNet等。然而，由于医学图像固有的放大和失真以及存在与正常组织密度相似的病灶，高精度医学图像分割仍然是一项极具挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了 TFCN（全卷积密集网络的变压器），通过将 ResLinear-Transformer（RL-Transformer）和卷积线性注意力块（CLAB）引入 FC-DenseNet 来解决该问题。 TFCNs不仅能够利用CT图像中更多的潜在信息进行特征提取，还可以通过CLAB模块更有效地捕获和传播语义特征并过滤非语义特征。我们的实验结果表明，TFCN 可以在 Synapse 数据集上以 83.72% 的 dice 分数实现最先进的性能。此外，我们还评估了 TFCN 对 COVID-19 公共数据集的病变区域影响的稳健性。 Python 代码将在 https://github.com/HUANGLIZI/TFCNs 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer的混合模型TFCNs，用于解决医学图像分割中的高精度挑战。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割因图像本身的放大、失真以及病变区域与正常组织密度相似而面临挑战，现有方法如U-Net和FC-DenseNet难以有效提取特征并区分语义信息。
AI.method: 通过将ResLinear-Transformer（RL-Transformer）和卷积线性注意力块（CLAB）引入FC-DenseNet，TFCNs能够更充分地利用CT图像的潜在信息，并通过CLAB模块高效捕捉和传播语义特征。
AI.result: 在Synapse数据集上，TFCNs的Dice分数达到83.72%，并在COVID-19公共数据集上验证了其对病变区域的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TFCNs在医学图像分割任务中表现出最先进的性能，证明了CNN-Transformer混合架构在处理复杂医学图像中的有效性。

authors_text: Rajeev Yasarla,Vishal M. Patel
title: Learning to restore images degraded by atmospheric turbulence using uncertainty
title_zh: 学习利用不确定性来恢复因大气湍流而退化的图像
comment: Recognized as Best Paper at IEEE International Conference on Image Processing, 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.08404
comments: Recognized as Best Paper at IEEE International Conference on Image Processing, 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.08404
abstract: Atmospheric turbulence can significantly degrade the quality of images acquired by long-range imaging systems by causing spatially and temporally random fluctuations in the index of refraction of the atmosphere. Variations in the refractive index causes the captured images to be geometrically distorted and blurry. Hence, it is important to compensate for the visual degradation in images caused by atmospheric turbulence. In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based approach for restring a single image degraded by atmospheric turbulence. We make use of the epistemic uncertainty based on Monte Carlo dropouts to capture regions in the image where the network is having hard time restoring. The estimated uncertainty maps are then used to guide the network to obtain the restored image. Extensive experiments are conducted on synthetic and real images to show the significance of the proposed work. Code is available at : https://github.com/rajeevyasarla/AT-Net
summary: Atmospheric turbulence can significantly degrade the quality of images acquired by long-range imaging systems by causing spatially and temporally random fluctuations in the index of refraction of the atmosphere. Variations in the refractive index causes the captured images to be geometrically distorted and blurry. Hence, it is important to compensate for the visual degradation in images caused by atmospheric turbulence. In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based approach for restring a single image degraded by atmospheric turbulence. We make use of the epistemic uncertainty based on Monte Carlo dropouts to capture regions in the image where the network is having hard time restoring. The estimated uncertainty maps are then used to guide the network to obtain the restored image. Extensive experiments are conducted on synthetic and real images to show the significance of the proposed work. Code is available at : https://github.com/rajeevyasarla/AT-Net
abstract_zh: 大气湍流会引起大气折射率的空间和时间随机波动，从而显着降低远程成像系统获取的图像质量。折射率的变化会导致捕获的图像发生几何扭曲和模糊。因此，补偿大气湍流引起的图像视觉退化非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法来限制因大气湍流而退化的单个图像。我们利用基于蒙特卡洛丢失的认知不确定性来捕获图像中网络难以恢复的区域。然后使用估计的不确定性图来指导网络获得恢复的图像。对合成图像和真实图像进行了广泛的实验，以显示所提出的工作的重要性。代码位于：https://github.com/rajeevyasarla/AT-Net

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的图像修复方法，利用不确定性估计来恢复受大气湍流降质的图像。
AI.motivation: 大气湍流会导致远程成像系统获取的图像出现几何失真和模糊，现有方法难以有效补偿此类退化。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛dropout估计网络的先验不确定性，通过不确定性图引导网络聚焦于难以修复的区域，实现图像恢复。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图像实验中，该方法显著提升了修复效果，代码已开源验证。
AI.conclusion: 基于不确定性的深度学习框架能有效应对大气湍流引起的图像退化问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Laura Londoño,Juana Valeria Hurtado,Nora Hertz,Philipp Kellmeyer,Silja Voeneky,Abhinav Valada
title: Fairness and Bias in Robot Learning
title_zh: 机器人学习中的公平与偏见
abstract: Machine learning has significantly enhanced the abilities of robots, enabling them to perform a wide range of tasks in human environments and adapt to our uncertain real world. Recent works in various machine learning domains have highlighted the importance of accounting for fairness to ensure that these algorithms do not reproduce human biases and consequently lead to discriminatory outcomes. With robot learning systems increasingly performing more and more tasks in our everyday lives, it is crucial to understand the influence of such biases to prevent unintended behavior toward certain groups of people. In this work, we present the first survey on fairness in robot learning from an interdisciplinary perspective spanning technical, ethical, and legal challenges. We propose a taxonomy for sources of bias and the resulting types of discrimination due to them. Using examples from different robot learning domains, we examine scenarios of unfair outcomes and strategies to mitigate them. We present early advances in the field by covering different fairness definitions, ethical and legal considerations, and methods for fair robot learning. With this work, we aim to pave the road for groundbreaking developments in fair robot learning.
summary: Machine learning has significantly enhanced the abilities of robots, enabling them to perform a wide range of tasks in human environments and adapt to our uncertain real world. Recent works in various machine learning domains have highlighted the importance of accounting for fairness to ensure that these algorithms do not reproduce human biases and consequently lead to discriminatory outcomes. With robot learning systems increasingly performing more and more tasks in our everyday lives, it is crucial to understand the influence of such biases to prevent unintended behavior toward certain groups of people. In this work, we present the first survey on fairness in robot learning from an interdisciplinary perspective spanning technical, ethical, and legal challenges. We propose a taxonomy for sources of bias and the resulting types of discrimination due to them. Using examples from different robot learning domains, we examine scenarios of unfair outcomes and strategies to mitigate them. We present early advances in the field by covering different fairness definitions, ethical and legal considerations, and methods for fair robot learning. With this work, we aim to pave the road for groundbreaking developments in fair robot learning.
abstract_zh: 机器学习显着增强了机器人的能力，使它们能够在人类环境中执行各种任务并适应我们不确定的现实世界。各个机器学习领域的最新工作强调了考虑公平性的重要性，以确保这些算法不会重现人类偏见，从而导致歧视性结果。随着机器人学习系统在我们的日常生活中执行越来越多的任务，了解这种偏见的影响对于防止针对某些人群的意外行为至关重要。在这项工作中，我们从跨越技术、伦理和法律挑战的跨学科角度提出了关于机器人学习公平性的首次调查。我们提出了对偏见来源和由此产生的歧视类型的分类。使用来自不同机器人学习领域的示例，我们研究了不公平结果的场景以及缓解它们的策略。我们通过涵盖不同的公平定义、伦理和法律考虑以及公平机器人学习的方法来展示该领域的早期进展。通过这项工作，我们的目标是为公平机器人学习的突破性发展铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文从技术、伦理和法律角度综述了机器人学习中的公平性与偏见问题，提出偏见来源分类及应对策略。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人学习系统在日常生活中应用增多，需避免算法继承人类偏见导致歧视性结果，确保技术公平性。
AI.method: 通过跨领域分析，提出偏见来源分类法，结合不同机器人学习场景案例，探讨不公平结果及缓解策略。
AI.result: 系统梳理了公平性定义、伦理法律考量及现有公平机器人学习方法，为后续研究奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 本文为实现公平机器人学习提供了框架，推动该领域突破性发展。
