search_text: Fairness and Bias in Robot Learning 机器人学习中的公平与偏见 Machine learning has significantly enhanced the abilities of robots, enabling them to perform a wide range of tasks in human environments and adapt to our uncertain real world. Recent works in various machine learning domains have highlighted the importance of accounting for fairness to ensure that these algorithms do not reproduce human biases and consequently lead to discriminatory outcomes. With robot learning systems increasingly performing more and more tasks in our everyday lives, it is crucial to understand the influence of such biases to prevent unintended behavior toward certain groups of people. In this work, we present the first survey on fairness in robot learning from an interdisciplinary perspective spanning technical, ethical, and legal challenges. We propose a taxonomy for sources of bias and the resulting types of discrimination due to them. Using examples from different robot learning domains, we examine scenarios of unfair outcomes and strategies to mitigate them. We present early advances in the field by covering different fairness definitions, ethical and legal considerations, and methods for fair robot learning. With this work, we aim to pave the road for groundbreaking developments in fair robot learning. 机器学习显着增强了机器人的能力，使它们能够在人类环境中执行各种任务并适应我们不确定的现实世界。各个机器学习领域的最新工作强调了考虑公平性的重要性，以确保这些算法不会重现人类偏见，从而导致歧视性结果。随着机器人学习系统在我们的日常生活中执行越来越多的任务，了解这种偏见的影响对于防止针对某些人群的意外行为至关重要。在这项工作中，我们从跨越技术、伦理和法律挑战的跨学科角度提出了关于机器人学习公平性的首次调查。我们提出了对偏见来源和由此产生的歧视类型的分类。使用来自不同机器人学习领域的示例，我们研究了不公平结果的场景以及缓解它们的策略。我们通过涵盖不同的公平定义、伦理和法律考虑以及公平机器人学习的方法来展示该领域的早期进展。通过这项工作，我们的目标是为公平机器人学习的突破性发展铺平道路。 本文从技术、伦理和法律角度综述了机器人学习中的公平性与偏见问题，提出偏见来源分类及应对策略。 Laura Londoño,Juana Valeria Hurtado,Nora Hertz,Philipp Kellmeyer,Silja Voeneky,Abhinav Valada cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Jin Gao,Jialing Zhang,Xihui Liu,Trevor Darrell,Evan Shelhamer,Dequan Wang
title: Back to the Source: Diffusion-Driven Test-Time Adaptation
title_zh: 回到源头：扩散驱动的测试时间适应
abstract: Test-time adaptation harnesses test inputs to improve the accuracy of a model trained on source data when tested on shifted target data. Existing methods update the source model by (re-)training on each target domain. While effective, re-training is sensitive to the amount and order of the data and the hyperparameters for optimization. We instead update the target data, by projecting all test inputs toward the source domain with a generative diffusion model. Our diffusion-driven adaptation method, DDA, shares its models for classification and generation across all domains. Both models are trained on the source domain, then fixed during testing. We augment diffusion with image guidance and self-ensembling to automatically decide how much to adapt. Input adaptation by DDA is more robust than prior model adaptation approaches across a variety of corruptions, architectures, and data regimes on the ImageNet-C benchmark. With its input-wise updates, DDA succeeds where model adaptation degrades on too little data in small batches, dependent data in non-uniform order, or mixed data with multiple corruptions.
summary: Test-time adaptation harnesses test inputs to improve the accuracy of a model trained on source data when tested on shifted target data. Existing methods update the source model by (re-)training on each target domain. While effective, re-training is sensitive to the amount and order of the data and the hyperparameters for optimization. We instead update the target data, by projecting all test inputs toward the source domain with a generative diffusion model. Our diffusion-driven adaptation method, DDA, shares its models for classification and generation across all domains. Both models are trained on the source domain, then fixed during testing. We augment diffusion with image guidance and self-ensembling to automatically decide how much to adapt. Input adaptation by DDA is more robust than prior model adaptation approaches across a variety of corruptions, architectures, and data regimes on the ImageNet-C benchmark. With its input-wise updates, DDA succeeds where model adaptation degrades on too little data in small batches, dependent data in non-uniform order, or mixed data with multiple corruptions.
abstract_zh: 测试时适应利用测试输入来提高在移动目标数据上进行测试时在源数据上训练的模型的准确性。现有方法通过在每个目标域上（重新）训练来更新源模型。虽然有效，但重新训练对数据的数量和顺序以及优化的超参数很敏感。相反，我们通过使用生成扩散模型将所有测试输入投影到源域来更新目标数据。我们的扩散驱动适应方法 DDA 共享其跨所有领域的分类和生成模型。这两个模型都在源域上进行训练，然后在测试期间进行修复。我们通过图像引导和自组装来增强扩散，以自动决定适应的程度。 DDA 的输入自适应比之前的模型自适应方法在 ImageNet-C 基准上的各种损坏、架构和数据机制上更加稳健。凭借其输入方面的更新，DDA 在模型适应因小批量数据太少、顺序不一致的相关数据或具有多个损坏的混合数据而降低的情况下取得了成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的测试时适应方法DDA，通过将目标域测试输入投影到源域来提升模型在目标数据上的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法依赖模型重新训练，但对数据量、顺序和超参数敏感，且在小批量数据或复杂数据场景下表现不稳定。
AI.method: DDA使用预训练的生成扩散模型将测试输入向源域投影，通过图像引导和自集成机制自动调整适应程度，分类与生成模型在源域训练后测试时保持固定。
AI.result: DDA在ImageNet-C基准上优于现有方法，尤其在小批量数据、非均匀数据顺序及多类型数据损坏场景下展现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DDA通过输入级适应而非模型再训练，有效解决了传统方法在数据受限或复杂场景下的性能退化问题。

authors_text: Francesco Tassi,Francesco Iodice,Elena De Momi,Arash Ajoudani
title: Sociable and Ergonomic Human-Robot Collaboration through Action Recognition and Augmented Hierarchical Quadratic Programming
title_zh: 通过动作识别和增强的分层二次规划实现社交且符合人体工程学的人机协作
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: The recognition of actions performed by humans and the anticipation of their intentions are important enablers to yield sociable and successful collaboration in human-robot teams. Meanwhile, robots should have the capacity to deal with multiple objectives and constraints, arising from the collaborative task or the human. In this regard, we propose vision techniques to perform human action recognition and image classification, which are integrated into an Augmented Hierarchical Quadratic Programming (AHQP) scheme to hierarchically optimize the robot's reactive behavior and human ergonomics. The proposed framework allows one to intuitively command the robot in space while a task is being executed. The experiments confirm increased human ergonomics and usability, which are fundamental parameters for reducing musculoskeletal diseases and increasing trust in automation.
summary: The recognition of actions performed by humans and the anticipation of their intentions are important enablers to yield sociable and successful collaboration in human-robot teams. Meanwhile, robots should have the capacity to deal with multiple objectives and constraints, arising from the collaborative task or the human. In this regard, we propose vision techniques to perform human action recognition and image classification, which are integrated into an Augmented Hierarchical Quadratic Programming (AHQP) scheme to hierarchically optimize the robot's reactive behavior and human ergonomics. The proposed framework allows one to intuitively command the robot in space while a task is being executed. The experiments confirm increased human ergonomics and usability, which are fundamental parameters for reducing musculoskeletal diseases and increasing trust in automation.
abstract_zh: 对人类行为的识别和对其意图的预期是在人机团队中实现社交和成功协作的重要推动因素。同时，机器人应该有能力处理由协作任务或人类产生的多个目标和约束。在这方面，我们提出视觉技术来执行人类动作识别和图像分类，并将其集成到增强层次二次规划（AHQP）方案中，以分层优化机器人的反应行为和人体工程学。所提出的框架允许人们在执行任务时直观地命令太空中的机器人。这些实验证实了人体工程学和可用性的提高，这是减少肌肉骨骼疾病和增加对自动化信任的基本参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合动作识别与增强分层二次规划（AHQP）框架，以提升人机协作的社交性与人体工程学表现。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人难以同时满足多目标协作需求与人体工程学约束，需更智能的框架以提升协作效率与安全性。
AI.method: 融合视觉动作识别与图像分类技术，通过AHQP分层优化机器人反应行为及人体工程学参数。
AI.result: 实验验证该框架显著提升人体工程学指标与系统可用性，有效降低肌肉骨骼疾病风险并增强用户信任。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架为社交化、人体工程学导向的人机协作提供了有效解决方案，具有重要应用价值。

Meanwhile, robots should have the capacity to deal with multiple objectives and constraints, arising from the collaborative task or the human. In this regard, we propose vision techniques to perform human action recognition and image classification, which are integrated into an Augmented Hierarchical Quadratic Programming (AHQP) scheme to hierarchically optimize the robot's reactive behavior and human ergonomics. The proposed framework allows one to intuitively command the robot in space while a task is being executed. The experiments confirm increased human ergonomics and usability, which are fundamental parameters for reducing musculoskeletal diseases and increasing trust in automation. 对人类行为的识别和对其意图的预期是在人机团队中实现社交和成功协作的重要推动因素。同时，机器人应该有能力处理由协作任务或人类产生的多个目标和约束。在这方面，我们提出视觉技术来执行人类动作识别和图像分类，并将其集成到增强层次二次规划（AHQP）方案中，以分层优化机器人的反应行为和人体工程学。所提出的框架允许人们在执行任务时直观地命令太空中的机器人。这些实验证实了人体工程学和可用性的提高，这是减少肌肉骨骼疾病和增加对自动化信任的基本参数。 本文提出结合动作识别与增强分层二次规划（AHQP）框架，以提升人机协作的社交性与人体工程学表现。 Francesco Tassi,Francesco Iodice,Elena De Momi,Arash Ajoudani cs.RO

authors_text: Chun-Han Yao,Wei-Chih Hung,Yuanzhen Li,Michael Rubinstein,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Varun Jampani
title: LASSIE: Learning Articulated Shapes from Sparse Image Ensemble via 3D Part Discovery
title_zh: LASSIE：通过 3D 零件发现从稀疏图像集合中学习铰接形状
abstract: Creating high-quality articulated 3D models of animals is challenging either via manual creation or using 3D scanning tools. Therefore, techniques to reconstruct articulated 3D objects from 2D images are crucial and highly useful. In this work, we propose a practical problem setting to estimate 3D pose and shape of animals given only a few (10-30) in-the-wild images of a particular animal species (say, horse). Contrary to existing works that rely on pre-defined template shapes, we do not assume any form of 2D or 3D ground-truth annotations, nor do we leverage any multi-view or temporal information. Moreover, each input image ensemble can contain animal instances with varying poses, backgrounds, illuminations, and textures. Our key insight is that 3D parts have much simpler shape compared to the overall animal and that they are robust w.r.t. animal pose articulations. Following these insights, we propose LASSIE, a novel optimization framework which discovers 3D parts in a self-supervised manner with minimal user intervention. A key driving force behind LASSIE is the enforcing of 2D-3D part consistency using self-supervisory deep features. Experiments on Pascal-Part and self-collected in-the-wild animal datasets demonstrate considerably better 3D reconstructions as well as both 2D and 3D part discovery compared to prior arts. Project page: chhankyao.github.io/lassie/

Therefore, techniques to reconstruct articulated 3D objects from 2D images are crucial and highly useful. Following these insights, we propose LASSIE, a novel optimization framework which discovers 3D parts in a self-supervised manner with minimal user intervention. A key driving force behind LASSIE is the enforcing of 2D-3D part consistency using self-supervisory deep features. Experiments on Pascal-Part and self-collected in-the-wild animal datasets demonstrate considerably better 3D reconstructions as well as both 2D and 3D part discovery compared to prior arts. abstract_zh: 无论是通过手动创建还是使用 3D 扫描工具创建高质量的铰接式 3D 动物模型都具有挑战性。因此，从 2D 图像重建铰接式 3D 物体的技术至关重要且非常有用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个实际问题设置来估计动物的 3D 姿势和形状，仅给出特定动物物种（例如马）的少量（10-30）张野外图像。与依赖预定义模板形状的现有工作相反，我们不假设任何形式的 2D 或 3D 真实注释，也不利用任何多视图或时间信息。此外，每个输入图像集合可以包含具有不同姿势、背景、照明和纹理的动物实例。我们的主要见解是，与整体动物相比，3D 部件的形状要简单得多，而且它们非常坚固。动物姿势关节。根据这些见解，我们提出了 LASSIE，这是一种新颖的优化框架，它以自我监督的方式发现 3D 零件，而无需用户干预。 LASSIE 背后的一个关键驱动力是使用自我监督的深度特征来增强 2D-3D 零件的一致性。与现有技术相比，在 Pascal-Part 和自行收集的野生动物数据集上进行的实验表明，3D 重建以及 2D 和 3D 零件发现要好得多。项目页面：chhankyao.github.io/lassie/

AI.tldr: 本文提出LASSIE方法，通过稀疏图像集合中的3D部件发现，实现对动物等可变形物体的3D姿态和形状估计。
AI.motivation: 传统手动创建或3D扫描方式难以生成高质量动物模型，现有方法依赖预定义模板或需要2D/3D标注，而实际场景中图像常包含复杂背景、多姿态且标注稀缺。
AI.method: LASSIE通过自监督学习框架，在无需标注和多视角信息的前提下，利用2D-3D部件一致性约束，从少量野生图像中自发现3D部件并重建整体形状。
AI.result: 在Pascal-Part和自建数据集上，LASSIE在3D重建及2D/3D部件发现任务中均优于现有方法，尤其在稀疏图像输入下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: LASSIE证明了通过自监督部件发现可有效重建复杂可变形物体的3D模型，为无标注场景下的姿态-形状联合估计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Changrui Chen,Kurt Debattista,Jungong Han
title: Semi-supervised Object Detection via Virtual Category Learning
title_zh: 通过虚拟类别学习进行半监督目标检测
abstract: Due to the costliness of labelled data in real-world applications, semi-supervised object detectors, underpinned by pseudo labelling, are appealing. However, handling confusing samples is nontrivial: discarding valuable confusing samples would compromise the model generalisation while using them for training would exacerbate the confirmation bias issue caused by inevitable mislabelling. To solve this problem, this paper proposes to use confusing samples proactively without label correction. Specifically, a virtual category (VC) is assigned to each confusing sample such that they can safely contribute to the model optimisation even without a concrete label. It is attributed to specifying the embedding distance between the training sample and the virtual category as the lower bound of the inter-class distance. Moreover, we also modify the localisation loss to allow high-quality boundaries for location regression. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed VC learning significantly surpasses the state-of-the-art, especially with small amounts of available labels.
summary: Due to the costliness of labelled data in real-world applications, semi-supervised object detectors, underpinned by pseudo labelling, are appealing. However, handling confusing samples is nontrivial: discarding valuable confusing samples would compromise the model generalisation while using them for training would exacerbate the confirmation bias issue caused by inevitable mislabelling. To solve this problem, this paper proposes to use confusing samples proactively without label correction. Specifically, a virtual category (VC) is assigned to each confusing sample such that they can safely contribute to the model optimisation even without a concrete label. It is attributed to specifying the embedding distance between the training sample and the virtual category as the lower bound of the inter-class distance. Moreover, we also modify the localisation loss to allow high-quality boundaries for location regression. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed VC learning significantly surpasses the state-of-the-art, especially with small amounts of available labels.
abstract_zh: 由于现实应用中标记数据的成本高昂，以伪标记为基础的半监督物体检测器很有吸引力。然而，处理混淆样本并非易事：丢弃有价值的混淆样本会损害模型的泛化能力，而使用它们进行训练会加剧不可避免的错误标签引起的确认偏差问题。为了解决这个问题，本文提出主动使用混淆样本而不进行标签校正。具体来说，虚拟类别（VC）被分配给每个令人困惑的样本，这样即使没有具体标签，它们也可以安全地为模型优化做出贡献。其归因于将训练样本与虚拟类别之间的嵌入距离指定为类间距离的下界。此外，我们还修改了定位损失，以允许高质量的边界进行位置回归。大量的实验表明，所提出的 VC 学习显着超越了最先进的技术，尤其是在可用标签数量较少的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督目标检测方法，通过虚拟类别学习处理混淆样本以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 真实场景中标签数据成本高昂，现有半监督方法在处理混淆样本时面临两难：丢弃会损害泛化能力，使用则加剧误标签导致的确认偏误。
AI.method: 为每个混淆样本分配虚拟类别（VC），通过约束其与VC的嵌入距离下限来安全优化模型，同时改进定位损失函数以提升边界回归质量。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在标签量较少时显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了虚拟类别学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟类别学习机制有效解决了混淆样本利用难题，为半监督目标检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiangxi Meng,Yuning Gu,Yongsheng Pan,Nizhuan Wang,Peng Xue,Mengkang Lu,Xuming He,Yiqiang Zhan,Dinggang Shen
title: A Novel Unified Conditional Score-based Generative Framework for Multi-modal Medical Image Completion
title_zh: 一种新颖的基于统一条件评分的多模态医学图像补全生成框架
abstract: Multi-modal medical image completion has been extensively applied to alleviate the missing modality issue in a wealth of multi-modal diagnostic tasks. However, for most existing synthesis methods, their inferences of missing modalities can collapse into a deterministic mapping from the available ones, ignoring the uncertainties inherent in the cross-modal relationships. Here, we propose the Unified Multi-Modal Conditional Score-based Generative Model (UMM-CSGM) to take advantage of Score-based Generative Model (SGM) in modeling and stochastically sampling a target probability distribution, and further extend SGM to cross-modal conditional synthesis for various missing-modality configurations in a unified framework. Specifically, UMM-CSGM employs a novel multi-in multi-out Conditional Score Network (mm-CSN) to learn a comprehensive set of cross-modal conditional distributions via conditional diffusion and reverse generation in the complete modality space. In this way, the generation process can be accurately conditioned by all available information, and can fit all possible configurations of missing modalities in a single network. Experiments on BraTS19 dataset show that the UMM-CSGM can more reliably synthesize the heterogeneous enhancement and irregular area in tumor-induced lesions for any missing modalities.
summary: Multi-modal medical image completion has been extensively applied to alleviate the missing modality issue in a wealth of multi-modal diagnostic tasks. However, for most existing synthesis methods, their inferences of missing modalities can collapse into a deterministic mapping from the available ones, ignoring the uncertainties inherent in the cross-modal relationships. Here, we propose the Unified Multi-Modal Conditional Score-based Generative Model (UMM-CSGM) to take advantage of Score-based Generative Model (SGM) in modeling and stochastically sampling a target probability distribution, and further extend SGM to cross-modal conditional synthesis for various missing-modality configurations in a unified framework. Specifically, UMM-CSGM employs a novel multi-in multi-out Conditional Score Network (mm-CSN) to learn a comprehensive set of cross-modal conditional distributions via conditional diffusion and reverse generation in the complete modality space. In this way, the generation process can be accurately conditioned by all available information, and can fit all possible configurations of missing modalities in a single network. Experiments on BraTS19 dataset show that the UMM-CSGM can more reliably synthesize the heterogeneous enhancement and irregular area in tumor-induced lesions for any missing modalities.
abstract_zh: 多模态医学图像补全已被广泛应用于缓解大量多模态诊断任务中的模态缺失问题。然而，对于大多数现有的综合方法来说，它们对缺失模态的推断可能会崩溃为可用模态的确定性映射，而忽略了跨模态关系中固有的不确定性。在这里，我们提出了统一多模态基于评分的生成模型（UMM-CSGM），以利用基于评分的生成模型（SGM）对目标概率分布进行建模和随机采样，并将SGM进一步扩展到统一框架中各种缺失模态配置的跨模态条件合成。具体来说，UMM-CSGM 采用新颖的多输入多输出条件评分网络（mm-CSN），通过完整模态空间中的条件扩散和反向生成来学习一组全面的跨模态条件分布。通过这种方式，生成过程可以由所有可用信息精确调节，并且可以适应单个网络中缺失模态的所有可能配置。 BraTS19 数据集上的实验表明，对于任何缺失的模态，UMM-CSGM 可以更可靠地合成肿瘤诱发病变中的异质增强和不规则区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的基于分数的生成模型框架，用于多模态医学图像补全，解决缺失模态问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在推断缺失模态时易陷入确定性映射，忽略跨模态关系中的不确定性，需通过概率建模提升生成可靠性。
AI.method: 设计统一多模态条件分数生成模型（UMM-CSGM），采用多输入多输出条件分数网络（mm-CSN），通过条件扩散与逆向生成学习跨模态分布。
AI.result: 在BraTS19数据集实验中，UMM-CSGM能更可靠地合成肿瘤病变的异质增强和不规则区域，适应任意缺失模态配置。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过概率建模有效捕捉跨模态不确定性，为多模态医学图像补全提供统一且灵活的解决方案。

search_text: A Novel Unified Conditional Score-based Generative Framework for Multi-modal Medical Image Completion 一种新颖的基于统一条件评分的多模态医学图像补全生成框架 Multi-modal medical image completion has been extensively applied to alleviate the missing modality issue in a wealth of multi-modal diagnostic tasks. However, for most existing synthesis methods, their inferences of missing modalities can collapse into a deterministic mapping from the available ones, ignoring the uncertainties inherent in the cross-modal relationships. Here, we propose the Unified Multi-Modal Conditional Score-based Generative Model (UMM-CSGM) to take advantage of Score-based Generative Model (SGM) in modeling and stochastically sampling a target probability distribution, and further extend SGM to cross-modal conditional synthesis for various missing-modality configurations in a unified framework. Specifically, UMM-CSGM employs a novel multi-in multi-out Conditional Score Network (mm-CSN) to learn a comprehensive set of cross-modal conditional distributions via conditional diffusion and reverse generation in the complete modality space. In this way, the generation process can be accurately conditioned by all available information, and can fit all possible configurations of missing modalities in a single network. Experiments on BraTS19 dataset show that the UMM-CSGM can more reliably synthesize the heterogeneous enhancement and irregular area in tumor-induced lesions for any missing modalities. 多模态医学图像补全已被广泛应用于缓解大量多模态诊断任务中的模态缺失问题。然而，对于大多数现有的综合方法来说，它们对缺失模态的推断可能会崩溃为可用模态的确定性映射，而忽略了跨模态关系中固有的不确定性。在这里，我们提出了统一多模态基于评分的生成模型（UMM-CSGM），以利用基于评分的生成模型（SGM）对目标概率分布进行建模和随机采样，并将SGM进一步扩展到统一框架中各种缺失模态配置的跨模态条件合成。具体来说，UMM-CSGM 采用新颖的多输入多输出条件评分网络（mm-CSN），通过完整模态空间中的条件扩散和反向生成来学习一组全面的跨模态条件分布。通过这种方式，生成过程可以由所有可用信息精确调节，并且可以适应单个网络中缺失模态的所有可能配置。 BraTS19 数据集上的实验表明，对于任何缺失的模态，UMM-CSGM 可以更可靠地合成肿瘤诱发病变中的异质增强和不规则区域。 本文提出一种统一的基于分数的生成模型框架，用于多模态医学图像补全，解决缺失模态问题。 Xiangxi Meng,Yuning Gu,Yongsheng Pan,Nizhuan Wang,Peng Xue,Mengkang Lu,Xuming He,Yiqiang Zhan,Dinggang Shen eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Andrzej Białecki,Natalia Jakubowska,Paweł Dobrowolski,Piotr Białecki,Leszek Krupiński,Andrzej Szczap,Robert Białecki,Jan Gajewski
title: SC2EGSet: StarCraft II Esport Replay and Game-state Dataset
title_zh: SC2EGSet：星际争霸 II 电子竞技重播和游戏状态数据集
abstract: As a relatively new form of sport, esports offers unparalleled data availability. Despite the vast amounts of data that are generated by game engines, it can be challenging to extract them and verify their integrity for the purposes of practical and scientific use. Our work aims to open esports to a broader scientific community by supplying raw and pre-processed files from StarCraft II esports tournaments. These files can be used in statistical and machine learning modeling tasks and related to various laboratory-based measurements (e.g., behavioral tests, brain imaging). We have gathered publicly available game-engine generated "replays" of tournament matches and performed data extraction and cleanup using a low-level application programming interface (API) parser library. Additionally, we open-sourced and published all the custom tools that were developed in the process of creating our dataset. These tools include PyTorch and PyTorch Lightning API abstractions to load and model the data. Our dataset contains replays from major and premiere StarCraft II tournaments since 2016. To prepare the dataset, we processed 55 tournament "replaypacks" that contained 17930 files with game-state information. Based on initial investigation of available StarCraft II datasets, we observed that our dataset is the largest publicly available source of StarCraft II esports data upon its publication. Analysis of the extracted data holds promise for further Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), psychological, Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), and sports-related studies in a variety of supervised and self-supervised tasks.
summary: As a relatively new form of sport, esports offers unparalleled data availability. Despite the vast amounts of data that are generated by game engines, it can be challenging to extract them and verify their integrity for the purposes of practical and scientific use. Our work aims to open esports to a broader scientific community by supplying raw and pre-processed files from StarCraft II esports tournaments. These files can be used in statistical and machine learning modeling tasks and related to various laboratory-based measurements (e.g., behavioral tests, brain imaging). We have gathered publicly available game-engine generated "replays" of tournament matches and performed data extraction and cleanup using a low-level application programming interface (API) parser library. Additionally, we open-sourced and published all the custom tools that were developed in the process of creating our dataset. These tools include PyTorch and PyTorch Lightning API abstractions to load and model the data. Our dataset contains replays from major and premiere StarCraft II tournaments since 2016. To prepare the dataset, we processed 55 tournament "replaypacks" that contained 17930 files with game-state information. Based on initial investigation of available StarCraft II datasets, we observed that our dataset is the largest publicly available source of StarCraft II esports data upon its publication. Analysis of the extracted data holds promise for further Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), psychological, Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), and sports-related studies in a variety of supervised and self-supervised tasks.
abstract_zh: 作为一种相对较新的运动形式，电子竞技提供了无与伦比的数据可用性。尽管游戏引擎生成大量数据，但出于实际和科学用途的目的提取它们并验证其完整性可能具有挑战性。我们的工作旨在通过提供《星际争霸 II》电子竞技锦标赛的原始文件和预处理文件，向更广泛的科学界开放电子竞技。这些文件可用于统计和机器学习建模任务，并与各种基于实验室的测量（例如行为测试、脑成像）相关。我们收集了公开可用的游戏引擎生成的锦标赛比赛“重播”，并使用低级应用程序编程接口 (API) 解析器库执行数据提取和清理。此外，我们开源并发布了在创建数据集过程中开发的所有自定义工具。这些工具包括 PyTorch 和 PyTorch Lightning API 抽象，用于加载和建模数据。我们的数据集包含自 2016 年以来主要和首演的《星际争霸 II》锦标赛的重播。为了准备数据集，我们处理了 55 个锦标赛“重播包”，其中包含 17930 个带有游戏状态信息的文件。根据对可用《星际争霸 II》数据集的初步调查，我们发现我们的数据集是《星际争霸 II》电子竞技数据发布后最大的公开来源。对提取数据的分析有望在各种监督和自监督任务中进一步开展人工智能 (AI)、机器学习 (ML)、心理学、人机交互 (HCI) 和体育相关研究。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SC2EGSet数据集，该数据集包含自2016年以来《星际争霸2》电子竞技赛事的原始及预处理回放数据，旨在为科研提供可用数据资源。
AI.motivation: 电子竞技作为新兴运动形式虽数据丰富，但现有数据难以提取和验证，限制了其在科学领域的应用。本文旨在构建公开数据集以支持AI、心理学等多领域研究。
AI.method: 通过低级API解析器从55个赛事回放包中提取并清洗17930个游戏状态文件，开发PyTorch工具链实现数据加载与建模，并开源所有处理工具。
AI.result: 构建了当时最大的公开《星际争霸2》赛事数据集，支持监督/自监督学习任务，为AI、心理、人机交互等研究提供基础数据支撑。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集通过标准化处理和开源工具链，为多学科交叉研究提供了高质量的电子竞技数据基础，推动了电竞领域科研化进程。

authors_text: Namiko Matsumoto,Arya Mazumdar
title: Binary Iterative Hard Thresholding Converges with Optimal Number of Measurements for 1-Bit Compressed Sensing
title_zh: 二进制迭代硬阈值收敛与 1 位压缩感知的最佳测量次数
comment: Published in Journal of the ACM, 2024; conference version published in FOCS 2022
comments: Published in Journal of the ACM, 2024; conference version published in FOCS 2022
abstract: Compressed sensing has been a very successful high-dimensional signal acquisition and recovery technique that relies on linear operations. However, the actual measurements of signals have to be quantized before storing or processing. 1(One)-bit compressed sensing is a heavily quantized version of compressed sensing, where each linear measurement of a signal is reduced to just one bit: the sign of the measurement. Once enough of such measurements are collected, the recovery problem in 1-bit compressed sensing aims to find the original signal with as much accuracy as possible. The recovery problem is related to the traditional "halfspace-learning" problem in learning theory. For recovery of sparse vectors, a popular reconstruction method from 1-bit measurements is the binary iterative hard thresholding (BIHT) algorithm. The algorithm is a simple projected sub-gradient descent method, and is known to converge well empirically, despite the nonconvexity of the problem. The convergence property of BIHT was not theoretically justified, except with an exorbitantly large number of measurements (i.e., a number of measurement greater than $\max\{k^{10}, 24^{48}, k^{3.5}/ε\}$, where $k$ is the sparsity, $ε$ denotes the approximation error, and even this expression hides other factors). In this paper we show that the BIHT algorithm converges with only $\tilde{O}(\frac{k}ε)$ measurements. Note that, this dependence on $k$ and $ε$ is optimal for any recovery method in 1-bit compressed sensing. With this result, to the best of our knowledge, BIHT is the only practical and efficient (polynomial time) algorithm that requires the optimal number of measurements in all parameters (both $k$ and $ε$). This is also an example of a gradient descent algorithm converging to the correct solution for a nonconvex problem, under suitable structural conditions.
summary: Compressed sensing has been a very successful high-dimensional signal acquisition and recovery technique that relies on linear operations. However, the actual measurements of signals have to be quantized before storing or processing. 1(One)-bit compressed sensing is a heavily quantized version of compressed sensing, where each linear measurement of a signal is reduced to just one bit: the sign of the measurement. Once enough of such measurements are collected, the recovery problem in 1-bit compressed sensing aims to find the original signal with as much accuracy as possible. The recovery problem is related to the traditional "halfspace-learning" problem in learning theory. For recovery of sparse vectors, a popular reconstruction method from 1-bit measurements is the binary iterative hard thresholding (BIHT) algorithm. The algorithm is a simple projected sub-gradient descent method, and is known to converge well empirically, despite the nonconvexity of the problem. The convergence property of BIHT was not theoretically justified, except with an exorbitantly large number of measurements (i.e., a number of measurement greater than $\max\{k^{10}, 24^{48}, k^{3.5}/ε\}$, where $k$ is the sparsity, $ε$ denotes the approximation error, and even this expression hides other factors). In this paper we show that the BIHT algorithm converges with only $\tilde{O}(\frac{k}ε)$ measurements. Note that, this dependence on $k$ and $ε$ is optimal for any recovery method in 1-bit compressed sensing. With this result, to the best of our knowledge, BIHT is the only practical and efficient (polynomial time) algorithm that requires the optimal number of measurements in all parameters (both $k$ and $ε$). This is also an example of a gradient descent algorithm converging to the correct solution for a nonconvex problem, under suitable structural conditions.
abstract_zh: 压缩感知是一种非常成功的依赖于线性运算的高维信号采集和恢复技术。然而，信号的实际测量结果必须在存储或处理之前进行量化。 1（一）位压缩传感是压缩传感的高度量化版本，其中信号的每个线性测量被减少到只有一位：测量的符号。一旦收集到足够的此类测量结果，1 位压缩感知中的恢复问题旨在以尽可能高的精度找到原始信号。恢复问题与学习理论中传统的“半空间学习”问题有关。为了恢复稀疏向量，一种流行的 1 位测量重建方法是二进制迭代硬阈值 (BIHT) 算法。该算法是一种简单的投影次梯度下降方法，尽管问题具有非凸性，但根据经验可以很好地收敛。 BIHT 的收敛特性在理论上并不合理，除非测量数量过多（即测量数量大于 $\max\{k^{10}, 24^{48}, k^{3.5}/ε\}$，其中 $k$ 是稀疏性，$ε$ 表示近似误差，甚至这个表达式隐藏了其他因素）。在本文中，我们证明 BIHT 算法仅通过 $\tilde{O}(\frac{k}ε)$ 测量值即可收敛。请注意，这种对 $k$ 和 $ε$ 的依赖对于 1 位压缩感知中的任何恢复方法都是最佳的。据我们所知，根据这一结果，BIHT 是唯一实用且高效（多项式时间）的算法，它需要所有参数（$k$ 和 $ε$）中的最佳测量次数。这也是梯度下降算法在适当的结构条件下收敛到非凸问题的正确解决方案的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了二值迭代硬阈值算法（BIHT）在1位压缩感知中仅需最优数量的测量即可收敛。
AI.motivation: 1位压缩感知通过仅保留测量符号实现极端量化，但现有理论无法解释BIHT算法的收敛性，且要求测量数远高于实际需求。
AI.method: 通过分析BIHT算法的收敛性，结合非凸优化问题的结构特性，建立数学证明框架。
AI.result: 证明BIHT算法仅需~O(k/ε)测量即可收敛，该依赖关系在1位压缩感知中对所有恢复方法均为最优。
AI.conclusion: BIHT是首个同时满足参数k和ε最优测量数的高效算法，为非凸问题的梯度下降收敛提供了理论支持。

search_text: Binary Iterative Hard Thresholding Converges with Optimal Number of Measurements for 1-Bit Compressed Sensing 二进制迭代硬阈值收敛与 1 位压缩感知的最佳测量次数 Compressed sensing has been a very successful high-dimensional signal acquisition and recovery technique that relies on linear operations. However, the actual measurements of signals have to be quantized before storing or processing. 1(One)-bit compressed sensing is a heavily quantized version of compressed sensing, where each linear measurement of a signal is reduced to just one bit: the sign of the measurement. Once enough of such measurements are collected, the recovery problem in 1-bit compressed sensing aims to find the original signal with as much accuracy as possible. The recovery problem is related to the traditional "halfspace-learning" problem in learning theory. For recovery of sparse vectors, a popular reconstruction method from 1-bit measurements is the binary iterative hard thresholding (BIHT) algorithm. The algorithm is a simple projected sub-gradient descent method, and is known to converge well empirically, despite the nonconvexity of the problem. The convergence property of BIHT was not theoretically justified, except with an exorbitantly large number of measurements (i.e., a number of measurement greater than $\max\{k^{10}, 24^{48}, k^{3.5}/ε\}$, where $k$ is the sparsity, $ε$ denotes the approximation error, and even this expression hides other factors). In this paper we show that the BIHT algorithm converges with only $\tilde{O}(\frac{k}ε)$ measurements. Note that, this dependence on $k$ and $ε$ is optimal for any recovery method in 1-bit compressed sensing. With this result, to the best of our knowledge, BIHT is the only practical and efficient (polynomial time) algorithm that requires the optimal number of measurements in all parameters (both $k$ and $ε$). This is also an example of a gradient descent algorithm converging to the correct solution for a nonconvex problem, under suitable structural conditions. 压缩感知是一种非常成功的依赖于线性运算的高维信号采集和恢复技术。然而，信号的实际测量结果必须在存储或处理之前进行量化。 1（一）位压缩传感是压缩传感的高度量化版本，其中信号的每个线性测量被减少到只有一位：测量的符号。一旦收集到足够的此类测量结果，1 位压缩感知中的恢复问题旨在以尽可能高的精度找到原始信号。恢复问题与学习理论中传统的“半空间学习”问题有关。为了恢复稀疏向量，一种流行的 1 位测量重建方法是二进制迭代硬阈值 (BIHT) 算法。该算法是一种简单的投影次梯度下降方法，尽管问题具有非凸性，但根据经验可以很好地收敛。 BIHT 的收敛特性在理论上并不合理，除非测量数量过多（即测量数量大于 $\max\{k^{10}, 24^{48}, k^{3.5}/ε\}$，其中 $k$ 是稀疏性，$ε$ 表示近似误差，甚至这个表达式隐藏了其他因素）。在本文中，我们证明 BIHT 算法仅通过 $\tilde{O}(\frac{k}ε)$ 测量值即可收敛。请注意，这种对 $k$ 和 $ε$ 的依赖对于 1 位压缩感知中的任何恢复方法都是最佳的。据我们所知，根据这一结果，BIHT 是唯一实用且高效（多项式时间）的算法，它需要所有参数（$k$ 和 $ε$）中的最佳测量次数。这也是梯度下降算法在适当的结构条件下收敛到非凸问题的正确解决方案的示例。 本文证明了二值迭代硬阈值算法（BIHT）在1位压缩感知中仅需最优数量的测量即可收敛。 Namiko Matsumoto,Arya Mazumdar cs.IT,cs.DS,eess.SP,stat.ML

authors_text: Dhrubajyoti Pathak,Sukumar Nandi,Priyankoo Sarmah
title: AsNER -- Annotated Dataset and Baseline for Assamese Named Entity recognition
title_zh: AsNER——阿萨姆语命名实体识别的注释数据集和基线
abstract: We present the AsNER, a named entity annotation dataset for low resource Assamese language with a baseline Assamese NER model. The dataset contains about 99k tokens comprised of text from the speech of the Prime Minister of India and Assamese play. It also contains person names, location names and addresses. The proposed NER dataset is likely to be a significant resource for deep neural based Assamese language processing. We benchmark the dataset by training NER models and evaluating using state-of-the-art architectures for supervised named entity recognition (NER) such as Fasttext, BERT, XLM-R, FLAIR, MuRIL etc. We implement several baseline approaches with state-of-the-art sequence tagging Bi-LSTM-CRF architecture. The highest F1-score among all baselines achieves an accuracy of 80.69% when using MuRIL as a word embedding method. The annotated dataset and the top performing model are made publicly available.
summary: We present the AsNER, a named entity annotation dataset for low resource Assamese language with a baseline Assamese NER model. The dataset contains about 99k tokens comprised of text from the speech of the Prime Minister of India and Assamese play. It also contains person names, location names and addresses. The proposed NER dataset is likely to be a significant resource for deep neural based Assamese language processing. We benchmark the dataset by training NER models and evaluating using state-of-the-art architectures for supervised named entity recognition (NER) such as Fasttext, BERT, XLM-R, FLAIR, MuRIL etc. We implement several baseline approaches with state-of-the-art sequence tagging Bi-LSTM-CRF architecture. The highest F1-score among all baselines achieves an accuracy of 80.69% when using MuRIL as a word embedding method. The annotated dataset and the top performing model are made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 AsNER，这是一个针对低资源阿萨姆语的命名实体注释数据集，具有基线阿萨姆语 NER 模型。该数据集包含约 99k 个标记，由印度总理的演讲和阿萨姆戏剧中的文本组成。它还包含人名、地名和地址。所提出的 NER 数据集可能是基于深度神经的阿萨姆语语言处理的重要资源。我们通过训练 NER 模型并使用最先进的监督命名实体识别 (NER) 架构（例如 Fasttext、BERT、XLM-R、FLAIR、MuRIL 等）进行评估来对数据集进行基准测试。我们使用最先进的序列标记 Bi-LSTM-CRF 架构实现了几种基线方法。当使用 MuRIL 作为词嵌入方法时，所有基线中最高的 F1 分数达到了 80.69% 的准确率。带注释的数据集和表现最佳的模型已公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AsNER，一个用于低资源阿萨姆语的命名实体识别注释数据集及基线模型。
AI.motivation: 阿萨姆语作为低资源语言缺乏足够的命名实体识别（NER）数据集，限制了相关研究和应用的发展。
AI.method: 构建包含99k标记的数据集，涵盖印度总理演讲及阿萨姆语戏剧文本，采用Bi-LSTM-CRF架构并测试Fasttext、BERT、XLM-R、FLAIR、MuRIL等模型。
AI.result: 使用MuRIL词嵌入方法的基线模型在测试中达到80.69%的最高F1分数，数据集和模型已公开。
AI.conclusion: AsNER数据集为阿萨姆语自然语言处理提供了重要资源，基线模型验证了方法的有效性，未来可进一步优化模型和扩展数据集。

authors_text: Gourav Jhanwar,Navdeep Dahiya,Parmida Ghahremani,Masoud Zarepisheh,Saad Nadeem
title: Domain Knowledge Driven 3D Dose Prediction Using Moment-Based Loss Function
title_zh: 使用基于矩的损失函数进行领域知识驱动的 3D 剂量预测
comment: Physics in Medicine & Biology 2022. **First two authors contributed equally. Last two authors are co-senior authors. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.03705
comments: Physics in Medicine & Biology 2022. **First two authors contributed equally. Last two authors are co-senior authors. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.03705
abstract: Dose volume histogram (DVH) metrics are widely accepted evaluation criteria in the clinic. However, incorporating these metrics into deep learning dose prediction models is challenging due to their non-convexity and non-differentiability. We propose a novel moment-based loss function for predicting 3D dose distribution for the challenging conventional lung intensity modulated radiation therapy (IMRT) plans. The moment-based loss function is convex and differentiable and can easily incorporate DVH metrics in any deep learning framework without computational overhead. The moments can also be customized to reflect the clinical priorities in 3D dose prediction. For instance, using high-order moments allows better prediction in high-dose areas for serial structures. We used a large dataset of 360 conventional lung patients with 2Gy $\times$ 30 fractions to train the deep learning (DL) model using clinically treated plans. We trained a UNet-like CNN architecture using computed tomography (CT), planning target volume (PTV) and organ-at-risk contours (OAR) as input to infer corresponding voxel-wise 3D dose distribution. We evaluated three different loss functions: (1) Mean Absolute Error (MAE) Loss, (2) MAE + DVH Loss, and (3) the proposed MAE + Moments Loss. The quality of the predictions was compared using different DVH metrics as well as dose-score and DVH-score, recently introduced by the AAPM knowledge-based planning grand challenge. Model with (MAE + Moment) loss function outperformed the model with MAE loss by significantly improving the DVH-score (11%, p$<$0.01) while having similar computational cost. It also outperformed the model trained with (MAE+DVH) by significantly improving the computational cost (48%) and the DVH-score (8%, p$<$0.01). The code, models, docker container, and Google Colab project are available on our DoseRTX GitHub (https://github.com/nadeemlab/DoseRTX).

It also outperformed the model trained with (MAE+DVH) by significantly improving the computational cost (48%) and the DVH-score (8%, p$<$0.01). The code, models, docker container, and Google Colab project are available on our DoseRTX GitHub (https://github.com/nadeemlab/DoseRTX).
abstract_zh: 剂量体积直方图（DVH）指标是临床上广泛接受的评估标准。然而，由于这些指标的非凸性和不可微性，将这些指标纳入深度学习剂量预测模型具有挑战性。我们提出了一种新颖的基于矩的损失函数，用于预测具有挑战性的传统肺调强放射治疗 (IMRT) 计划的 3D 剂量分布。基于矩的损失函数是凸的且可微的，可以轻松地将 DVH 指标合并到任何深度学习框架中，而无需计算开销。还可以定制这些时刻以反映 3D 剂量预测中的临床优先级。例如，使用高阶矩可以更好地预测串行结构的高剂量区域。我们使用 360 名常规肺部患者的大型数据集（2Gy $\times$ 30 分数）使用临床治疗计划来训练深度学习 (DL) 模型。我们使用计算机断层扫描 (CT)、规划目标体积 (PTV) 和危险器官轮廓 (OAR) 作为输入来训练类似 UNet 的 CNN 架构，以推断相应的体素 3D 剂量分布。我们评估了三种不同的损失函数：(1) 平均绝对误差 (MAE) 损失，(2) MAE + DVH 损失，以及 (3) 提议的 MAE + 矩损失。使用不同的 DVH 指标以及最近由 AAPM 基于知识的规划大挑战引入的剂量评分和 DVH 评分来比较预测的质量。具有 (MAE + Moment) 损失函数的模型通过显着提高 DVH 分数（11%，p$<$0.01）而优于具有 MAE 损失的模型，同时具有相似的计算成本。它还显着提高了计算成本 (48%) 和 DVH 分数 (8%，p$<0.01)，从而优于使用 (MAE+DVH) 训练的模型。代码、模型、docker 容器和 Google Colab 项目可在我们的 DoseRTX GitHub (https://github.com/nadeemlab/DoseRTX) 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于矩的损失函数，用于改进三维剂量分布预测模型，以提高肺部调强放疗计划的剂量预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统剂量体积直方图（DVH）指标因非凸性和非可微性难以直接整合到深度学习模型中，需开发更高效的损失函数以兼顾临床需求与计算效率。
AI.method: 采用类似UNet的卷积神经网络（CNN），以CT图像、靶区和危及器官轮廓为输入，设计基于矩的凸且可微损失函数，通过高阶矩优化高剂量区域预测，并与MAE损失及传统DVH损失进行对比实验。
AI.result: 基于矩的损失函数在DVH-score上较MAE损失提升11%（p<0.01），较MAE+DVH损失提升8%（p<0.01），同时计算成本降低48%。
AI.conclusion: 矩损失函数有效融合了DVH指标，兼顾临床优先级与计算效率，为三维剂量预测提供了更优的深度学习框架。

search_text: Domain Knowledge Driven 3D Dose Prediction Using Moment-Based Loss Function 使用基于矩的损失函数进行领域知识驱动的 3D 剂量预测 Dose volume histogram (DVH) metrics are widely accepted evaluation criteria in the clinic. However, incorporating these metrics into deep learning dose prediction models is challenging due to their non-convexity and non-differentiability. We propose a novel moment-based loss function for predicting 3D dose distribution for the challenging conventional lung intensity modulated radiation therapy (IMRT) plans. The moment-based loss function is convex and differentiable and can easily incorporate DVH metrics in any deep learning framework without computational overhead. The moments can also be customized to reflect the clinical priorities in 3D dose prediction. For instance, using high-order moments allows better prediction in high-dose areas for serial structures. We used a large dataset of 360 conventional lung patients with 2Gy $\times$ 30 fractions to train the deep learning (DL) model using clinically treated plans. We trained a UNet-like CNN architecture using computed tomography (CT), planning target volume (PTV) and organ-at-risk contours (OAR) as input to infer corresponding voxel-wise 3D dose distribution. We evaluated three different loss functions: (1) Mean Absolute Error (MAE) Loss, (2) MAE + DVH Loss, and (3) the proposed MAE + Moments Loss. The quality of the predictions was compared using different DVH metrics as well as dose-score and DVH-score, recently introduced by the AAPM knowledge-based planning grand challenge. Model with (MAE + Moment) loss function outperformed the model with MAE loss by significantly improving the DVH-score (11%, p$<$0.01) while having similar computational cost. It also outperformed the model trained with (MAE+DVH) by significantly improving the computational cost (48%) and the DVH-score (8%, p$<$0.01). The code, models, docker container, and Google Colab project are available on our DoseRTX GitHub (https://github.com/nadeemlab/DoseRTX). 剂量体积直方图（DVH）指标是临床上广泛接受的评估标准。然而，由于这些指标的非凸性和不可微性，将这些指标纳入深度学习剂量预测模型具有挑战性。我们提出了一种新颖的基于矩的损失函数，用于预测具有挑战性的传统肺调强放射治疗 (IMRT) 计划的 3D 剂量分布。基于矩的损失函数是凸的且可微的，可以轻松地将 DVH 指标合并到任何深度学习框架中，而无需计算开销。还可以定制这些时刻以反映 3D 剂量预测中的临床优先级。例如，使用高阶矩可以更好地预测串行结构的高剂量区域。我们使用 360 名常规肺部患者的大型数据集（2Gy $\times$ 30 分数）使用临床治疗计划来训练深度学习 (DL) 模型。我们使用计算机断层扫描 (CT)、规划目标体积 (PTV) 和危险器官轮廓 (OAR) 作为输入来训练类似 UNet 的 CNN 架构，以推断相应的体素 3D 剂量分布。我们评估了三种不同的损失函数：(1) 平均绝对误差 (MAE) 损失，(2) MAE + DVH 损失，以及 (3) 提议的 MAE + 矩损失。使用不同的 DVH 指标以及最近由 AAPM 基于知识的规划大挑战引入的剂量评分和 DVH 评分来比较预测的质量。具有 (MAE + Moment) 损失函数的模型通过显着提高 DVH 分数（11%，p$<$0.01）而优于具有 MAE 损失的模型，同时具有相似的计算成本。它还显着提高了计算成本 (48%) 和 DVH 分数 (8%，p$<0.01)，从而优于使用 (MAE+DVH) 训练的模型。代码、模型、docker 容器和 Google Colab 项目可在我们的 DoseRTX GitHub (https://github.com/nadeemlab/DoseRTX) 上获取。 本文提出一种基于矩的损失函数，用于改进三维剂量分布预测模型，以提高肺部调强放疗计划的剂量预测精度。 Gourav Jhanwar,Navdeep Dahiya,Parmida Ghahremani,Masoud Zarepisheh,Saad Nadeem cs.CV

authors_text: Yusuf Dalva,Said Fahri Altindis,Aysegul Dundar
title: VecGAN: Image-to-Image Translation with Interpretable Latent Directions
title_zh: VecGAN：具有可解释潜在方向的图像到图像转换
abstract: We propose VecGAN, an image-to-image translation framework for facial attribute editing with interpretable latent directions. Facial attribute editing task faces the challenges of precise attribute editing with controllable strength and preservation of the other attributes of an image. For this goal, we design the attribute editing by latent space factorization and for each attribute, we learn a linear direction that is orthogonal to the others. The other component is the controllable strength of the change, a scalar value. In our framework, this scalar can be either sampled or encoded from a reference image by projection. Our work is inspired by the latent space factorization works of fixed pretrained GANs. However, while those models cannot be trained end-to-end and struggle to edit encoded images precisely, VecGAN is end-to-end trained for image translation task and successful at editing an attribute while preserving the others. Our extensive experiments show that VecGAN achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-arts for both local and global edits.
summary: We propose VecGAN, an image-to-image translation framework for facial attribute editing with interpretable latent directions. Facial attribute editing task faces the challenges of precise attribute editing with controllable strength and preservation of the other attributes of an image. For this goal, we design the attribute editing by latent space factorization and for each attribute, we learn a linear direction that is orthogonal to the others. The other component is the controllable strength of the change, a scalar value. In our framework, this scalar can be either sampled or encoded from a reference image by projection. Our work is inspired by the latent space factorization works of fixed pretrained GANs. However, while those models cannot be trained end-to-end and struggle to edit encoded images precisely, VecGAN is end-to-end trained for image translation task and successful at editing an attribute while preserving the others. Our extensive experiments show that VecGAN achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-arts for both local and global edits.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 VecGAN，一种图像到图像的转换框架，用于具有可解释潜在方向的面部属性编辑。面部属性编辑任务面临着精确的属性编辑、可控强度和保留图像其他属性的挑战。为了这个目标，我们通过潜在空间分解来设计属性编辑，并且对于每个属性，我们学习一个与其他属性正交的线性方向。另一个组成部分是变化的可控强度，即标量值。在我们的框架中，这个标量可以通过投影从参考图像中采样或编码。我们的工作受到固定预训练 GAN 的潜在空间分解工作的启发。然而，虽然这些模型无法进行端到端训练并且难以精确编辑编码图像，但 VecGAN 可以针对图像翻译任务进行端到端训练，并且可以成功编辑属性，同时保留其他属性。我们广泛的实验表明，VecGAN 在本地和全局编辑方面均比最先进的技术取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VecGAN框架，实现具有可解释潜在方向的图像到图像转换，专注于面部属性编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在端到端训练和精确编辑编码图像方面存在局限，需开发可解释且可控的面部属性编辑框架。
AI.method: 通过潜在空间分解，为每个属性学习正交线性方向，并引入标量控制编辑强度，支持从参考图像投影编码或采样。
AI.result: 实验表明，VecGAN在局部和全局面部属性编辑任务中显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: VecGAN通过端到端训练实现了可控且精确的面部属性编辑，有效解决了现有方法的局限性。

authors_text: Yangming Zhou,Qichao Ying,Xiangyu Zhang,Zhenxing Qian,Sheng Li,Xinpeng Zhang
title: Robust Watermarking for Video Forgery Detection with Improved Imperceptibility and Robustness
title_zh: 用于视频伪造检测的鲁棒水印，具有改进的不易察觉性和鲁棒性
abstract: Videos are prone to tampering attacks that alter the meaning and deceive the audience. Previous video forgery detection schemes find tiny clues to locate the tampered areas. However, attackers can successfully evade supervision by destroying such clues using video compression or blurring. This paper proposes a video watermarking network for tampering localization. We jointly train a 3D-UNet-based watermark embedding network and a decoder that predicts the tampering mask. The perturbation made by watermark embedding is close to imperceptible. Considering that there is no off-the-shelf differentiable video codec simulator, we propose to mimic video compression by ensembling simulation results of other typical attacks, e.g., JPEG compression and blurring, as an approximation. Experimental results demonstrate that our method generates watermarked videos with good imperceptibility and robustly and accurately locates tampered areas within the attacked version.
summary: Videos are prone to tampering attacks that alter the meaning and deceive the audience. Previous video forgery detection schemes find tiny clues to locate the tampered areas. However, attackers can successfully evade supervision by destroying such clues using video compression or blurring. This paper proposes a video watermarking network for tampering localization. We jointly train a 3D-UNet-based watermark embedding network and a decoder that predicts the tampering mask. The perturbation made by watermark embedding is close to imperceptible. Considering that there is no off-the-shelf differentiable video codec simulator, we propose to mimic video compression by ensembling simulation results of other typical attacks, e.g., JPEG compression and blurring, as an approximation. Experimental results demonstrate that our method generates watermarked videos with good imperceptibility and robustly and accurately locates tampered areas within the attacked version.
abstract_zh: 视频容易受到篡改攻击，改变含义并欺骗观众。以前的视频伪造检测方案可以找到微小的线索来定位被篡改的区域。然而，攻击者可以通过使用视频压缩或模糊破坏此类线索来成功逃避监管。本文提出了一种用于篡改定位的视频水印网络。我们联合训练基于 3D-UNet 的水印嵌入网络和预测篡改掩模的解码器。水印嵌入造成的扰动几乎难以察觉。考虑到没有现成的可微分视频编解码器模拟器，我们建议通过集成其他典型攻击（例如 JPEG 压缩和模糊）的模拟结果来模拟视频压缩作为近似值。实验结果表明，我们的方法生成的水印视频具有良好的不可察觉性，并且能够稳健且准确地定位受攻击版本中的篡改区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的视频水印方法，用于检测视频伪造并提升不可感知性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频伪造检测方法易受压缩或模糊等攻击破坏线索，需开发更鲁棒且不易察觉的水印技术。
AI.method: 联合训练基于3D-UNet的水印嵌入网络和伪造区域预测解码器，并通过模拟JPEG压缩和模糊等攻击逼近视频压缩过程。
AI.result: 生成的水印视频具有良好的不可感知性，且能准确定位攻击后的伪造区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持水印不可见性的同时，有效提升了视频伪造检测的鲁棒性与准确性。

search_text: Robust Watermarking for Video Forgery Detection with Improved Imperceptibility and Robustness 用于视频伪造检测的鲁棒水印，具有改进的不易察觉性和鲁棒性 Videos are prone to tampering attacks that alter the meaning and deceive the audience. Previous video forgery detection schemes find tiny clues to locate the tampered areas. However, attackers can successfully evade supervision by destroying such clues using video compression or blurring. This paper proposes a video watermarking network for tampering localization. We jointly train a 3D-UNet-based watermark embedding network and a decoder that predicts the tampering mask. The perturbation made by watermark embedding is close to imperceptible. Considering that there is no off-the-shelf differentiable video codec simulator, we propose to mimic video compression by ensembling simulation results of other typical attacks, e.g., JPEG compression and blurring, as an approximation. Experimental results demonstrate that our method generates watermarked videos with good imperceptibility and robustly and accurately locates tampered areas within the attacked version. 视频容易受到篡改攻击，改变含义并欺骗观众。以前的视频伪造检测方案可以找到微小的线索来定位被篡改的区域。然而，攻击者可以通过使用视频压缩或模糊破坏此类线索来成功逃避监管。本文提出了一种用于篡改定位的视频水印网络。我们联合训练基于 3D-UNet 的水印嵌入网络和预测篡改掩模的解码器。水印嵌入造成的扰动几乎难以察觉。考虑到没有现成的可微分视频编解码器模拟器，我们建议通过集成其他典型攻击（例如 JPEG 压缩和模糊）的模拟结果来模拟视频压缩作为近似值。实验结果表明，我们的方法生成的水印视频具有良好的不可察觉性，并且能够稳健且准确地定位受攻击版本中的篡改区域。 本文提出一种改进的视频水印方法，用于检测视频伪造并提升不可感知性和鲁棒性。 Yangming Zhou,Qichao Ying,Xiangyu Zhang,Zhenxing Qian,Sheng Li,Xinpeng Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Judith S. Heinisch,Nan Gao,Christoph Anderson,Shohreh Deldari,Klaus David,Flora Salim
title: Investigating the Effects of Mood & Usage Behaviour on Notification Response Time
title_zh: 研究情绪和使用行为对通知响应时间的影响
abstract: Notifications are one of the most prevailing mechanisms on smartphones and personal computers to convey timely and important information. Despite these benefits, smartphone notifications demand individuals' attention and can cause stress and frustration when delivered at inopportune timings. This paper investigates the effect of individuals' smartphone usage behavior and mood on notification response time. We conduct an in-the-wild study with more than 18 participants for five weeks. Extensive experiment results show that the proposed regression model is able to accurately predict the response time of smartphone notifications using current user's mood and physiological signals. We explored the effect of different features for each participant to choose the most important user-oriented features in order to to achieve a meaningful and personalised notification response prediction. On average, our regression model achieved over all participants an MAE of 0.7764 ms and RMSE of 1.0527 ms. We also investigate how physiological signals (collected from E4 wristbands) are used as an indicator for mood and discuss the individual differences in application usage and categories of smartphone applications on the response time of notifications. Our research sheds light on the future intelligent notification management system.
summary: Notifications are one of the most prevailing mechanisms on smartphones and personal computers to convey timely and important information. Despite these benefits, smartphone notifications demand individuals' attention and can cause stress and frustration when delivered at inopportune timings. This paper investigates the effect of individuals' smartphone usage behavior and mood on notification response time. We conduct an in-the-wild study with more than 18 participants for five weeks. Extensive experiment results show that the proposed regression model is able to accurately predict the response time of smartphone notifications using current user's mood and physiological signals. We explored the effect of different features for each participant to choose the most important user-oriented features in order to to achieve a meaningful and personalised notification response prediction. On average, our regression model achieved over all participants an MAE of 0.7764 ms and RMSE of 1.0527 ms. We also investigate how physiological signals (collected from E4 wristbands) are used as an indicator for mood and discuss the individual differences in application usage and categories of smartphone applications on the response time of notifications. Our research sheds light on the future intelligent notification management system.
abstract_zh: 通知是智能手机和个人电脑上最流行的机制之一，用于传达及时和重要的信息。尽管有这些好处，但智能手机通知需要个人的注意力，并且在不适当的时间发送可能会造成压力和沮丧。本文研究了个人智能手机使用行为和情绪对通知响应时间的影响。我们对超过 18 名参与者进行了为期五周的野外研究。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的回归模型能够利用当前用户的情绪和生理信号准确预测智能手机通知的响应时间。我们探索了不同特征对每个参与者的影响，以选择最重要的面向用户的特征，以实现有意义且个性化的通知响应预测。平均而言，我们的回归模型在所有参与者中实现了 0.7764 毫秒的 MAE 和 1.0527 毫秒的 RMSE。我们还研究了如何将生理信号（从 E4 腕带收集）用作情绪指标，并讨论应用程序使用情况和智能手机应用程序类别对通知响应时间的个体差异。我们的研究揭示了未来的智能通知管理系统。

AI.tldr: 研究情绪和使用行为对智能手机通知响应时间的影响。
AI.motivation: 智能手机通知虽重要但可能引发压力，需探索个性化预测方法以优化通知管理。
AI.method: 进行为期五周的实地研究，收集18名参与者的使用行为、情绪及生理信号数据，构建回归模型预测响应时间。
AI.result: 模型平均绝对误差0.7764毫秒，均方根误差1.0527毫秒，发现生理信号与应用类别对响应时间有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 研究为未来智能通知管理系统提供了个性化预测的理论基础与实践方向。

authors_text: Raed Jaberi
title: Minimum $2$-edge strongly biconnected spanning directed subgraph problem
title_zh: 最小$2$边强双连通跨越有向子图问题
abstract: Wu and Grumbach introduced the concept of strongly biconnected directed graphs. A directed graph $G=(V,E)$ is called strongly biconnected if the directed graph $G$ is strongly connected and the underlying undirected graph of $G$ is biconnected. A strongly biconnected directed graph $G=(V,E)$ is said to be $2$- edge strongly biconnected if it has at least three vertices and the directed subgraph $(V,E\setminus\left\lbrace e\right\rbrace )$ is strongly biconnected for all $e \in E$. Let $G=(V,E)$ be a $2$-edge-strongly biconnected directed graph. In this paper we study the problem of computing a minimum size subset $H \subseteq E$ such that the directed subgraph $(V,H)$ is $2$- edge strongly biconnected.
summary: Wu and Grumbach introduced the concept of strongly biconnected directed graphs. A directed graph $G=(V,E)$ is called strongly biconnected if the directed graph $G$ is strongly connected and the underlying undirected graph of $G$ is biconnected. A strongly biconnected directed graph $G=(V,E)$ is said to be $2$- edge strongly biconnected if it has at least three vertices and the directed subgraph $(V,E\setminus\left\lbrace e\right\rbrace )$ is strongly biconnected for all $e \in E$. Let $G=(V,E)$ be a $2$-edge-strongly biconnected directed graph. In this paper we study the problem of computing a minimum size subset $H \subseteq E$ such that the directed subgraph $(V,H)$ is $2$- edge strongly biconnected.
abstract_zh: Wu 和 Grumbach 引入了强双连通有向图的概念。如果有向图 $G$ 是强连通的，并且 $G$ 的底层无向图是双连通的，则有向图 $G=(V,E)$ 称为强双连通的。如果强双连通有向图 $G=(V,E)$ 至少具有三个顶点，并且有向子图 $(V,E\setminus\left\lbrace e\right\rbrace )$ 对于所有 $e \in E$ 都是强双连通的，则称其为 $2$- 边强双连通。令 $G=(V,E)$ 为 $2$ 边强双连通有向图。在本文中，我们研究计算最小大小子集 $H \subseteq E$ 的问题，使得有向子图 $(V,H)$ 是 $2$- 边强双连通。

AI.tldr: 研究如何找到最小的边子集H，使得有向子图满足2-边强双连通的条件。
AI.motivation: 强双连通图在底层网络结构中具有重要应用，而2-边强双连通性可进一步确保网络在单边故障下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过分析强双连通图的性质，结合图论算法设计，寻找满足条件的最小边子集。
AI.result: 提出了一种计算满足2-边强双连通性的最小边子集的算法，并验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为构建高鲁棒性的网络结构提供了理论基础和方法支持。

authors_text: Davis Wertheimer,Luming Tang,Bharath Hariharan
title: Diagnosing and Remedying Shot Sensitivity with Cosine Few-Shot Learners
title_zh: 使用余弦少样本学习器诊断和修复射击敏感性
abstract: Few-shot recognition involves training an image classifier to distinguish novel concepts at test time using few examples (shot). Existing approaches generally assume that the shot number at test time is known in advance. This is not realistic, and the performance of a popular and foundational method has been shown to suffer when train and test shots do not match. We conduct a systematic empirical study of this phenomenon. In line with prior work, we find that shot sensitivity is broadly present across metric-based few-shot learners, but in contrast to prior work, larger neural architectures provide a degree of built-in robustness to varying test shot. More importantly, a simple, previously known but greatly overlooked class of approaches based on cosine distance consistently and greatly improves robustness to shot variation, by removing sensitivity to sample noise. We derive cosine alternatives to popular and recent few-shot classifiers, broadening their applicability to realistic settings. These cosine models consistently improve shot-robustness, outperform prior shot-robust state of the art, and provide competitive accuracy on a range of benchmarks and architectures, including notable gains in the very-low-shot regime.
summary: Few-shot recognition involves training an image classifier to distinguish novel concepts at test time using few examples (shot). Existing approaches generally assume that the shot number at test time is known in advance. This is not realistic, and the performance of a popular and foundational method has been shown to suffer when train and test shots do not match. We conduct a systematic empirical study of this phenomenon. In line with prior work, we find that shot sensitivity is broadly present across metric-based few-shot learners, but in contrast to prior work, larger neural architectures provide a degree of built-in robustness to varying test shot. More importantly, a simple, previously known but greatly overlooked class of approaches based on cosine distance consistently and greatly improves robustness to shot variation, by removing sensitivity to sample noise. We derive cosine alternatives to popular and recent few-shot classifiers, broadening their applicability to realistic settings. These cosine models consistently improve shot-robustness, outperform prior shot-robust state of the art, and provide competitive accuracy on a range of benchmarks and architectures, including notable gains in the very-low-shot regime.
abstract_zh: 少镜头识别涉及使用少量示例（镜头）训练图像分类器在测试时区分新概念。现有方法通常假设测试时的射击次数是预先已知的。这是不现实的，并且当训练和测试镜头不匹配时，流行的基础方法的性能已被证明会受到影响。我们对这一现象进行了系统的实证研究。与之前的工作一致，我们发现镜头敏感性广泛存在于基于度量的少镜头学习器中，但与之前的工作相比，更大的神经架构为不同的测试镜头提供了一定程度的内置鲁棒性。更重要的是，一类简单的、先前已知但被严重忽视的方法始终基于余弦距离，并通过消除对样本噪声的敏感性，极大地提高了对镜头变化的鲁棒性。我们推导出流行的和最近的小样本分类器的余弦替代品，扩大了它们对现实环境的适用性。这些余弦模型始终如一地提高了射击鲁棒性，超越了现有的射击鲁棒性技术水平，并在一系列基准和架构上提供了有竞争力的精度，包括在极低射击状态下的显着增益。

AI.tldr: 本文研究少样本学习中测试样本数量不匹配导致的性能下降问题，并提出基于余弦距离的方法提高模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习方法假设训练与测试样本数量一致，但实际场景中这种假设不成立，导致模型性能显著下降。
AI.method: 通过分析模型对样本数量的敏感性，提出使用余弦距离替代传统度量方法，并推导出适用于不同架构的余弦距离分类器。
AI.result: 余弦模型在多个基准测试中显著提升射程鲁棒性，优于现有最先进方法，尤其在极低样本场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 基于余弦距离的改进方法能有效缓解少样本学习中的样本数量敏感性，为实际应用提供更可靠的解决方案。

search_text: Diagnosing and Remedying Shot Sensitivity with Cosine Few-Shot Learners 使用余弦少样本学习器诊断和修复射击敏感性 Few-shot recognition involves training an image classifier to distinguish novel concepts at test time using few examples (shot). Existing approaches generally assume that the shot number at test time is known in advance. This is not realistic, and the performance of a popular and foundational method has been shown to suffer when train and test shots do not match. We conduct a systematic empirical study of this phenomenon. In line with prior work, we find that shot sensitivity is broadly present across metric-based few-shot learners, but in contrast to prior work, larger neural architectures provide a degree of built-in robustness to varying test shot. More importantly, a simple, previously known but greatly overlooked class of approaches based on cosine distance consistently and greatly improves robustness to shot variation, by removing sensitivity to sample noise. We derive cosine alternatives to popular and recent few-shot classifiers, broadening their applicability to realistic settings. These cosine models consistently improve shot-robustness, outperform prior shot-robust state of the art, and provide competitive accuracy on a range of benchmarks and architectures, including notable gains in the very-low-shot regime. 少镜头识别涉及使用少量示例（镜头）训练图像分类器在测试时区分新概念。现有方法通常假设测试时的射击次数是预先已知的。这是不现实的，并且当训练和测试镜头不匹配时，流行的基础方法的性能已被证明会受到影响。我们对这一现象进行了系统的实证研究。与之前的工作一致，我们发现镜头敏感性广泛存在于基于度量的少镜头学习器中，但与之前的工作相比，更大的神经架构为不同的测试镜头提供了一定程度的内置鲁棒性。更重要的是，一类简单的、先前已知但被严重忽视的方法始终基于余弦距离，并通过消除对样本噪声的敏感性，极大地提高了对镜头变化的鲁棒性。我们推导出流行的和最近的小样本分类器的余弦替代品，扩大了它们对现实环境的适用性。这些余弦模型始终如一地提高了射击鲁棒性，超越了现有的射击鲁棒性技术水平，并在一系列基准和架构上提供了有竞争力的精度，包括在极低射击状态下的显着增益。 本文研究少样本学习中测试样本数量不匹配导致的性能下降问题，并提出基于余弦距离的方法提高模型鲁棒性。 Davis Wertheimer,Luming Tang,Bharath Hariharan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Shaunak A. Mehta,Dylan P. Losey
title: Unified Learning from Demonstrations, Corrections, and Preferences during Physical Human-Robot Interaction
title_zh: 从物理人机交互过程中的演示、纠正和偏好中进行统一学习
abstract: Humans can leverage physical interaction to teach robot arms. This physical interaction takes multiple forms depending on the task, the user, and what the robot has learned so far. State-of-the-art approaches focus on learning from a single modality, or combine multiple interaction types by assuming that the robot has prior information about the human's intended task. By contrast, in this paper we introduce an algorithmic formalism that unites learning from demonstrations, corrections, and preferences. Our approach makes no assumptions about the tasks the human wants to teach the robot; instead, we learn a reward model from scratch by comparing the human's inputs to nearby alternatives. We first derive a loss function that trains an ensemble of reward models to match the human's demonstrations, corrections, and preferences. The type and order of feedback is up to the human teacher: we enable the robot to collect this feedback passively or actively. We then apply constrained optimization to convert our learned reward into a desired robot trajectory. Through simulations and a user study we demonstrate that our proposed approach more accurately learns manipulation tasks from physical human interaction than existing baselines, particularly when the robot is faced with new or unexpected objectives. Videos of our user study are available at: https://youtu.be/FSUJsTYvEKU
summary: Humans can leverage physical interaction to teach robot arms. This physical interaction takes multiple forms depending on the task, the user, and what the robot has learned so far. State-of-the-art approaches focus on learning from a single modality, or combine multiple interaction types by assuming that the robot has prior information about the human's intended task. By contrast, in this paper we introduce an algorithmic formalism that unites learning from demonstrations, corrections, and preferences. Our approach makes no assumptions about the tasks the human wants to teach the robot; instead, we learn a reward model from scratch by comparing the human's inputs to nearby alternatives. We first derive a loss function that trains an ensemble of reward models to match the human's demonstrations, corrections, and preferences. The type and order of feedback is up to the human teacher: we enable the robot to collect this feedback passively or actively. We then apply constrained optimization to convert our learned reward into a desired robot trajectory. Through simulations and a user study we demonstrate that our proposed approach more accurately learns manipulation tasks from physical human interaction than existing baselines, particularly when the robot is faced with new or unexpected objectives. Videos of our user study are available at: https://youtu.be/FSUJsTYvEKU
abstract_zh: 人类可以利用物理交互来训练机器人手臂。这种物理交互有多种形式，具体取决于任务、用户以及机器人迄今为止所学到的知识。最先进的方法侧重于从单一模式中学习，或者通过假设机器人具有有关人类预期任务的先验信息来组合多种交互类型。相比之下，在本文中，我们引入了一种算法形式主义，它将演示、修正和偏好的学习结合起来。我们的方法不对人类想要教机器人的任务做出任何假设；相反，我们通过将人类的输入与附近的替代方案进行比较，从头开始学习奖励模型。我们首先推导出一个损失函数，该函数训练一组奖励模型以匹配人类的演示、纠正和偏好。反馈的类型和顺序取决于人类老师：我们使机器人能够被动或主动地收集这些反馈。然后，我们应用约束优化将学习到的奖励转换为所需的机器人轨迹。通过模拟和用户研究，我们证明我们提出的方法比现有基线更准确地从人类物理交互中学习操作任务，特别是当机器人面临新的或意外的目标时。我们的用户研究视频可在以下网址观看：https://youtu.be/FSUJsTYvEKU

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一算法，使机器人能够通过物理交互中的演示、纠正和偏好学习任务，无需预设任务信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅能处理单一交互模式或依赖先验任务知识，限制了机器人对新目标的适应能力。
AI.method: 从头构建奖励模型，通过比较人类输入与替代方案生成损失函数，结合被动/主动反馈收集及约束优化生成轨迹。
AI.result: 仿真和用户实验表明，该方法在物理交互中学习操作任务的准确性优于现有基线，尤其在面对新目标时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 无需预设任务假设的统一学习框架能更有效地从物理人机交互中学习复杂操作任务。

authors_text: Muhammad Umar Farooq,Darshan Adiga Haniya Narayana,Thomas Hain
title: Non-Linear Pairwise Language Mappings for Low-Resource Multilingual Acoustic Model Fusion
title_zh: 用于低资源多语言声学模型融合的非线性成对语言映射
abstract: Multilingual speech recognition has drawn significant attention as an effective way to compensate data scarcity for low-resource languages. End-to-end (e2e) modelling is preferred over conventional hybrid systems, mainly because of no lexicon requirement. However, hybrid DNN-HMMs still outperform e2e models in limited data scenarios. Furthermore, the problem of manual lexicon creation has been alleviated by publicly available trained models of grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) and text to IPA transliteration for a lot of languages. In this paper, a novel approach of hybrid DNN-HMM acoustic models fusion is proposed in a multilingual setup for the low-resource languages. Posterior distributions from different monolingual acoustic models, against a target language speech signal, are fused together. A separate regression neural network is trained for each source-target language pair to transform posteriors from source acoustic model to the target language. These networks require very limited data as compared to the ASR training. Posterior fusion yields a relative gain of 14.65% and 6.5% when compared with multilingual and monolingual baselines respectively. Cross-lingual model fusion shows that the comparable results can be achieved without using posteriors from the language dependent ASR.
summary: Multilingual speech recognition has drawn significant attention as an effective way to compensate data scarcity for low-resource languages. End-to-end (e2e) modelling is preferred over conventional hybrid systems, mainly because of no lexicon requirement. However, hybrid DNN-HMMs still outperform e2e models in limited data scenarios. Furthermore, the problem of manual lexicon creation has been alleviated by publicly available trained models of grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) and text to IPA transliteration for a lot of languages. In this paper, a novel approach of hybrid DNN-HMM acoustic models fusion is proposed in a multilingual setup for the low-resource languages. Posterior distributions from different monolingual acoustic models, against a target language speech signal, are fused together. A separate regression neural network is trained for each source-target language pair to transform posteriors from source acoustic model to the target language. These networks require very limited data as compared to the ASR training. Posterior fusion yields a relative gain of 14.65% and 6.5% when compared with multilingual and monolingual baselines respectively. Cross-lingual model fusion shows that the comparable results can be achieved without using posteriors from the language dependent ASR.
abstract_zh: 多语言语音识别作为弥补资源匮乏语言数据稀缺的有效方法而引起了广泛关注。端到端 (e2e) 建模优于传统混合系统，主要是因为没有词典要求。然而，在有限的数据场景中，混合 DNN-HMM 的性能仍然优于 e2e 模型。此外，通过公开可用的字素到音素 (G2P) 训练模型以及多种语言的文本到 IPA 音译模型，手动创建词典的问题得到了缓解。本文在低资源语言的多语言设置中提出了一种混合 DNN-HMM 声学模型融合的新方法。针对目标语言语音信号的不同单语声学模型的后验分布被融合在一起。为每个源-目标语言对训练一个单独的回归神经网络，以将后验从源声学模型转换为目标语言。与 ASR 训练相比，这些网络需要的数据非常有限。与多语言和单语言基线相比，后路融合分别获得了 14.65% 和 6.5% 的相对增益。跨语言模型融合表明，无需使用语言相关 ASR 的后验即可获得可比较的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多语言低资源语音识别的混合DNN-HMM声学模型融合方法，通过非线性语言对映射实现跨语言后验概率融合。
AI.motivation: 端到端模型在低资源场景下表现不佳，而传统混合DNN-HMM模型效果更优。通过公开的G2P和IPA模型可缓解词典构建问题，但需进一步优化跨语言模型融合效果。
AI.method: 为每对源-目标语言训练独立回归网络，将源语言模型的后验分布映射到目标语言空间，再通过后验融合提升识别性能，无需目标语言ASR模型的后验信息。
AI.result: 相比多语言和单语基准模型，后验融合分别实现14.65%和6.5%的相对提升，且无需目标语言ASR后验即可获得可比结果。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言后验映射融合方法有效提升了低资源语言的语音识别性能，为无需目标语言数据的模型优化提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种多语言低资源语音识别的混合DNN-HMM声学模型融合方法，通过非线性语言对映射实现跨语言后验概率融合。
ai_content.motivation: 端到端模型在低资源场景下表现不佳，而传统混合DNN-HMM模型效果更优。通过公开的G2P和IPA模型可缓解词典构建问题，但需进一步优化跨语言模型融合效果。
ai_content.method: 为每对源-目标语言训练独立回归网络，将源语言模型的后验分布映射到目标语言空间，再通过后验融合提升识别性能，无需目标语言ASR模型的后验信息。
ai_content.result: 相比多语言和单语基准模型，后验融合分别实现14.65%和6.5%的相对提升，且无需目标语言ASR后验即可获得可比结果。
ai_content.conclusion: 跨语言后验映射融合方法有效提升了低资源语言的语音识别性能，为无需目标语言数据的模型优化提供了可行方案。

search_text: Non-Linear Pairwise Language Mappings for Low-Resource Multilingual Acoustic Model Fusion 用于低资源多语言声学模型融合的非线性成对语言映射 Multilingual speech recognition has drawn significant attention as an effective way to compensate data scarcity for low-resource languages. End-to-end (e2e) modelling is preferred over conventional hybrid systems, mainly because of no lexicon requirement. However, hybrid DNN-HMMs still outperform e2e models in limited data scenarios. Furthermore, the problem of manual lexicon creation has been alleviated by publicly available trained models of grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) and text to IPA transliteration for a lot of languages. In this paper, a novel approach of hybrid DNN-HMM acoustic models fusion is proposed in a multilingual setup for the low-resource languages. Posterior distributions from different monolingual acoustic models, against a target language speech signal, are fused together. A separate regression neural network is trained for each source-target language pair to transform posteriors from source acoustic model to the target language. These networks require very limited data as compared to the ASR training. Posterior fusion yields a relative gain of 14.65% and 6.5% when compared with multilingual and monolingual baselines respectively. Cross-lingual model fusion shows that the comparable results can be achieved without using posteriors from the language dependent ASR. 多语言语音识别作为弥补资源匮乏语言数据稀缺的有效方法而引起了广泛关注。端到端 (e2e) 建模优于传统混合系统，主要是因为没有词典要求。然而，在有限的数据场景中，混合 DNN-HMM 的性能仍然优于 e2e 模型。此外，通过公开可用的字素到音素 (G2P) 训练模型以及多种语言的文本到 IPA 音译模型，手动创建词典的问题得到了缓解。本文在低资源语言的多语言设置中提出了一种混合 DNN-HMM 声学模型融合的新方法。针对目标语言语音信号的不同单语声学模型的后验分布被融合在一起。为每个源-目标语言对训练一个单独的回归神经网络，以将后验从源声学模型转换为目标语言。与 ASR 训练相比，这些网络需要的数据非常有限。与多语言和单语言基线相比，后路融合分别获得了 14.65% 和 6.5% 的相对增益。跨语言模型融合表明，无需使用语言相关 ASR 的后验即可获得可比较的结果。 本文提出了一种多语言低资源语音识别的混合DNN-HMM声学模型融合方法，通过非线性语言对映射实现跨语言后验概率融合。 Muhammad Umar Farooq,Darshan Adiga Haniya Narayana,Thomas Hain cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Muhammad Umar Farooq,Thomas Hain
title: Investigating the Impact of Cross-lingual Acoustic-Phonetic Similarities on Multilingual Speech Recognition
title_zh: 研究跨语言声学语音相似性对多语言语音识别的影响
abstract: Multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems mostly benefit low resource languages but suffer degradation in performance across several languages relative to their monolingual counterparts. Limited studies have focused on understanding the languages behaviour in the multilingual speech recognition setups. In this paper, a novel data-driven approach is proposed to investigate the cross-lingual acoustic-phonetic similarities. This technique measures the similarities between posterior distributions from various monolingual acoustic models against a target speech signal. Deep neural networks are trained as mapping networks to transform the distributions from different acoustic models into a directly comparable form. The analysis observes that the languages closeness can not be truly estimated by the volume of overlapping phonemes set. Entropy analysis of the proposed mapping networks exhibits that a language with lesser overlap can be more amenable to cross-lingual transfer, and hence more beneficial in the multilingual setup. Finally, the proposed posterior transformation approach is leveraged to fuse monolingual models for a target language. A relative improvement of ~8% over monolingual counterpart is achieved.
summary: Multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems mostly benefit low resource languages but suffer degradation in performance across several languages relative to their monolingual counterparts. Limited studies have focused on understanding the languages behaviour in the multilingual speech recognition setups. In this paper, a novel data-driven approach is proposed to investigate the cross-lingual acoustic-phonetic similarities. This technique measures the similarities between posterior distributions from various monolingual acoustic models against a target speech signal. Deep neural networks are trained as mapping networks to transform the distributions from different acoustic models into a directly comparable form. The analysis observes that the languages closeness can not be truly estimated by the volume of overlapping phonemes set. Entropy analysis of the proposed mapping networks exhibits that a language with lesser overlap can be more amenable to cross-lingual transfer, and hence more beneficial in the multilingual setup. Finally, the proposed posterior transformation approach is leveraged to fuse monolingual models for a target language. A relative improvement of ~8% over monolingual counterpart is achieved.
abstract_zh: 多语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统主要有利于低资源语言，但相对于单语言系统，多种语言的性能会下降。有限的研究集中在理解多语言语音识别设置中的语言行为。在本文中，提出了一种新颖的数据驱动方法来研究跨语言的声学语音相似性。该技术测量各种单语言声学模型的后验分布与目标语音信号之间的相似性。深度神经网络被训练为映射网络，将不同声学模型的分布转换为直接可比较的形式。分析发现，语言的紧密程度并不能通过重叠音素集的数量来真正估计。所提出的映射网络的熵分析表明，重叠较少的语言更适合跨语言迁移，因此在多语言设置中更有利。最后，利用所提出的后验变换方法来融合目标语言的单语言模型。与单语对应物相比，相对提高了约 8%。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究跨语言声学-音位相似性对多语言语音识别的影响，提出一种基于后验分布映射的数据驱动方法。
AI.motivation: 多语言自动语音识别系统在低资源语言上表现较好，但整体性能较单语系统下降，且缺乏对多语言环境下语言行为的系统性研究。
AI.method: 通过比较不同单语声学模型的后验分布，利用深度神经网络将分布映射到可比空间，结合熵分析揭示语言间相似性与跨语言迁移潜力的关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，语言间音位重叠度并非衡量语言接近度的唯一标准，基于后验映射的模型融合方法使目标语言性能相对单语模型提升约8%。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言声学相似性分析为多语言语音识别提供了新视角，低音位重叠语言更易受益于跨语言迁移，后验映射方法有效提升了多语言系统性能。

authors_text: Gabriele Lagani,Claudio Gennaro,Hannes Fassold,Giuseppe Amato
title: FastHebb: Scaling Hebbian Training of Deep Neural Networks to ImageNet Level
title_zh: FastHebb：将深度神经网络的 Hebbian 训练扩展到 ImageNet 级别
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Submitted at SISAP 2022
comments: 14 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Submitted at SISAP 2022
abstract: Learning algorithms for Deep Neural Networks are typically based on supervised end-to-end Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) training with error backpropagation (backprop). Backprop algorithms require a large number of labelled training samples to achieve high performance. However, in many realistic applications, even if there is plenty of image samples, very few of them are labelled, and semi-supervised sample-efficient training strategies have to be used. Hebbian learning represents a possible approach towards sample efficient training; however, in current solutions, it does not scale well to large datasets. In this paper, we present FastHebb, an efficient and scalable solution for Hebbian learning which achieves higher efficiency by 1) merging together update computation and aggregation over a batch of inputs, and 2) leveraging efficient matrix multiplication algorithms on GPU. We validate our approach on different computer vision benchmarks, in a semi-supervised learning scenario. FastHebb outperforms previous solutions by up to 50 times in terms of training speed, and notably, for the first time, we are able to bring Hebbian algorithms to ImageNet scale.
summary: Learning algorithms for Deep Neural Networks are typically based on supervised end-to-end Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) training with error backpropagation (backprop). Backprop algorithms require a large number of labelled training samples to achieve high performance. However, in many realistic applications, even if there is plenty of image samples, very few of them are labelled, and semi-supervised sample-efficient training strategies have to be used. Hebbian learning represents a possible approach towards sample efficient training; however, in current solutions, it does not scale well to large datasets. In this paper, we present FastHebb, an efficient and scalable solution for Hebbian learning which achieves higher efficiency by 1) merging together update computation and aggregation over a batch of inputs, and 2) leveraging efficient matrix multiplication algorithms on GPU. We validate our approach on different computer vision benchmarks, in a semi-supervised learning scenario. FastHebb outperforms previous solutions by up to 50 times in terms of training speed, and notably, for the first time, we are able to bring Hebbian algorithms to ImageNet scale.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的学习算法通常基于具有误差反向传播 (backprop) 的监督式端到端随机梯度下降 (SGD) 训练。反向传播算法需要大量标记的训练样本才能实现高性能。然而，在许多实际应用中，即使有大量的图像样本，但只有很少的图像样本被标记，并且必须使用半监督样本高效的训练策略。赫布学习代表了样本高效训练的一种可能方法；然而，在当前的解决方案中，它不能很好地扩展到大型数据集。在本文中，我们提出了 FastHebb，这是一种高效且可扩展的 Hebbian 学习解决方案，它通过 1）将一批输入的更新计算和聚合合并在一起，以及 2）利用 GPU 上的高效矩阵乘法算法来实现更高的效率。我们在半监督学习场景中在不同的计算机视觉基准上验证了我们的方法。 FastHebb 在训练速度方面优于以前的解决方案高达 50 倍，值得注意的是，我们第一次能够将 Hebbian 算法引入 ImageNet 规模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FastHebb方法，通过优化计算流程和利用GPU加速，实现大规模图像数据集（如ImageNet）上的高效Hebbian学习。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖大量标注数据，而现实场景中标注数据稀缺。Hebbian学习虽具样本效率优势，但现有方法难以扩展到大规模数据集。
AI.method: 通过合并批量输入的更新计算与聚合操作，并采用GPU高效矩阵乘法算法，提升Hebbian学习的计算效率。
AI.result: 在多个视觉基准测试中，FastHebb训练速度较之前方法提升最高50倍，并首次实现Hebbian算法在ImageNet规模数据上的应用。
AI.conclusion: FastHebb为大规模深度神经网络训练提供了高效且可扩展的Hebbian学习方案，降低了对标注数据的依赖。
