conclusion: FastHebb为大规模深度神经网络训练提供了高效且可扩展的Hebbian学习方案，降低了对标注数据的依赖。
search_text: FastHebb: Scaling Hebbian Training of Deep Neural Networks to ImageNet Level FastHebb：将深度神经网络的 Hebbian 训练扩展到 ImageNet 级别 Learning algorithms for Deep Neural Networks are typically based on supervised end-to-end Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) training with error backpropagation (backprop). Backprop algorithms require a large number of labelled training samples to achieve high performance. However, in many realistic applications, even if there is plenty of image samples, very few of them are labelled, and semi-supervised sample-efficient training strategies have to be used. Hebbian learning represents a possible approach towards sample efficient training; however, in current solutions, it does not scale well to large datasets. In this paper, we present FastHebb, an efficient and scalable solution for Hebbian learning which achieves higher efficiency by 1) merging together update computation and aggregation over a batch of inputs, and 2) leveraging efficient matrix multiplication algorithms on GPU. We validate our approach on different computer vision benchmarks, in a semi-supervised learning scenario. FastHebb outperforms previous solutions by up to 50 times in terms of training speed, and notably, for the first time, we are able to bring Hebbian algorithms to ImageNet scale. 深度神经网络的学习算法通常基于具有误差反向传播 (backprop) 的监督式端到端随机梯度下降 (SGD) 训练。反向传播算法需要大量标记的训练样本才能实现高性能。然而，在许多实际应用中，即使有大量的图像样本，但只有很少的图像样本被标记，并且必须使用半监督样本高效的训练策略。赫布学习代表了样本高效训练的一种可能方法；然而，在当前的解决方案中，它不能很好地扩展到大型数据集。在本文中，我们提出了 FastHebb，这是一种高效且可扩展的 Hebbian 学习解决方案，它通过 1）将一批输入的更新计算和聚合合并在一起，以及 2）利用 GPU 上的高效矩阵乘法算法来实现更高的效率。我们在半监督学习场景中在不同的计算机视觉基准上验证了我们的方法。 FastHebb 在训练速度方面优于以前的解决方案高达 50 倍，值得注意的是，我们第一次能够将 Hebbian 算法引入 ImageNet 规模。 本文提出FastHebb方法，通过优化计算流程和利用GPU加速，实现大规模图像数据集（如ImageNet）上的高效Hebbian学习。 Gabriele Lagani,Claudio Gennaro,Hannes Fassold,Giuseppe Amato cs.CV

authors_text: Kinga Skorupska,Radosław Nielek,Wiesław Kopeć
title: AFFORCE: Actionable Framework for Designing Crowdsourcing Experiences for Older Adults
title_zh: AFFORCE：为老年人设计众包体验的可行框架
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, presented at the WI-IAT 2021 Conference
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, presented at the WI-IAT 2021 Conference
abstract: In this article we propose a unique framework for designing attractive and engaging crowdsourcing systems for older adults, which is called AFFORCE (Actionable Framework For Crowdsourcing Experiences). We first categorize and map mitigating factors and barriers to crowdsourcing for older adults to finally discuss, present and combine system elements addressing them into an actionable reference framework. This innovative framework is based on our experience with the design of crowdsourcing systems for older adults in exploratory cases and studies, related work, as well as our and related research at the intersection of older adults' use of ICT, crowdsourcing and citizen science.
summary: In this article we propose a unique framework for designing attractive and engaging crowdsourcing systems for older adults, which is called AFFORCE (Actionable Framework For Crowdsourcing Experiences). We first categorize and map mitigating factors and barriers to crowdsourcing for older adults to finally discuss, present and combine system elements addressing them into an actionable reference framework. This innovative framework is based on our experience with the design of crowdsourcing systems for older adults in exploratory cases and studies, related work, as well as our and related research at the intersection of older adults' use of ICT, crowdsourcing and citizen science.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个独特的框架，用于为老年人设计有吸引力且有吸引力的众包系统，该框架称为 AFFORCE（众包体验的可行框架）。我们首先对老年人众包的缓解因素和障碍进行分类和映射，最后讨论、呈现并将解决这些问题的系统元素组合成一个可操作的参考框架。这一创新框架基于我们在探索性案例和研究、相关工作中为老年人设计众包系统的经验，以及我们在老年人使用信息通信技术、众包和公民科学交叉点方面的相关研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出名为AFFORCE的框架，用于设计适合老年人参与的吸引人且具互动性的众包系统。
AI.motivation: 现有众包系统未充分考虑老年人在技术使用中的障碍，需针对性设计提升其参与度的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分类映射老年人参与众包的障碍因素，结合系统设计元素与实证案例、相关研究构建可操作框架。
AI.result: 提出AFFORCE框架，为设计适老化众包系统提供系统化参考，有效应对老年人使用ICT的挑战。
AI.conclusion: AFFORCE框架为提升老年人在众包与公民科学领域的参与度提供了可行的设计指南与理论支持。

authors_text: Jumon Nozaki,Tatsuya Kawahara,Kenkichi Ishizuka,Taiichi Hashimoto
title: End-to-end Speech-to-Punctuated-Text Recognition
title_zh: 端到端语音到标点文本识别
abstract: Conventional automatic speech recognition systems do not produce punctuation marks which are important for the readability of the speech recognition results. They are also needed for subsequent natural language processing tasks such as machine translation. There have been a lot of works on punctuation prediction models that insert punctuation marks into speech recognition results as post-processing. However, these studies do not utilize acoustic information for punctuation prediction and are directly affected by speech recognition errors. In this study, we propose an end-to-end model that takes speech as input and outputs punctuated texts. This model is expected to predict punctuation robustly against speech recognition errors while using acoustic information. We also propose to incorporate an auxiliary loss to train the model using the output of the intermediate layer and unpunctuated texts. Through experiments, we compare the performance of the proposed model to that of a cascaded system. The proposed model achieves higher punctuation prediction accuracy than the cascaded system without sacrificing the speech recognition error rate. It is also demonstrated that the multi-task learning using the intermediate output against the unpunctuated text is effective. Moreover, the proposed model has only about 1/7th of the parameters compared to the cascaded system.
summary: Conventional automatic speech recognition systems do not produce punctuation marks which are important for the readability of the speech recognition results. They are also needed for subsequent natural language processing tasks such as machine translation. There have been a lot of works on punctuation prediction models that insert punctuation marks into speech recognition results as post-processing. However, these studies do not utilize acoustic information for punctuation prediction and are directly affected by speech recognition errors. In this study, we propose an end-to-end model that takes speech as input and outputs punctuated texts. This model is expected to predict punctuation robustly against speech recognition errors while using acoustic information. We also propose to incorporate an auxiliary loss to train the model using the output of the intermediate layer and unpunctuated texts. Through experiments, we compare the performance of the proposed model to that of a cascaded system. The proposed model achieves higher punctuation prediction accuracy than the cascaded system without sacrificing the speech recognition error rate. It is also demonstrated that the multi-task learning using the intermediate output against the unpunctuated text is effective. Moreover, the proposed model has only about 1/7th of the parameters compared to the cascaded system.
abstract_zh: 传统的自动语音识别系统不会产生对于语音识别结果的可读性很重要的标点符号。后续的自然语言处理任务（例如机器翻译）也需要它们。关于标点符号预测模型已经有很多工作，这些模型将标点符号插入到语音识别结果中作为后处理。然而，这些研究没有利用声学信息进行标点符号预测，并且直接受到语音识别错误的影响。在本研究中，我们提出了一种端到端模型，以语音作为输入并输出标点文本。该模型有望在使用声学信息时针对语音识别错误稳健地预测标点符号。我们还建议结合辅助损失来使用中间层的输出和不加标点的文本来训练模型。通过实验，我们将所提出的模型的性能与级联系统的性能进行了比较。所提出的模型在不牺牲语音识别错误率的情况下实现了比级联系统更高的标点符号预测精度。它还证明了使用中间输出针对无标点文本的多任务学习是有效的。此外，与级联系统相比，所提出的模型只有约 1/7 的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的语音到带标点文本识别模型，旨在直接生成带标点的文本以提高可读性和后续自然语言处理任务的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统语音识别系统不生成标点符号，导致输出文本可读性差且影响下游任务（如机器翻译）。现有后处理模型未利用声学信息，易受语音识别错误影响。
AI.method: 设计端到端模型直接以语音为输入输出带标点文本，并引入中间层输出与未标点文本的辅助损失函数进行多任务训练。
AI.result: 相较级联系统，所提模型在标点预测准确率更高且未牺牲语音识别错误率，参数量仅为级联系统的1/7。多任务学习策略有效性得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 端到端模型结合声学信息与辅助损失函数能有效提升标点预测鲁棒性，且具有更优的参数效率。

authors_text: Daniel Niederlöhner,Michael Ulrich,Sascha Braun,Daniel Köhler,Florian Faion,Claudius Gläser,André Treptow,Holger Blume
title: Self-Supervised Velocity Estimation for Automotive Radar Object Detection Networks
title_zh: 汽车雷达目标检测网络的自监督速度估计
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2022 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) (IV 2022), June 5-9, 2022, in Aachen, Germany
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2022 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) (IV 2022), June 5-9, 2022, in Aachen, Germany
abstract: This paper presents a method to learn the Cartesian velocity of objects using an object detection network on automotive radar data. The proposed method is self-supervised in terms of generating its own training signal for the velocities. Labels are only required for single-frame, oriented bounding boxes (OBBs). Labels for the Cartesian velocities or contiguous sequences, which are expensive to obtain, are not required. The general idea is to pre-train an object detection network without velocities using single-frame OBB labels, and then exploit the network's OBB predictions on unlabelled data for velocity training. In detail, the network's OBB predictions of the unlabelled frames are updated to the timestamp of a labelled frame using the predicted velocities and the distances between the updated OBBs of the unlabelled frame and the OBB predictions of the labelled frame are used to generate a self-supervised training signal for the velocities. The detection network architecture is extended by a module to account for the temporal relation of multiple scans and a module to represent the radars' radial velocity measurements explicitly. A two-step approach of first training only OBB detection, followed by training OBB detection and velocities is used. Further, a pre-training with pseudo-labels generated from radar radial velocity measurements bootstraps the self-supervised method of this paper. Experiments on the publicly available nuScenes dataset show that the proposed method almost reaches the velocity estimation performance of a fully supervised training, but does not require expensive velocity labels. Furthermore, we outperform a baseline method which uses only radial velocity measurements as labels.
summary: This paper presents a method to learn the Cartesian velocity of objects using an object detection network on automotive radar data. The proposed method is self-supervised in terms of generating its own training signal for the velocities. Labels are only required for single-frame, oriented bounding boxes (OBBs). Labels for the Cartesian velocities or contiguous sequences, which are expensive to obtain, are not required. The general idea is to pre-train an object detection network without velocities using single-frame OBB labels, and then exploit the network's OBB predictions on unlabelled data for velocity training. In detail, the network's OBB predictions of the unlabelled frames are updated to the timestamp of a labelled frame using the predicted velocities and the distances between the updated OBBs of the unlabelled frame and the OBB predictions of the labelled frame are used to generate a self-supervised training signal for the velocities. The detection network architecture is extended by a module to account for the temporal relation of multiple scans and a module to represent the radars' radial velocity measurements explicitly. A two-step approach of first training only OBB detection, followed by training OBB detection and velocities is used. Further, a pre-training with pseudo-labels generated from radar radial velocity measurements bootstraps the self-supervised method of this paper. Experiments on the publicly available nuScenes dataset show that the proposed method almost reaches the velocity estimation performance of a fully supervised training, but does not require expensive velocity labels. Furthermore, we outperform a baseline method which uses only radial velocity measurements as labels.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用汽车雷达数据上的对象检测网络来学习对象的笛卡尔速度的方法。所提出的方法在生成自己的速度训练信号方面是自我监督的。仅单帧定向边界框 (OBB) 需要标签。不需要笛卡尔速度或连续序列的标签，这些标签的获取成本很高。总体思路是使用单帧 OBB 标签预训练没有速度的对象检测网络，然后利用网络对未标记数据的 OBB 预测进行速度训练。具体来说，使用预测速度将网络的未标记帧的 OBB 预测更新为标记帧的时间戳，并且使用未标记帧的更新 OBB 与标记帧的 OBB 预测之间的距离来生成速度的自监督训练信号。检测网络架构通过一个模块进行扩展，以解释多次扫描的时间关系，并通过一个模块来明确表示雷达的径向速度测量。使用两步方法，首先仅训练 OBB 检测，然后训练 OBB 检测和速度。此外，利用雷达径向速度测量生成的伪标签进行预训练引导了本文的自监督方法。在公开的 nuScenes 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法几乎达到了完全监督训练的速度估计性能，但不需要昂贵的速度标签。此外，我们优于仅使用径向速度测量作为标签的基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需昂贵速度标签的自监督方法，通过雷达数据学习物体的笛卡尔速度，用于汽车雷达目标检测网络。
AI.motivation: 传统雷达目标检测需依赖昂贵的速度标签，而本文旨在通过自监督学习减少对速度标签的依赖，仅利用单帧有向边界框标签实现速度估计。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练：首先用单帧有向边界框标签预训练检测网络，随后利用未标记数据的预测边界框与标记帧的时空关系生成伪标签，结合雷达径向速度模块进行自监督速度训练。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，该方法速度估计性能接近全监督方法，且优于仅使用径向速度作为标签的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过自监督学习有效解决了速度标签获取成本高的问题，在无需速度标签的情况下实现了高精度速度估计，提升了雷达目标检测的实用性。

search_text: Self-Supervised Velocity Estimation for Automotive Radar Object Detection Networks 汽车雷达目标检测网络的自监督速度估计 This paper presents a method to learn the Cartesian velocity of objects using an object detection network on automotive radar data. The proposed method is self-supervised in terms of generating its own training signal for the velocities. Labels are only required for single-frame, oriented bounding boxes (OBBs). Labels for the Cartesian velocities or contiguous sequences, which are expensive to obtain, are not required. The general idea is to pre-train an object detection network without velocities using single-frame OBB labels, and then exploit the network's OBB predictions on unlabelled data for velocity training. In detail, the network's OBB predictions of the unlabelled frames are updated to the timestamp of a labelled frame using the predicted velocities and the distances between the updated OBBs of the unlabelled frame and the OBB predictions of the labelled frame are used to generate a self-supervised training signal for the velocities. The detection network architecture is extended by a module to account for the temporal relation of multiple scans and a module to represent the radars' radial velocity measurements explicitly. A two-step approach of first training only OBB detection, followed by training OBB detection and velocities is used. Further, a pre-training with pseudo-labels generated from radar radial velocity measurements bootstraps the self-supervised method of this paper. Experiments on the publicly available nuScenes dataset show that the proposed method almost reaches the velocity estimation performance of a fully supervised training, but does not require expensive velocity labels. Furthermore, we outperform a baseline method which uses only radial velocity measurements as labels. 本文提出了一种使用汽车雷达数据上的对象检测网络来学习对象的笛卡尔速度的方法。所提出的方法在生成自己的速度训练信号方面是自我监督的。仅单帧定向边界框 (OBB) 需要标签。不需要笛卡尔速度或连续序列的标签，这些标签的获取成本很高。总体思路是使用单帧 OBB 标签预训练没有速度的对象检测网络，然后利用网络对未标记数据的 OBB 预测进行速度训练。具体来说，使用预测速度将网络的未标记帧的 OBB 预测更新为标记帧的时间戳，并且使用未标记帧的更新 OBB 与标记帧的 OBB 预测之间的距离来生成速度的自监督训练信号。检测网络架构通过一个模块进行扩展，以解释多次扫描的时间关系，并通过一个模块来明确表示雷达的径向速度测量。使用两步方法，首先仅训练 OBB 检测，然后训练 OBB 检测和速度。此外，利用雷达径向速度测量生成的伪标签进行预训练引导了本文的自监督方法。在公开的 nuScenes 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法几乎达到了完全监督训练的速度估计性能，但不需要昂贵的速度标签。此外，我们优于仅使用径向速度测量作为标签的基线方法。 本文提出一种无需昂贵速度标签的自监督方法，通过雷达数据学习物体的笛卡尔速度，用于汽车雷达目标检测网络。 Daniel Niederlöhner,Michael Ulrich,Sascha Braun,Daniel Köhler,Florian Faion,Claudius Gläser,André Treptow,Holger Blume cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Kosuke Nishida,Kyosuke Nishida,Shuichi Nishioka
title: Improving Few-Shot Image Classification Using Machine- and User-Generated Natural Language Descriptions
title_zh: 使用机器和用户生成的自然语言描述改进少镜头图像分类
abstract: Humans can obtain the knowledge of novel visual concepts from language descriptions, and we thus use the few-shot image classification task to investigate whether a machine learning model can have this capability. Our proposed model, LIDE (Learning from Image and DEscription), has a text decoder to generate the descriptions and a text encoder to obtain the text representations of machine- or user-generated descriptions. We confirmed that LIDE with machine-generated descriptions outperformed baseline models. Moreover, the performance was improved further with high-quality user-generated descriptions. The generated descriptions can be viewed as the explanations of the model's predictions, and we observed that such explanations were consistent with prediction results. We also investigated why the language description improved the few-shot image classification performance by comparing the image representations and the text representations in the feature spaces.
summary: Humans can obtain the knowledge of novel visual concepts from language descriptions, and we thus use the few-shot image classification task to investigate whether a machine learning model can have this capability. Our proposed model, LIDE (Learning from Image and DEscription), has a text decoder to generate the descriptions and a text encoder to obtain the text representations of machine- or user-generated descriptions. We confirmed that LIDE with machine-generated descriptions outperformed baseline models. Moreover, the performance was improved further with high-quality user-generated descriptions. The generated descriptions can be viewed as the explanations of the model's predictions, and we observed that such explanations were consistent with prediction results. We also investigated why the language description improved the few-shot image classification performance by comparing the image representations and the text representations in the feature spaces.
abstract_zh: 人类可以从语言描述中获得新的视觉概念的知识，因此我们使用少样本图像分类任务来研究机器学习模型是否具有这种能力。我们提出的模型 LIDE（从图像和描述中学习）具有一个用于生成描述的文本解码器和一个用于获取机器或用户生成的描述的文本表示的文本编码器。我们确认，具有机器生成描述的 LIDE 优于基线模型。此外，通过高质量的用户生成的描述，性能进一步提高。生成的描述可以被视为对模型预测的解释，我们观察到这种解释与预测结果一致。我们还通过比较特征空间中的图像表示和文本表示，研究了为什么语言描述提高了少样本图像分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合图像和自然语言描述的模型LIDE，用于改进少样本图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过语言描述学习新视觉概念，但机器学习模型是否具备此能力尚不明确，因此研究如何利用语言描述提升少样本分类性能。
AI.method: 设计LIDE模型，包含文本解码器生成描述和文本编码器提取描述表征，通过对比图像与文本在特征空间中的表示分析语言描述对分类的提升机制。
AI.result: LIDE在机器生成描述下优于基线模型，高质量用户生成描述进一步提升性能，且生成的描述与预测结果一致，可作为模型解释。
AI.conclusion: 语言描述（尤其是高质量用户生成描述）能有效增强少样本图像分类，模型通过融合多模态表征实现更准确的视觉概念学习。

authors_text: Wentao Tan,Changxing Ding,Pengfei Wang,Mingming Gong,Kui Jia
title: Style Interleaved Learning for Generalizable Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于泛化人员重新识别的风格交错学习
comment: accepted version to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
comments: accepted version to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) for person re-identification (ReID) is a challenging problem, as access to target domain data is not permitted during the training process. Most existing DG ReID methods update the feature extractor and classifier parameters based on the same features. This common practice causes the model to overfit to existing feature styles in the source domain, resulting in sub-optimal generalization ability on target domains. To solve this problem, we propose a novel style interleaved learning (IL) framework. Unlike conventional learning strategies, IL incorporates two forward propagations and one backward propagation for each iteration. We employ the features of interleaved styles to update the feature extractor and classifiers using different forward propagations, which helps to prevent the model from overfitting to certain domain styles. To generate interleaved feature styles, we further propose a new feature stylization approach. It produces a wide range of meaningful styles that are both different and independent from the original styles in the source domain, which caters to the IL methodology. Extensive experimental results show that our model not only consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on large-scale benchmarks for DG ReID, but also has clear advantages in computational efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/WentaoTan/Interleaved-Learning.
summary: Domain generalization (DG) for person re-identification (ReID) is a challenging problem, as access to target domain data is not permitted during the training process. Most existing DG ReID methods update the feature extractor and classifier parameters based on the same features. This common practice causes the model to overfit to existing feature styles in the source domain, resulting in sub-optimal generalization ability on target domains. To solve this problem, we propose a novel style interleaved learning (IL) framework. Unlike conventional learning strategies, IL incorporates two forward propagations and one backward propagation for each iteration. We employ the features of interleaved styles to update the feature extractor and classifiers using different forward propagations, which helps to prevent the model from overfitting to certain domain styles. To generate interleaved feature styles, we further propose a new feature stylization approach. It produces a wide range of meaningful styles that are both different and independent from the original styles in the source domain, which caters to the IL methodology. Extensive experimental results show that our model not only consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on large-scale benchmarks for DG ReID, but also has clear advantages in computational efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/WentaoTan/Interleaved-Learning.
abstract_zh: 用于人员重新识别 (ReID) 的域泛化 (DG) 是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为在训练过程中不允许访问目标域数据。大多数现有的 DG ReID 方法基于相同的特征更新特征提取器和分类器参数。这种常见做法会导致模型过度拟合源域中的现有特征样式，从而导致目标域的泛化能力不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的交错学习（IL）框架。与传统的学习策略不同，IL 在每次迭代中包含两次前向传播和一次反向传播。我们利用交错样式的特征来使用不同的前向传播来更新特征提取器和分类器，这有助于防止模型过度拟合某些领域样式。为了生成交错的特征样式，我们进一步提出了一种新的特征风格化方法。它产生各种有意义的样式，这些样式既不同于源域中的原始样式又独立于源域中的原始样式，这迎合了 IL 方法。大量的实验结果表明，我们的模型不仅在 DG ReID 的大规模基准上始终优于最先进的方法，而且在计算效率方面也具有明显的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/WentaoTan/Interleaved-Learning 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种风格交织学习框架，用于提升跨域行人重识别（ReID）模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有跨域ReID方法因过度依赖源域特征风格导致目标域泛化性能不足，需设计新型学习策略避免过拟合。
AI.method: 提出风格交织学习（IL）框架，采用两次前向传播与一次反向传播的迭代机制，并结合新型特征风格化方法生成独立于源域的多样化特征风格。
AI.result: 在大规模基准测试中持续优于现有方法，且计算效率显著提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过交织风格特征更新与独立风格生成，有效提升了跨域ReID模型的泛化能力与计算效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种风格交织学习框架，用于提升跨域行人重识别（ReID）模型的泛化能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有跨域ReID方法因过度依赖源域特征风格导致目标域泛化性能不足，需设计新型学习策略避免过拟合。
ai_content.method: 提出风格交织学习（IL）框架，采用两次前向传播与一次反向传播的迭代机制，并结合新型特征风格化方法生成独立于源域的多样化特征风格。
ai_content.result: 在大规模基准测试中持续优于现有方法，且计算效率显著提升，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过交织风格特征更新与独立风格生成，有效提升了跨域ReID模型的泛化能力与计算效率。

search_text: Style Interleaved Learning for Generalizable Person Re-identification 用于泛化人员重新识别的风格交错学习 Domain generalization (DG) for person re-identification (ReID) is a challenging problem, as access to target domain data is not permitted during the training process. Most existing DG ReID methods update the feature extractor and classifier parameters based on the same features. This common practice causes the model to overfit to existing feature styles in the source domain, resulting in sub-optimal generalization ability on target domains. To solve this problem, we propose a novel style interleaved learning (IL) framework. Unlike conventional learning strategies, IL incorporates two forward propagations and one backward propagation for each iteration. We employ the features of interleaved styles to update the feature extractor and classifiers using different forward propagations, which helps to prevent the model from overfitting to certain domain styles. To generate interleaved feature styles, we further propose a new feature stylization approach. It produces a wide range of meaningful styles that are both different and independent from the original styles in the source domain, which caters to the IL methodology. Extensive experimental results show that our model not only consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on large-scale benchmarks for DG ReID, but also has clear advantages in computational efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/WentaoTan/Interleaved-Learning. 用于人员重新识别 (ReID) 的域泛化 (DG) 是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为在训练过程中不允许访问目标域数据。大多数现有的 DG ReID 方法基于相同的特征更新特征提取器和分类器参数。这种常见做法会导致模型过度拟合源域中的现有特征样式，从而导致目标域的泛化能力不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的交错学习（IL）框架。与传统的学习策略不同，IL 在每次迭代中包含两次前向传播和一次反向传播。我们利用交错样式的特征来使用不同的前向传播来更新特征提取器和分类器，这有助于防止模型过度拟合某些领域样式。为了生成交错的特征样式，我们进一步提出了一种新的特征风格化方法。它产生各种有意义的样式，这些样式既不同于源域中的原始样式又独立于源域中的原始样式，这迎合了 IL 方法。大量的实验结果表明，我们的模型不仅在 DG ReID 的大规模基准上始终优于最先进的方法，而且在计算效率方面也具有明显的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/WentaoTan/Interleaved-Learning 获取。 本文提出一种风格交织学习框架，用于提升跨域行人重识别（ReID）模型的泛化能力。 Wentao Tan,Changxing Ding,Pengfei Wang,Mingming Gong,Kui Jia cs.CV

authors_text: Qijian Zhang,Junhui Hou,Yue Qian
title: PointMCD: Boosting Deep Point Cloud Encoders via Multi-view Cross-modal Distillation for 3D Shape Recognition
title_zh: PointMCD：通过多视图跨模态蒸馏增强深度点云编码器以进行 3D 形状识别
abstract: As two fundamental representation modalities of 3D objects, 3D point clouds and multi-view 2D images record shape information from different domains of geometric structures and visual appearances. In the current deep learning era, remarkable progress in processing such two data modalities has been achieved through respectively customizing compatible 3D and 2D network architectures. However, unlike multi-view image-based 2D visual modeling paradigms, which have shown leading performance in several common 3D shape recognition benchmarks, point cloud-based 3D geometric modeling paradigms are still highly limited by insufficient learning capacity, due to the difficulty of extracting discriminative features from irregular geometric signals. In this paper, we explore the possibility of boosting deep 3D point cloud encoders by transferring visual knowledge extracted from deep 2D image encoders under a standard teacher-student distillation workflow. Generally, we propose PointMCD, a unified multi-view cross-modal distillation architecture, including a pretrained deep image encoder as the teacher and a deep point encoder as the student. To perform heterogeneous feature alignment between 2D visual and 3D geometric domains, we further investigate visibility-aware feature projection (VAFP), by which point-wise embeddings are reasonably aggregated into view-specific geometric descriptors. By pair-wisely aligning multi-view visual and geometric descriptors, we can obtain more powerful deep point encoders without exhausting and complicated network modification. Experiments on 3D shape classification, part segmentation, and unsupervised learning strongly validate the effectiveness of our method. The code and data will be publicly available at https://github.com/keeganhk/PointMCD.
summary: As two fundamental representation modalities of 3D objects, 3D point clouds and multi-view 2D images record shape information from different domains of geometric structures and visual appearances. In the current deep learning era, remarkable progress in processing such two data modalities has been achieved through respectively customizing compatible 3D and 2D network architectures. However, unlike multi-view image-based 2D visual modeling paradigms, which have shown leading performance in several common 3D shape recognition benchmarks, point cloud-based 3D geometric modeling paradigms are still highly limited by insufficient learning capacity, due to the difficulty of extracting discriminative features from irregular geometric signals. In this paper, we explore the possibility of boosting deep 3D point cloud encoders by transferring visual knowledge extracted from deep 2D image encoders under a standard teacher-student distillation workflow. Generally, we propose PointMCD, a unified multi-view cross-modal distillation architecture, including a pretrained deep image encoder as the teacher and a deep point encoder as the student. To perform heterogeneous feature alignment between 2D visual and 3D geometric domains, we further investigate visibility-aware feature projection (VAFP), by which point-wise embeddings are reasonably aggregated into view-specific geometric descriptors. By pair-wisely aligning multi-view visual and geometric descriptors, we can obtain more powerful deep point encoders without exhausting and complicated network modification. Experiments on 3D shape classification, part segmentation, and unsupervised learning strongly validate the effectiveness of our method. The code and data will be publicly available at https://github.com/keeganhk/PointMCD.
abstract_zh: 作为 3D 对象的两种基本表示方式，3D 点云和多视图 2D 图像记录了来自不同几何结构和视觉外观领域的形状信息。在当前的深度学习时代，通过分别定制兼容的3D和2D网络架构，在处理这两种数据模态方面取得了显着进展。然而，与基于多视图图像的 2D 视觉建模范式在几个常见的 3D 形状识别基准中表现出领先的性能不同，基于点云的 3D 几何建模范式仍然受到学习能力不足的严重限制，因为从不规则的几何信号中提取判别特征很困难。在本文中，我们探索了通过在标准师生蒸馏工作流程下传输从深度 2D 图像编码器提取的视觉知识来增强深度 3D 点云编码器的可能性。一般来说，我们提出了PointMCD，一种统一的多视图跨模态蒸馏架构，包括作为教师的预训练深度图像编码器和作为学生的深度点编码器。为了在 2D 视觉域和 3D 几何域之间执行异构特征对齐，我们进一步研究了可见性感知特征投影（VAFP），通过该投影将逐点嵌入合理地聚合到特定于视图的几何描述符中。通过成对对齐多视图视觉和几何描述符，我们可以获得更强大的深度点编码器，而无需进行详尽且复杂的网络修改。 3D 形状分类、零件分割和无监督学习的实验有力地验证了我们方法的有效性。代码和数据将在 https://github.com/keeganhk/PointMCD 公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointMCD方法，通过多视角跨模态蒸馏提升点云编码器性能，用于三维形状识别。
AI.motivation: 基于点云的三维几何建模因难以提取判别性特征而学习能力不足，而多视角图像方法在基准测试中表现更优，需通过知识迁移提升点云编码器。
AI.method: 设计PointMCD架构，以预训练二维图像编码器为教师模型，点云编码器为学生模型，并引入可见性感知特征投影（VAFP）实现跨模态特征对齐。
AI.result: 在三维形状分类、部件分割及无监督学习任务中验证了方法有效性，代码与数据已公开。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态蒸馏可显著增强点云编码器表征能力，无需复杂网络修改即可实现性能提升。

authors_text: I Made Aswin Nahrendra,Christian Tirtawardhana,Byeongho Yu,Eungchang Mason Lee,Hyun Myung
title: Retro-RL: Reinforcing Nominal Controller With Deep Reinforcement Learning for Tilting-Rotor Drones
title_zh: Retro-RL：通过深度强化学习强化倾转旋翼无人机的标称控制器
abstract: Studies that broaden drone applications into complex tasks require a stable control framework. Recently, deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have been exploited in many studies for robot control to accomplish complex tasks. Unfortunately, deep RL algorithms might not be suitable for being deployed directly into a real-world robot platform due to the difficulty in interpreting the learned policy and lack of stability guarantee, especially for a complex task such as a wall-climbing drone. This paper proposes a novel hybrid architecture that reinforces a nominal controller with a robust policy learned using a model-free deep RL algorithm. The proposed architecture employs an uncertainty-aware control mixer to preserve guaranteed stability of a nominal controller while using the extended robust performance of the learned policy. The policy is trained in a simulated environment with thousands of domain randomizations to achieve robust performance over diverse uncertainties. The performance of the proposed method was verified through real-world experiments and then compared with a conventional controller and the state-of-the-art learning-based controller trained with a vanilla deep RL algorithm.
summary: Studies that broaden drone applications into complex tasks require a stable control framework. Recently, deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have been exploited in many studies for robot control to accomplish complex tasks. Unfortunately, deep RL algorithms might not be suitable for being deployed directly into a real-world robot platform due to the difficulty in interpreting the learned policy and lack of stability guarantee, especially for a complex task such as a wall-climbing drone. This paper proposes a novel hybrid architecture that reinforces a nominal controller with a robust policy learned using a model-free deep RL algorithm. The proposed architecture employs an uncertainty-aware control mixer to preserve guaranteed stability of a nominal controller while using the extended robust performance of the learned policy. The policy is trained in a simulated environment with thousands of domain randomizations to achieve robust performance over diverse uncertainties. The performance of the proposed method was verified through real-world experiments and then compared with a conventional controller and the state-of-the-art learning-based controller trained with a vanilla deep RL algorithm.
abstract_zh: 将无人机应用扩展到复杂任务的研究需要稳定的控制框架。最近，深度强化学习（RL）算法已被用于机器人控制的许多研究中，以完成复杂的任务。不幸的是，由于难以解释学习策略并且缺乏稳定性保证，深度强化学习算法可能不适合直接部署到现实世界的机器人平台中，特别是对于爬墙无人机等复杂任务。本文提出了一种新颖的混合架构，该架构通过使用无模型深度强化学习算法学习的稳健策略来增强名义控制器。所提出的架构采用不确定性感知控制混合器来保证标称控制器的稳定性，同时使用学习策略的扩展鲁棒性能。该策略在具有数千个域随机化的模拟环境中进行训练，以在不同的不确定性下实现稳健的性能。该方法的性能通过现实世界的实验进行了验证，然后与传统控制器和使用普通深度强化学习算法训练的最先进的基于学习的控制器进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合架构，通过深度强化学习增强倾斜旋翼无人机的名义控制器，以提升复杂任务下的稳定性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习算法因策略可解释性差和稳定性不足，难以直接应用于复杂任务如壁面攀爬无人机的控制，需结合传统控制器保证安全。
AI.method: 设计包含不确定性感知控制混合器的混合架构，使用无模型深度RL训练鲁棒策略，并通过数千次领域随机化模拟训练提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 真实实验验证了该方法在复杂环境中的稳定性与性能优势，优于传统控制器及基于 vanilla RL 的最新学习型控制器。
AI.conclusion: 融合传统控制器与深度RL策略的混合架构，可有效平衡稳定性与性能，为复杂无人机控制提供新思路。

motivation: 现有深度强化学习算法因策略可解释性差和稳定性不足，难以直接应用于复杂任务如壁面攀爬无人机的控制，需结合传统控制器保证安全。

search_text: Retro-RL: Reinforcing Nominal Controller With Deep Reinforcement Learning for Tilting-Rotor Drones Retro-RL：通过深度强化学习强化倾转旋翼无人机的标称控制器 Studies that broaden drone applications into complex tasks require a stable control framework. Recently, deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have been exploited in many studies for robot control to accomplish complex tasks. Unfortunately, deep RL algorithms might not be suitable for being deployed directly into a real-world robot platform due to the difficulty in interpreting the learned policy and lack of stability guarantee, especially for a complex task such as a wall-climbing drone. This paper proposes a novel hybrid architecture that reinforces a nominal controller with a robust policy learned using a model-free deep RL algorithm. The proposed architecture employs an uncertainty-aware control mixer to preserve guaranteed stability of a nominal controller while using the extended robust performance of the learned policy. The policy is trained in a simulated environment with thousands of domain randomizations to achieve robust performance over diverse uncertainties. The performance of the proposed method was verified through real-world experiments and then compared with a conventional controller and the state-of-the-art learning-based controller trained with a vanilla deep RL algorithm. 将无人机应用扩展到复杂任务的研究需要稳定的控制框架。最近，深度强化学习（RL）算法已被用于机器人控制的许多研究中，以完成复杂的任务。不幸的是，由于难以解释学习策略并且缺乏稳定性保证，深度强化学习算法可能不适合直接部署到现实世界的机器人平台中，特别是对于爬墙无人机等复杂任务。本文提出了一种新颖的混合架构，该架构通过使用无模型深度强化学习算法学习的稳健策略来增强名义控制器。所提出的架构采用不确定性感知控制混合器来保证标称控制器的稳定性，同时使用学习策略的扩展鲁棒性能。该策略在具有数千个域随机化的模拟环境中进行训练，以在不同的不确定性下实现稳健的性能。该方法的性能通过现实世界的实验进行了验证，然后与传统控制器和使用普通深度强化学习算法训练的最先进的基于学习的控制器进行了比较。 本文提出一种混合架构，通过深度强化学习增强倾斜旋翼无人机的名义控制器，以提升复杂任务下的稳定性和鲁棒性。 I Made Aswin Nahrendra,Christian Tirtawardhana,Byeongho Yu,Eungchang Mason Lee,Hyun Myung cs.RO

authors_text: Zhifeng Wang,Wenxing Yan,Chunyan Zeng,Shi Dong
title: UIILD: A Unified Interpretable Intelligent Learning Diagnosis Framework for Intelligent Tutoring Systems
title_zh: UIILD：用于智能辅导系统的统一可解释的智能学习诊断框架
abstract: Intelligent learning diagnosis is a critical engine of intelligent tutoring systems, which aims to estimate learners' current knowledge mastery status and predict their future learning performance. The significant challenge with traditional learning diagnosis methods is the inability to balance diagnostic accuracy and interpretability. Although the existing psychometric-based learning diagnosis methods provide some domain interpretation through cognitive parameters, they have insufficient modeling capability with a shallow structure for large-scale learning data. While the deep learning-based learning diagnosis methods have improved the accuracy of learning performance prediction, their inherent black-box properties lead to a lack of interpretability, making their results untrustworthy for educational applications. To settle the above problem, the proposed unified interpretable intelligent learning diagnosis (UIILD) framework, which benefits from the powerful representation learning ability of deep learning and the interpretability of psychometrics, achieves a better performance of learning prediction and provides interpretability from three aspects: cognitive parameters, learner-resource response network, and weights of self-attention mechanism. Within the proposed framework, this paper presents a two-channel learning diagnosis mechanism LDM-ID as well as a three-channel learning diagnosis mechanism LDM-HMI. Experiments on two real-world datasets and a simulation dataset show that our method has higher accuracy in predicting learners' performances compared with the state-of-the-art models, and can provide valuable educational interpretability for applications such as precise learning resource recommendation and personalized learning tutoring in intelligent tutoring systems.
summary: Intelligent learning diagnosis is a critical engine of intelligent tutoring systems, which aims to estimate learners' current knowledge mastery status and predict their future learning performance. The significant challenge with traditional learning diagnosis methods is the inability to balance diagnostic accuracy and interpretability. Although the existing psychometric-based learning diagnosis methods provide some domain interpretation through cognitive parameters, they have insufficient modeling capability with a shallow structure for large-scale learning data. While the deep learning-based learning diagnosis methods have improved the accuracy of learning performance prediction, their inherent black-box properties lead to a lack of interpretability, making their results untrustworthy for educational applications. To settle the above problem, the proposed unified interpretable intelligent learning diagnosis (UIILD) framework, which benefits from the powerful representation learning ability of deep learning and the interpretability of psychometrics, achieves a better performance of learning prediction and provides interpretability from three aspects: cognitive parameters, learner-resource response network, and weights of self-attention mechanism. Within the proposed framework, this paper presents a two-channel learning diagnosis mechanism LDM-ID as well as a three-channel learning diagnosis mechanism LDM-HMI. Experiments on two real-world datasets and a simulation dataset show that our method has higher accuracy in predicting learners' performances compared with the state-of-the-art models, and can provide valuable educational interpretability for applications such as precise learning resource recommendation and personalized learning tutoring in intelligent tutoring systems.
abstract_zh: 智能学习诊断是智能辅导系统的关键引擎，旨在评估学习者当前的知识掌握状况并预测其未来的学习表现。传统学习诊断方法的重大挑战是无法平衡诊断准确性和可解释性。尽管现有的基于心理测量的学习诊断方法通过认知参数提供了一些领域解释，但它们对于大规模学习数据的建模能力不足，结构浅层。虽然基于深度学习的学习诊断方法提高了学习成绩预测的准确性，但其固有的黑盒特性导致缺乏可解释性，使得其结果对于教育应用而言不可信。为了解决上述问题，提出的统一可解释智能学习诊断（UIILD）框架受益于深度学习强大的表示学习能力和心理测量学的可解释性，实现了更好的学习预测性能，并从认知参数、学习者资源响应网络和自注意力机制权重三个方面提供了可解释性。在所提出的框架内，本文提出了两通道学习诊断机制LDM-ID和三通道学习诊断机制LDM-HMI。在两个真实数据集和一个模拟数据集上的实验表明，与最先进的模型相比，我们的方法在预测学习者表现方面具有更高的准确性，并且可以为智能辅导系统中的精确学习资源推荐和个性化学习辅导等应用提供有价值的教育可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的可解释智能学习诊断框架UIILD，旨在解决智能教学系统中学习诊断的准确性与可解释性难以兼顾的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统学习诊断方法在准确性和可解释性之间存在矛盾，心理测量方法模型能力不足，深度学习方法缺乏可解释性，难以满足教育应用场景需求。
AI.method: 设计融合深度学习表征能力和心理测量可解释性的UIILD框架，提出双通道LDM-ID和三通道LDM-HMI诊断机制，从认知参数、学习者-资源响应网络和自注意力权重三个维度提供解释性。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集和一个模拟数据集上的实验表明，该方法在学习预测准确性上优于现有模型，并能为精准资源推荐和个性化辅导提供教育解释性支持。
AI.conclusion: UIILD框架有效平衡了诊断准确性与可解释性，为智能教学系统的实际应用提供了可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Vy Vo,Van Nguyen,Trung Le,Quan Hung Tran,Gholamreza Haffari,Seyit Camtepe,Dinh Phung
title: An Additive Instance-Wise Approach to Multi-class Model Interpretation
title_zh: 多类模型解释的附加实例方法
comment: ef:In The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations, 2023
comments: ef:In The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations, 2023
abstract: Interpretable machine learning offers insights into what factors drive a certain prediction of a black-box system. A large number of interpreting methods focus on identifying explanatory input features, which generally fall into two main categories: attribution and selection. A popular attribution-based approach is to exploit local neighborhoods for learning instance-specific explainers in an additive manner. The process is thus inefficient and susceptible to poorly-conditioned samples. Meanwhile, many selection-based methods directly optimize local feature distributions in an instance-wise training framework, thereby being capable of leveraging global information from other inputs. However, they can only interpret single-class predictions and many suffer from inconsistency across different settings, due to a strict reliance on a pre-defined number of features selected. This work exploits the strengths of both methods and proposes a framework for learning local explanations simultaneously for multiple target classes. Our model explainer significantly outperforms additive and instance-wise counterparts on faithfulness with more compact and comprehensible explanations. We also demonstrate the capacity to select stable and important features through extensive experiments on various data sets and black-box model architectures.
summary: Interpretable machine learning offers insights into what factors drive a certain prediction of a black-box system. A large number of interpreting methods focus on identifying explanatory input features, which generally fall into two main categories: attribution and selection. A popular attribution-based approach is to exploit local neighborhoods for learning instance-specific explainers in an additive manner. The process is thus inefficient and susceptible to poorly-conditioned samples. Meanwhile, many selection-based methods directly optimize local feature distributions in an instance-wise training framework, thereby being capable of leveraging global information from other inputs. However, they can only interpret single-class predictions and many suffer from inconsistency across different settings, due to a strict reliance on a pre-defined number of features selected. This work exploits the strengths of both methods and proposes a framework for learning local explanations simultaneously for multiple target classes. Our model explainer significantly outperforms additive and instance-wise counterparts on faithfulness with more compact and comprehensible explanations. We also demonstrate the capacity to select stable and important features through extensive experiments on various data sets and black-box model architectures.
abstract_zh: Interpretable machine learning offers insights into what factors drive a certain prediction of a black-box system.大量的解释方法侧重于识别解释性输入特征，这些特征通常分为两大类：归因和选择。 A popular attribution-based approach is to exploit local neighborhoods for learning instance-specific explainers in an additive manner. The process is thus inefficient and susceptible to poorly-conditioned samples.同时，许多基于选择的方法直接优化实例训练框架中的局部特征分布，从而能够利用来自其他输入的全局信息。然而，它们只能解释单类预测，并且由于严格依赖于所选特征的预定义数量，许多预测在不同设置之间存在不一致。这项工作利用了这两种方法的优点，并提出了一个同时学习多个目标类别的局部解释的框架。我们的模型解释器在忠实度上显着优于加法和实例对应的模型，具有更紧凑和易于理解的解释。我们还通过对各种数据集和黑盒模型架构的广泛实验展示了选择稳定且重要特征的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合归因与选择方法优势的多类模型解释框架，通过加法实例方式实现更高效、稳定的局部解释。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法效率低且易受样本影响，选择方法仅能解释单类预测且存在跨设置不一致性，需兼顾多类解释与全局信息利用。
AI.method: 设计融合加法实例机制与多类优化的框架，同时学习多个目标类的局部解释，通过实例级训练提升特征选择稳定性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集与黑箱模型上，该方法在解释忠实性、简洁性及特征稳定性指标上均优于现有归因与选择方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效结合两类方法优势，在保持解释性的同时提升多类模型解释的鲁棒性与普适性。

conclusion: 所提框架有效结合两类方法优势，在保持解释性的同时提升多类模型解释的鲁棒性与普适性。
search_text: An Additive Instance-Wise Approach to Multi-class Model Interpretation 多类模型解释的附加实例方法 Interpretable machine learning offers insights into what factors drive a certain prediction of a black-box system. A large number of interpreting methods focus on identifying explanatory input features, which generally fall into two main categories: attribution and selection. A popular attribution-based approach is to exploit local neighborhoods for learning instance-specific explainers in an additive manner. The process is thus inefficient and susceptible to poorly-conditioned samples. Meanwhile, many selection-based methods directly optimize local feature distributions in an instance-wise training framework, thereby being capable of leveraging global information from other inputs. However, they can only interpret single-class predictions and many suffer from inconsistency across different settings, due to a strict reliance on a pre-defined number of features selected. This work exploits the strengths of both methods and proposes a framework for learning local explanations simultaneously for multiple target classes. Our model explainer significantly outperforms additive and instance-wise counterparts on faithfulness with more compact and comprehensible explanations. We also demonstrate the capacity to select stable and important features through extensive experiments on various data sets and black-box model architectures. Interpretable machine learning offers insights into what factors drive a certain prediction of a black-box system.大量的解释方法侧重于识别解释性输入特征，这些特征通常分为两大类：归因和选择。 A popular attribution-based approach is to exploit local neighborhoods for learning instance-specific explainers in an additive manner. The process is thus inefficient and susceptible to poorly-conditioned samples.同时，许多基于选择的方法直接优化实例训练框架中的局部特征分布，从而能够利用来自其他输入的全局信息。然而，它们只能解释单类预测，并且由于严格依赖于所选特征的预定义数量，许多预测在不同设置之间存在不一致。这项工作利用了这两种方法的优点，并提出了一个同时学习多个目标类别的局部解释的框架。我们的模型解释器在忠实度上显着优于加法和实例对应的模型，具有更紧凑和易于理解的解释。我们还通过对各种数据集和黑盒模型架构的广泛实验展示了选择稳定且重要特征的能力。 本文提出一种结合归因与选择方法优势的多类模型解释框架，通过加法实例方式实现更高效、稳定的局部解释。 Vy Vo,Van Nguyen,Trung Le,Quan Hung Tran,Gholamreza Haffari,Seyit Camtepe,Dinh Phung cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Abir Sen,Tapas Kumar Mishra,Ratnakar Dash
title: Deep learning based Hand gesture recognition system and design of a Human-Machine Interface
title_zh: 基于深度学习的手势识别系统及人机界面设计
abstract: In this work, a real-time hand gesture recognition system-based human-computer interface (HCI) is presented. The system consists of six stages: (1) hand detection, (2) gesture segmentation, (3) use of five pre-trained convolutional neural network models (CNN) and vision transformer (ViT), (4) building an interactive human-machine interface (HMI), (5) development of a gesture-controlled virtual mouse, (6) use of Kalman filter to estimate the hand position, based on that the smoothness of the motion of pointer is improved. In our work, five pre-trained CNN (VGG16, VGG19, ResNet50, ResNet101, and Inception-V1) models and ViT have been employed to classify hand gesture images. Two multi-class datasets (one public and one custom) have been used to validate the models. Considering the model's performances, it is observed that Inception-V1 has significantly shown a better classification performance compared to the other four CNN models and ViT in terms of accuracy, precision, recall, and F-score values. We have also expanded this system to control some desktop applications (such as VLC player, audio player, file management, playing 2D Super-Mario-Bros game, etc.) with different customized gesture commands in real-time scenarios. The average speed of this system has reached 25 fps (frames per second), which meets the requirements for the real-time scenario. Performance of the proposed gesture control system obtained the average response time in milisecond for each control which makes it suitable for real-time. This model (prototype) will benefit physically disabled people interacting with desktops.

The system consists of six stages: (1) hand detection, (2) gesture segmentation, (3) use of five pre-trained convolutional neural network models (CNN) and vision transformer (ViT), (4) building an interactive human-machine interface (HMI), (5) development of a gesture-controlled virtual mouse, (6) use of Kalman filter to estimate the hand position, based on that the smoothness of the motion of pointer is improved. In our work, five pre-trained CNN (VGG16, VGG19, ResNet50, ResNet101, and Inception-V1) models and ViT have been employed to classify hand gesture images. Two multi-class datasets (one public and one custom) have been used to validate the models. Considering the model's performances, it is observed that Inception-V1 has significantly shown a better classification performance compared to the other four CNN models and ViT in terms of accuracy, precision, recall, and F-score values. We have also expanded this system to control some desktop applications (such as VLC player, audio player, file management, playing 2D Super-Mario-Bros game, etc.) with different customized gesture commands in real-time scenarios. The average speed of this system has reached 25 fps (frames per second), which meets the requirements for the real-time scenario. Performance of the proposed gesture control system obtained the average response time in milisecond for each control which makes it suitable for real-time. This model (prototype) will benefit physically disabled people interacting with desktops.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，提出了一种基于实时手势识别系统的人机界面（HCI）。该系统由六个阶段组成：（1）手部检测，（2）手势分割，（3）使用五个预训练的卷积神经网络模型（CNN）和视觉变换器（ViT），（4）构建交互式人机界面（HMI），（5）开发手势控制的虚拟鼠标，（6）使用卡尔曼滤波器估计手部位置，在此基础上提高指针运动的平滑度。在我们的工作中，使用了五个预训练的 CNN（VGG16、VGG19、ResNet50、ResNet101 和 Inception-V1）模型和 ViT 对手势图像进行分类。使用两个多类数据集（一个公共数据集和一个自定义数据集）来验证模型。考虑到模型的性能，可以看出，与其他四个 CNN 模型和 ViT 相比，Inception-V1 在准确率、精确度、召回率和 F 分数值方面显着表现出更好的分类性能。我们还扩展了该系统，以在实时场景中使用不同的自定义手势命令来控制一些桌面应用程序（例如VLC播放器、音频播放器、文件管理、玩2D超级马里奥兄弟游戏等）。该系统的平均速度达到了25 fps（每秒帧数），满足了实时场景的要求。所提出的手势控制系统的性能获得了每个控制的平均响应时间（以毫秒为单位），这使得它适合实时。该模型（原型）将有利于身体残疾的人与桌面交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的实时手势识别系统及人机交互界面设计，通过多种预训练模型实现手势分类与桌面应用控制。
AI.motivation: 为残障人士提供更便捷的桌面交互方式，提升其使用计算机的自主性与效率。
AI.method: 系统分为六阶段：手势检测、分割、采用五种预训练CNN模型（VGG16/VGG19/ResNet50/ResNet101/Inception-V1）及ViT进行分类、构建交互界面、开发手势控制虚拟鼠标、使用卡尔曼滤波优化指针平滑度。
AI.result: Inception-V1在准确率、精确率等指标上优于其他模型，系统达25fps实时性能，可控制VLC播放器、文件管理等应用，平均响应时间满足实时需求。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过深度学习模型有效实现了实时手势控制，尤其Inception-V1表现优异，为残障人士提供了实用的人机交互方案。

authors_text: Yabin Zhang,Jiehong Lin,Chenhang He,Yongwei Chen,Kui Jia,Lei Zhang
title: Masked Surfel Prediction for Self-Supervised Point Cloud Learning
title_zh: 用于自监督点云学习的蒙面面预测
comment: Codes will be available at https://github.com/YBZh/MaskSurf
comments: Codes will be available at https://github.com/YBZh/MaskSurf
abstract: Masked auto-encoding is a popular and effective self-supervised learning approach to point cloud learning. However, most of the existing methods reconstruct only the masked points and overlook the local geometry information, which is also important to understand the point cloud data. In this work, we make the first attempt, to the best of our knowledge, to consider the local geometry information explicitly into the masked auto-encoding, and propose a novel Masked Surfel Prediction (MaskSurf) method. Specifically, given the input point cloud masked at a high ratio, we learn a transformer-based encoder-decoder network to estimate the underlying masked surfels by simultaneously predicting the surfel positions (i.e., points) and per-surfel orientations (i.e., normals). The predictions of points and normals are supervised by the Chamfer Distance and a newly introduced Position-Indexed Normal Distance in a set-to-set manner. Our MaskSurf is validated on six downstream tasks under three fine-tuning strategies. In particular, MaskSurf outperforms its closest competitor, Point-MAE, by 1.2\% on the real-world dataset of ScanObjectNN under the OBJ-BG setting, justifying the advantages of masked surfel prediction over masked point cloud reconstruction. Codes will be available at https://github.com/YBZh/MaskSurf.
summary: Masked auto-encoding is a popular and effective self-supervised learning approach to point cloud learning. However, most of the existing methods reconstruct only the masked points and overlook the local geometry information, which is also important to understand the point cloud data. In this work, we make the first attempt, to the best of our knowledge, to consider the local geometry information explicitly into the masked auto-encoding, and propose a novel Masked Surfel Prediction (MaskSurf) method. Specifically, given the input point cloud masked at a high ratio, we learn a transformer-based encoder-decoder network to estimate the underlying masked surfels by simultaneously predicting the surfel positions (i.e., points) and per-surfel orientations (i.e., normals). The predictions of points and normals are supervised by the Chamfer Distance and a newly introduced Position-Indexed Normal Distance in a set-to-set manner. Our MaskSurf is validated on six downstream tasks under three fine-tuning strategies. In particular, MaskSurf outperforms its closest competitor, Point-MAE, by 1.2\% on the real-world dataset of ScanObjectNN under the OBJ-BG setting, justifying the advantages of masked surfel prediction over masked point cloud reconstruction. Codes will be available at https://github.com/YBZh/MaskSurf.
abstract_zh: 屏蔽自动编码是一种流行且有效的点云学习自监督学习方法。然而，大多数现有方法仅重建掩模点并忽略局部几何信息，这对于理解点云数据也很重要。在这项工作中，我们首次尝试，据我们所知，将局部几何信息显式地考虑到掩模自动编码中，并提出了一种新颖的掩模面预测（MaskSurf）方法。具体来说，给定高比率掩蔽的输入点云，我们学习基于变压器的编码器-解码器网络，通过同时预测面元位置（即点）和每个面元方向（即法线）来估计底层掩蔽面元。点和法线的预测由倒角距离和新引入的位置索引法线距离以设置到设置的方式进行监督。我们的 MaskSurf 在三种微调策略下的六项下游任务上得到了验证。特别是，MaskSurf 在 OBJ-BG 设置下的 ScanObjectNN 真实数据集上的性能优于其最接近的竞争对手 Point-MAE 1.2%，证明了掩模面元预测相对于掩模点云重建的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/YBZh/MaskSurf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码表面元预测的自监督点云学习方法，通过同时预测点位置和法线方向来提升点云重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有掩码自编码方法仅重建被遮罩点，忽视了局部几何信息的重要性，而局部几何对理解点云数据至关重要。
AI.method: 设计MaskSurf方法，使用Transformer编码器-解码器网络，通过Chamfer距离和新提出的Position-Indexed Normal Distance联合优化表面元位置与法线预测。
AI.result: 在ScanObjectNN数据集的OBJ-BG设置下，MaskSurf较Point-MAE提升1.2%，并在六个下游任务中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模局部几何信息的掩码表面元预测优于传统掩码点云重建方法，为自监督点云学习提供了新思路。

Our MaskSurf is validated on six downstream tasks under three fine-tuning strategies. In particular, MaskSurf outperforms its closest competitor, Point-MAE, by 1.2\% on the real-world dataset of ScanObjectNN under the OBJ-BG setting, justifying the advantages of masked surfel prediction over masked point cloud reconstruction. Codes will be available at https://github.com/YBZh/MaskSurf. 屏蔽自动编码是一种流行且有效的点云学习自监督学习方法。然而，大多数现有方法仅重建掩模点并忽略局部几何信息，这对于理解点云数据也很重要。在这项工作中，我们首次尝试，据我们所知，将局部几何信息显式地考虑到掩模自动编码中，并提出了一种新颖的掩模面预测（MaskSurf）方法。具体来说，给定高比率掩蔽的输入点云，我们学习基于变压器的编码器-解码器网络，通过同时预测面元位置（即点）和每个面元方向（即法线）来估计底层掩蔽面元。点和法线的预测由倒角距离和新引入的位置索引法线距离以设置到设置的方式进行监督。我们的 MaskSurf 在三种微调策略下的六项下游任务上得到了验证。特别是，MaskSurf 在 OBJ-BG 设置下的 ScanObjectNN 真实数据集上的性能优于其最接近的竞争对手 Point-MAE 1.2%，证明了掩模面元预测相对于掩模点云重建的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/YBZh/MaskSurf 获取。 本文提出了一种基于掩码表面元预测的自监督点云学习方法，通过同时预测点位置和法线方向来提升点云重建效果。 Yabin Zhang,Jiehong Lin,Chenhang He,Yongwei Chen,Kui Jia,Lei Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Chaoxing Huang,Yurui Qian,Simon Chun Ho Yu,Jian Hou,Baiyan Jiang,Queenie Chan,Vincent Wai-Sun Wong,Winnie Chiu-Wing Chu,Weitian Chen
title: Uncertainty-Aware Self-supervised Neural Network for Liver $T_{1ρ}$ Mapping with Relaxation Constraint
title_zh: 具有松弛约束的肝脏不确定性感知自监督神经网络 $T_{1ρ}$ 映射
comment: Provisionally accepted by Physics in Medicine and Biology
comments: Provisionally accepted by Physics in Medicine and Biology
abstract: $T_{1ρ}$ mapping is a promising quantitative MRI technique for the non-invasive assessment of tissue properties. Learning-based approaches can map $T_{1ρ}$ from a reduced number of $T_{1ρ}$ weighted images, but requires significant amounts of high quality training data. Moreover, existing methods do not provide the confidence level of the $T_{1ρ}$ estimation. To address these problems, we proposed a self-supervised learning neural network that learns a $T_{1ρ}$ mapping using the relaxation constraint in the learning process. Epistemic uncertainty and aleatoric uncertainty are modelled for the $T_{1ρ}$ quantification network to provide a Bayesian confidence estimation of the $T_{1ρ}$ mapping. The uncertainty estimation can also regularize the model to prevent it from learning imperfect data. We conducted experiments on $T_{1ρ}$ data collected from 52 patients with non-alcoholic fatty liver disease. The results showed that our method outperformed the existing methods for $T_{1ρ}$ quantification of the liver using as few as two $T_{1ρ}$-weighted images. Our uncertainty estimation provided a feasible way of modelling the confidence of the self-supervised learning based $T_{1ρ}$ estimation, which is consistent with the reality in liver $T_{1ρ}$ imaging.
summary: $T_{1ρ}$ mapping is a promising quantitative MRI technique for the non-invasive assessment of tissue properties. Learning-based approaches can map $T_{1ρ}$ from a reduced number of $T_{1ρ}$ weighted images, but requires significant amounts of high quality training data. Moreover, existing methods do not provide the confidence level of the $T_{1ρ}$ estimation. To address these problems, we proposed a self-supervised learning neural network that learns a $T_{1ρ}$ mapping using the relaxation constraint in the learning process. Epistemic uncertainty and aleatoric uncertainty are modelled for the $T_{1ρ}$ quantification network to provide a Bayesian confidence estimation of the $T_{1ρ}$ mapping. The uncertainty estimation can also regularize the model to prevent it from learning imperfect data. We conducted experiments on $T_{1ρ}$ data collected from 52 patients with non-alcoholic fatty liver disease. The results showed that our method outperformed the existing methods for $T_{1ρ}$ quantification of the liver using as few as two $T_{1ρ}$-weighted images. Our uncertainty estimation provided a feasible way of modelling the confidence of the self-supervised learning based $T_{1ρ}$ estimation, which is consistent with the reality in liver $T_{1ρ}$ imaging.
abstract_zh: $T_{1ρ}$ 映射是一种很有前途的定量 MRI 技术，用于组织特性的非侵入性评估。基于学习的方法可以从数量减少的 $T_{1ρ}$ 加权图像中映射 $T_{1ρ}$，但需要大量高质量的训练数据。此外，现有方法不提供$T_{1ρ}$估计的置信水平。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种自监督学习神经网络，该网络在学习过程中使用松弛约束来学习 $T_{1ρ}$ 映射。针对 $T_{1ρ}$ 量化网络建模认知不确定性和任意不确定性，以提供 $T_{1ρ}$ 映射的贝叶斯置信估计。不确定性估计还可以对模型进行正则化，以防止其学习不完美的数据。我们对从 52 名非酒精性脂肪肝患者收集的 $T_{1ρ}$ 数据进行了实验。结果表明，我们的方法优于现有的肝脏 $T_{1ρ}$ 量化方法，仅使用两张 $T_{1ρ}$ 加权图像。我们的不确定性估计为基于 $T_{1ρ}$ 估计的自监督学习的置信度建模提供了一种可行的方法，这与肝脏 $T_{1ρ}$ 成像的实际情况一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合弛豫约束和不确定性建模的自监督神经网络，用于肝脏T₁ρ映射。
AI.motivation: 现有T₁ρ量化方法需要大量高质量数据且无法提供置信度评估，限制了其临床应用。
AI.method: 设计自监督学习框架，通过弛豫约束建模T₁ρ映射，并引入认识不确定性与偶然不确定性进行贝叶斯置信估计。
AI.result: 在52例非酒精性脂肪肝患者数据上，使用仅2张T₁ρ加权图像时，该方法在T₁ρ量化精度上优于现有方法，且不确定性估计与实际成像结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过不确定性建模有效提升了自监督学习在T₁ρ估计中的可靠性，为临床定量MRI提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhi Xu,Hongbo Zhu,Hua Chen,Wei Zhang
title: Polytopic Planar Region Characterization of Rough Terrains for Legged Locomotion
title_zh: 腿式运动的崎岖地形的多面平面区域表征
abstract: This paper studies the problem of constructing polytopic representations of planar regions from depth camera readings. This problem is of great importance for terrain mapping in complicated environment and has great potentials in legged locomotion applications. To address the polytopic planar region characterization problem, we propose a two-stage solution scheme. At the first stage, the planar regions embedded within a sequence of depth images are extracted individually first and then merged to establish a terrain map containing only planar regions in a selected frame. To simplify the representations of the planar regions that are applicable to foothold planning for legged robots, we further approximate the extracted planar regions via low-dimensional polytopes at the second stage. With the polytopic representation, the proposed approach achieves a great balance between accuracy and simplicity. Experimental validations with RGB-D cameras are conducted to demonstrate the performance of the proposed scheme. The proposed scheme successfully characterizes the planar regions via polytopes with acceptable accuracy. More importantly, the run time of the overall perception scheme is less than 10ms (i.e., > 100Hz) throughout the tests, which strongly illustrates the advantages of our approach developed in this paper.
summary: This paper studies the problem of constructing polytopic representations of planar regions from depth camera readings. This problem is of great importance for terrain mapping in complicated environment and has great potentials in legged locomotion applications. To address the polytopic planar region characterization problem, we propose a two-stage solution scheme. At the first stage, the planar regions embedded within a sequence of depth images are extracted individually first and then merged to establish a terrain map containing only planar regions in a selected frame. To simplify the representations of the planar regions that are applicable to foothold planning for legged robots, we further approximate the extracted planar regions via low-dimensional polytopes at the second stage. With the polytopic representation, the proposed approach achieves a great balance between accuracy and simplicity. Experimental validations with RGB-D cameras are conducted to demonstrate the performance of the proposed scheme. The proposed scheme successfully characterizes the planar regions via polytopes with acceptable accuracy. More importantly, the run time of the overall perception scheme is less than 10ms (i.e., > 100Hz) throughout the tests, which strongly illustrates the advantages of our approach developed in this paper.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了从深度相机读数构建平面区域的多面表示的问题。该问题对于复杂环境下的地形测绘具有重要意义，并且在腿式运动应用中具有巨大潜力。为了解决多面体平面区域表征问题，我们提出了一个两阶段的解决方案。在第一阶段，首先单独提取嵌入深度图像序列中的平面区域，然后合并以建立仅包含所选帧中的平面区域的地形图。为了简化适用于腿式机器人立足点规划的平面区域的表示，我们在第二阶段通过低维多面体进一步近似提取的平面区域。通过多面体表示，所提出的方法在准确性和简单性之间实现了很好的平衡。使用 RGB-D 相机进行实验验证以证明所提出方案的性能。所提出的方案通过多面体成功地表征了平面区域，精度可以接受。更重要的是，整个测试过程中整体感知方案的运行时间小于10ms（即> 100Hz），这有力地说明了我们在本文中开发的方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度相机数据的多面体平面区域表征方法，用于腿部机器人的地形映射与运动规划。
AI.motivation: 复杂环境中腿部机器人需要高精度且简化的地形表示以实现稳定移动，传统方法难以兼顾精度与计算效率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方案：首先从深度图像序列中提取并合并平面区域构建地形图，其次用低维多面体近似平面区域以简化表示。
AI.result: 实验验证多面体表征精度达标且整体感知方案运行时延低于10ms（>100Hz），证明方法的有效性与实时性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在精度与计算效率间取得平衡，为腿部机器人动态地形适应提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Nie Lin,Minjie Cai
title: EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Challenge for Action Recognition 2022: Team HNU-FPV Technical Report
title_zh: EPIC-KITCHENS-100 2022 年动作识别无监督领域适应挑战：HNU-FPV 团队技术报告
comment: Technical report for CVPR 2022 EPIC-Ego4D Workshop (EPIC Challenge)
comments: Technical report for CVPR 2022 EPIC-Ego4D Workshop (EPIC Challenge)
abstract: In this report, we present the technical details of our submission to the 2022 EPIC-Kitchens Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) Challenge. Existing UDA methods align the global features extracted from the whole video clips across the source and target domains but suffer from the spatial redundancy of feature matching in video recognition. Motivated by the observation that in most cases a small image region in each video frame can be informative enough for the action recognition task, we propose to exploit informative image regions to perform efficient domain alignment. Specifically, we first use lightweight CNNs to extract the global information of the input two-stream video frames and select the informative image patches by a differentiable interpolation-based selection strategy. Then the global information from videos frames and local information from image patches are processed by an existing video adaptation method, i.e., TA3N, in order to perform feature alignment for the source domain and the target domain. Our method (without model ensemble) ranks 4th among this year's teams on the test set of EPIC-KITCHENS-100.
summary: In this report, we present the technical details of our submission to the 2022 EPIC-Kitchens Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) Challenge. Existing UDA methods align the global features extracted from the whole video clips across the source and target domains but suffer from the spatial redundancy of feature matching in video recognition. Motivated by the observation that in most cases a small image region in each video frame can be informative enough for the action recognition task, we propose to exploit informative image regions to perform efficient domain alignment. Specifically, we first use lightweight CNNs to extract the global information of the input two-stream video frames and select the informative image patches by a differentiable interpolation-based selection strategy. Then the global information from videos frames and local information from image patches are processed by an existing video adaptation method, i.e., TA3N, in order to perform feature alignment for the source domain and the target domain. Our method (without model ensemble) ranks 4th among this year's teams on the test set of EPIC-KITCHENS-100.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了我们向 2022 年 EPIC-Kitchens 无监督域适应 (UDA) 挑战赛提交的技术细节。现有的 UDA 方法将从源域和目标域的整个视频片段中提取的全局特征进行对齐，但会受到视频识别中特征匹配的空间冗余的影响。出于观察，在大多数情况下，每个视频帧中的小图像区域对于动作识别任务来说可以提供足够的信息，我们建议利用信息丰富的图像区域来执行有效的域对齐。具体来说，我们首先使用轻量级 CNN 提取输入两流视频帧的全局信息，并通过基于可微插值的选择策略选择信息丰富的图像块。然后，通过现有的视频自适应方法（即TA3N）处理来自视频帧的全局信息和来自图像块的局部信息，以对源域和目标域进行特征对齐。我们的方法（没有模型集成）在今年 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 测试集的团队中排名第四。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了团队HNU-FPV在2022年EPIC-KITCHENS无监督域适应挑战赛中的技术报告，提出了一种高效的域对齐方法。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法在视频识别中存在空间冗余问题，而观察到每个视频帧中的小图像区域通常足以进行动作识别，因此提出利用这些信息区域进行高效域对齐。
AI.method: 首先使用轻量级CNN提取输入双流视频帧的全局信息，并通过可微插值选择策略选择信息图像块。然后通过现有视频适应方法TA3N对视频帧的全局信息和图像块的局部信息进行特征对齐。
AI.result: 该方法（未使用模型集成）在EPIC-KITCHENS-100测试集上排名第四。
AI.conclusion: 利用信息图像块进行域对齐的方法在无监督域适应任务中表现出色，具有较高的实用价值。

search_text: EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Challenge for Action Recognition 2022: Team HNU-FPV Technical Report EPIC-KITCHENS-100 2022 年动作识别无监督领域适应挑战：HNU-FPV 团队技术报告 In this report, we present the technical details of our submission to the 2022 EPIC-Kitchens Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) Challenge. Existing UDA methods align the global features extracted from the whole video clips across the source and target domains but suffer from the spatial redundancy of feature matching in video recognition. Motivated by the observation that in most cases a small image region in each video frame can be informative enough for the action recognition task, we propose to exploit informative image regions to perform efficient domain alignment. Specifically, we first use lightweight CNNs to extract the global information of the input two-stream video frames and select the informative image patches by a differentiable interpolation-based selection strategy. Then the global information from videos frames and local information from image patches are processed by an existing video adaptation method, i.e., TA3N, in order to perform feature alignment for the source domain and the target domain. Our method (without model ensemble) ranks 4th among this year's teams on the test set of EPIC-KITCHENS-100. 在本报告中，我们介绍了我们向 2022 年 EPIC-Kitchens 无监督域适应 (UDA) 挑战赛提交的技术细节。现有的 UDA 方法将从源域和目标域的整个视频片段中提取的全局特征进行对齐，但会受到视频识别中特征匹配的空间冗余的影响。出于观察，在大多数情况下，每个视频帧中的小图像区域对于动作识别任务来说可以提供足够的信息，我们建议利用信息丰富的图像区域来执行有效的域对齐。具体来说，我们首先使用轻量级 CNN 提取输入两流视频帧的全局信息，并通过基于可微插值的选择策略选择信息丰富的图像块。然后，通过现有的视频自适应方法（即TA3N）处理来自视频帧的全局信息和来自图像块的局部信息，以对源域和目标域进行特征对齐。我们的方法（没有模型集成）在今年 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 测试集的团队中排名第四。 本文介绍了团队HNU-FPV在2022年EPIC-KITCHENS无监督域适应挑战赛中的技术报告，提出了一种高效的域对齐方法。 Nie Lin,Minjie Cai cs.CV

authors_text: Huabin Diao,Gongyan Li,Shaoyun Xu,Yuexing Hao
title: Attention Round for Post-Training Quantization
title_zh: 训练后量化的注意力回合
abstract: At present, the quantification methods of neural network models are mainly divided into post-training quantization (PTQ) and quantization aware training (QAT). Post-training quantization only need a small part of the data to complete the quantification process, but the performance of its quantitative model is not as good as the quantization aware training. This paper presents a novel quantification method called Attention Round. This method gives parameters w the opportunity to be mapped to all possible quantized values, rather than just the two quantized values nearby w in the process of quantization. The probability of being mapped to different quantified values is negatively correlated with the distance between the quantified values and w, and decay with a Gaussian function. In addition, this paper uses the lossy coding length as a measure to assign bit widths to the different layers of the model to solve the problem of mixed precision quantization, which effectively avoids to solve combinatorial optimization problem. This paper also performs quantitative experiments on different models, the results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed method. For ResNet18 and MobileNetV2, the post-training quantization proposed in this paper only require 1,024 training data and 10 minutes to complete the quantization process, which can achieve quantization performance on par with quantization aware training.
summary: At present, the quantification methods of neural network models are mainly divided into post-training quantization (PTQ) and quantization aware training (QAT). Post-training quantization only need a small part of the data to complete the quantification process, but the performance of its quantitative model is not as good as the quantization aware training. This paper presents a novel quantification method called Attention Round. This method gives parameters w the opportunity to be mapped to all possible quantized values, rather than just the two quantized values nearby w in the process of quantization. The probability of being mapped to different quantified values is negatively correlated with the distance between the quantified values and w, and decay with a Gaussian function. In addition, this paper uses the lossy coding length as a measure to assign bit widths to the different layers of the model to solve the problem of mixed precision quantization, which effectively avoids to solve combinatorial optimization problem. This paper also performs quantitative experiments on different models, the results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed method. For ResNet18 and MobileNetV2, the post-training quantization proposed in this paper only require 1,024 training data and 10 minutes to complete the quantization process, which can achieve quantization performance on par with quantization aware training.
abstract_zh: 目前神经网络模型的量化方法主要分为训练后量化（PTQ）和量化感知训练（QAT）。训练后量化只需要一小部分数据即可完成量化过程，但其量化模型的性能不如量化感知训练。本文提出了一种称为“注意力循环”的新颖量化方法。该方法使参数w有机会映射到所有可能的量化值，而不仅仅是量化过程中w附近的两个量化值。映射到不同量化值的概率与量化值与w之间的距离负相关，并以高斯函数衰减。此外，本文采用有损编码长度作为衡量标准，为模型的不同层分配位宽，解决混合精度量化问题，有效避免了求解组合优化问题。本文还对不同模型进行了定量实验，结果证实了所提方法的有效性。对于ResNet18和MobileNetV2，本文提出的训练后量化仅需要1024个训练数据和10分钟即可完成量化过程，可以实现与量化感知训练相当的量化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Attention Round的新型后训练量化方法，通过改进量化过程中的参数映射策略和混合精度分配，提升量化模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有后训练量化（PTQ）方法性能不如量化感知训练（QAT），且传统量化方法限制参数仅映射到邻近两个量化值，导致精度损失。
AI.method: 采用高斯函数衰减机制，使参数可映射到所有可能量化值（概率与距离负相关）；利用失真编码长度度量分配不同层的位宽，解决混合精度量化问题。
AI.result: 在ResNet18和MobileNetV2上仅需1,024训练数据和10分钟即可完成量化，性能达到QAT水平。
AI.conclusion: Attention Round方法通过概率映射和位宽分配策略，有效提升PTQ性能，实现与QAT相当的量化效果，且无需复杂训练过程。

authors_text: Akira Matsui,Emilio Ferrara
title: Word Embedding for Social Sciences: An Interdisciplinary Survey
title_zh: 社会科学的词嵌入：一项跨学科调查
abstract: To extract essential information from complex data, computer scientists have been developing machine learning models that learn low-dimensional representation mode. From such advances in machine learning research, not only computer scientists but also social scientists have benefited and advanced their research because human behavior or social phenomena lies in complex data. However, this emerging trend is not well documented because different social science fields rarely cover each other's work, resulting in fragmented knowledge in the literature. To document this emerging trend, we survey recent studies that apply word embedding techniques to human behavior mining. We built a taxonomy to illustrate the methods and procedures used in the surveyed papers, aiding social science researchers in contextualizing their research within the literature on word embedding applications. This survey also conducts a simple experiment to warn that common similarity measurements used in the literature could yield different results even if they return consistent results at an aggregate level.
summary: To extract essential information from complex data, computer scientists have been developing machine learning models that learn low-dimensional representation mode. From such advances in machine learning research, not only computer scientists but also social scientists have benefited and advanced their research because human behavior or social phenomena lies in complex data. However, this emerging trend is not well documented because different social science fields rarely cover each other's work, resulting in fragmented knowledge in the literature. To document this emerging trend, we survey recent studies that apply word embedding techniques to human behavior mining. We built a taxonomy to illustrate the methods and procedures used in the surveyed papers, aiding social science researchers in contextualizing their research within the literature on word embedding applications. This survey also conducts a simple experiment to warn that common similarity measurements used in the literature could yield different results even if they return consistent results at an aggregate level.
abstract_zh: 为了从复杂数据中提取重要信息，计算机科学家一直在开发学习低维表示模式的机器学习模型。从机器学习研究的进步中，不仅计算机科学家而且社会科学家都受益并推进了他们的研究，因为人类行为或社会现象存在于复杂的数据中。然而，这种新兴趋势并没有得到很好的记录，因为不同的社会科学领域很少涵盖彼此的工作，导致文献中的知识碎片化。为了记录这一新兴趋势，我们调查了最近将词嵌入技术应用于人类行为挖掘的研究。我们建立了一个分类法来说明调查论文中使​​用的方法和程序，帮助社会科学研究人员将他们的研究融入有关词嵌入应用的文献中。这项调查还进行了一个简单的实验，以警告文献中使用的常见相似性测量可能会产生不同的结果，即使它们在总体水平上返回一致的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了词嵌入技术在社会科学领域的应用，构建分类法并实验验证相似性测量的潜在问题。
AI.motivation: 跨学科知识碎片化导致社会科学与计算机科学的成果难以互通，需系统梳理词嵌入技术在人类行为研究中的应用现状。
AI.method: 通过文献综述建立方法分类体系，并设计实验对比常见相似性度量方法的差异性。
AI.result: 形成应用分类框架，发现不同相似性指标可能产生矛盾结果，提示需谨慎选择分析方法。
AI.conclusion: 词嵌入技术为社会科学提供新工具，但方法适用性需结合学科特点，应加强跨学科对话与标准建设。

motivation: 跨学科知识碎片化导致社会科学与计算机科学的成果难以互通，需系统梳理词嵌入技术在人类行为研究中的应用现状。
method: 通过文献综述建立方法分类体系，并设计实验对比常见相似性度量方法的差异性。
result: 形成应用分类框架，发现不同相似性指标可能产生矛盾结果，提示需谨慎选择分析方法。
conclusion: 词嵌入技术为社会科学提供新工具，但方法适用性需结合学科特点，应加强跨学科对话与标准建设。
search_text: Word Embedding for Social Sciences: An Interdisciplinary Survey 社会科学的词嵌入：一项跨学科调查 To extract essential information from complex data, computer scientists have been developing machine learning models that learn low-dimensional representation mode. From such advances in machine learning research, not only computer scientists but also social scientists have benefited and advanced their research because human behavior or social phenomena lies in complex data. However, this emerging trend is not well documented because different social science fields rarely cover each other's work, resulting in fragmented knowledge in the literature. To document this emerging trend, we survey recent studies that apply word embedding techniques to human behavior mining. We built a taxonomy to illustrate the methods and procedures used in the surveyed papers, aiding social science researchers in contextualizing their research within the literature on word embedding applications. This survey also conducts a simple experiment to warn that common similarity measurements used in the literature could yield different results even if they return consistent results at an aggregate level. 为了从复杂数据中提取重要信息，计算机科学家一直在开发学习低维表示模式的机器学习模型。从机器学习研究的进步中，不仅计算机科学家而且社会科学家都受益并推进了他们的研究，因为人类行为或社会现象存在于复杂的数据中。然而，这种新兴趋势并没有得到很好的记录，因为不同的社会科学领域很少涵盖彼此的工作，导致文献中的知识碎片化。为了记录这一新兴趋势，我们调查了最近将词嵌入技术应用于人类行为挖掘的研究。我们建立了一个分类法来说明调查论文中使​​用的方法和程序，帮助社会科学研究人员将他们的研究融入有关词嵌入应用的文献中。这项调查还进行了一个简单的实验，以警告文献中使用的常见相似性测量可能会产生不同的结果，即使它们在总体水平上返回一致的结果。 本文综述了词嵌入技术在社会科学领域的应用，构建分类法并实验验证相似性测量的潜在问题。 Akira Matsui,Emilio Ferrara cs.AI

authors_text: Zi Wang,George E. Dahl,Kevin Swersky,Chansoo Lee,Zelda Mariet,Zachary Nado,Justin Gilmer,Jasper Snoek,Zoubin Ghahramani
title: Pre-training helps Bayesian optimization too
title_zh: 预训练也有助于贝叶斯优化
comment: ICML2022 Workshop on Adaptive Experimental Design and Active Learning in the Real World. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.08215
comments: ICML2022 Workshop on Adaptive Experimental Design and Active Learning in the Real World. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.08215
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) has become a popular strategy for global optimization of many expensive real-world functions. Contrary to a common belief that BO is suited to optimizing black-box functions, it actually requires domain knowledge on characteristics of those functions to deploy BO successfully. Such domain knowledge often manifests in Gaussian process priors that specify initial beliefs on functions. However, even with expert knowledge, it is not an easy task to select a prior. This is especially true for hyperparameter tuning problems on complex machine learning models, where landscapes of tuning objectives are often difficult to comprehend. We seek an alternative practice for setting these functional priors. In particular, we consider the scenario where we have data from similar functions that allow us to pre-train a tighter distribution a priori. To verify our approach in realistic model training setups, we collected a large multi-task hyperparameter tuning dataset by training tens of thousands of configurations of near-state-of-the-art models on popular image and text datasets, as well as a protein sequence dataset. Our results show that on average, our method is able to locate good hyperparameters at least 3 times more efficiently than the best competing methods.
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) has become a popular strategy for global optimization of many expensive real-world functions. Contrary to a common belief that BO is suited to optimizing black-box functions, it actually requires domain knowledge on characteristics of those functions to deploy BO successfully. Such domain knowledge often manifests in Gaussian process priors that specify initial beliefs on functions. However, even with expert knowledge, it is not an easy task to select a prior. This is especially true for hyperparameter tuning problems on complex machine learning models, where landscapes of tuning objectives are often difficult to comprehend. We seek an alternative practice for setting these functional priors. In particular, we consider the scenario where we have data from similar functions that allow us to pre-train a tighter distribution a priori. To verify our approach in realistic model training setups, we collected a large multi-task hyperparameter tuning dataset by training tens of thousands of configurations of near-state-of-the-art models on popular image and text datasets, as well as a protein sequence dataset. Our results show that on average, our method is able to locate good hyperparameters at least 3 times more efficiently than the best competing methods.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化（BO）已成为许多昂贵的现实世界函数的全局优化的流行策略。人们普遍认为 BO 适合优化黑盒功能，但实际上需要了解这些功能特征的领域知识才能成功部署 BO。这种领域知识通常体现在指定函数初始信念的高斯过程先验中。然而，即使拥有专业知识，选择先验也不是一件容易的事。对于复杂机器学习模型上的超参数调整问题尤其如此，其中调整目标的情况通常难以理解。我们寻求一种替代实践来设置这些功能优先级。特别是，我们考虑这样的场景：我们拥有来自类似函数的数据，这使我们能够先验地预训练更紧密的分布。为了验证我们在现实模型训练设置中的方法，我们通过在流行的图像和文本数据集以及蛋白质序列数据集上训练数以万计的近乎最先进的模型配置，收集了一个大型多任务超参数调整数据集。我们的结果表明，平均而言，我们的方法能够比最佳竞争方法高效至少 3 倍地定位良好的超参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过预训练数据改进贝叶斯优化中的函数先验设置，提升复杂模型超参数调优效率。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯优化需要领域知识选择高斯过程先验，但复杂模型的超参数调优场景中，函数特性难以理解导致先验选择困难。
AI.method: 利用相似函数数据预训练更紧致的先验分布，构建包含数万模型配置的多任务超参数调优数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法平均比现有最佳方法快3倍以上找到优质超参数。
AI.conclusion: 预训练能有效增强贝叶斯优化性能，为自动超参数调优提供新思路。
