authors_text: Ali Mottaghi,Aidean Sharghi,Serena Yeung,Omid Mohareri
title: Adaptation of Surgical Activity Recognition Models Across Operating Rooms
title_zh: 手术室手术活动识别模型的适应
abstract: Automatic surgical activity recognition enables more intelligent surgical devices and a more efficient workflow. Integration of such technology in new operating rooms has the potential to improve care delivery to patients and decrease costs. Recent works have achieved a promising performance on surgical activity recognition; however, the lack of generalizability of these models is one of the critical barriers to the wide-scale adoption of this technology. In this work, we study the generalizability of surgical activity recognition models across operating rooms. We propose a new domain adaptation method to improve the performance of the surgical activity recognition model in a new operating room for which we only have unlabeled videos. Our approach generates pseudo labels for unlabeled video clips that it is confident about and trains the model on the augmented version of the clips. We extend our method to a semi-supervised domain adaptation setting where a small portion of the target domain is also labeled. In our experiments, our proposed method consistently outperforms the baselines on a dataset of more than 480 long surgical videos collected from two operating rooms.
summary: Automatic surgical activity recognition enables more intelligent surgical devices and a more efficient workflow. Integration of such technology in new operating rooms has the potential to improve care delivery to patients and decrease costs. Recent works have achieved a promising performance on surgical activity recognition; however, the lack of generalizability of these models is one of the critical barriers to the wide-scale adoption of this technology. In this work, we study the generalizability of surgical activity recognition models across operating rooms. We propose a new domain adaptation method to improve the performance of the surgical activity recognition model in a new operating room for which we only have unlabeled videos. Our approach generates pseudo labels for unlabeled video clips that it is confident about and trains the model on the augmented version of the clips. We extend our method to a semi-supervised domain adaptation setting where a small portion of the target domain is also labeled. In our experiments, our proposed method consistently outperforms the baselines on a dataset of more than 480 long surgical videos collected from two operating rooms.
abstract_zh: 自动手术活动识别可实现更智能的手术设备和更高效的工作流程。将此类技术集成到新手术室中有望改善患者的护理服务并降低成本。最近的工作在手术活动识别方面取得了可喜的表现；然而，这些模型缺乏普遍性是大规模采用该技术的关键障碍之一。在这项工作中，我们研究了手术室中手术活动识别模型的普遍性。我们提出了一种新的域适应方法来提高新手术室中手术活动识别模型的性能，其中我们只有未标记的视频。我们的方法为有信心的未标记视频剪辑生成伪标签，并在剪辑的增强版本上训练模型。我们将我们的方法扩展到半监督域适应设置，其中目标域的一小部分也被标记。在我们的实验中，我们提出的方法始终优于从两个手术室收集的 480 多个长手术视频数据集上的基线。

AI.tldr: 研究手术活动识别模型在不同手术室间的泛化能力，并提出领域自适应方法以提高新手术室中的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型缺乏跨手术室的泛化能力，限制了技术的广泛应用，需提升模型在新环境中的适应能力。
AI.method: 提出一种领域自适应方法，通过生成置信度高的伪标签并训练模型，扩展至半监督设置。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在包含480多个视频的数据集上持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的领域自适应方法有效提升了模型在新手术室的性能，为跨环境部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Ukcheol Shin,Kyunghyun Lee,In So Kweon
title: DRL-ISP: Multi-Objective Camera ISP with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: DRL-ISP：具有深度强化学习的多目标相机 ISP
comment: Accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2022 (*First two authors are equal contributed)
comments: Accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2022 (*First two authors are equal contributed)
abstract: In this paper, we propose a multi-objective camera ISP framework that utilizes Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) and camera ISP toolbox that consist of network-based and conventional ISP tools. The proposed DRL-based camera ISP framework iteratively selects a proper tool from the toolbox and applies it to the image to maximize a given vision task-specific reward function. For this purpose, we implement total 51 ISP tools that include exposure correction, color-and-tone correction, white balance, sharpening, denoising, and the others. We also propose an efficient DRL network architecture that can extract the various aspects of an image and make a rigid mapping relationship between images and a large number of actions. Our proposed DRL-based ISP framework effectively improves the image quality according to each vision task such as RAW-to-RGB image restoration, 2D object detection, and monocular depth estimation.
summary: In this paper, we propose a multi-objective camera ISP framework that utilizes Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) and camera ISP toolbox that consist of network-based and conventional ISP tools. The proposed DRL-based camera ISP framework iteratively selects a proper tool from the toolbox and applies it to the image to maximize a given vision task-specific reward function. For this purpose, we implement total 51 ISP tools that include exposure correction, color-and-tone correction, white balance, sharpening, denoising, and the others. We also propose an efficient DRL network architecture that can extract the various aspects of an image and make a rigid mapping relationship between images and a large number of actions. Our proposed DRL-based ISP framework effectively improves the image quality according to each vision task such as RAW-to-RGB image restoration, 2D object detection, and monocular depth estimation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种多目标相机 ISP 框架，该框架利用深度强化学习 (DRL) 和由基于网络和传统 ISP 工具组成的相机 ISP 工具箱。所提出的基于 DRL 的相机 ISP 框架迭代地从工具箱中选择合适的工具并将其应用于图像，以最大化给定的视觉任务特定奖励函数。为此，我们实施了总共 51 个 ISP 工具，包括曝光校正、色彩和色调校正、白平衡、锐化、去噪等。我们还提出了一种高效的 DRL 网络架构，可以提取图像的各个方面，并在图像和大量动作之间建立刚性的映射关系。我们提出的基于 DRL 的 ISP 框架根据每个视觉任务（例如 RAW 到 RGB 图像恢复、2D 对象检测和单目深度估计）有效地提高了图像质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的多目标相机ISP框架，通过结合网络化和传统ISP工具，优化图像处理以适应不同视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 传统ISP工具难以灵活适配多样化的视觉任务需求，需开发一种能动态选择最优处理工具并优化图像质量的智能框架。
AI.method: 构建包含51种ISP工具（如曝光校正、去噪等）的工具箱，设计高效DRL网络架构，通过强化学习迭代选择工具以最大化任务特定奖励函数。
AI.result: 在RAW-to-RGB修复、目标检测和单目深度估计等任务中，所提框架显著提升了图像质量与任务性能。
AI.conclusion: DRL-ISP验证了深度强化学习在动态优化相机图像处理流程中的有效性，为多目标视觉任务提供了灵活解决方案。

search_text: DRL-ISP: Multi-Objective Camera ISP with Deep Reinforcement Learning DRL-ISP：具有深度强化学习的多目标相机 ISP In this paper, we propose a multi-objective camera ISP framework that utilizes Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) and camera ISP toolbox that consist of network-based and conventional ISP tools. The proposed DRL-based camera ISP framework iteratively selects a proper tool from the toolbox and applies it to the image to maximize a given vision task-specific reward function. For this purpose, we implement total 51 ISP tools that include exposure correction, color-and-tone correction, white balance, sharpening, denoising, and the others. We also propose an efficient DRL network architecture that can extract the various aspects of an image and make a rigid mapping relationship between images and a large number of actions. Our proposed DRL-based ISP framework effectively improves the image quality according to each vision task such as RAW-to-RGB image restoration, 2D object detection, and monocular depth estimation. 在本文中，我们提出了一种多目标相机 ISP 框架，该框架利用深度强化学习 (DRL) 和由基于网络和传统 ISP 工具组成的相机 ISP 工具箱。所提出的基于 DRL 的相机 ISP 框架迭代地从工具箱中选择合适的工具并将其应用于图像，以最大化给定的视觉任务特定奖励函数。为此，我们实施了总共 51 个 ISP 工具，包括曝光校正、色彩和色调校正、白平衡、锐化、去噪等。我们还提出了一种高效的 DRL 网络架构，可以提取图像的各个方面，并在图像和大量动作之间建立刚性的映射关系。我们提出的基于 DRL 的 ISP 框架根据每个视觉任务（例如 RAW 到 RGB 图像恢复、2D 对象检测和单目深度估计）有效地提高了图像质量。 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的多目标相机ISP框架，通过结合网络化和传统ISP工具，优化图像处理以适应不同视觉任务。 Ukcheol Shin,Kyunghyun Lee,In So Kweon cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.IV

authors_text: Kaiming Kuang,Li Zhang,Jingyu Li,Hongwei Li,Jiajun Chen,Bo Du,Jiancheng Yang
title: What Makes for Automatic Reconstruction of Pulmonary Segments
title_zh: 肺段自动重建的原理是什么
abstract: 3D reconstruction of pulmonary segments plays an important role in surgical treatment planning of lung cancer, which facilitates preservation of pulmonary function and helps ensure low recurrence rates. However, automatic reconstruction of pulmonary segments remains unexplored in the era of deep learning. In this paper, we investigate what makes for automatic reconstruction of pulmonary segments. First and foremost, we formulate, clinically and geometrically, the anatomical definitions of pulmonary segments, and propose evaluation metrics adhering to these definitions. Second, we propose ImPulSe (Implicit Pulmonary Segment), a deep implicit surface model designed for pulmonary segment reconstruction. The automatic reconstruction of pulmonary segments by ImPulSe is accurate in metrics and visually appealing. Compared with canonical segmentation methods, ImPulSe outputs continuous predictions of arbitrary resolutions with higher training efficiency and fewer parameters. Lastly, we experiment with different network inputs to analyze what matters in the task of pulmonary segment reconstruction. Our code is available at https://github.com/M3DV/ImPulSe.
summary: 3D reconstruction of pulmonary segments plays an important role in surgical treatment planning of lung cancer, which facilitates preservation of pulmonary function and helps ensure low recurrence rates. However, automatic reconstruction of pulmonary segments remains unexplored in the era of deep learning. In this paper, we investigate what makes for automatic reconstruction of pulmonary segments. First and foremost, we formulate, clinically and geometrically, the anatomical definitions of pulmonary segments, and propose evaluation metrics adhering to these definitions. Second, we propose ImPulSe (Implicit Pulmonary Segment), a deep implicit surface model designed for pulmonary segment reconstruction. The automatic reconstruction of pulmonary segments by ImPulSe is accurate in metrics and visually appealing. Compared with canonical segmentation methods, ImPulSe outputs continuous predictions of arbitrary resolutions with higher training efficiency and fewer parameters. Lastly, we experiment with different network inputs to analyze what matters in the task of pulmonary segment reconstruction. Our code is available at https://github.com/M3DV/ImPulSe.
abstract_zh: 肺段的3D重建在肺癌的手术治疗计划中发挥着重要作用，有利于保留肺功能并有助于确保低复发率。然而，在深度学习时代，肺段的自动重建仍未得到探索。在本文中，我们研究了肺段自动重建的原因。首先，我们从临床和几何角度制定肺段的解剖学定义，并提出符合这些定义的评估指标。其次，我们提出了 ImPulSe（隐式肺段），一种专为肺段重建而设计的深层隐式表面模型。 ImPulSe 对肺段的自动重建在指标上是准确的并且在视觉上很有吸引力。与规范分割方法相比，ImPulSe 输出任意分辨率的连续预测，具有更高的训练效率和更少的参数。最后，我们尝试不同的网络输入来分析肺段重建任务中重要的因素。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/M3DV/ImPulSe 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度隐式表面模型的自动肺段重建方法ImPulSe，用于肺癌手术规划中的3D肺段重建。
AI.motivation: 肺段的精确3D重建对肺癌手术治疗规划至关重要，但现有深度学习方法尚未有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 首先定义肺段的解剖学与几何学标准并设计评估指标，然后提出隐式表面模型ImPulSe，通过不同网络输入实验分析重建关键因素。
AI.result: ImPulSe在指标和视觉效果上均表现出高精度，相比传统分割方法具有更高训练效率和更少参数。
AI.conclusion: 隐式表面模型有效实现了肺段自动重建，为手术规划提供了准确且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Seongjun Yang,Hyeonji Hwang,Daeyoung Kim,Radhika Dua,Jong-Yeup Kim,Eunho Yang,Edward Choi
title: Towards the Practical Utility of Federated Learning in the Medical Domain
title_zh: 联邦学习在医学领域的实际应用
comment: Accepted to the Main conference of CHIL2023
comments: Accepted to the Main conference of CHIL2023
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is an active area of research. One of the most suitable areas for adopting FL is the medical domain, where patient privacy must be respected. Previous research, however, does not provide a practical guide to applying FL in the medical domain. We propose empirical benchmarks and experimental settings for three representative medical datasets with different modalities: longitudinal electronic health records, skin cancer images, and electrocardiogram signals. The likely users of FL such as medical institutions and IT companies can take these benchmarks as guides for adopting FL and minimize their trial and error. For each dataset, each client data is from a different source to preserve real-world heterogeneity. We evaluate six FL algorithms designed for addressing data heterogeneity among clients, and a hybrid algorithm combining the strengths of two representative FL algorithms. Based on experiment results from three modalities, we discover that simple FL algorithms tend to outperform more sophisticated ones, while the hybrid algorithm consistently shows good, if not the best performance. We also find that a frequent global model update leads to better performance under a fixed training iteration budget. As the number of participating clients increases, higher cost is incurred due to increased IT administrators and GPUs, but the performance consistently increases. We expect future users will refer to these empirical benchmarks to design the FL experiments in the medical domain considering their clinical tasks and obtain stronger performance with lower costs.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is an active area of research. One of the most suitable areas for adopting FL is the medical domain, where patient privacy must be respected. Previous research, however, does not provide a practical guide to applying FL in the medical domain. We propose empirical benchmarks and experimental settings for three representative medical datasets with different modalities: longitudinal electronic health records, skin cancer images, and electrocardiogram signals. The likely users of FL such as medical institutions and IT companies can take these benchmarks as guides for adopting FL and minimize their trial and error. For each dataset, each client data is from a different source to preserve real-world heterogeneity. We evaluate six FL algorithms designed for addressing data heterogeneity among clients, and a hybrid algorithm combining the strengths of two representative FL algorithms. Based on experiment results from three modalities, we discover that simple FL algorithms tend to outperform more sophisticated ones, while the hybrid algorithm consistently shows good, if not the best performance. We also find that a frequent global model update leads to better performance under a fixed training iteration budget. As the number of participating clients increases, higher cost is incurred due to increased IT administrators and GPUs, but the performance consistently increases. We expect future users will refer to these empirical benchmarks to design the FL experiments in the medical domain considering their clinical tasks and obtain stronger performance with lower costs.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是一个活跃的研究领域。最适合采用 FL 的领域之一是医疗领域，必须尊重患者的隐私。然而，之前的研究并没有为 FL 在医学领域的应用提供实用指南。我们为具有不同模式的三个代表性医疗数据集提出了经验基准和实验设置：纵向电子健康记录、皮肤癌图像和心电图信号。 FL 的潜在用户（例如医疗机构和 IT 公司）可以将这些基准作为采用 FL 的指南，并最大限度地减少试验和错误。对于每个数据集，每个客户端数据都来自不同的来源，以保持现实世界的异质性。我们评估了六种专为解决客户端之间的数据异构性而设计的 FL 算法，以及结合了两种代表性 FL 算法优点的混合算法。基于三种模式的实验结果，我们发现简单的 FL 算法往往优于更复杂的算法，而混合算法始终表现出良好的性能，即使不是最好的性能。我们还发现，在固定的训练迭代预算下，频繁的全局模型更新可以带来更好的性能。随着参与客户数量的增加，IT 管理员和 GPU 的增加会带来更高的成本，但性能却不断提高。我们预计未来的用户将参考这些经验基准来考虑其临床任务来设计医学领域的 FL 实验，并以更低的成本获得更强的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对医疗领域的联邦学习（FL）实用基准和实验设置，以指导医疗机构和IT公司采用FL技术。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏在医疗领域应用FL的实践指南，而医疗数据隐私保护需求迫切，需通过基准减少试错成本。
AI.method: 基于三种医疗数据集（电子健康记录、皮肤癌图像、心电图信号），构建异质性客户端数据环境，评估六种FL算法及一种混合算法的性能。
AI.result: 简单算法常优于复杂算法，混合算法表现最佳；频繁全局模型更新提升性能，参与客户端增加虽提高成本但性能持续提升。
AI.conclusion: 未来用户可参考本文基准设计医疗FL实验，在临床任务需求下实现更高性能与更低成本的平衡。

motivation: 现有研究缺乏在医疗领域应用FL的实践指南，而医疗数据隐私保护需求迫切，需通过基准减少试错成本。
method: 基于三种医疗数据集（电子健康记录、皮肤癌图像、心电图信号），构建异质性客户端数据环境，评估六种FL算法及一种混合算法的性能。
result: 简单算法常优于复杂算法，混合算法表现最佳；频繁全局模型更新提升性能，参与客户端增加虽提高成本但性能持续提升。
conclusion: 未来用户可参考本文基准设计医疗FL实验，在临床任务需求下实现更高性能与更低成本的平衡。
search_text: Towards the Practical Utility of Federated Learning in the Medical Domain 联邦学习在医学领域的实际应用 Federated learning (FL) is an active area of research. One of the most suitable areas for adopting FL is the medical domain, where patient privacy must be respected. Previous research, however, does not provide a practical guide to applying FL in the medical domain. We propose empirical benchmarks and experimental settings for three representative medical datasets with different modalities: longitudinal electronic health records, skin cancer images, and electrocardiogram signals. The likely users of FL such as medical institutions and IT companies can take these benchmarks as guides for adopting FL and minimize their trial and error. For each dataset, each client data is from a different source to preserve real-world heterogeneity. We evaluate six FL algorithms designed for addressing data heterogeneity among clients, and a hybrid algorithm combining the strengths of two representative FL algorithms. Based on experiment results from three modalities, we discover that simple FL algorithms tend to outperform more sophisticated ones, while the hybrid algorithm consistently shows good, if not the best performance. We also find that a frequent global model update leads to better performance under a fixed training iteration budget. As the number of participating clients increases, higher cost is incurred due to increased IT administrators and GPUs, but the performance consistently increases. We expect future users will refer to these empirical benchmarks to design the FL experiments in the medical domain considering their clinical tasks and obtain stronger performance with lower costs. 联邦学习（FL）是一个活跃的研究领域。最适合采用 FL 的领域之一是医疗领域，必须尊重患者的隐私。然而，之前的研究并没有为 FL 在医学领域的应用提供实用指南。我们为具有不同模式的三个代表性医疗数据集提出了经验基准和实验设置：纵向电子健康记录、皮肤癌图像和心电图信号。 FL 的潜在用户（例如医疗机构和 IT 公司）可以将这些基准作为采用 FL 的指南，并最大限度地减少试验和错误。对于每个数据集，每个客户端数据都来自不同的来源，以保持现实世界的异质性。我们评估了六种专为解决客户端之间的数据异构性而设计的 FL 算法，以及结合了两种代表性 FL 算法优点的混合算法。基于三种模式的实验结果，我们发现简单的 FL 算法往往优于更复杂的算法，而混合算法始终表现出良好的性能，即使不是最好的性能。我们还发现，在固定的训练迭代预算下，频繁的全局模型更新可以带来更好的性能。随着参与客户数量的增加，IT 管理员和 GPU 的增加会带来更高的成本，但性能却不断提高。我们预计未来的用户将参考这些经验基准来考虑其临床任务来设计医学领域的 FL 实验，并以更低的成本获得更强的性能。 本文提出针对医疗领域的联邦学习（FL）实用基准和实验设置，以指导医疗机构和IT公司采用FL技术。 Seongjun Yang,Hyeonji Hwang,Daeyoung Kim,Radhika Dua,Jong-Yeup Kim,Eunho Yang,Edward Choi cs.LG,cs.AI
